english_verse: God's message did not start with you people, and you are not the only ones it has reached.
translation_verse: Wula! Naawunni yɛligu daa piili yarima saani, bee? Bee, ya kɔkɔ saani ka di paai?

english_verse: If you think of yourself as a prophet or a spiritual person, you will know I am writing only what the Lord has commanded.
translation_verse: Sɔ yi yɛli, ni, u nyɛ la anabi, bee, ŋɔn mi Sii maa yɛla, di daama nin sakki, ni, man ŋɔn sɔbri seelli n‑tiri ya wa nyɛ la ti Dugma zaaligu.

english_verse: So don't pay attention to anyone who ignores what I am writing.
translation_verse: Sɔ mun yi bu wumni n‑tiri yɛligu wa, yan di wumni n‑tiri di daama gba.

english_verse: My friends, be eager to prophesy and don't stop anyone from speaking languages that others don't know.
translation_verse: Tɔ, ka dinŋɔna, m mabiisi, ya boom suŋŋa anabitiri yɛla, amaa ka di ta'ari yɛttɔ'a balibubalibu yɛla.

english_verse: But do everything properly and in order.
translation_verse: See ka bunseelikam niŋi suŋŋa ka dɔli soori deede.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to remember the message I preached and that you believed and trusted.
translation_verse: Tɔ, m mabiisi, n ya teaai ya la man ŋɔn daa mooli lahabasuŋŋu maa n‑ti ya seem. Lahabaari wa ka ya daa deaai, ka lahabaari maa zugu ka ya kpalim n‑zɛ yummu.

english_verse: You will be saved by this message, if you hold firmly to it. But if you don't, your faith was all for nothing.
translation_verse: Halli lala lahabasuŋŋu zugu ka ya nya tuliginsim, ya yi kpalim n‑dɔla wulisiseaa man daa mooli n‑ti ya la suŋŋa. Di yi pa lala, ya yɛdda bɛ la yɔri.

english_verse: I told you the most important part of the message exactly as it was told to me. This part is: Christ died for our sins, as the Scriptures say.
translation_verse: Lahabaari wa ka n daa deaai seeba saani ka laa n‑zaŋŋi n‑ti ya, ka di yɛttɔ'akpanni nŋɔa: ni, Kirisita Masiiya daa kpi ti tumbeeri zugu, hoo Litaafi maa ŋɔn daa pun wulisi seem.

english_verse: He was buried, and three days later he was raised to life, as the Scriptures say.
translation_verse: Ka di laa n‑wulisi, ni, ba daa sɔ'ai u, ni, dabsa ata daari ka u daa neaai kum ni, hoo Litaafi maa ŋɔn daa pun wulisi seem.

english_verse: After this, he appeared to more than five hundred other followers. Most of them are still alive, but some have died.
translation_verse: Di nyaaŋŋa ka u daa kyɛ ka ti mabiisi bɔbgu daa nya u, ka ba daa zoaai n‑gaari ninvugkɔbsinu. Niriba wa pam na bɛ ba nyɔvuya ni, amaa baseeba laa n‑ka ni.

english_verse: He also appeared to James, then to all of the apostles.
translation_verse: Ka u daa laa n‑kyɛ ka Gyeemsi nya u, ka u tuumudima zaa gba daa nya u.

english_verse: Finally, he appeared to me, even though I am like someone who was born at the wrong time.
translation_verse: Anŋɔ zaa nyaaŋŋa, u daa naayi kyɛ ka n gba nya u, hoo ban gbirigi n‑dɔ'ai sɔa.

english_verse: I am the least important of all the apostles. In fact, I caused so much trouble for God's church that I don't even deserve to be called an apostle.
translation_verse: Dama mani n kpalim tuumudima maa zaa nyaaŋŋa, halli m bu sum ni ba booli ma Naawunni tuumu gba, dama n daa katti Naawunni niriba n‑namsiri ba.

english_verse: But God treated me with undeserved grace! He made me what I am, and his grace wasn't wasted. I worked much harder than any of the other apostles, although it was really God's grace at work and not me.
translation_verse: Amaa Naawunni piini zugu kyɛ ka m bɛ la man bɛ seem; ka lala piini maa bu basi yɔri, dama n daa tum tuma n‑gaari ba zaa - halli di pa la mani n‑tumna, amaa Naawunni piini ŋɔn mari ma n‑tumna.

english_verse: But it doesn't matter if I preached or if they preached. All of you believed the message just the same. God's People Will Be Raised to Life
translation_verse: Tɔ, di yi nyɛ la mani bee bana, lala ka ti moonna, ka lala ka ya daa niŋi yɛdda.

english_verse: If we preach that Christ was raised from death, how can some of you say the dead will not be raised to life?
translation_verse: Tɔ: ti moonni n‑yɛtti, ni, Kirisita daa neaai kum ni; ka wula ka ya seeba yɛtti, ni, kum neaari ka ni?

english_verse: If they won't be raised to life, Christ himself wasn't raised to life.
translation_verse: Kum neaari yi ka ni, dinŋɔna Kirisita daa bu neaai.

english_verse: And if Christ wasn't raised to life, our message is worthless, and so is your faith.
translation_verse: Kirisita mun yi daa bu neaai kum ni, dinŋɔna ti moonni la lahabaari maa yɔri, ka ya yɛdda niŋbu gba nyɛ la yɔri.

english_verse: If the dead won't be raised to life, we have told lies about God by saying he raised Christ to life, when he really did not.
translation_verse: M‑paasi lala, ba nin nya ti la, ni, zirima'ariba zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi Naawunni yɛla. Dama ti yɛtti, ni, Naawunni n daa neaai Kirisita kum ni: amaa ban kpi la yi ku toaai n‑neaai kum ni, dinŋɔna u daa bu neaai u.

english_verse: So if the dead won't be raised to life, Christ wasn't raised to life.
translation_verse: Ii! - ban kpi yi ku toaai n‑neaai kum ni, dinŋɔna Kirisita gba daa bu neaai.

english_verse: Unless Christ was raised to life, your faith is useless, and you are still living in your sins.
translation_verse: Kirisita mun yi bu neaai kum ni, dinŋɔna ya yɛdda ka gbinni ka ya na kpalim m‑bɛ ya tumbeeri ni.

english_verse: And those people who died after putting their faith in him are completely lost.
translation_verse: Ka lala naa n‑kyɛ ka Kirisita niriba ban ka ni la gba baasi yɔri.

english_verse: If our hope in Christ is good only for this life, we are worse off than anyone else.
translation_verse: Di yi nyɛ la: ni, ti ka tama Kirisita ni, di yi pa la duniya wa ni kɔkɔa, dinŋɔna ti wahala gaari sɔkam zaa dinni.

english_verse: But Christ has been raised to life! And he makes us certain that others will also be raised to life.
translation_verse: Amaa yɛlimaŋni ka Kirisita daa siri neaai n‑yisigi kum ni; u pun daŋŋi ban kpi la zaa lala - hoo ban daŋŋi n‑kyɛ naara pɔi ka naayi nya puri antaam maa zaa seem la.

english_verse: Just as we will die because of Adam, we will be raised to life because of Christ.
translation_verse: Ya bu nya? - ninsaalisɔ zugu ka kum daa paai ti zaa na, ka dizugu kum ni neaari gba daa paai ti na ninsaalisɔ zugu.

english_verse: Adam brought death to all of us, and Christ will bring life to all of us.
translation_verse: Ii! - Adam zugu ka sɔkam kpiira; Kirisita mun zugu ka sɔkam nin neaai kum ni.

english_verse: But we must each wait our turn. Christ was the first to be raised to life, and his people will be raised to life when he returns.
translation_verse: Amaa sɔkam ni u saha: Kirisita daŋŋi hoo naara ŋɔn daŋŋi seem la, ka ban pa nyɛ la Kirisita niriba - ba saha nyɛ la u lappu na dabsiri daari.

english_verse: Then after Christ has destroyed all powers and forces, the end will come, and he will give the kingdom to God the Father.
translation_verse: Di nyaaŋŋa ka di nin naai: Kirisita nin sa'am yiiko dima ni fukumsi dima zaa yɛla ka kyɛ ka ba baasi yɔri pɔi, ka naayi zaŋŋi naam maa yɛla n‑niŋi u Ba Naawunni nuusi ni.

english_verse: Christ will rule until he puts all his enemies under his power,
translation_verse: Dama see ka u di naam halli nti nyaŋŋi u dindaandima zaa.

english_verse: and the last enemy he destroys will be death.
translation_verse: Ka u dindaansɔ ŋɔn ti ya kpalim nyaaŋŋa ka u sa'am u yɛla nyɛ la kum.

english_verse: When the Scriptures say he will put everything under his power, they don't include God. It was God who put everything under the power of Christ.
translation_verse: Ni, “U zaŋŋi bunseelikam n‑kyɛ ka u nyaŋŋi ka su a fukumsi.” Tɔ, ka ŋɔn Naawunni yi ti zaŋŋi ‘bunseelikam’ n‑ti u, di wulisi, ni, di pa la ŋɔn Naawunni fukumsi ka u su.

english_verse: After everything is under the power of God's Son, he will put himself under the power of God, who put everything under his Son's power. Then God will mean everything to everyone.
translation_verse: Ka Naawunni Bii maa muna - u yi ti nyaŋŋi n‑naai, u mammaŋŋa gba nin kpɛ u Ba maasim ni, sɔ ŋɔn zaŋŋi seelikam n‑ti u ni u ti nyaŋŋi; ka lala nin kyɛ ka Naawunni naayi leebi seelikam sɔkam saani.

english_verse: If the dead are not going to be raised to life, what will people do who are being baptized for them? Why are they being baptized for those dead people?
translation_verse: Tɔ: ka ba yi yɛtti, ni, kum ni neaari ka ni, ka ban suuri Naawunni koom n‑tiri ban pun kpi la ya niŋi la wula? Ban kpi maa yi bu neaari fass, wula zugu ka ba suuri koom n‑tiri ba?

english_verse: And why do we always risk our lives
translation_verse: Tirima muna - wula zugu ka ti diri wahala sahakam?

english_verse: and face death every day? The pride that I have in you because of Christ Jesus our Lord is what makes me say this.
translation_verse: N kpiiri ni beoo kam - lala n siri nyɛ di, m mabiisi - hoo man mari sufumaasim n‑duusiri m maŋŋa ya zaa yɛla zugu seem la, ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita saani la.

english_verse: What do you think I gained by fighting wild animals in Ephesus? If the dead are not raised to life, “Let's eat and drink. Tomorrow we die.”
translation_verse: Halli n daa bɛ la Ɛfɛsusi timpuuni n‑zabri ni mooni bunkɔbbeeri. Tɔ, di yi nyɛ la kulla ninsaala beesigu wa yɛla zugu kɔkɔa, n ku nya anfaani di zugu. Ban kpi yi bu neaara, ni, “Ya kyɛ ka ti diri ka nyuura, Dama beoo ti sa nin kpi.”

english_verse: Don't fool yourselves. Bad friends will destroy you.
translation_verse: Yan di kyɛ ka ba yɔmsi ya: ni, “Zɔbeoo sa'amni la halli beesisuŋŋu gba soori.”

english_verse: Be sensible and stop sinning. You should be embarrassed that some people still don't know about God. What Our Bodies Will Be Like
translation_verse: Ya maalima n‑teesi yɛlimaŋni yɛla, ka di laa n‑tumni tumbeeri. Yaseeba bɛ ni m‑bu mi Naawunni yɛla. Ya vi yɛttɔ'a ka n yɛtti wa.

english_verse: Some of you have asked, “How will the dead be raised to life? What kind of bodies will they have?”
translation_verse: Tɔ: di yi pa seem sɔ nin boosi n‑yɛli, ni, “Kpiimma neaari la wula n‑doaari na? Wula, ningbimbɔ ka ba ya zaŋŋi n‑yisigi?”

english_verse: Don't be foolish. A seed must die before it can sprout from the ground.
translation_verse: Nyin gyɛrigu wa! I yi buri bumburiseelli, ka ku toaai m‑buli na n‑niŋi di yi pa la ka daŋŋi n‑kpi.

english_verse: Wheat seeds and all other seeds look different from the sprouts that come up.
translation_verse: I yi buri, pa kan ya buli n‑yi na la ka i butta, kulla bumburli hoo kawanni, bee, kyi bumburiseaa.

english_verse: This is because God gives everything the kind of body he wants it to have.
translation_verse: Amaa Naawunni n yi tiri ka ningbinseaa ŋɔn boori maa; bumbutiri zaa ni ka u tisiri ka ningbiŋŋu.

english_verse: People, animals, birds, and fish are each made of flesh, but none of them are alike.
translation_verse: Ningbina zaa pa yummu: ninsaala ningbiŋŋu m bɛ ni, ni bunkɔbri dina ŋɔn bɛ ni, niinsi gba dina bɛ a kɔkɔa, ni zimi gba dina.

english_verse: Everything in the heavens has a body, and so does everything on earth. But each one is very different from all the others.
translation_verse: Saazugu ningbina bɛ ni, ka kyɛ duniya wa ni ningbina, ka a zaa mari a veelim, ka a nyɛ la a kookooba.

english_verse: The sun isn't like the moon, the moon isn't like the stars, and each star is different.
translation_verse: Wuntaŋŋa mari ka veelim, ka namboaa mun mari ka dinni, ni saŋmariwuusi gba mara; ka saŋmariwuseaa veelim bu ŋmanni la ka taraana dinni.

english_verse: That's how it will be when our bodies are raised to life. These bodies will die, but the bodies that are raised will live forever.
translation_verse: Tɔ: ka kum ni neaari nin nyɛ la lala. Ba zaŋŋi bunseesi an sa'amni ni la n‑sɔ'ai, ka bunseesi an nin bɛ ni sahakam la nin doaai na.

english_verse: The first man was named Adam, and the Scriptures tell us that he was a living person. But Jesus, who may be called the last Adam, is a life-giving spirit.
translation_verse: Di sɔbi n‑dooli, ni, “Daŋŋni nira la, Adam, daa leebi la ninsaala.”, sɔ ŋɔn vu la: halli ka Adam sɔ naayi kyɛ na nti leebi siiya n‑tiri sɔkam nyɔvurimaŋni.

english_verse: We see that the one with a spiritual body did not come first. He came after the one who had a physical body.
translation_verse: Amaa sii maa daana daa bu daŋŋi na: ay! - duniya dinni la n daa daŋŋi n‑kyɛ na ka sii maa daana la naayi pa.

english_verse: The first man was made from the dust of the earth, but the second man came from heaven.
translation_verse: Ba daa zaŋŋi tanni m‑maali daŋŋni ninsaala maa, amaa ŋɔn mun pa buyi la ŋɔna, u yi la arizana ni na.

english_verse: Everyone on earth has a body like the body of the one who was made from the dust of the earth. And everyone in heaven has a body like the body of the one who came from heaven.
translation_verse: Hoo tanni daana ŋɔn daa bɛ seem la, lala ka u duniya wa taaba gba bɛ ni; ka arizana niriba mun bɛ la hoo ba mun toondaana, arizana ni doo la.

english_verse: Just as we are like the one who was made out of earth, we will be like the one who came from heaven.
translation_verse: Dizugu ti pun mi tanni doo wa beesigu beebu, n‑ŋmanni hoo ŋɔna ŋɔn bɛ seem; ka lala yaasa ti nin ŋmanni hoo arizana doowa nti bɛ u gba beesigu.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to know that our bodies of flesh and blood will decay. This means they cannot share in God's kingdom, which lasts forever.
translation_verse: M mabiisi, n yɛtti ya wa, ni, duniya wa ningbina kur nyɛ la numni ni ziim, a ku toaai n‑nya Naawunni naam beebu; halli ka kan sa'amni ni la ku toaai n‑di faari kan bu naara.

english_verse: I will explain a mystery to you. Not every one of us will die, but we will all be changed.
translation_verse: Ya wumma! N yɛtti ya la yɛlisɔ'ara yɛla: pa ti zaasa n nin kpi, amaa ba nin takki ti zaa.

english_verse: It will happen suddenly, quicker than the blink of an eye. At the sound of the last trumpet the dead will be raised. We will all be changed, so we will never die again.
translation_verse: Ba nin takki ti yoomyooma, hoo nimbiri kamsigu saha. Lala saha ka ba nin kyɛ ka kikaa ti kum n‑wulisi duniya naari saha paari na. Dama ba nin peebi, ka ban kpi la zaa nin doaai ka ku laa n‑kpi; ka tirima mun nin takki.

english_verse: Our dead and decaying bodies will be changed into bodies that won't die or decay.
translation_verse: See ka kan sa'amni la ti deaai beesigu din bu naara, hoo ban deaari sutura n‑yeeri seem la. Ka kan kpiiri la nin deaai beesigu din bu kpiira n‑yɛa.

english_verse: The bodies we now have are weak and can die. But they will be changed into bodies that are eternal. Then the Scriptures will come true, “Death has lost the battle!
translation_verse: Lala saha maa ka kan sa'amna ka kpiiri la ti deaai kan bu laa n‑kpiira n‑yɛ, ka di siri nin niŋi hoo ban daa pun sɔbi n‑dooli seem la, ni#:- “Ba vɔli kum n‑nyaŋŋi.”

english_verse: Where is its victory? Where is its sting?”
translation_verse: ni#:- “Ha! Kum, i nyaŋŋsim bɛ la yani? Ha! Kum, i dumpu yiiko lee?”

english_verse: Sin is what gives death its sting, and the Law is the power behind sin.
translation_verse: Dama dumpu seaa kum ŋɔn mari n‑dumni ti la nyɛ la tumbeeri taalli; ka taalli maa yiiko bɛ la zaaligu la ni.

english_verse: But thank God for letting our Lord Jesus Christ give us the victory!
translation_verse: Dinŋɔna ti puusiri Naawunni barika! Dama ŋɔna n kyɛ ka ti nyaŋŋi, ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita Masiiya zugu.

english_verse: My dear friends, stand firm and don't be shaken. Always keep busy working for the Lord. You know that everything you do for him is worthwhile.
translation_verse: Lala zugu, m mabiwutta, see ka ya bɛ yummu deede; yan di bɛ kpa, ka bɛ kpa. Ya zaŋŋma ya mansi zaa n‑ti ti Dugma tuma maa sahakam, dama ya mi halli, ni, ya yi tumni pam n‑tiri ti Dugma, ya bu tumni la yɔri.

english_verse: When you collect money for God's people, I want you to do exactly what I told the churches in Galatia to do.
translation_verse: Tɔ: zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi toosigu n‑ti Naawunni niriba la yɛla: man daa wulisi Galɛseaa dima maa seem la, ya gba niŋma lala.

english_verse: That is, each Sunday each of you must put aside part of what you have earned. If you do this, you won't have to take up a collection when I come.
translation_verse: Di nyɛ la: ni, bakwai piiligu dabsiri daari zaa, see ka ya sɔkam yinniyinni yiisiri beela n‑zaali m‑mara, hoo Naawunni ŋɔn lɔrigi u yɛla seem maa; lala nin kyɛ ka man yi ti kyɛ na sahanseaa la, toosigu yɛla ku laa m‑bɛ ni yaasa.

english_verse: Choose some followers to take the money to Jerusalem. I will send them on with the money and with letters which show that you approve of them.
translation_verse: N yi ti paai na, n nin sɔbi gbana n‑zaŋŋi a n‑ti yan yiisi seeba la, ni ya piini la m‑paasi, ka tum ba ni ba ti zi a n‑kyaŋŋi Gyɛrusalɛm.

english_verse: If you think I should go along, they can go with me. Paul's Travel Plans
translation_verse: Di mun yi sum ni man gba kyaŋŋi, ba nin beeli ma ka ti kyaŋŋi.

english_verse: After I have gone through Macedonia, I hope to see you
translation_verse: N yi dɔli Masidoonya tingbaŋŋu n‑gaari, n nin kyɛ ya saani na. Ii, n siri ya n‑dɔli Masidoonya pɔi,

english_verse: and visit with you for a while. I may even stay all winter, so that you can help me on my way to wherever I will be going next.
translation_verse: ka di bu ya'ai ka n niŋi dabsa ayi ya saani, bee, n nin kpalim ya saani halli ni waari saha ti naai. Lala ka ya nin nyaŋŋi n‑zaali ma soori ni, ni n ti kyaŋŋi n kyɛnni maa, di yi nyɛ Gyɛrusalɛm bee seela zaa.

english_verse: If the Lord lets me, I would rather come later for a longer visit than to stop off now for only a short visit.
translation_verse: Dama m bu boori ni n nyɛ ya ka n nɔba n zɛ saazugu ka gaari yooma; m boori ni Naawunni yi sakki, ni, n niŋi la dabsa ayi ya saani.

english_verse: I will stay in Ephesus until Pentecost,
translation_verse: Amaa n nin kpalim m‑bɛ Ɛfɛsusi halli ni DaPisinu Daari Pɛntikoosi Kyuu la saha.

english_verse: because there is a wonderful opportunity for me to do some work here. But there are also many people who are against me.
translation_verse: Dama ba lɔrigi soori n‑ti ma ni n tum tunsuma pam, amaa ka niriba pam ta'ari ma di ni.

english_verse: When Timothy arrives, give him a friendly welcome. He is doing the Lord's work, just as I am.
translation_verse: Timɔti yi ti paai ya na, yan kyɛ ka u bɛ ya saani ka dabeem ka u, dama u tumni la ti Dugma tuma maa hoo man gba ŋɔn tumni seem la.

english_verse: Don't let anyone mistreat him. I am looking for him to return to me together with the other followers. So when he leaves, send him off with your blessings.
translation_verse: Ya sɔ di zeem u. Ya zaalima u soori zugu ni sufu maasim, ka u ti labi n saani na. Dama n guri la u kyɛnni na, ŋɔn ni ti mabiisi zaa.

english_verse: I have tried hard to get our friend Apollos to visit you with the other followers. He doesn't want to come just now, but he will come when he can. Personal Concerns and Greetings
translation_verse: Ti mabii Apɔloosi ŋɔna - n daa susi u nimbirimoaa, ni, u kpaŋŋma u maŋŋa n‑dɔli ti mabiisi wa n‑kyɛ ya saani na; amaa u daa bu boori ni u kyɛ na pampaŋŋɔ, halli fiiŋ: ni, u yi ti nya sahasuŋŋu, u nin kyɛ na.

english_verse: Keep alert. Be firm in your faith. Stay brave and strong.
translation_verse: Tɔ: ka dinŋɔna ya baŋŋma suŋŋa! Ka zɛ deede ya yɛdda ni, m‑mari sufukpeemni ka kpamsiri ya mansi.

english_verse: Show love in everything you do.
translation_verse: See ka ya niŋi bunseelli kam wurilim zugu.

english_verse: You know that Stephanas and his family were the first in Achaia to have faith in the Lord. They have done all they can for God's people. My friends, I ask you
translation_verse: Ma mabiisi, ya pun mi Sitɛfanasi yɛla: ni, ŋɔn ni u yiri dima maa daa niŋi Yisa yɛdda n‑daŋŋi Akaaya dima zaa; ka ba zikki zaa bɛ la yɛdda dima la suŋŋsim ni. Dizugu ya kpaŋŋma ya mansi, m mabiisi,

english_verse: to obey leaders like them and to do the same for all others who work hard with you.
translation_verse: ni ya wumni n‑tiri lala niriba, ni ba nimmoosi tuntuntaaba zaa.

english_verse: I was glad to see Stephanas and Fortunatus and Achaicus. Having them here was like having you.
translation_verse: Sitɛfanasi ŋɔn daa paai ma na, ŋɔn ni Fɔtunaatusi ni Akaayakusi, n sufu daa maai, dama ba nin zɛ ya zaazii maa ni, yan ka n saani maa zugu.

english_verse: They made me feel much better, just as they made you feel better. You should appreciate people like them.
translation_verse: Dama ba daa labsi n sii na, ni ya gba siisi m‑paasi. Yan di tam lala niriba yɛla.

english_verse: Greetings from the churches in Asia. Aquila and Priscilla, together with the church that meets in their house, send greetings in the name of the Lord.
translation_verse: Ti kpa wa mabiisi m puusiri ya ni - Naawunni niriba ban la'amni m‑bɛ ni Ɛseaa tingbaŋŋu tinsi ni zaa. Akwila gba puusiri ya na, ni u pɔ'a Prisila, ni ban la'amni ba yiri maa ni n‑gyeemni Naawunni la.

english_verse: All the Lord's followers send their greetings. Give each other a warm greeting.
translation_verse: Halli ti mabiisi zaa puusira. Ya puusima taaba suŋŋasuŋŋa ti wurilim puusigu ni.

english_verse: I pray that God will put a curse on everyone who doesn't love the Lord. And may the Lord come soon.
translation_verse: Sɔ yi bu wuri ti Dugma, mbusu bɛ di daama zugu. Marana ta!, ni, Kyɛm na, ti Dugma!

english_verse: I pray the Lord Jesus will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Ti Dugma Yisa piinisuma bɛ ya saani.

english_verse: I love everyone who belongs to Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: N wurilim bɛ ya saani, Kirisita Yisa Masiiya saani.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Jesus Christ, and from Timothy, who is also a follower. To God's church in Corinth and to all of God's people in Achaia.
translation_verse: Man Pɔla n‑sɔbri gbaŋŋu wa - man ŋɔn nyɛ Yisa Kirisita Masiiya tuumu, Naawunni yuubu zugu - man ni ti mabii Timɔti: ti sɔbri n‑tiri ya, yan bɛ Kɔrinti tiŋŋa n‑la'amni n‑gyeemni ti Dugma la, ni Naawunni niriba zaa ban bɛ Akaaya tingbaŋŋu ni.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Paul Gives Thanks
translation_verse: Ti Ba Naawunni, ni ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita, zaŋŋma u piinisuma ni alaafɛ zaa n‑ti ya.

english_verse: Praise God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ! The Father is a merciful God, who always gives us comfort.
translation_verse: Kyɛ ka ti pɛ'ai Naawunni, ŋɔn nyɛ ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita Ba la, ti Ba Nambɔzoaa Daana, ka ŋɔn Naawunni n su sufumaasim n‑kpamsiri sɔkam.

english_verse: He comforts us when we are in trouble, so that we can share this same comfort with others in trouble.
translation_verse: Ŋɔna n siri kpamsiri ti sufu ti yɛlibeeri zaa puuni, ka lala nin kyɛ ka ti gba nin toaai n‑kpamsi ban mari yɛlimugsa zaa sufu, hoo tin gba ŋɔn daa deaai sufumaasim Naawunni saani seem la.

english_verse: We share in the terrible sufferings of Christ, but also in the wonderful comfort he gives.
translation_verse: Hoo tin kur la'am n‑diri Kirisita wahala wa, lala ka ti nin la'am n‑diri u sufumaasim kpamsigu gba, halli nti yakki.

english_verse: We suffer in the hope that you will be comforted and saved. And because we are comforted, you will also be comforted, as you patiently endure suffering like ours.
translation_verse: Ti yi nya toom, di nyɛ la ya sufumaasim ni ya fa-m‑basi zugu; ti mun yi ti nya ti sufu kpamsigu, di bɛ la lala ka di nin kyɛ ka ya gba sufu kpamsi, halli ka ya nin bamsi sugru di zugu n‑zɛ yummu, sahanseaa yan nya namsi hoo ti dina wa la.

english_verse: You never disappoint us. You suffered as much as we did, and we know that you will be comforted as we were.
translation_verse: Dizugu ti mari tama ya zugu ka ka birisigu, dama ti mi halli, ni, yan la'am n‑diri ti wahala wa seem la, lala ka ya nin la'am n‑nya ti sufumaasim gba.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to know what a hard time we had in Asia. Our sufferings were so horrible and so unbearable that death seemed certain.
translation_verse: Dama ti bu boori ni ya kpalim n‑zi ti yɛla, ti mabiisi, tin ŋɔn daa di wahala Ɛseaa tingbaŋŋu wa ni seem: ti siri daa namsi ni halli nti yakki, ka ti daa kɔŋŋi tama zaa zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ti beebu gba.

english_verse: In fact, we felt sure we were going to die. But this made us stop trusting in ourselves and start trusting God, who raises the dead to life.
translation_verse: Ti daa teesiya, ni, kum kɔkɔ n kpalim ti. Amaa dinŋɔ daa niŋi ti, ni di ti wulisi ti, ni, ti di niŋni ti mammansi yɛdda, amaa Naawunni ŋɔn toaai n‑neaari ban kpi la.

english_verse: God saved us from the threat of death, and we are sure that he will do it again and again.
translation_verse: U daa fa ti m‑basi yɛlibeeri anŋɔ taabu ni, ka u nin laa n‑fa ti m‑basi yaasa. Halli ti niŋi tama, ni, u nin laa n‑yiisi ti yɛlibeeri ni,

english_verse: Please help us by praying for us. Then many people will give thanks for the blessings we receive in answer to all these prayers. Paul's Change of Plans
translation_verse: yan ŋɔn suŋŋni ti ya wunsusigu zugu la. Lala nin kyɛ ka niriba pam ti puusi Naawunni tirima zugu, dama ba nin nya Naawunni ŋɔn wum niriba pam wunsusigu seem la ka suŋŋi ti di zugu.

english_verse: We can be proud of our clear conscience. We have always lived honestly and sincerely, especially when we were with you. And we were guided by God's gift of undeserved grace instead of by the wisdom of this world.
translation_verse: Tɔ: ka dinŋɔna tin nyuuri bara yɛttɔ'aseaa zugu la nyɛ la: ni, ti sufu ni bamsim wulisiri ti, ni, ti bɛ la beesisuŋŋu duniya wa ni. Ni, di pa la duniya wa yamgɔliŋŋu soori ka ti dɔla, amaa sɔsuŋŋu ka ti dɔli n‑tiri Naawunni kasikasi. Naawunni ŋɔn daa suŋŋi ti seem la, lala ka ti bɛ ni, halli yarima saani ka ti beesigu siri daa pun bɛ lala.

english_verse: I am not writing anything you cannot read and understand. I hope you will understand it completely,
translation_verse: Ti bu sɔbri bunseelli yan ku toaai n‑karim ka baŋŋi di gbinni. Ka m mari tama, ni, ya nin baŋŋi di zaa halli ni di tɔriga,

english_verse: just as you already partly understand us. Then when our Lord Jesus returns, you can be as proud of us as we are of you.
translation_verse: dama ya pun baŋŋi ti yɛliseesi gbinni. Ka lala nin kyɛ ka ya nin toaai n‑nyu bara tirima zugu, hoo tin ya n‑nyu bara yarima zugu seem wa, ti Dugma Yisa dabsiri daari maa.

english_verse: I was so sure of your pride in us that I had planned to visit you first of all. In this way you would have the blessing of two visits from me—
translation_verse: N daa pun niŋi yɛdda, ni, di bɛ la lala: ka dizugu n daa gbaai gbaari, ni, n ya n‑daŋŋi n‑kyɛ ya saani na pɔi, ka lala ti kyɛ ka ya nya sufumaasim buyi.

english_verse: once on my way to Macedonia and again on my return from there. Then you could send me on to Judea.
translation_verse: N daa yɛli, ni, n ya n‑dɔli ya saani na n‑gaari n‑kyaŋŋi Masidoonya tingbaŋŋu ni, ka laa n‑yi bɛni n‑labi ya saani na yaasa, ka ya zaali ma soori ka n kyaŋŋi Gyuudiiya.

english_verse: Do you think I couldn't make up my mind about what to do? Or do I seem like someone who says “Yes” or “No” simply to please others?
translation_verse: Tɔ; man ŋɔn daa yɛtti lala maa, n daa birisiri n‑yɔmsira, bee? Bee, n daa gbaai n yɛla hoo duniya wa nira, n‑yɛli ‘Ii!’ ka labi n‑yɛli, ‘Ay!’

english_verse: God can be trusted, and so can I, when I say our answer to you has always been “Yes” and never “No.”
translation_verse: Ay! - Naawunni ŋɔn nyɛ yɛdda daana zugu ka ti na zi n‑yɛli ya, ‘Ii!’ ka labi n‑yɛli, ‘Ayi!’

english_verse: This is because Jesus Christ the Son of God is always “Yes” and never “No.” And he is the one Silas, Timothy, and I told you about.
translation_verse: Dama Naawunni Bii Yisa Kirisita yɛla ka ti daa mooli n‑ti ya - man ni Sailivanisi ni Timɔti - ka ŋɔn mun Yisa pa la ‘Ii!’ ni ‘Ay!’ daana, amaa ka u seelikam kur sakki, ni, ‘Ii!’

english_verse: Christ says “Yes” to all God's promises. This is why we have Christ to say “Amen” for us to the glory of God.
translation_verse: Dama nangbambasiseesi Naawunni ŋɔn daa basi la zaa ka ŋɔn Yisa sakki, ni, ‘Ii!’ n‑zaali a ni. Dizugu ŋɔn Yisa zugu ka ti niŋi ‘Ammi!’ la, n‑tiri Naawunni gyirima.

english_verse: And so God makes it possible for you and us to stand firmly together with Christ. God is also the one who chose us
translation_verse: Tɔ: ka Naawunni n zaŋŋi tirima ni yarima gba n‑zaali deede n‑ti Kirisita; ŋɔna n daa diisi ti naam gba,

english_verse: and put his Spirit in our hearts to show that we belong only to him.
translation_verse: ka laa n‑zaŋŋi u daalimni m‑pa ti; ka kyɛ ka u Sii la bɛ ti sufu ni, ni di ti wulisi, ni, di zaaniya ka di siri ya kyɛ na.

english_verse: We are not bosses who tell you what to believe. We are working with you to make you glad, because your faith is strong.
translation_verse: Pa la ti su la ya yɛdda yɛla m‑mugsira, amaa tin ni yarima la'amni n‑suŋŋni la taaba ya sufumaasim zugu; dama yɛdda zugu ka ya zɛ deede maa.

english_verse: I have decided not to make my next visit with you so painful.
translation_verse: Dinzugu n daa teesi n‑gbaai n sufu ni, ni, n bu ya kyɛ ya saani na n‑laa n‑nya sufusa'aŋŋu yaasa.

english_verse: If I make you feel bad, who would be left to cheer me up, except the people I had made to feel bad?
translation_verse: Dama man yi ti sa'am ya sufu, ŋɔni m bɛ ni n‑ya kyɛ ka man mun sufu maai? - ka di pa la man sa'am seeba sufu maa, di nyɛ la yarima.

english_verse: The reason I want to be happy is to make you happy. I wrote as I did because I didn't want to visit you and be made to feel bad, when you should make me feel happy.
translation_verse: N daa sɔbi lala maa, ni n ti kyɛ ka man yi kyɛ ya saani na maa, ya ku sa'am n sufu maa; dama yarima n nyɛ ban sum ni ya kyɛ ka n sufu maai. Ay! - n siri daa mari yɛdda, ni, ya zaa nin la'am n‑nya n sufumaasim maa.

english_verse: At the time I wrote, I was suffering terribly. My eyes were full of tears, and my heart was broken. But I didn't want to make you feel bad. I only wanted to let you know how much I cared for you. Forgiveness
translation_verse: Dama sufusa'aŋŋu ni beerim ni nintam zugu n daa kyɛ ka n sɔbi n‑ti ya maa. Ka di pa la ni n kyɛ ka ya sufu ti sa'am, amaa ni ya ti baŋŋi man wuri ya pam seem.

english_verse: I don't want to be hard on you. But if one of you has made someone feel bad, I am not really the one who has been made to feel bad. Some of you are the ones.
translation_verse: Ninvugsɔ ŋɔn daa taasi sufusa'aŋŋu na maa, pa man sufu ka u daa sa'am amaa ya zaa sufu - bee, n tɔ'asiri lala n‑yakkri sɔsuŋŋu?

english_verse: Most of you have already pointed out the wrong that person did, and this is punishment enough for what was done.
translation_verse: Ya daadam bɔbgu ŋɔn pun darigi u tubri seem la - tɔ di sakkiya!

english_verse: When people sin, you should forgive and comfort them, so they won't give up in despair.
translation_verse: Dinzugu ya kyɛri u taalli m‑pɛŋŋi u, ka suŋŋi u ka u ti nya sufumaasim: di yi pa lala, di pa seem sufusa'aŋŋu nin nyaŋŋi u.

english_verse: You should make them sure of your love for them.
translation_verse: Di zugu n kpamsiri ya ni, ni, ya kur kyɛ ka u baŋŋi, ni, ya wuri u ni.

english_verse: I also wrote because I wanted to test you and find out if you would follow my instructions.
translation_verse: Halli din daa kyɛ ka n daa sɔbi n‑ti ya daa nyɛ la: ni, n ti zamsi ya yɛdda yɛla, m‑baŋŋi ya nin deaai n noori seelikam puuni deede, bee, ya bu ya deaai?

english_verse: I will forgive anyone you forgive. Yes, for your sake and with Christ as my witness, I have forgiven whatever needed to be forgiven.
translation_verse: Ya yi pun kyɛ sɔ taalli m‑pɛŋŋi u, man gba kyɛ di daama taalli m‑pɛŋŋi u: man mun daa kyɛ taaliseaa m‑pɛŋŋi u la - taalli yi siri daa bɛ ni - n daa kyɛ m‑pɛŋŋi yarima zugu, Kirisita Masiiya tooni.

english_verse: I have done this to keep Satan from getting the better of us. We all know what goes on in his mind.
translation_verse: Ka di nin kyɛ ka Sintaani ku nyaŋŋi ti. Dama ti pa la seeba ban zi u teesibeeri yɛla an nyɛ seem la.

english_verse: When I went to Troas to preach the good news about Christ, I found that the Lord had already prepared the way.
translation_verse: Tɔ, man ŋɔn daa kyaŋŋi Tirɔ'asi tiŋŋa, ni n ti mooli Kirisita lahabasuŋŋu yɛla maa, n daa nya ka ti Dugma pun yoaai soori n‑ti ma.

english_verse: But I was worried when I didn't find my friend Titus there. So I left the other followers and went on to Macedonia.
translation_verse: Amaa n daa na kpalim n‑ka sufudoaa dama n daa bu nya m mabii Taituusi la bɛni. Lala zugu ka n daa kyeoosi ba ka gaari n‑kyaŋŋi Masidoonya.

english_verse: I am grateful that God always makes it possible for Christ to lead us to victory. God also helps us spread the knowledge about Christ everywhere, and this knowledge is like the smell of perfume.
translation_verse: Amaa ti puusiri Naawunni dama u suŋŋni ti sahakam. Ka Kirisita ŋɔn nyaŋŋi zaa ka kyɛnni u gyirima gyingaari ni kyɛnni sahanseaa la, ŋɔn Naawunni n kyɛ ka ti dɔli la Kirisita nyaaŋŋa. Halli u kyɛ ka tirima zugu ka ba baŋŋi u bamsim maa seela zaa, hoo nyunya'asiri ŋɔn kpeeri yiri ya'akam zaa puuni la ka niriba zaa wumna.

english_verse: A lot of people try to get rich from preaching God's message. But we are God's sincere messengers, and by the power of Christ we speak our message with God as our witness.
translation_verse: Tirim bu ŋmanni daa biisi, ti bu zaŋŋi Naawunni yɛligu n‑diri daa n‑koosiri m‑boori ligri di zugu. Ay - ti tɔ'asiri yɛdda ni yɛlimaŋni yɛla: ti tɔ'asiri hoo Naawunni ŋɔn tum seeba la, ka di nyɛ la ŋɔn Naawunni ni Kirisita tooni ka ti tɔ'asira.

english_verse: Are we once again bragging about ourselves? Do we need letters to you or from you to tell others about us? Some people do need letters telling about them.
translation_verse: Ammi, dinŋɔ wulisi la, ni, ti maali n‑tibgri ti mansi, bee? Ti nyɛ la seeba ban boori ni ba sɔbi gbana n‑kyɛ ka ya baŋŋi ti, fa? Bee, ya sɔbri lala gbana n‑ti ti gba? - hoo seeba ŋɔn boori a seem la.

english_verse: But you are our letter, and you are in our hearts for everyone to read and understand.
translation_verse: Ay! Ti gbana maa n siri nyɛ yarima: ban sɔbi gbanseesi n‑niŋi ti sufu ni n nyɛ ya. Sɔkam nin toaai n‑karim ti lala gbana maa m‑baŋŋi a gbinni ŋɔn nyɛ seem.

english_verse: You are like a letter written by Christ and delivered by us. But you are not written with pen and ink or on tablets made of stone. You are written in our hearts by the Spirit of the living God.
translation_verse: Di kasigi n‑wulisi, ni, Yisa Kirisita mammaŋŋa n sɔbi lala gbaŋŋu maa, di nyɛ la yarima; ka tirima muna - ba tum ti ni ti mari ka na. Ba bu zaŋŋi inki n‑sɔbi ka, amaa Naawunni Nyɔvuri Daana Sii Kasi la ka ba zaŋŋi n‑sɔbra. Halli ba bu boaai n‑sɔbi ka kuglama ni, hoo Musa zaaligu ŋɔn daa sɔbi seem la, amaa ninsaalidima sufu ni.

english_verse: We are sure about all this. Christ makes us sure in the very presence of God.
translation_verse: Ti yɛtti dinŋɔ, dama ti niŋi yɛdda ka bu birisiri Naawunni tooni, ka di bɛ la Kirisita zugu.

english_verse: We don't have the right to claim that we have done anything on our own. God gives us what it takes to do all we do.
translation_verse: Seelli ka ti ni din nin wulisi, ni, tirim mammaŋŋa nin toaai n‑tumni tuma maa. Din kyɛ ka ti nin toaai n‑tumni a maa yi la Naawunni saani na.

english_verse: He makes us worthy to be the servants of his new agreement that comes from the Holy Spirit and not from a written Law. After all, the Law brings death, but the Spirit brings life.
translation_verse: Ŋɔn Naawunni n kyɛ ka ti sa'ai ni ti tum u nangbanyinni zaaligu sɔpaalli tuma wa. Ka ka pa la sɔseaa kan dɔli sɔppu la, amaa Sii maa soori n nyɛ ka. Sɔppu zaaligu soori mari la kum, amaa Sii maa soori tisiri la nyɔvuri.

english_verse: The Law of Moses brought only the promise of death, even though it was carved on stones and given in a wonderful way. Still the Law made Moses' face shine so brightly the people of Israel could not look at it, even though it was a fading glory.
translation_verse: Tɔ; amaa zaalikurigu la muna - ba daa boaai ka n‑sɔbi n‑niŋi kuga ni, ka ka daa mari kum na; amaa ka tuma soori daa mari gyirima pam. Halli di daa kyɛ ka Musa nindaa la daa nya'ari nyain, ka Izraɛli dima daa bu nyaŋŋi n‑gɔsira. U nindaa neesim daa baligri ni; amaa di zaa yɔri, gyirima n‑daa siri la.

english_verse: So won't the agreement the Spirit brings to us be even more wonderful?
translation_verse: Ka di yi bɛ lala, gyirima pam nin ti dɔli Sii maa zaaligu soori tuma, halli nti yakki: bee, m ma'ai ni?

english_verse: In fact, the new agreement is so wonderful that the Law is no longer glorious at all.
translation_verse: Sɔkurigu gyirima bu laa n‑ŋmani la gyirimamaŋni, dama sɔpaalli gyirima gaari ka halli nti yakki.

english_verse: The Law was given with a glory that faded away. But the glory of the new agreement is much greater, because it will never fade away.
translation_verse: Daŋŋni soori neesim daa baligri m‑basira, halli ka di daa piili ni gyirima; dizugu sɔseaa kan kpalim m‑bɛ gyirima ni ka bu naari la mari la gyirima n‑gaari ka.

english_verse: This wonderful hope makes us feel like speaking freely.
translation_verse: Lala zugu tin mari tama kanŋɔ maa zugu, ti gbaari ti mansi n‑tumna, ka vi ka ni.

english_verse: We are not like Moses. His face was shining, but he covered it to keep the people of Israel from seeing the brightness fade away.
translation_verse: Tirima bu ŋmani la hoo Musa, dama ŋɔna n daa zaŋŋi saariga n‑ligi u nindaa, ni Izraɛli niriba di ti nya gyirima neesim la ŋɔn daa baligri n‑naari seem maa.

english_verse: The people were stubborn, and something still keeps them from seeing the truth when the Law is read. Only Christ can take away the covering that keeps them from seeing.
translation_verse: Amaa di zaa yɔri, Izraɛli dima maa yɛm na kpalim n‑ligi ni; ba yi kur karimni gbankurigu la, saariga maa na kpalim m‑pili la ba yɛm. Ka bu piligi m‑basi, dama Yisa kɔkɔ n nyɛ ka piligra.

english_verse: When the Law of Moses is read, they have their minds covered over
translation_verse: Halli ni zuna, ba yi ti karimni Musa zaaligu gbaŋŋu la, saariga maa na kpalim m‑pili la ba yɛm.

english_verse: The Lord and the Spirit are one and the same, and the Lord's Spirit sets us free.
translation_verse: Tɔ: ti Dugma n nyɛ Sii maa, ka ti Dugma Sii yi bɛ seelli zaa, bɛni ka sumaŋŋa nin bɛ ni.

english_verse: God has been kind enough to trust us with this work. This is why we never give up.
translation_verse: Ka di nyɛ la Naawunni namboo zugu ka ti tumni wa, ti ku toaai n‑kyɛ tama.

english_verse: We don't do shameful things that must be kept secret. And we don't try to fool anyone or twist God's message around. God is our witness that we speak only the truth, so others will be sure we can be trusted.
translation_verse: Ay! - di pa lala. Ti za'asi yɛlisɔ'ara seesi m mari vi la, ka bu goori n‑yɔmsira, ti mun bu sa'amni Naawunni yɛligu la. Amaa tin yɛtti yɛlimaŋni maa paalu ni maa zugu kyɛ ka sɔkam baŋŋi ti yɛla suŋŋa u sufu teesa ni, zaŋŋi n‑kpa Naawunni saani.

english_verse: If there is anything hidden about our message, it is hidden only to someone who is lost.
translation_verse: Halli ni ti lahabasuŋŋu maa ŋɔn ligi la saariga seeba saani maa zaa yɔri, ban baasiri yɔri la saani ka ka ligi.

english_verse: The god who rules this world has blinded the minds of unbelievers. They cannot see the light, which is the good news about our glorious Christ, who shows what God is like.
translation_verse: Dama Sintaani n kyɛ ka duniya wa dima nya u n‑gyeemni u, ni, ba Naawunni. U siri kyɛ ka ban ka yɛdda la sufu zoomna, ka bu nyari neesimaŋni: lala neesim maa mun yi la lahabasuŋŋu mooligu ni na - lahabaari zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi Kirisita gyirima, ka ŋɔn Kirisita mun ŋmani la Naawunni deede.

english_verse: We are not preaching about ourselves. Our message is that Jesus Christ is Lord. He also sent us to be your servants.
translation_verse: Pa ti mammansi yɛla ka ti moonna, amaa Yisa Kirisita Masiiya yɛla, ni, u nyɛ la ti Dugma: ka laa m‑moonni, ni, tirima n nyɛ ban gyeemni ya zaa, ŋɔn Yisa zugu.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “God commanded light to shine in the dark.” Now God is shining in our hearts to let you know that his glory is seen in Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Naawunni daa yɛli, ni, “Kyɛ ka neesim neaai zibsim ni!”: tɔ, ŋɔn Naawunni kyɛ ka u neesim neaai ti sufu ni gba, ni di ti ti ti bamsim zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi Naawunni gyirima din bɛ Yisa Kirisita nindaa ni la.

english_verse: We often suffer, but we are never crushed. Even when we don't know what to do, we never give up.
translation_verse: Di mugsi ti ya'ari kam, amaa ti bu ŋmirigi. Ti burimna, amaa ka bu basi tama.

english_verse: In times of trouble, God is with us, and when we are knocked down, we get up again.
translation_verse: Ba niŋni ti putoo, amaa ti bu basi yɔri; ba ŋmɛ ti n‑lusi, amaa ti bu sa'am zaa.

english_verse: We face death every day because of Jesus. Our bodies show what his death was like, so his life can also be seen in us.
translation_verse: Ii - tirima ban nɛ wa, ba kur zaŋŋni ti n‑niŋni kum ziiya, Yisa yɛla zugu; dama lala nin kyɛ ka ŋɔn Yisa nyɔvuri beesigu ti yi paalu, halli ti ningbina an kpiiri la puuni gba.

english_verse: This means that death is working in us, but life is working in you.
translation_verse: Tɔ, ka dizugu kum tumni ti puuni, amaa yarima muna - nyɔvuri tumni ya puuni.

english_verse: In the Scriptures it says, “I spoke because I had faith.” We have this same kind of faith. So we speak
translation_verse: Di sɔbi n‑dooli, ni, “N daa niŋi yɛdda; dizugu ka n daa tɔ'asi.” Tɔ, ka tirima gba niŋi yɛdda, ka lala zugu ka ti tɔ'asira.

english_verse: because we know that God raised the Lord Jesus to life. And just as God raised Jesus, he will also raise us to life. Then he will bring us into his presence together with you.
translation_verse: Dama ti mi halli, ni, Naawunni daa neaai ti Dugma Yisa kum ni. Ka laa m‑mi, ni, ŋɔna n nyɛ sɔ ŋɔn nin kyɛ ka ti gba neaai, tin ni Yisa ŋɔn la'am m‑bɛ ni maa, ka nin taasi tin ni yarima zaa m‑paai u saani na.

english_verse: All of this has been done for you, so more and more people will know how kind God is and will praise and honor him. Faith in the Lord
translation_verse: Anŋɔ zaa nyɛ la yarima anfaani zugu; di gbinni nyɛ la: ni, niriba pam ŋɔn deaari Naawunni piinisuma an zoaai nti yakki la, ba nin puusi Naawunni pampam di zugu, ka Naawunni gyirima ti paasira.

english_verse: We never give up. Our bodies are gradually dying, but we ourselves are being made stronger each day.
translation_verse: Ka dinŋɔna ti ku basi tama. Halli ni ti ningbina dɔŋŋni maa zaa yɔri, ti mun sufu ni ti maanni n‑leebri bumpaala beoo kam.

english_verse: These little troubles are getting us ready for an eternal glory that will make all our troubles seem like nothing.
translation_verse: Yɛlimugsa mari ti, amaa a bu tibsa ka a mun ku yuui. Ka anŋɔ zaa nin kyɛ ka ti nya tibsim ni gyirima an gaari zaa ka laa n‑ka naari.

english_verse: Things that are seen don't last forever, but things that are not seen are eternal. This is why we keep our minds on the things that cannot be seen.
translation_verse: Ti siri bu zaŋŋi ti nini n‑kpa la bunseesi an nyari la, amaa an bu nyari maa ka ti gɔsira. Dama bunseesi an nyari ni nini bu ya n‑yuui, amaa an bu nyari muna - anŋɔ nin ti kpalim m‑bɛ ni sahakam.

english_verse: Our bodies are like tents that we live in here on earth. But when these tents are destroyed, we know that God will give each of us a place to live. These homes will not be buildings someone has made, but they are in heaven and will last forever.
translation_verse: Tɔ: ka ti baŋŋi ti duniya wa ningbina yɛla: ni, a ŋmani la hoo suga, bee, tanti leensi; ni, a yi ti wurim m‑basi, sɔkam mari u dusuŋŋu, Naawunni ŋɔn mɛ seaa n‑ti ti, pa ninsaala; ka lala duu maa zɛ la arizana ni, ka ka nin ti yuui halli saha kan ka naari.

english_verse: While we are here on earth, we sigh because we want to live in that heavenly home.
translation_verse: Tin ŋɔn kpalim m‑bɛ kpa wa, ti na nyuusiri ni, dama ti sufu kur boori la ti paai dupaala wa n‑kpɛ a ni, bee, ti nya suturipaala Naawunni saani n‑yɛ a.

english_verse: We want to put it on like clothes and not be naked.
translation_verse: Ya bu nya? - ti yi nya sutura n‑yɛa, dinŋɔ wulisiri, ni, ti ku laa n‑kyɛnni yɔri.

english_verse: These tents we now live in are like a heavy burden, and we groan. But we don't do this just because we want to leave these bodies that will die. It is because we want to change them for bodies that will never die.
translation_verse: Tin mun na kpalim n‑gbeeri kpa wa sugri la ni, ti kur nyuusiri ni ka fabinna; di pa la tin boori la ni ti kyɛnni yɔri, amaa tin boori ni ti yɛ suturiveela, bee, n‑kpɛ ti duseesi an zɛ arizana ni la. Di saha ka ti bunseesi an kpiiri la nin ti basi zaa, ka nyɔvuri nin nyaŋŋi a zaa.

english_verse: God is the one who makes all this possible. He has given us his Spirit to make us certain he will do it.
translation_verse: Halli lala zugu ka Naawunni daa naam ti m‑maali ti siri; ka u wulisi ti lala, dama u pun daŋŋi n‑zaŋŋi u Siiya n‑ti ti.

english_verse: So always be cheerful! As long as we are in these bodies, we are away from the Lord.
translation_verse: Tɔ: ka dinŋɔna ti kpamsiri ti sufu, dama ti mi halli, ni, ti yi na kpalim m‑bɛ ningbina wa puuni, di wulisi, ni, ti na ka Naawunni saani.

english_verse: But we live by faith, not by what we see.
translation_verse: Pampaŋŋɔ saha ti mari yɛdda n‑kyɛnna: pa ti nini ka ti mari n‑nyari deede.

english_verse: We should be cheerful, because we would rather leave these bodies and be at home with the Lord.
translation_verse: Ii, ti siri kpamsiri ti sufu: tin ŋɔn mun boori ni ti yi ningbina wa ni, ni ti ti bɛ Naawunni saani.

english_verse: But whether we are at home with the Lord or away from him, we still try our best to please him.
translation_verse: Ka dinzugu ti kpaŋŋi ti mansi n‑tumni din kyɛ ka ŋɔn Naawunni nini tigra, halli tin bɛ duniya wa ningbina puuni maa, bee, ti ka a ni.

english_verse: We know what it means to respect the Lord, and we encourage everyone to turn to him. God himself knows what we are like, and I hope you also know what kind of people we are.
translation_verse: Ka dinŋɔna ti mi Naawunni yɛla ŋɔn mari dabeem seem: lala zugu ka ti kpaŋŋni ti maŋŋa ni ti moonni Naawunni lahabaari n‑kyɛ ka niriba ti sakki. Ti beebu bu sɔ'ai Naawunni saani, ka ti laa m‑mari tama, ni, di bu sɔ'ai ya gba sufu teesa saani.

english_verse: We are not trying once more to brag about ourselves. But we want you to be proud of us, when you are with those who are not sincere and brag about what others think of them.
translation_verse: Di pa la ti maali m‑boori ti tibgi ti maŋŋa ya saani yaasa; ay! - ti ya n‑ti ya la soori ni ya ti nyuuri bara ti yɛla zugu. Ka dinŋɔna, ninvugseeba yi ya nyu bara zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi bunseesi an nyari wa yɛla, ka pa sufu ni yɛlimaŋni yɛla, ni ba ti zeem ya - tɔ! yan mun nin nyaŋŋi n‑labsi ba labsisuŋŋu.

english_verse: If we seem out of our minds, it is between God and us. But if we are in our right minds, it is for your good.
translation_verse: Ni, yinyaari mari ti - tɔ, di yi bɛ la lala, di nyɛ la Naawunni zugu ka ti kɔŋŋi yɛm. Tin mun yi nyɛ ninvugmaŋa, di nyɛ la yarima zugu ka ti mari ninneesim.

english_verse: We are ruled by Christ's love for us. We are certain that if one person died for everyone else, then all of us have died.
translation_verse: Yisa Kirisita Masiiya wurilim bɛ ni m‑mugsiri ti: ti ku toaai n‑yɛli seela, na'ala, ninvugyinni ŋɔn daa kpi n‑ti sɔkam la zugu, lala wulisi, ni, sɔkam mun kpiya.

english_verse: And Christ did die for all of us. He died so we would no longer live for ourselves, but for the one who died and was raised to life for us.
translation_verse: Ka ŋɔn daa kpi maa gbinni nyɛ la: ni, ban kpalim m‑bɛ ni la, pa ba mammaŋŋa zugu ka ba bɛ ni, amaa ŋɔn Kirisita zugu ka ba bɛ ni, dama u daa kpi n‑ti ba ka laa n‑yisigi.

english_verse: We are careful not to judge people by what they seem to be, though we once judged Christ in this way.
translation_verse: Ka di zugu pampaŋŋɔ zaŋŋi n‑kyɛnna ti ku laa n‑gɔsiri niriba hoo duniya wa ninsaadima maa ŋɔn gɔsiri ba seem m‑bugsiri ba yɛla: halli ti yi daa gɔsiri Kirisita mammaŋŋa gɔsibu wa, ti ku laa n‑niŋi lala.

english_verse: Anyone who belongs to Christ is a new person. The past is forgotten, and everything is new.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔna ninvugsɔ yi bɛ Kirisita saani, ba naam u la bumpaalli: u beesikurigu la gaariya, ka bunseelikam leebi la beesipaalli.

english_verse: God has done it all! He sent Christ to make peace between himself and us, and he has given us the work of making peace between himself and others.
translation_verse: Ka anŋɔ zaa yi la Naawunni saani. U daa kyɛ ka Kirisita zɔ ti sindaani u saani m‑maali yɛttɔ'a zaa, ka daa laa n‑zaŋŋi sindaani zoobu tuma wa n‑ti ti ni ti ti tumna.

english_verse: What we mean is that God was in Christ, offering peace and forgiveness to the people of this world. And he has given us the work of sharing his message about peace.
translation_verse: Ni, ŋɔn Naawunni daa bɛ la Kirisita saani n‑zɔri sindaani, ni u ti maali u yɛttɔ'a zaa n‑ti duniya wa dima, ni u ku laa n‑teesi ba tumbeeri yɛla halli beela. Ka u zaŋŋi sindaani zoobu wa yɛla n‑ti ti ni ti ti moonna.

english_verse: We were sent to speak for Christ, and God is begging you to listen to our message. We speak for Christ and sincerely ask you to make peace with God.
translation_verse: Dama Naawunni tum ma, hoo ŋɔn tum bisɔ ni u ti mari ŋɔn Naawunni kukɔri n‑kyɛ na n‑susira. Lala ka u tum ti zaa gba. Ti susiri niriba nimmoosi Kirisita zugu, ni, ba labi Naawunni saani na n‑niŋi nangbanyinni.

english_verse: We work together with God, and we beg you to make good use of God's gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Naawunni tuntuntaaba n nyɛ ti, ka Naawunni pun zaŋŋi u piini n‑ti ti, halli ka ti bu sumsi lala; tɔ, ka di zugu ti kpamsiri ya, ni, yan di kyɛ ka Naawunni piini wa basi yɔri.

english_verse: In the Scriptures God says, “When the time came, I listened to you, and when you needed help, I came to save you.” That time has come. This is the day for you to be saved.
translation_verse: Dama u yɛliya, ni#:- “Sahasuŋŋu maa deede ka n daa wum n‑ti ya, Halli tuliginsim dabsiri daari ka n daa suŋŋi ya.” ka mani n yɛtti ya wa, ni, pampaŋŋɔ n nyɛ Naawunni ‘sahasuŋŋu’ wa, ka ‘tuliginsim daari’ wa n nyɛ zuna.

english_verse: We don't want anyone to find fault with our work, and so we try hard not to cause problems.
translation_verse: Ti bu ta'ari sɔ soori, ka lala nin kyɛ ka ba ku galim ti tuma soori wa.

english_verse: But in everything and in every way we show we truly are God's servants. We have always been patient, though we have had a lot of trouble, suffering, and hard times.
translation_verse: Amaa bunseelikam zaa puuni ti ya n‑wulisiri, ni, Naawunni tuntumniba n nyɛ ti. Halli di yi nyɛ wahala diibu puuni gba, ti bɛ la lala n‑diri sugru, ni toom ni yɛlimugsa puuni gba.

english_verse: We have been beaten, put in jail, and hurt in riots. We have worked hard and have gone without sleep or food.
translation_verse: Ba bu ti, ka kpari ti sarika duri ni; niriba mun daa zabri ti yɛla zugu; ti daa tumni tunkpeema, ka ganni gɔgala, ka kpalim m‑bɛ kɔm ni. A zaa puuni ka ti tumni la Naawunni tuma.

english_verse: But we have kept ourselves pure and have been understanding, patient, and kind. The Holy Spirit has been with us, and our love has been real.
translation_verse: Ti kur zɛ yummu Naawunni saani, m‑mari yɛm, ni sugru, ni nirilim; ti kpalim m‑bɛ Naawunni Vuusim Kasi saani, ka wuri niriba ni yɛlimaŋni.

english_verse: We have spoken the truth, and God's power has worked in us. In all our struggles we have said and done only what is right.
translation_verse: Ti mari la yɛlimaŋni yɛligu n‑tumna, ni Naawunni yiiko; ti mari ti tɔppu neema an nyɛ la yɛlimaŋni dina, ka a bɛ la ti nudirigu ni ti nuzaa ni zaa.

english_verse: Whether we were honored or dishonored or praised or cursed, we always told the truth about ourselves. But some people said we did not.
translation_verse: Anŋɔ zaa puuni ka ba pɛ'ari ti, ka laa n‑fiilim ti; ba gyeemni ti ka laa n‑zeemni ti; ba yɛtti, ni, ti yɔmsira, ka laa n‑yɛtti, ni, ti tɔ'asiri yɛlimaŋni.

english_verse: We are unknown to others, but well known to you. We seem to be dying, and yet we are still alive. We have been punished, but never killed,
translation_verse: Sɔsɔ bu mi ti yɛla, amaa ti yuuri duya; ti nyɛ la hoo ban kpiira, ka kpalim n‑nɛa; ba namsiri ti, amaa ti bu kpi zaa.

english_verse: and we are always happy, even in times of suffering. Although we are poor, we have made many people rich. And though we own nothing, everything is ours.
translation_verse: Halli ti bɛ la sufusa'aŋŋu ni, amaa ka mari sufupeelli sahakam; ti bɛ la fara ni, amaa ka kyɛ ka daadam pam leebi la bundaandima; ti ka seela, amaa ka mari bunseelikam.

english_verse: Friends in Corinth, we are telling the truth when we say there is room in our hearts for you.
translation_verse: Ya bu nya, ti zɔdima? - ti tɔ'asi n‑ti ya Kɔrinti dima wa ka bu mɔŋŋi ya, halli ti yoaai la ti sufu ni teesa n‑ti ya.

english_verse: We are not holding back on our love for you, but you are holding back on your love for us.
translation_verse: Di pa la ni tirima n mɔŋŋni ya ti wurilim; ay! - amaa yarima n mɔŋŋni ti ya wurilim.

english_verse: I speak to you as I would speak to my own children. Please make room in your hearts for us. The Temple of the Living God
translation_verse: Dinŋɔna see ka ya dɔli soori n‑labsi n‑ti ma hoo man pun tisi seem - n tɔ'asiri n‑tiri ya hoo m biisi la - ka ya gba yoaai ya sufu ni teesa n‑ti ma.

english_verse: Stay away from people who are not followers of the Lord! Can someone who is good get along with someone who is evil? Are light and darkness the same?
translation_verse: Yan di kyɛ ka yan ni ban ka yɛdda la ti la'amni n‑tumni hoo na'akoora ŋɔn tumni seem. Ammi, yɛlimaŋni ni tuppuwumni la'amni n‑suŋŋni taaba? - Ay! Bee, neesim ni zibsim ya niŋi la wula n‑la'amna? - a ku toaai, halli beela!

english_verse: Is Christ a friend of Satan? Can people who follow the Lord have anything in common with those who don't?
translation_verse: Kirisita siri ku toaai n‑lɔ nangbanyinni ni Sintaani; bee, yɛdda daana ku toaai n‑nyɛ ŋɔn za'asi yɛdda niŋbu la taraana.

english_verse: Do idols belong in the temple of God? We are the temple of the living God, as God himself says, “I will live with these people and walk among them. I will be their God, and they will be my people.”
translation_verse: Naawunni Gyeeŋŋu Yiri siri bu ŋmanni ba'ari bee bugri ŋɔn bɛ seela. Amaa tirima n nyɛ gyeeŋŋu yiri n‑ti Naawunni Nyɔvuri Daana maa. Hoo ŋɔn Naawunni daa yɛliya#:- “N nin kpɛ ba saani n‑gbɛa; Man ni ban nin kyɛnni n‑gyinna; N nin nyɛ Naawunni n‑ti ba Ka ba mun nin nyɛ n niriba.”

english_verse: The Lord also says, “Leave them and stay away! Don't touch anything that isn't clean. Then I will welcome you
translation_verse: Dinzugu, ni#:- “ ‘Ya yim na ka kyɛ ba, n‑wɔligi ya mansi m‑bɛ ya kɔkɔa.’ - Lala ka ti Dugma yɛtta.” Ni#:- “Ya di siisi bunda'ariga kan kyisira, Ka n nin deaai ya.

english_verse: and be your Father. You will be my sons and my daughters, as surely as I am God, the All-Powerful.”
translation_verse: Ka n nin leebi ya Ba, Ka yan mun nin leebi m biisi. - Lala ka ti Dugma Yiiko Zaa Daana yɛtta.”

english_verse: My friends, God has made us these promises. So we should stay away from everything that keeps our bodies and spirits from being clean. We should honor God and try to be completely like him. The Church Makes Paul Happy
translation_verse: Tɔ, m mabiwutta, ba pun basi nangbambasiri wa n‑ti ti na, ka di zugu ya kyɛ ka ti leebi Naawunni niriba kasikasi. Ka kyɛ ka da'ari ka ti ni, ti ningbina ni ti siisi zaa; ka laa n‑zɔri Naawunni, ni u ti su ti beesigu yɛla zaa.

english_verse: Make a place for us in your hearts! We haven't mistreated or hurt anyone. We haven't cheated anyone.
translation_verse: Ya ku deaai ti suŋŋa? Ti bu tum sɔ taalli, ti bu sa'am sɔ soori, ti mun bu yɔmsi sɔ n‑fa u.

english_verse: I am not saying this to be hard on you. But, as I have said before, you will always be in our thoughts, whether we live or die.
translation_verse: Man ŋɔn yɛtti lala, di pa la ni n ya n‑wulisi, ni, ya pa la niriba: ya siri bɛ la ti sufu ni, halli ni tin ni yan yi la'am n‑kpi, bee, ti la'am n‑nɛ gba - ti pun yɛli ya lala - bee, ti daa bu yɛli?

english_verse: I trust you completely. I am always proud of you, and I am greatly encouraged. In all my trouble I am still very happy.
translation_verse: N siri niŋi ya yɛdda ka tɔ'asiri pam n‑nyuuri bara ya zugu. N nya n sufu maasim zaa di zugu; ni ti wahala diibu zaa yɔri, n sufu pɛligiya pam.

english_verse: After we came to Macedonia, we didn't have any chance to rest. We were faced with all kinds of problems. We were troubled by enemies and troubled by fears.
translation_verse: Dama tin daa paai Masidoonya sahanseaa maa, ti daa bu nya vuusim, ka daa nyari yɛla pam ya'ari kam zaa. Daadam saani ka ti daa mari zaba, ka ti sufu puuni ka dabeem daa kur bɛ ni.

english_verse: But God cheers up people in need, and this is what he did when he sent Titus to us.
translation_verse: Amaa ni di zaa yɔri, Naawunni n nyɛ sɔ ŋɔn gɔsiri ban ka yaa yɛla n‑tiri ba maasim, ka u daa maai ti sufu, ka kyɛ ka Taituusi kyɛ ti saani na.

english_verse: Of course, we were glad to see Titus, but what really made us glad is the way you cheered him up. He told how sorry you were and how concerned you were about me. And this made me even happier.
translation_verse: Ka di pa la u kyɛnni na maa kɔkɔa, amaa yan ni ŋɔna ŋɔn daa mari sufumaasim ni taaba seem la zugu. U daa yɛtti yan boori ti yɛla seem la, ni yan nyari sufusa'aŋŋu seem, taalli maa zugu; m‑paasi yan zaŋŋi ya sufu zaa n‑niŋni na: ka lala daa kyɛ ka n sufu maai halli nti yakki.

english_verse: I don't feel bad anymore, even though my letter hurt your feelings. I did feel bad at first, but I don't now. I know that the letter hurt you for a while.
translation_verse: Ni man daa sɔbi gbaŋŋu ka ya sufu sa'am maa zaa, m bu ya takki n‑labi nyaaŋŋa. Halli n siri daa boori ni n takki, dama n daa nya ka gbaŋŋu kana daa niŋi ya sufusa'aŋŋu, halli ni di daa bu yuui pam gba.

english_verse: Now I am happy, but not because I hurt your feelings. It is because God used your hurt feelings to make you turn back to him, and none of you were harmed by us.
translation_verse: Pampaŋŋɔ muna n yi mari la sufupeelli, pa la ya sufusa'aŋŋu la zugu, amaa, ni, ya sufusa'aŋŋu daa kyɛ ka ya takki ya sɔbeeri, ka taasi ya tooni. Naawunni zugu sufusa'aŋŋu n‑daa la, ka dizugu ya daa bu labi nyaaŋŋa ti tuma zugu.

english_verse: When God makes you feel sorry enough to turn to him and be saved, you don't have anything to feel bad about. But when this world makes you feel sorry, it can cause your death.
translation_verse: Naawunni zugu sufusa'aŋŋu wa zugu siri kyɛ ka ti takkri ti sɔbeeri nti nya tuliginsim, ni ti sufu ku laa m‑miligi; duniya wa sufusa'aŋŋu mun taasiri ti kum ni.

english_verse: Just look what God has done by making you feel sorry! You sincerely want to prove you are innocent. You are angry. You are shocked. You are eager to see that justice is done. You have proved that you were completely right in this matter.
translation_verse: Ya bu nya Naawunni zugu sufusa'aŋŋu wa ŋɔn suŋŋi ya seem? - ya boori yooma m‑maali yɛttɔ'a maa, ka bu boori galiŋŋu di zugu. Ya gyɛ la suuri n‑niŋi tumbɛtumna la, ka zɔri tumbeoo la yɛla dabeem; ya boori nimmoosi ni ya maai yɛlli maa, ni ya kari yɛttɔ'a maa sariya ni yɛlimaŋni. Bunseelli kam puuni ya daa wulisi, ni, ya yi yɛla wa ni, ka ka taalli di zugu.

english_verse: When I wrote you, it wasn't to accuse the one who was wrong or to take up for the one who was hurt. I wrote, so God would show you how much you do care for us.
translation_verse: Man daa sɔbi n‑ti ya na maa gbinni muna, di pa la ŋɔn daa niŋi taalli la zugu, bee, ban daa tum sɔ taalli la zugu gba. Ay! - n daa sɔbi ni, ni n ti kyɛ ka ya baŋŋi yan boori ti yɛla nimmoosi maa seem, ka di yi paalu ni, Naawunni tooni.

english_verse: And we were greatly encouraged. Although we were encouraged, we felt even better when we saw how happy Titus was, because you had shown he had nothing to worry about.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔ zaa zugu ti sufu kpamsiya. Ka n‑zaŋŋi m‑paasi ti mammaŋŋa kpamsigu zugu, ti mari sufupeelli Taituusi yɛla zugu, dama u sufu daa maaya, yan daa ti u sufudoaa la zugu.

english_verse: We had told him how much we thought of you, and you did not disappoint us. Just as we have always told you the truth, so everything we told him about you has also proved to be true.
translation_verse: N daa pun tɔ'asi n‑ti u n‑nyuuri bara zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ya yɛla, ka ya mun daa bu diisi ma vi. Tin daa yɛli seelli zaa n‑ti ya la daa nyɛ la yɛlimaŋni, ka lala ka tin daa nyu bara seesi n‑ti Taituusi ya zugu la gba siri daa niŋi yɛlimaŋni.

english_verse: Titus loves all of you very much, especially when he remembers how you obeyed him and how you trembled with fear when you welcomed him.
translation_verse: Din paasiri u wurilim n‑ti ya nyɛ la: ni, u teaari la ya zaa ŋɔn daa wum n‑ti u seem la, ni, ya daa deaai u ka zɔri dabeem pam tumbeeri la zugu.

english_verse: It makes me really glad to know I can depend on you.
translation_verse: N nin toaai n‑niŋi ya yɛdda zaa seelikam puuni, ka di niŋi ma nya'asim pam.

english_verse: My friends, we want you to know that the churches in Macedonia have shown others God's gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Tɔ, m mabiisi, m boori la ya baŋŋi Naawunni ŋɔn daa zaŋŋi piiniseaa n‑suŋŋi Masidoonya dima maa.

english_verse: They gave as much as they could afford and even more, simply because they wanted to.
translation_verse: Dama mani nŋɔ n‑diri sɛhara, ni, ba daa tisi ban daa nyaŋŋi seem - halli n‑yakki ba kpeeŋŋu tɔriga. Ba mammaŋŋa yuubu ni

english_verse: They even asked and begged us to let them have the joy of giving their money for God's people.
translation_verse: ka ba daa bɛlim ti pam, ni, ti kyɛ ka ba la'am n‑tumni tunsuŋŋu wa.

english_verse: And they did more than we had hoped. They gave themselves first to the Lord and then to us, just as God wanted them to do.
translation_verse: Ba mun daa bu niŋi tin daa teesi seem la, amaa ba daa daŋŋi n‑zaŋŋi ba mansi n‑ti la Naawunni, ka naayi ti ti gba, Naawunni yuubu zugu.

english_verse: Titus was the one who got you started doing this good thing, so we begged him to help you finish what you had begun.
translation_verse: Tɔ: Taituusi daa pun daŋŋi m‑piili lala tuma maa, ka dizugu ti daa susi u, ni, u tumma tunveelli wa n‑naai yarima gba saani.

english_verse: You do everything better than anyone else. You have stronger faith. You speak better and know more. You are eager to give, and you love us better. Now you must give more generously than anyone else.
translation_verse: Ka dinŋɔna yarima ŋɔn kur niŋni seelikam suŋŋa la zugu - di yi nyɛ yɛdda ni, bee yɛttɔ'a ni, bee yɛm, bee nimmoosi tumpu ni, bee wurilim ni, yan wuri ti suŋŋasuŋŋa seem la - kur kpaŋŋma ya mansi m‑moori n‑niŋi suŋŋa n‑gba tisiri lala piini maa.

english_verse: I am not ordering you to do this. I am simply testing how real your love is by comparing it with the concern that others have shown.
translation_verse: Di pa la n tiri ya la wadda, amaa m boori la n zamsi ya wurilim ŋɔn paai seem n‑nya, din nin kyɛ ka n zaŋŋi seeba ban wuri nimmoosi maa wurilim m‑ma'asiri ya dinni.

english_verse: You know our Lord Jesus Christ treated us with undeserved grace by giving up all his riches, so you could become rich.
translation_verse: Dama ya mi ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita tunsuŋŋu veelim ŋɔn nyɛ seem maa: ni, u daa su arizikki zaa, amaa yarim zugu ka u daa leebi fara daana, ni lala ti kyɛ ka ya mun leebi bundaandima.

english_verse: A year ago you were the first ones to give, and you gave because you wanted to. So listen to my advice.
translation_verse: Ka dinŋɔna n saawara maa nŋɔa: ni, yarima n nyɛ seeba ban daa piili lala yɛttɔ'a maa yuumni la sa; ka di daa pa la yan daa daŋŋi n‑tum la kɔkɔa, amaa ya daa daŋŋi m‑piili n‑teesi lala tuma maa yɛla.

english_verse: I think you should finish what you started. If you give according to what you have, you will prove you are as eager to give as you were to think about giving.
translation_verse: Tɔ, ka pampaŋŋɔ see ka ya tum tuma maa halli nti naai; ka lala nin kyɛ ka ya sufu ni teesa zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi tuma maa, ni ya tuma maa gba, nin dɔli la taaba halli nti naai; ka ya nin tum ya marigu tɔriga.

english_verse: It doesn't matter how much you have. What matters is how much you are willing to give from what you have.
translation_verse: Ya bu nya? - ninvugsɔ yi ti boori ni u tisi, piini maa deaari dɔli la ŋɔn mari seem, pa ŋɔn ka seelli la.

english_verse: I am not trying to make life easier for others by making life harder for you. But it is only fair
translation_verse: Di pa la ni ti kyɛ ka seeba vuusiri ka yarim mun nya mugsigu; ay! amaa ni di ti sa'asi n‑ti sɔkam.

english_verse: for you to share with them when you have so much, and they have so little. Later, when they have more than enough, and you are in need, they can share with you. Then everyone will have a fair share,
translation_verse: Pampaŋŋɔ ya mara, ka seeba mun ka; ka ya nin suŋŋi ba ban pɔsigi seela maa. Ban mun yi ti mara, ka ya ka, ba gba nin suŋŋi ya: lala ka ya nin sa'asi taaba.

english_verse: just as the Scriptures say, “Those who gathered too much had nothing left. Those who gathered only a little had all they needed.” Titus and His Friends
translation_verse: Hoo din pun sɔbi n‑dooli seem la, ni#:- “Ban daa va pam la dina daa bu zoaai n‑yakki, ka ban mun daa va beela maa dina n daa bu pɔsigi ba.”

english_verse: I am grateful that God made Titus care as much about you as we do.
translation_verse: M puusiri Naawunni ŋɔn daa kyɛ ka Taituusi gba nini moaai zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ya yɛla zugu.

english_verse: When we begged Titus to visit you, he said he would. He wanted to because he cared so much for you.
translation_verse: Dama ŋɔn Taituusi daa wum ti susigu maa ni sufumaasim pam, ka laa n‑gbaai u kyɛnni ya saani na la ni u toori zigizigi boorimma nimmoosi.

english_verse: With Titus we are also sending one of the Lord's followers who is well known in every church for spreading the good news.
translation_verse: M‑paasi u zugu, ti ya kyɛ ka ti mabisɔ gba ti kyɛ ya saani na. Ŋɔna n nyɛ sɔ ŋɔn tumni lahabasuŋŋu maa tuma, ka Naawunni niriba ban la'amni lugri kam zaa ni kur pɛ'ari u di zugu.

english_verse: The churches chose this follower to travel with us while we carry this gift that will bring praise to the Lord and show how much we hope to help.
translation_verse: M‑paasi lala, ŋɔna ka ba daa yiisi ni u ti dɔli ti n‑suŋŋi ti, tin taasi piini maa sahanseaa la; piini mun tisibu wa wulisiri ti Dugma gyirima paalu ni, ka laa n‑wulisi tin boori ti suŋŋi niriba nimbirimoaa seem la.

english_verse: We don't want anyone to find fault with the way we handle your generous gift.
translation_verse: Dama ti bu boori ni sɔ galim ti zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ligri pam wa yɛla.

english_verse: But we want to do what pleases the Lord and what people think is right.
translation_verse: Dizugu ti kpaŋŋi la ti mansi n‑niŋni din tu, pa la Naawunni tooni kɔkɔa, amaa saalidima tooni gba.

english_verse: We are also sending someone else with Titus and the other follower. We approve of this man. In fact, he has already shown us many times that he wants to help. And now he wants to help even more than ever, because he trusts you so much.
translation_verse: Ti laa n‑ya tum la ti mabisɔ m‑paasi ba zugu; ti daa pun nya ka doo wa tumni nimmoosi sahakam, ka pampaŋŋɔ u niŋi ya yɛdda pam, ka dizugu u ya tum n‑gaari lala.

english_verse: Titus is my partner, who works with me to serve you. The other two followers are sent by the churches, and they bring honor to Christ.
translation_verse: Taituusi muna - u nyɛ la n tuntuntaraana ya saani. Ka ti mabiisi wa mun zɛ la ba taaba zaaziiya, ba taaba mun n nyɛ baseeba ban la'amni n‑gyeemni Naawunni tinsi zaa puuni; ka ban laa n‑nyɛ seeba ban kyɛ ka Naawunni nya pɛ'abu.

english_verse: Treat them in such a way that the churches will see your love and will know why we bragged about you.
translation_verse: Dinzugu ya kyɛ ka niriba wa ti baŋŋi ya wurilim ŋɔn nyɛ seem, ka laa m‑baŋŋi din kyɛ ka ti nyuuri bara ya zugu, ka Naawunni niriba zaa ti nya.

english_verse: I don't need to write you about the money you plan to give for God's people.
translation_verse: Tɔ: ka ligri toosigu n‑tiri Naawunni niriba la yɛla muna - di pa la yɛlimugsa man saani ni n sɔbi di yɛla n‑ti ya.

english_verse: I know how eager you are to give. And I have proudly told the Lord's followers in Macedonia that you people in Achaia have been ready for a whole year. Now your desire to give has made them want to give.
translation_verse: Dama m pun mi halli yan boori ni ya suŋŋi lala seem. Halli n pun tibgi ya yuuri Masidoonya dima saani, ni, ya Akaaya tingbaŋŋu dima wa n pun maali ya siri ni ya tisi ka di yuui, halli yuumni la sa. Ka ya zigizigi la yɛla daa kyɛ ka ba niriba pam gbaai tuma wa m‑paasi.

english_verse: This is why I am sending Titus and the two others to you. I want you to be ready, just as I promised. This will prove we were not wrong to brag about you.
translation_verse: Tɔ, ka dinŋɔna n tumni la ti mabiisi wa ni ba daŋŋi n tooni n‑kyɛ ya saani na, ni tin nyu bariseesi ya yɛla wa zugu ku basi yɔri. Ti daa yɛli ba, ni, ya daa pun maali ya siri,

english_verse: Some followers from Macedonia may come with me, and I want them to find that you have the money ready. If you don't, I would be embarrassed for trusting you to do this. But you would be embarrassed even more.
translation_verse: ka m bu boori Masidoonya niriba ti dɔli ma na n‑nya ka ya bu niŋi siri zaa. Lala nin diisi tirima vi, ka laa n‑diisi ya gba vi, tin daa niŋi ya yɛdda seem wa zugu.

english_verse: So I have decided to ask Titus and the others to spend some time with you before I arrive. This way they can arrange to collect the money you have promised. Then you will have the chance to give because you want to, and not because you feel forced to.
translation_verse: Lala zugu ka n daa teesi, ni, di kpa la talasi ni n kpamsi ti mabiisi wa ka ba daŋŋi ma na n‑suŋŋi ya ni ya ti sɛ'asi ya piiniseesi yan daa pun yɛli, ni, ya nin tisi la. Lala nin kyɛ ka a siri nyɛ la wurilim piini, pa ban mugsi ya seesi zugu.

english_verse: Remember this saying, “A few seeds make a small harvest, but a lot of seeds make a big harvest.”
translation_verse: Ya teaama dinŋɔa: ŋɔn butti n‑ya'ara ti ya n‑ŋmaari ni n‑ya'ara; ka ŋɔn mun n butti n‑zoaara ti ya n‑ŋmaari ni n‑zoaara.

english_verse: Each of you must make up your own mind about how much to give. But don't feel sorry that you must give and don't feel you are forced to give. God loves people who love to give.
translation_verse: Amaa see ka sɔkam ti tisi u sufu ŋɔn teesi, ni, u tisima seem, pa la mugsigu zugu, dama Naawunni wuri la ŋɔn tisiri sufupeelim zugu.

english_verse: God can bless you with everything you need, and you will always have more than enough to do all kinds of good things for others.
translation_verse: Ka ŋɔn Naawunni nin kyɛ ka u piini zaa paari ya saani na, ni ya ti mari yan boori seelli zaa sahakam, ka laa m‑mari m‑paasi ni ya ti zaŋŋni n‑suŋŋni niriba.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “God freely gives his gifts to the poor, and always does right.”
translation_verse: Hoo din pun sɔbi n‑dooli seem zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ninvugsɔ ŋɔn tisiri la, ni#:- “U zaŋŋi piini n‑wurim n‑tisi fara dima, Ka kpalim la yɛlimaŋni daana sahakam.”

english_verse: God gives seed to farmers and provides everyone with food. He will increase what you have, so you can give even more to those in need.
translation_verse: Ka Naawunni n nyɛ sɔ ŋɔn zaŋŋi bumbura n‑tiri ban butti la, ka laa n‑tiri bundira ni ba ti di. Ka u siri nin zaŋŋi bumbura n‑tisi yarima, ka laa m‑paasi ya antaam zaa - di nyɛ la: yɛlimaŋni puuni beesigu.

english_verse: You will be blessed in every way, and you will be able to keep on being generous. Then many people will thank God when we deliver your gift.
translation_verse: Ya nin bɛ ni hoo seeba bam mara, bunseelikam zaa puuni; ka di nin kyɛ ka ya tisiri ya yuubu sahakam: ka lala nin kyɛ ka ba puusi Naawunni ya tuma wa zugu, tirim mun saani.

english_verse: What you are doing is much more than a service that supplies God's people with what they need. It is something that will make many others thank God.
translation_verse: Tɔ, ka dizugu yan tumni suŋŋsim wa gbinni pa la, ni, ya nin suŋŋi Naawunni niriba ban pɔsigi bunseesi zii kɔkɔa, amaa ka di laa m‑mari la wulisigu pam ka naayi paasiri Naawunni puusigu.

english_verse: The way in which you have proved yourselves by this service will bring honor and praise to God. You believed the message about Christ, and you obeyed it by sharing generously with God's people and with everyone else.
translation_verse: Ya yi tum suŋŋsim tuma wa n‑naai, di nin wulisi ya beesisuŋŋu beebu yɛla. Ka niriba nin ti nya; ka pɛ'ai Naawunni, ni, ya deaari ŋɔn Naawunni noori n‑tɔ'asiri n‑wulisiri Kirisita lahabasuŋŋu yɛla yɛlimaŋni ŋɔn bɛ seem. Ka din paasi lala zugu, ni, ya yiisiri ya sufu yuubu piini n‑tiri ba, ni sɔkam.

english_verse: Now they are praying for you and want to see you, because God used you to bless them so very much.
translation_verse: Ka ba nin laa n‑susiri Naawunni n‑tiri ya, ka nin boori ya yɛla ni nimbirimoaa, dama Naawunni ti ya u piinisuma pam gba, halli nti yakki.

english_verse: Do you think I am a coward when I am with you and brave when I am far away? Well, I ask you to listen, because Christ himself was humble and gentle.
translation_verse: Man, Pɔla, n‑sɔbri wa: ka n susiri ya, Kirisita sugru zugu, ni u nirilim zugu. Halli ban yɛtti n yɛla seem maa yɔri ka n susiri ya - dama ba yɛtti, ni, n yi bɛ ya saani n nyɛ la sɔ ŋɔn zɔri vi ni dabeem, amaa n yi ka ya saani muna m mari la sufukpeemni ni dablim.

english_verse: Some people have said we act like the people of this world. So when I arrive, I expect I will have to be firm and forceful in what I say to them. Please don't make me treat you that way.
translation_verse: N susigu wa gbinni nyɛ la: ni, n di kyɛ ya saani na nti niŋi sufukpeemni, dama n teesiri, ni, di nin kpa la talasi ni n zaŋŋi n sufukpeemni m‑boosi ninvugseeba boosa; dama ba yɛtti, ni, man nyɛ la sɔ ŋɔn tuusi la tɔppu hoo duniya wa dima ŋɔn tuusiri seem maa.

english_verse: We live in this world, but we don't act like its people
translation_verse: Ni ti bɛ la duniya wa ni maa zaa yɔri, ti bu zabri hoo duniya wa tɔppu ŋɔn tuusiri seem.

english_verse: or fight our battles with the weapons of this world. Instead, we use God's power that can destroy fortresses. We destroy arguments
translation_verse: Neenseesi tin mari n‑zabra maa pa la duniya wa tɔppu neema: ay! - a mari la Naawunni yiiko, n‑nyaŋŋi n‑sa'amni kpeeŋŋu ziziisi. Ti sa'amni la nangbankpeemni yɛla gba,

english_verse: and every bit of pride that keeps anyone from knowing God. We capture people's thoughts and make them obey Christ.
translation_verse: m‑paasi bunseelikam zaa kan duusiri kamaŋŋa ka za'asiri Naawunni yɛla bamsim. Ti mun zabri ni ti ti gbaasi sufu ni teesa zaa, n‑kyɛ ka a zaa ti wum n‑ti Kirisita.

english_verse: And when you completely obey him, we will punish anyone who refuses to obey.
translation_verse: Ka ya yi ti sakki wumpu n‑naai, ti nin maali siri ni ti darigi ban ku wum la zaa tuba.

english_verse: You judge by appearances. If any of you think you are the only ones who belong to Christ, then think again. We belong to Christ as much as you do.
translation_verse: Ya nini n gɔsiri yɛla ka ya teesiri, ni, a gɔsibu siri wulisiri la a gbinni zaa ŋɔn bɛ seem. Ay! - ŋɔnkam niŋi yɛdda, ni, u nyɛ la Kirisita nira, see ka u maali n‑teesi, ni, tirim gba nyɛ la Kirisita niriba lala.

english_verse: Maybe I brag a little too much about the authority that the Lord gave me to help you and not to hurt you. Yet I am not embarrassed to brag.
translation_verse: Di yi pa seem n nin nyu bara zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ti Dugma ŋɔn zaŋŋi yiikoseaa n‑ti ti la, halli nti yakki sɔsuŋŋu gba; ŋɔn Naawunni siri daa zaŋŋi n‑ti ti, ni ti ti duusi ya beesigu, pa ti sigsi ka. Amaa vi ku mari ma bara nyuubu wa zugu.

english_verse: And I am not trying to scare you with my letters.
translation_verse: M bu boori di ŋmanni hoo man sɔbri n gbana wa ni n ti vɔlisiri ya.

english_verse: Some of you are saying, “Paul's letters are harsh and powerful. But in person, he is a weakling and has nothing worth saying.”
translation_verse: Dama ninvugseeba ban yɛtti n yɛla, ni, n gbana n nyɛ buntibsa ka mugsira, amaa m mammaŋŋa yi ti bɛ ya saani sahanseaa la n nyɛ la ninvugyɔri, ningbimbaaliga daana; ni, “Ka u yɛttɔ'a wa muna - a ka yaa halli beela!”

english_verse: Those people had better understand that when I am with you, I will do exactly what I say in my letters.
translation_verse: See ka lala niriba baŋŋma, ni, tin nyɛ seem ti gbana sɔppu maa ni, sahanseaa tin ka ya saani la, lala ka ti nin nyɛ ti tuma maa ni, sahanseaa tin bɛ ni maa.

english_verse: We won't dare compare ourselves with those who think so much of themselves. But they are foolish to compare themselves with themselves.
translation_verse: Niriba wa n nyari ba mansi kɔkɔa, amaa tirima ku toaai n‑zaŋŋi ba yɛla m‑ma'asi ti mansi, bee n‑la'am m‑bɛ ba saani. Ba zaŋŋi ba mansi yɛla n‑zamsiri taaba; ba zaŋŋi ba mansi m‑ma'asiri la taaba. Ba siri ka yɛm halli fiiŋ gba!

english_verse: We won't brag about something we don't have a right to brag about. We will only brag about the work God has sent us to do, and you are part of that work.
translation_verse: Tirim mun ku ma'asi ti mansi n‑nyu bara n‑yakki din mari soori. Ti nin sɛ'ali ti ma'asigu ni zamsigu yɛla ni ya'aseaa Naawunni ŋɔn zaali ti - halli nti paai ya saani na gba.

english_verse: We are not bragging more than we should. After all, we did bring the message about Christ to you.
translation_verse: Ti yi daa bu paai ya na, ti barinyuubu naa n‑ku dɔli soori; amaa di pa lala, dama ti siri daa pun daŋŋi ya saani na n‑taasi Kirisita lahabasuŋŋu n‑ti ya.

english_verse: We don't brag about what others have done, as if we had done those things ourselves. But I hope as you become stronger in your faith, we will be able to reach many more of the people around you. That has always been our goal.
translation_verse: Ti mun bu yakkri n‑gatti ti tɔriga n‑nyuuri bara zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ninvugseeba tuma m‑paasi ti maŋtoori dina zugu. Amaa ti mari tama, ni, ya yɛdda nin zoaara, ka lala ka ti tuma zii gba nin yɛligi ya saani.

english_verse: Then we will be able to preach the good news in other lands where we cannot take credit for work someone else has already done.
translation_verse: Halli ni ti nin toaai m‑mooli lahabasuŋŋu maa n‑ti ya tooni sa tingbanseesi niriba. Ti bu boori ti kpɛ sɔ tuma ya'ari ni n‑nyuuri bara tunseesi ŋɔn pun tum n‑naai la zugu.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “If you want to brag, then brag about the Lord.”
translation_verse: Ni, “Kyɛ ka ŋɔn ya nyu bara zaa nyuuri a ti Dugma yɛla zugu.”

english_verse: You may brag about yourself, but the only approval that counts is the Lord's approval.
translation_verse: Di siri pa la ŋɔn pɛ'ari u maŋŋa la yuuri ka ba duusira, amaa ti Dugma ŋɔn pɛ'ai sɔ la.

english_verse: But now I fear that you will be tricked, just as Eve was tricked by that lying snake. I am afraid that you might stop thinking about Christ in an honest and sincere way.
translation_verse: Amaa dabeem mari ma, dama n teaari Hawa yɛla, ni, waafu daa zaŋŋi u putɔyam n‑yɔmsi u n‑nyaŋŋi u; man mun n zɔri, ni, di yi pa seem ya nin burigi n‑yi yɛlimaŋni sɔseaa yan nin mari n‑dɔli Kirisita wa ni.
