english_verse: We told you about Jesus, and you received the Holy Spirit and accepted our message. But you let some people tell you about another Jesus. Now you are ready to receive another spirit and accept a different message.
translation_verse: Dama sɔ yi kyɛ na m‑moonni Yisa sɔ yɛla, ka di pa la tirim Yisa wa, ya nin sakki n‑deaai lala; bee, yan deaai la sisɔ ŋɔn pa yan pun deaai Sisɔ wa, bee, lahabasuŋŋu kan pa yan deaai seaa wa, anŋɔ zaa ka ya nin sakki n‑deaai lala ni nimbirimoaa.

english_verse: I may not speak as well as they do, but I know as much. And this has already been made perfectly clear to you.
translation_verse: Halli ni n yɛttɔ'a pa la yɛttɔ'azulima maa zaa, man lee m‑mari la bamsim. Ti daa pun wulisi anŋɔ zaa kasi n‑ti ya, ka di dɔli la sɔya zaa.

english_verse: Was it wrong for me to lower myself and honor you by preaching God's message free of charge?
translation_verse: Ya bu nya? - n daa sigsi m maŋŋa ni n ti duusi ya, dama n daa mooli Naawunni lahabasuŋŋu n‑ti ya la yɔri, samni ka ni: tɔ, taalli ka n daa tum maa?

english_verse: I robbed other churches by taking money from them to serve you.
translation_verse: N daa fa la Naawunni niriba ban bɛ tinseesi la ni, dama n daa deaai la suŋŋsim ba saani ni n ti suŋŋi ya.

english_verse: Even when I was in need, I still didn't bother you. In fact, some of the Lord's followers from Macedonia brought me what I needed. I have not been a burden to you in the past, and I will never be a burden.
translation_verse: Ka man ŋɔn daa bɛ ya saani nti pɔsigi seelli maa, n daa bu zaŋŋi n yɛla m‑mugsi ya sɔa; dama ti mabiseeba ban daa yi Masidoonya na la n daa tiri ma man daa pɔsigi seelli zaa. N daa bu sakki n‑kyɛ ka n yɛla mugsi ya sɔa, ka n ya kpalim m‑bɛ lala.

english_verse: As surely as I speak the truth about Christ, no one in Achaia can stop me from bragging about this.
translation_verse: Kirisita yɛlimaŋni ŋɔn saligi m‑bɛ n saani wa ŋɔna, ya Akaaya tingbaŋŋu ni sɔ ku toaai n‑ta'ai ma bara wa nyuubu ni.

english_verse: And it isn't because I don't love you. God himself knows how much I do love you.
translation_verse: Ka bɔzugu? - ni, man bu wuri ya zugu, bee? Ay! - Naawunni m mi, ni, n wuri ya!

english_verse: I plan to go on doing just what I have always done. Then those people won't be able to brag about doing the same things we are doing.
translation_verse: Ka dinŋɔna n ya kpalim n‑tumni la man tumni seem wa. Dama ninvugseeba m bɛ ni ban boori ba nya soori n‑zaŋŋi ba mansi n‑wulisi, ni, tin ni ban sa'ai taaba: tɔ, n tuma gbinni nyɛ la: ni, n ti nyaŋŋi n‑ta'ai ba, ba barinyuubu ziiya.

english_verse: Anyway, they are no more than false apostles and dishonest workers. They only pretend to be apostles of Christ.
translation_verse: Lala niriba nyɛ la ziri tuumudima. Ba tuma zii la muna, yɛlimaŋni ka di ni. Ba gyinni m‑ma'ari ziri, ni, ba nyɛ la Kirisita tuumudima.

english_verse: And it is no wonder. Even Satan tries to make himself look like an angel of light.
translation_verse: Ka lala ka alahazibu, dama Sintaani mammaŋŋa gba ma'ari ziri, ni, u nyɛ la malaaka neesim daana.

english_verse: So why does it seem strange for Satan's servants to pretend to do what is right? Someday they will get exactly what they deserve. Paul's Sufferings for Christ
translation_verse: Dizugu di ka alahazibu, ni, u nyaandɔliba gba yi ma'ari ziri, ni, ba dɔli la yɛlimaŋni nyaaŋŋa. Amaa ba naari nin nyɛ din dɔli la ba tuma maa.

english_verse: I don't want any of you to think I am a fool. But if you do, then let me be a fool and brag a little.
translation_verse: N laa n‑yɛtti ya, ni, yan di kyɛ ka ya sɔ nya ma la gyɛrigu. Di yi pa lala, see ka ya di sugru n‑deaai ma hoo gyɛrigu, ka dinŋɔna n nin nyu bara beela.

english_verse: When I do all this bragging, I do it as a fool and not for the Lord.
translation_verse: Nyamaŋŋa bara wa ziiya, m bu tɔ'asiri an dɔli la soori ti Dugma saani; n tɔ'asiri gyɛrilim yɛttɔ'a.

english_verse: Yet if others want to brag about what they have done, so will I.
translation_verse: Ni, niriba pam n nyuuri bara ba duniya wa yɛla zugu: tɔ, lala ka man gba ya n‑nyu bara.

english_verse: And since you are so smart, you will gladly put up with a fool.
translation_verse: Ya bu nya? - ya diri sugru n‑tiri ban kɔŋŋni yɛm, yan mari yɛm pam maa zugu.

english_verse: In fact, you let people make slaves of you and cheat you and steal from you. Why, you even let them strut around and slap you in the face.
translation_verse: Ninvugsɔ yi ti zaŋŋi ya hoo u daaba n nyɛ ya, tɔ - ya nin di sugru n‑sakki lala: sɔ yi diri ya gba, ya nin sakki, bee, sɔ yi fa ya, bee, sɔ yi ti zaali u maŋŋa ya tooni, bee, sɔ yi lɔbi ya tampɛkka - anŋɔ zaa puuni ya nin di sugru n‑sakki lala.

english_verse: I am ashamed to say we are too weak to behave in such a way. If they can brag, so can I, but it is a foolish thing to do.
translation_verse: Man muna, n daa ka yaa ni n ti tum anŋɔ zaa n‑niŋi ya - di yi pa seem n yaa pɔsigri wa nin diisi ma vi. Amaa nira ŋɔn nyaŋŋi n‑nyu bara seelikam zaa zugu la muna - tɔ, man gba nin toaai n‑nyu di bara: ya nyama, n siri tɔ'asiri la gyɛrilim; bee m ma'ai ni?

english_verse: Are they Hebrews? So am I. Are they Jews? So am I. Are they from the family of Abraham? Well, so am I.
translation_verse: Ni, ba nyɛ la Hibruu niriba? - tɔ, man gba. Ni, ba nyɛ la Izraɛli dima? - man gba n nyɛa. Ni, ba nyɛ la Ibrahim ya'ansi? Lala ka man gba n nyɛa.

english_verse: Are they servants of Christ? I am a fool to talk this way, but I serve him better than they do. I have worked harder and have been put in jail more times. I have been beaten with whips more and have been in danger of death more often.
translation_verse: Ni, ba tumni la Kirisita tuma? - ay! mani n gaari lala. Dama man daa tum n‑gaari ba, n‑kpɛ sarika n‑gaari; ba daa bu ma, halli ka n daa ti ya kpi, ka di daa maali m‑maali n‑niŋi ma n‑gaari ba zaa. Tɔ, pa sɔ ŋɔn zugu n labgi yɛttɔ'a nŋɔa? - Ay, gyɛrilim n siri nyɛ di!

english_verse: Five times my own people gave me
translation_verse: Napɔmbunu ka Yɛhudiyadima maa daa feebi ma kpaasa pisinaasi yinni ka ni.

english_verse: Three times the Romans beat me with a big stick, and once my enemies stoned me. I have been shipwrecked three times, and I even had to spend a night and a day in the sea.
translation_verse: Napɔmbuta muna ka ba daa bu ma daari, ka zaŋŋi kuga n‑lɔbi ma yimmu: napɔmbuta ka n daa bɛ nyarintitaari ni ka ka sa'am n‑sim teeku koom ni, halli n daa kpalim m‑bɛ teekuzuliŋŋu ni, n‑yuui yuŋŋu n‑neaai beoo nti paai zaanoori yaasa ka n naayi nya fa-m‑basi.

english_verse: I have worked and struggled and spent many sleepless nights. I have gone hungry and thirsty and often had nothing to eat. I have been cold from not having enough clothes to keep me warm.
translation_verse: N tumni tunkara n‑namsira, halli sahaseaa m bu gbisira; kɔm m mari ma, ni kɔnyuuri, ni nangbantoo; waari gba mari ma, ka n kyɛnni n‑gyinni yɔri.

english_verse: Besides everything else, each day I am burdened down, worrying about all the churches.
translation_verse: Kan paasi anŋɔ zaasa, din mugsiri ma pam dabsa zaa la nyɛ la: ni, n teesiri Naawunni niriba zaa yɛla yɛttɔ'a maa.

english_verse: If I have to brag, I will brag about how weak I am.
translation_verse: Tɔ, ka dinŋɔna n yi ya nyu bara, see ka n nyu a man ŋɔn bugsi seem la zugu.

english_verse: God, the Father of our Lord Jesus, knows I am not lying. And God is to be praised forever!
translation_verse: Naawunni m mi, ni, m bu ma'ari la ziri, ka u nyɛ la ti Dugma Yisa Ba la, ka su pɛ'abu sahakam zaa.

english_verse: I have to brag. There is nothing to be gained by it, but I must brag about the visions and other things that the Lord has shown me.
translation_verse: See ka n kpalim n‑nyuuri n bara wa. Ni anfaani seaa ka di ni maa zaa yɔri, n nin tugi m‑paai zii nyaabu yɛla, ni ti Dugma ŋɔn kasigi bunseesi n‑ti ma la.

english_verse: I am planning to visit you for the third time. But I still won't make a burden of myself. What I really want is you, and not what you have. Children are not supposed to save up for their parents, but parents are supposed to take care of their children.
translation_verse: Pampaŋŋɔ n laa n‑niŋi siri ni n ti kyɛ ya saani na, din paasiri n kyɛnni buta zugu; ka kyɛnni wa saha gba n ku zaŋŋi n yɛla m‑mugsiri ya. Dama di pa la m boori ya neema, bee, ya ligri, amaa ya mammansi ka m boora. Ya bu nya? - di pa la biisi n ya m‑bɔ n‑zaali n‑ti ba badima ni ba madima, amaa ba badima ni ba madima nin bɔ n‑zaali n‑ti ba.

english_verse: As I said, only God really knows if this man was in his body at the time.
translation_verse: Ka n laa m‑mi di daama yɛla - di daa nyɛ la u maŋtoori ningbiŋŋu n‑daa la, bee, u daa yi u ningbiŋŋu m‑basi maa, n ku toaai m‑baŋŋi, kulla Naawunni m mi -

english_verse: But he was taken up into paradise, where he heard things too wonderful to tell.
translation_verse: ni, ba daa gbaai u nti du n‑kpɛ Naawunni zisuŋŋu, nti wum yɛliseesi an ku toaai n‑yɛli; soori ka ni ni ninsaala ti tɔ'asi a taabu, halli beela.

english_verse: I will brag about that man, but not about myself, except to say how weak I am.
translation_verse: Tɔ: lala doo taabu yɛla zugu ka n nin nyu bara; n ku nyu bara m mammaŋŋa yɛla zugu, ka di yi pa la n nyu a man ŋɔn bugsa seem la zugu.

english_verse: Yet even if I did brag, I would not be foolish. I would simply be speaking the truth. But I will try not to say too much. That way, none of you will think more highly of me than you should because of what you have seen me do and say.
translation_verse: Halli n yi ya nyu bara, n ku tumni gyɛrilim di zugu, dama n ya n‑tɔ'asiri la yɛlimaŋni. Amaa n nin kyɛ ni, ni sɔ di teesi n yɛla pam, n‑gaari ba n nin toaai m‑baŋŋi a seem, ban gɔsiri n tuma ka wumni n yɛligu la sahanseaa la.

english_verse: Of course, I am now referring to the wonderful things I saw. One of Satan's angels was sent to make me suffer terribly, so that I would not feel too proud.
translation_verse: Zii ni kasigri yɛla wa daa nyɛ la alahazibu n‑ti ma; dinzugu Naawunni bu boori ni karimbaani mari ma a zugu. Ka di zugu n daa nya Sintaani tuumu tuma n ningbina wa ni nti mugsi ma hoo goaa ŋɔn yi bɛ ni n‑kusiri ma.

english_verse: Three times I begged the Lord to make this suffering go away.
translation_verse: Napɔmbuta ka n daa susi ti Dugma, ni, u nin kyɛ ka ka yi ka kyɛ ma.

english_verse: But he replied, “My gift of undeserved grace is all you need. My power is strongest when you are weak.” So if Christ keeps giving me his power, I will gladly brag about how weak I am.
translation_verse: Amaa u daa yɛli ma, ni, “M piini la bɛ ni, halli nyin bu sumni di la, ka di nin sa'asi n‑ti i. Dama n yiiko zoaari m‑paari ka tɔriga n‑tiri bugsim daandima maa.” Dinzugu n nin maali n‑nyu bara man bugsa seem la zugu. Lala nin kyɛ ka Kirisita yiiko nin kpalim m‑bɛ n saani sahakam.

english_verse: Yes, I am glad to be weak or insulted or mistreated or to have troubles and sufferings, if it is for Christ. Because when I am weak, I am strong. Paul's Concern for the Lord's Followers at Corinth
translation_verse: Dinŋɔ zugu n nin nya sufudoaa man yi bugsa sahanseaa la, ni ban tuuri ma sahanseaa, ni wahala diibu saha gba; ka laa n‑nya sufudoaa namsa ni yɛlimugsa ni, di yi nyɛ Kirisita zugu. Man bukki ni maa, dina ka m mari la yaa.

english_verse: I have been making a fool of myself. But you forced me to do it, when you should have been speaking up for me. I may be nothing at all, but I am as good as those super apostles.
translation_verse: Tɔ: n leebi la gyɛrigu ka tɔ'asi gyɛrilim n‑naai. Yarim mun kyɛ ka n niŋi lala: yan daa yi zɛ n nyaaŋŋa di naa n‑sɔa. Ban boonni seeba, ni, ‘tumudima ban gaari zaa’ la muna - halli ni man pa seelli maa zaa, m bu pɔsigi ba ni.

english_verse: When I was with you, I was patient and worked all the powerful miracles and signs and wonders of a true apostle.
translation_verse: Bunseesi an wulisiri tuumumaŋni yɛla la ka n daa tumni ya saani, ana ni sugru diibu zaa: an mari alahazibu la, ni makkri yɛla, ni yiiko tuma nla.

english_verse: You missed out on only one blessing the other churches received. That is, you didn't have to support me. Forgive me for doing you wrong.
translation_verse: Bumbɔ saani ka ya daa fiilim m‑bu paai Naawunni niriba ban bɛ tinseesi la zaa maa ziiya? - ni, man daa bu zaŋŋi n yɛla m‑mugsi ya la zugu? Eeh, m badima, ya kyɛ n taalli kanŋɔ m‑pɛŋŋi ma!

english_verse: You agree that I wasn't a burden to you. Maybe that's because I was trying to catch you off guard and trick you.
translation_verse: Ni, tɔ! halli m bu zaŋŋi n yɛla m‑mugsi ya gba, amaa ni dinŋɔ zaa yɔri, man ŋɔn nyɛ yɔmsa zaa daana wa, n daa yɔmsi ya n‑gbaai ya.

english_verse: I urged Titus to visit you, and I sent another follower with him. But Titus didn't cheat you, and we felt and behaved the same way he did.
translation_verse: N daa bɛlim la Taituusi, ni, u kyɛ ya saani na, ka daa tum ti mabisɔ ni u dɔli u na m‑paasi. Tɔ, Taituusi daa fa ya neema? - Ay! u daa bu fa. Pa Sii yinni ni soori yinni maa ka ti dɔla la - m mammaŋŋa ni ban zaa?

english_verse: Have you been thinking all along that we have been defending ourselves to you? Actually, we have been speaking to God as followers of Christ. But, my friends, we did it all for your good.
translation_verse: Ka dinŋɔna ya yi teesiri, ni, ti tɔ'asiri ti yɛttɔ'a wa ni yarima ti kari ti yɛlli sariya? Ay, di pa lala, n zɔsuma! Ti bɛ la Kirisita saani ka ti tɔ'asiri Naawunni tooni. Ka tin niŋni seelli zaa nyɛ la din nin kpamsi ya.

english_verse: I am afraid when I come, we won't be pleased with each other. I fear that some of you may be arguing or jealous or angry or selfish or gossiping or insulting each other. I even fear that you may be proud and acting like a mob.
translation_verse: Dama n zɔri la dabeem, man ŋɔn teesi, ni, di yi pa seem n nin kyɛ na ka ku paai ya hoo man boori yan nyɛ seem la. Ka ya gba ku nya ma yan boori m bɛ seem maa. Ii, dabeem mari ma, ni, nangbankpeemni nin bɛ ni, ni nyuuri zappu, ni nyigbu, ni suuri, ni wɔligri, ni nyaanzum, ni galagala, ni karimbaani, ni basabasa zaa tuma an bu dɔli soori.

english_verse: I am afraid God will make me ashamed when I visit you again. I will feel like crying because many of you have never given up your old sins. You are still doing things that are immoral, indecent, and shameful.
translation_verse: Dabeem m mari ma yaasa, ni, n yi kyɛ na ka Naawunni nin laa n‑sigsi ma ya nini ni yaasa, ka n nin nya sufusa'aŋŋu pam ban pun tum tumbeeri la zugu, ka ba ku sakki n‑takki n‑yi lala yɛla ni. Ba tumbeeri wa bɛ la hoo da'ari tuma la, ni zina, ni kɔribeeri tuma an bu dɔli soori halli zaa.

english_verse: I am on my way to visit you for the third time. And as the Scriptures say, “Any charges must be proved true by at least two or three witnesses.”
translation_verse: N kyɛnni kanŋɔ nin paasi buta: ni, “Yɛlli kam zaa nin zaani suŋŋa, niriba ayi-ata yi di di sɛhara n‑dɔli la taaba.”

english_verse: During my second visit I warned you that I would punish you and anyone else who doesn't stop sinning. I am far away from you now, but I give you the same warning.
translation_verse: N buyi kyɛnni maa saha ka n daa pun bɛ ya saani nti daŋŋi n‑yɛli n yɛttɔ'a wa, ka man ŋɔn ka ya saani pampaŋŋɔ n ya maali n‑yɛli yaasa. Ni, n yi labi na n ku kyɛ ban daa pun tum tumbeeri la, ka ku laa n‑kyɛ baseeba ban paasi ba zugu la pampaŋŋɔa.

english_verse: This should prove to you that I am speaking for Christ. When he corrects you, he won't be weak. He will be powerful!
translation_verse: Di gbinni nyɛ la: ya daa boori la n wulisi ya ka ya baŋŋi, ni, Kirisita tɔ'asiri man yɛttɔ'a wa puuni. Tɔ: ya baŋŋma, ni, u pa la bumbugsiga n‑ti ya: ay! - u siri mari la yiiko ya saani.

english_verse: Although he was weak when he was nailed to the cross, he now lives by the power of God. We are weak, just as Christ was. But you will see that we will live by the power of God, just as Christ does.
translation_verse: U siri daa bukki ni ka ba daa kpaasi u n‑tabli dɔpulli zugu; amaa ni lala maa zaa yɔri, pampaŋŋɔ u mari la nyɔvuri m‑bɛ ni Naawunni yiiko zugu. Lala taabu ti gba la'am u saani m‑bukki, amaa Naawunni yiiko zugu ti nin bɛ u ni n‑tumni n‑tiri ya.

english_verse: Test yourselves and find out if you really are true to your faith. If you pass the test, you will discover that Christ is living in you. But if Christ isn't living in you, you have failed.
translation_verse: Ya viisim ya mansi n‑nya yan bɛ la yɛdda niŋbu maa ni, bee? - Ya zamsima ya mansi. Bee, ya na bu mi, ni, Yisa Kirisita bɛ la ya saani? Ya yi pa la seeba ban lu zamsigu ni, u bɛ ni.

english_verse: I hope you will discover we have not failed.
translation_verse: M mari tama, ni, ya nin ti baŋŋi, ni, tirima bu lu zamsigu ni.

english_verse: We pray you will stop doing evil things. We don't pray like this to make ourselves look good, but to get you to do right, even if we are failures.
translation_verse: Tɔ: ti susiri Naawunni, ni, ya ku tum din bu tu. Pa la ni niriba ti nya tirima, ni, ti nyaŋŋi zamsigu maa ni. Ay! - tin boori seem nyɛ la: ni, yarima nin tumni din tu, halli ni tirim bɛ la hoo ban lu zamsigu ni gba.

english_verse: All we can do is to follow the truth and not fight against it.
translation_verse: Dama ti ku toaai n‑niŋi seelli n‑galim yɛlimaŋni maa, see ka ti dɔli la yɛlimaŋni soori n‑tumna.

english_verse: Even though we are weak, we are glad that you are strong, and we pray you will do even better.
translation_verse: Ti yi ti bukki ka yan mun kpeem, ti mari sufupeelim di zugu. Ti kur susiri Naawunni, ni, ya nin nyaŋŋi seelikam suŋŋa.

english_verse: I am writing these things to you before I arrive. This way I won't have to be hard on you when I use the authority the Lord has given me. I was given this authority, so I could help you and not destroy you.
translation_verse: Lala zugu ka n sɔbri anŋɔ man na ka ya saani maa, ni n yi ti kyɛ na n ku mari kukɔri nyiim n‑zaŋŋi n yiiko m‑mugsiri ya. Ti Dugma zaŋŋi yiiko wa n‑ti ma, ni m maali ya yɛla ka a kyaŋŋi tooni ka ku labi nyaaŋŋa.

english_verse: Goodbye, my friends. Do better and pay attention to what I have said. Try to get along and live peacefully with each other. Now I pray that God, who gives love and peace, will be with you.
translation_verse: Yɛttɔ'a maa naari, m mabiisi, nyɛ la: ni, ya kpalim suŋŋa. Ya kyɛ ka ya kpaŋŋi ya mansi, kyɛ ka ya sufu kpamsi, ka mari nangbanyinni n‑ti taaba, ni sufudoaa zaa. Naawunni siri nyɛ la Sufudoaa ni Wurilim Daana, ka u nin bɛ ya saani.

english_verse: Give each other a warm greeting. All God's people send their greetings.
translation_verse: Ya puusima taaba suŋŋasuŋŋa ti wurilim puusigu ni. Tiŋŋa wa Naawunni niriba puusiri ya zaa na.

english_verse: From the apostle Paul and from all the Lord's followers with me. I was chosen to be an apostle by Jesus Christ and by God the Father, who raised him from death. No mere human chose or appointed me to this work. To the churches in Galatia:
translation_verse: Man ni ti mabiseeba ban bɛ kpa m‑paasi n zugu n‑sɔbri n‑tiri yarima - ya Naawunni la'aŋŋu dima zaa ban bɛ la Galɛseaa tingbaŋŋu ni.

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
translation_verse: Ti Ba Naawunni ni ti Dugma Yisa Masiiya nin ti ya piinisuma ni alaafɛa zaa.

english_verse: Christ obeyed God our Father and gave himself as a sacrifice for our sins to rescue us from this evil world.
translation_verse: Din yɛ n‑kyɛ ka ti tuligi n‑yi zuna tumbeeri sahabeoo puuni nŋɔa#:- ŋɔn Yisa Kirisita daa zaŋŋi u maŋŋa n‑tisi, ti tumbeeri zugu; ka di daa dɔli ti Ba Naawunni ŋɔn daa boori seem.

english_verse: God will be given glory forever and ever. Amen. The Only True Message
translation_verse: Tibgri bɛ la ŋɔn Naawunni saani halli saha din ka tɔriga! Ammi.

english_verse: I am shocked that you have so quickly turned from God, who chose you with his gift of undeserved grace. You have believed another message,
translation_verse: Di gyɛri ma pam ya yɛla zugu! Dama di na bu yuui ka ya zaa daa ŋmaligi n‑za'asi ninvugsɔ ŋɔn daa booli ya u saani na, u piinisuma la zugu, ka ya daa dee n‑sakki n‑tiri lahabasunseaa.

english_verse: when there is really only one true message. But some people are causing you trouble and want to make you turn away from the good news about Christ.
translation_verse: Yɛlimaŋni, ‘lahabasunseaa’ laa n‑ka ni, amaa n dee n‑yɛtti la lala, dama ninvugseeba bɛ ni n‑gyɛtti ya yɛm ka kpaŋŋni ba mansi ni ba takki Yisa Kirisita lahabasuŋŋu maa.

english_verse: I pray that God will punish anyone who preaches anything different from our message to you! It doesn't matter if that person is one of us or an angel from heaven.
translation_verse: Amaa di yi ti nyɛ tirima - bee, halli malaaka ŋɔn yi arizana ni na gba - n yi mooli lahabasuŋŋu n‑ti ya ka ka bɛ ka kɔkɔ ka kyɛ tin daa mooli lahabasunseaa n‑ti ya la, ŋɔn sa'amma m‑basi bugum puuni halli saha kan ka naari.

english_verse: I have said it before, and I will say it again. I hope God will punish anyone who preaches anything different from what you have already believed.
translation_verse: Ti daa pun yɛli lala, ka n laa n‑yɛtti ya wa yaasa: nira kam yi mooli lahabaseaa n‑ti ya ka ka bɛ ka kɔkɔ ka kyɛ yan daa pun deaai seaa maa, di daama ŋɔn sa'amma m‑basi halli saha kan ka naari!

english_verse: I am not trying to please people. I want to please God. Do you think I am trying to please people? If I were doing that, I would not be a servant of Christ. How Paul Became an Apostle
translation_verse: Kala, dinŋɔ ŋmani kaman n boori la ni ninsaalidima nini tigi ma? Bee, Naawunni nintigri ka m boora? Ni, n kpaŋŋni n maŋŋa la ni sɔkam ti baŋŋi n yɛla, fa! Ay! - N da naa m‑boori n niŋi lala, n da naa n‑ku niŋi Kirisita tuntumna, walla!

english_verse: My friends, I want you to know that no one made up the message I preach.
translation_verse: Ya kyɛ ka n yɛli ya, m mabiisi, ni, lahabasunseaa man daa mooli n‑ti ya maa pa la ninsaala dinni.

english_verse: It wasn't given or taught to me by some mere human. My message came directly from Jesus Christ when he appeared to me.
translation_verse: N daa bu deaai ka sɔsɔ saani, bee, sɔ n daa zaŋŋi ka n‑wulisi ma. Di daa nyɛ la Yisa Masiiya mammaŋŋa ŋɔn daa kasigi ka n‑ti ma.

english_verse: You know how I used to live as a Jew. I was cruel to God's church and even tried to destroy it.
translation_verse: Ya daa pun wum sahanseaa man daa na dɔli la Yɛhudiyadima addiini soori la yɛla. Ni, n daa kur namsiri la Naawunni la'aŋŋu dima ka daa bu zɔri ba namboo, ka daa laa n‑kpaŋŋi m maŋŋa ni n sa'am ba yɛla zaa.

english_verse: I was a much better Jew than anyone else my own age, and I obeyed every law our ancestors had given us.
translation_verse: N daa bɛ la Yɛhudiyadima addiini soori ni nimbirimoaa n‑gaari n taaba maa, ka kur zaŋŋi saha n‑dɔla ti yaadima addiini kaya deede.

english_verse: to show me his Son, so I would announce his message to the Gentiles. I didn't talk this over with anyone.
translation_verse: u daa kasigi u Bii n‑wulisi ma, din yɛ n‑kyɛ ka n moonni yɛttɔ'amaŋa maa lahabaari n‑tisi ban pa Yɛhudiyadima maa. Lala saha maa n daa bu kyaŋŋi ninsaalisɔ saani nti deaai noori kpaaŋŋu,

english_verse: I didn't say a word, not even to the men in Jerusalem who were apostles before I was. Instead, I went at once to Arabia, and afterwards I returned to Damascus.
translation_verse: n mun daa bu kyaŋŋi Gyɛrusalɛm nti nya tuumudima ban daa bɛ ni n‑daŋŋi n tooni tuumu tuma puuni la. Amaa n daa na'a kyaŋŋi la Arabii tingbaŋŋu la ni, ka naayi labi Damasikusi timpuuni na.

english_verse: The only other apostle I saw was James, the Lord's brother.
translation_verse: N daa bu nya tuumusɔ yaasa ka di pa ni Gyeemsi kɔkɔa, ti Dugma tunzɔ la.

english_verse: And in the presence of God I swear I am telling the truth.
translation_verse: Man sɔbi seelli wa nyɛ la yɛlimaŋni. Naawunni gba mi, ni, n bu ma'ari ziri!

english_verse: Later, I went to the regions of Syria and Cilicia.
translation_verse: Di nyaaŋŋa n daa kyaŋŋi la Siriiya ni Silisii tingbana ya'aseesi.

english_verse: But no one who belonged to Christ's churches in Judea had ever seen me in person.
translation_verse: Lala saha maa ka Kirisita la'aŋŋu ninvugseeba ban daa bɛ Gyuudiiya tingbaŋŋu ni la daa na zi n‑nya ma.

english_verse: They had only heard that the one who had been cruel to them was now preaching the message that he had once tried to destroy.
translation_verse: Ba daa na'a kur wumni la lahabaari, ni, “Dɔsɔ ŋɔn daa namsiri ti saha din gaari la - ŋɔna yi moonni la yɛdda yɛla pampaŋŋɔa, halli ŋɔn daa kur kpaŋŋi u maŋŋa ni u sa'am a m‑basi la!”

english_verse: And because of me, they praised God.
translation_verse: Ka dizugu daa kyɛ ka ba daa pɛ'ai ka tibgi Naawunni man zugu.

english_verse: Fourteen years later I went to Jerusalem with Barnabas. I also took along Titus.
translation_verse: Yuumpii ni anaasi nyaaŋŋa, man ni Baanabasi daa laa n‑labi Gyɛrusalɛm, ka n daa zaŋŋi Taituusi m‑paasi ka ti daa kyaŋŋi.

english_verse: But I went there because God had told me to go, and I explained the good news I had been preaching to the Gentiles. Then I met privately with the ones who seemed to be the most important leaders. I wanted to make sure my work in the past and my future work would not be for nothing.
translation_verse: Din daa kyɛ ka n kyaŋŋi daa nyɛ la Naawunni ŋɔn daa kasigi n‑ti ma, ni, n kyɛma. N daa zaŋŋi n lahabasuŋŋu maa yɛla n‑wulisi ba, Naawunni lahabasunseaa man daa moonni n‑tiri ninvugseeba ban pa Yɛhudiyadima la. N daa wulisi lala lahabaari m mammaŋŋa, n‑ti baseeba ban daa nyɛ ninvugtibsa la'aŋŋu dima puuni la kɔkɔa, dama n daa bu boori man daa pun tum tunseesi la, bee, man daa na tumni tunseesi maa, daa yi leebi tunyɔya.

english_verse: Titus went to Jerusalem with me. He was a Greek, but still he wasn't forced to be circumcised.
translation_verse: Amaa n dɔlinkpeaa Taituusi, halli ni ŋɔn daa nyɛ Griika doo maa zaa yɔri, u daa bu nya mugsi gunibu zugu.

english_verse: We went there because of those who pretended to be followers and had sneaked in among us as spies. They had come to take away the freedom Christ Jesus had given us, and they were trying to make us their slaves.
translation_verse: Ay! - di daa nyɛ la yɔmsigu dima maa zugu, baseeba ban daa ma'ai ziri, ni, ba nyɛ la ban niŋi yɛdda: niriba wa daa kpɛ ti saani na, ni ba ti sɔ'ai m‑baŋŋi ti yɔlisimma yɛla maa - tin mari yɔlisinseaa Yisa Masiiya dɔligu zugu la - dama ba daa boori la ba zaŋŋi ti n‑leebi daaba.

english_verse: But we wanted you to have the true message. This is why we didn't give in to them, not even for a second.
translation_verse: Amaa ti daa bu kyɛ nini n‑ti ba, halli beela, ni ti ti kyɛ ka Naawunni yɛlimaŋni lahabasuŋŋu maa kpalim m‑bɛ ya saani n‑ti ya.

english_verse: Some of them were supposed to be important leaders, but I didn't care who they were. God doesn't have any favorites! None of these so-called special leaders added anything to my message.
translation_verse: Amaa ninvugseeba ban daa bɛ ni kaman zuguraandima la muna - man mun ba'a ka ba zuguraantiri yɛla ni, zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ban daa nyɛ seem; dama Naawunni bu gamsiri n‑tibgri niriba - zuguraandima wa daa bu zaŋŋi yɛlipaaliseaa m‑paasi ma.

english_verse: They realized God had sent me with the good news for Gentiles, and he had sent Peter with the same message for Jews.
translation_verse: Amaa ba daa baŋŋiya, ni, Naawunni daa zaŋŋi la lahabasuŋŋu mooligu n‑ti ma, ni n deaai n‑zaŋŋi m‑moonni n‑tiri ban pa Yɛhudiyadima maa, kaman ŋɔn daa pun zaŋŋi mooligu wa n‑tisi Piita, ni u zaŋŋi m‑mooli n‑ti Yɛhudiyadima seem la.

english_verse: God, who had sent Peter on a mission to the Jews, was now using me to preach to the Gentiles.
translation_verse: Naawunni daa kyɛ ka u yiiko puuni ka Piita daa niŋi tuumu n‑ti ban nyɛ Yɛhudiyadima maa, ka Ŋɔn daa kyɛ ka man gba daa leebi tuumu lala n‑tisi ban pa Yɛhudiyadima maa.

english_verse: James, Peter, and John realized that God had given me the message about his gift of undeserved grace. And these men are supposed to be the backbone of the church. They even gave Barnabas and me a friendly handshake. This was to show that we would work with Gentiles and that they would work with Jews.
translation_verse: Ba daa baŋŋiya, ni, Naawunni zaŋŋi la lahabasuŋŋu n‑ti ma, u wurilim zugu - di nyɛ la Gyeemsi, ni Siifasi Piita, ni Gyɔni, ninvugseeba niriba ŋɔn gɔsiri hoo ti la'aŋŋu duu zaantɔlisi. Ka lala maa zugu ka ba daa gbaai n nuu - man ni Baanabasi zaa - n‑wulisi, ni, tin ni ban nyɛ la bunyinni: ka daa sakki, ni, mani ni Baanabasi yɛ n‑tumni n‑tiri la ban pa Yɛhudiyadima, ka ban mun tumni n‑tisiri ban nyɛ Yɛhudiyadima maa.

english_verse: They only asked us to remember the poor, and this was something I had always been eager to do. Paul Corrects Peter at Antioch
translation_verse: Ni, see ka ti teaari ba faradima maa yɛla, din nyɛ man gba ŋɔn boori n niŋi seelli la ni nimbirimoaa.

english_verse: When Peter came to Antioch, I told him face to face that he was wrong.
translation_verse: Amaa Siifasi ŋɔn daa ti kyɛ Antiyɔkku na, n daa galim u pam paalu ni, dama ŋɔn daa siri kur tumni seem maa daa bu tu.

english_verse: But when I saw they were not really obeying the truth that is in the good news, I corrected Peter in front of everyone and said: Peter, you are a Jew, but you live like a Gentile. So how can you force Gentiles to live like Jews?
translation_verse: Man ŋɔn daa ti nya ka ba daa bu dɔli lahabasuŋŋu maa soori ni yɛlimaŋni, n daa zɛ la ba zaa tooni nti yɛli Siifasi, ni, “Nyin nyɛ la Yɛhudiya nira, amaa ka i bɛ la ban pa Yɛhudiyadima maa beesigu, ka bu ŋmani Yɛhudiyadoowa. Ka di kyaŋŋi la wula ka i boori i mugsi ban pa Yɛhudiyadima maa ka ba bɛ ni kaman Yɛhudiyadima?”

english_verse: We are Jews by birth and are not sinners like Gentiles.
translation_verse: Tirim muna - ba dɔ'ai ti la Yɛhudiyadima, ka pa la ban pa Yɛhudiyadima, tin boonni seeba, ni, ‘ala'akyi dima’ la.

english_verse: But we know that God accepts only those who have faith in Jesus Christ. No one can please God by simply obeying the Law. So we put our faith in Christ Jesus, and God accepted us because of our faith.
translation_verse: Ti baŋŋiya, ni, nira m bɛ yɛlimaŋni daana Naawunni tooni la ŋɔn kur niŋi Yisa Masiiya yɛdda zugu, ka pa la fukumsi zaalikpana ŋɔn wulisi seem dɔligu zugu. Ka dizugu ti niŋi Kirisita Yisa yɛdda, ni ti leebi la yɛlimaŋni dima lala yɛdda zugu, pa zaalikpana dɔligu zugu: dama sɔsɔ ku toaai m‑bɛ yɛlimaŋni daana kasikasi, zaalikpana dɔligu zugu.

english_verse: When we Jews started looking for a way to please God, we discovered that we are sinners too. Does this mean that Christ is the one who makes us sinners? No, it doesn't!
translation_verse: Tɔ, ka dinŋɔna ti kpaŋŋni ti mansi ni ti yi taalli ni Naawunni saani hoo yɛlimaŋni dima, ka di nyɛ la tin la'am ni Kirisita la zugu; ka di saha ka ti nya m‑baŋŋi, ni, ti nyɛ la ala'akyi dima, kaman ban pun pa Yɛhudiyadima la ŋɔn nyɛ seem. Kala, dinŋɔ wulisiya, ni, Masiiya zɛ la ala'akyi tumpu nyaaŋŋa? Ay - soori ka ni gba!

english_verse: But if I tear down something and then build it again, I prove that I was wrong at first.
translation_verse: Ka n yi piili n‑yɛ m‑mɛ man daa pun tɛ zaalikpanseesi m‑basi la, dinŋɔna n wulisiri m mammaŋŋa yɛla, ni, n nyɛ la ŋɔn burigi zaaligu.

english_verse: It was the Law itself that killed me and freed me from its power, so I could live for God. I have been nailed to the cross with Christ.
translation_verse: Fukumsi zaaligudima ŋɔn bɛ ni zugu, n daa kpi n‑ti zaaligu wa yɛla; din yɛ kyɛ ka n ti bɛ ni n‑tiri Naawunni. Man pun la'am n‑kpi Kirisita Masiiya dɔpulli maa zugu.

english_verse: I have died, but Christ lives in me. And I now live by faith in the Son of God, who loved me and gave his life for me.
translation_verse: Dinzugu di laa m‑pa la mani m bɛ ni, amaa di nyɛ la Kirisita m bɛ ma ni zugu. Nyɔvuriseaa ni man bɛ duniya wa ni pampaŋŋɔa, Naawunni Bii maa yɛdda zugu ka m bɛ ni, dama u wuri ma pam ka daa yiisi u nyɔvuri n‑tisi man zugu.

english_verse: I don't turn my back on God's gift of undeserved grace. If we can be acceptable to God by obeying the Law, it was useless for Christ to die.
translation_verse: Man mun ku sakki, ni, n za'asi Naawunni piini suma wa. Amaa di yi nyɛ la fukumsi zaaligudima zugu ka nira nin toaai n‑yi taalli puuni Naawunni saani hoo yɛlimaŋni daana, dinŋɔna Kirisita Masiiya kum maa daa ka gbinni!

english_verse: You stupid Galatians! I told you exactly how Jesus Christ was nailed to a cross. Has someone now put an evil spell on you?
translation_verse: Yarim Galɛseaa dima wa! Yan gyɛra dima wa! Ŋɔni n lee n‑zaŋŋi u tiima n‑kyirim ya wa? Ya mammantoori nini n daa nya m‑baŋŋi Yisa Masiiya kum maa yɛla, ni, ba daa kpaasi u n‑tabli dɔpulli zugu!

english_verse: I want to know only one thing. How were you given God's Spirit? Was it by obeying the Law of Moses or by hearing about Christ and having faith in him?
translation_verse: Ya yɛlim ma yɛlli yinni wa: ammi, ya daa deaai Naawunni Siiya Vuusim Kasi yan daa tum la zaaligudima ŋɔn wulisi seem tuma zugu, bee, yan daa wum lahabasuŋŋu la ka daa niŋi ka yɛdda zugu?

english_verse: How can you be so stupid? Do you think that by yourself you can complete what God's Spirit started in you?
translation_verse: Wula zugu ka ya lee n‑nyɛ gyɛra lala? Ya daa piili la ni Naawunni Sii Kasi maa; ya boori la ya ti naai ni ya mammantoori yiiko?

english_verse: Have you gone through all of this for nothing? Is it all really for nothing?
translation_verse: Ammi, yan daa di wahala seem wa, di daa ka gbinni halli beela? Di yi ti nyɛ la, ni, di siri daa ka gbinni!

english_verse: God gives you his Spirit and works miracles in you. But does he do this because you obey the Law of Moses or because you have heard about Christ and have faith in him?
translation_verse: Naawunni ŋɔn zaŋŋi u Sii Kasi n‑ti ya la, ka tum alahazibu tuntumsa n‑ti ya, zaaligudima tumpu zugu n‑daa la? bee, yan daa wum la Naawunni lahabasuŋŋu la ka niŋi ka yɛdda la zugu?

english_verse: And so, you should understand that everyone who has faith is a child of Abraham.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔna ya baŋŋma, ni, Ibrahim ya'ansi ni yɛlimaŋni n nyɛ ninvugseeba ban mari yɛdda la.

english_verse: Long ago the Scriptures said God would accept the Gentiles because of their faith. This is why God told Abraham the good news that all nations would be blessed because of him.
translation_verse: Litaafi wulisiya, ni, Naawunni nin ti deaai ban pa Yɛhudiyadima maa hoo yɛlimaŋni dima ba yɛdda niŋbu maa zugu. Ka dizugu ka Litaafi daa daŋŋi m‑mooli lahabasuma maa n‑tisi Ibrahim, ni, “Nyin zugu ka duniya wa niriba zaa nin nya zugsuŋŋu”.

english_verse: This means everyone who has faith will share in the blessings given to Abraham because of his faith.
translation_verse: Ibrahim daa nyɛ yɛdda daana ka daa nya bunsuma nangbambasiri maa di zugu, ka lala ka ŋɔn kam zaa niŋi yɛdda nin ti nya bunsuma la, kaman Ibrahim ŋɔn daa nya seem maa taabu.

english_verse: Anyone who tries to please God by obeying the Law is under a curse. The Scriptures say, “Everyone who doesn't obey everything in the Law is under a curse.”
translation_verse: Ban kur zaŋŋi ba mansi n‑sakki n‑tiri zaaligudima tumpu la yɛla, ban m bɛ la mbusu yɛla puuni. Dama Litaafi pun yɛli, ni, “Ŋɔn kam bu kpalim n‑sakkri n‑deaari bunseelli kam din sɔbi n‑dooli zaalikpana gbaŋŋu la puuni n‑niŋni a ni, mbusu bɛ di daama zugu.”

english_verse: No one can please God by obeying the Law. The Scriptures also say, “The people God accepts because of their faith will live.”
translation_verse: Dinŋɔna di wulisiya, ni, sɔsɔ ku yi taalli Naawunni saani hoo yɛlimaŋni daana, fukumsi zaaligudima zugu: dama Litaafi yɛliya, ni, “Yɛlimaŋni daana nin nya nyɔvuri u yɛdda niŋbu zugu.”

english_verse: But Christ rescued us from the Law's curse, when he became a curse in our place. This is because the Scriptures say that anyone who is nailed to a tree is under a curse.
translation_verse: Amaa Kirisita Masiiya mammaŋŋa daa leebi la mbusu tuuri, ni u ti suŋŋi ti ka yiisi ti mbusu galinsi ni na - seesi zaaligu ŋɔn daa mari ti a puuni la; dama Litaafi yɛliya, ni, “Ban zaŋŋi ninvugsɔ zaa n‑yuli doo zugu ni u ti kpi la - Naawunni mbusu bɛ la di daama zugu.”

english_verse: And because of what Jesus Christ has done, the blessing promised to Abraham was taken to the Gentiles. This happened so that by faith we would be given the promised Holy Spirit. The Law and the Promise
translation_verse: Ŋɔn Kirisita daa niŋi lala, ni u kyɛ ka di ti paai ban kam pa Yɛhudiyadima la - Naawunni zugsuŋŋu bunseesi ŋɔn daa pun basi nangbambasiri n‑tisi Ibrahim la nin paai ba na. Ŋɔn Yisa Masiiya zugu ka ba ti deaai a. Dinzugu ti yɛdda puuni ti nin toaai n‑deaai Vuusim Kasi maa, hoo Naawunni ŋɔn daa pun basi nangbambasiri maa.

english_verse: My friends, I will use an everyday example to explain what I mean. Once someone agrees to something, no one else can change or cancel the agreement.
translation_verse: M mabiisi, n yɛ zaŋŋi la ti beoo kam yɛla n‑ŋmansi n‑wulisi ya#:- tɔ, niriba ayi yi ti zaali yɛttɔkka ka sakki n‑ti taaba, sɔ ku toaai n‑kpiisi ka, bee, m‑paasi ka seela.

english_verse: That is how it is with the promises God made to Abraham and his descendant. The promises were not made to many descendants, but only to one, and that one is Christ.
translation_verse: Tɔ; ka Naawunni daa basi nangbambasiri n‑tisi, ni, ‘Ibrahim nyaaŋŋa’. Litaafi bu tɔ'asiri la nyaaŋŋa dima pam yɛla amaa, ni, ‘nyaaŋŋa’ - ninvugyinni kɔkɔa. Di nyɛ la: ni, Kirisita Masiiya maa.

english_verse: If we have to obey the Law in order to receive God's blessings, those blessings don't really come to us because of God's promise. But God was kind to Abraham and made him a promise.
translation_verse: Dama Naawunni piini yi da dɔli fukumsi zaaligudima maa, dinŋɔna di daa bu naa n‑dɔli u nangbambasiri maa yaasa. Amaa u nangbambasiri basibu zugu ka Naawunni daa zaŋŋi piini maa n‑tisi Ibrahim.

english_verse: What is the use of the Law? It was given later to show that we sin. But it was only supposed to last until the coming of that descendant who was given the promise. In fact, angels gave the Law to Moses, and he gave it to the people.
translation_verse: Tɔ, ka fukumsi zaaligu maa gbinni? Ka daa paasiya, ni ka yɛ n‑wulisi tumbeeri ŋɔn nyɛ seela, ka laa n‑wulisi, ni, ka yɛ m‑bɛ ni n‑guusira, halli ka Ibrahim ‘nyaaŋŋa’ la ti yi na, ban daa basi nangbambasiri maa n‑ti sɔ la. Malaakadima saani ka lala fukumsi zaaligu maa daa paai na ka di bɛ la sindaanzɔtta nuu ni.

english_verse: There is only one God, and the Law did not come directly from him. Slaves and Children
translation_verse: Tɔ: ka sindaani daana yɛttɔ'a pa la ninvugyinni kɔkɔ saani; Naawunni mun n nyɛ yinni.

english_verse: Does the Law disagree with God's promises? No, it doesn't! If any law could give life to us, we could become acceptable to God by obeying that law.
translation_verse: Kala, di wulisiya, ni, lala fukumsi zaaligudima maa galim la Naawunni nangbambasiri maa? Ay, halli beela! Dama ninsaala yi daa nyaŋŋi n‑deaai zaaligu seaa kan mari nyɔvuri, dinŋɔna sɔkam siri da naa n‑niŋi yɛlimaŋni daana, zaaligu maa zugu.

english_verse: But the Scriptures say that sin controls everyone, so that God's promises will be for anyone who has faith in Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Amaa Litaafi yɛliya, ni, duniya wa zaa bɛ la ala'akyi tumbeeri yiiko suulinsi puuni; ka dizugu kyɛ ka piiniseesi an bɛ nangbambasiri maa puuni, zaŋŋi n‑kpa yɛdda zugu la, nin nyɛ la ninvugseeba ban mari yɛdda la dina.

english_verse: The Law controlled us and kept us under its power until the time came when we would have faith.
translation_verse: Amaa yɛdda saha maa ŋɔn daa na bu paai na, fukumsi zaalikpana maa daa kur guri ti kaman dansarika dima, halli ka yɛdda yɛla kyɛnni na ti yi paalu.

english_verse: In fact, the Law was to be our teacher until Christ came. Then we could have faith and be acceptable to God.
translation_verse: Dinzugu zaaligu maa daa su ti yɛla zaa kyappi, halli ka Kirisita ti paai na, din ti yɛ kyɛ ka ti yi Naawunni taalli puuni hoo yɛlimaŋni dima, ti yɛdda niŋbu zugu.

english_verse: But once a person has learned to have faith, there is no more need to have the Law as a teacher.
translation_verse: Pampaŋŋɔ yɛdda saha ŋɔn yi paai na wa, ti bu laa m‑boori fukumsi nti su ti n‑gura.

english_verse: All of you are God's children because of your faith in Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Di nyɛ la Kirisita Yisa yɛdda la zugu ka yarima zaa n nyɛ Naawunni biisi.

english_verse: And when you were baptized, it was as though you had put on Christ in the same way you put on new clothes.
translation_verse: Ya ninvugseeba zaa ban daa su Naawunni koom la Yisa Masiiya puuni, ya daa zaŋŋi u n‑yɛ hoo ban yeeri sutura la.

english_verse: Faith in Christ Jesus is what makes each of you equal with each other, whether you are a Jew or a Greek, a slave or a free person, a man or a woman.
translation_verse: Ka dinzugu Yisa saani ka Yɛhudiyadima ni ban pa Yɛhudiyadima yɛla laa n‑ka ni, bee, daaba ni ban su ba mansi yɛla, bee, dappa ni pɔ'aba yɛla - anŋɔ zaa laa n‑ka ni. Ya zaasa nyɛ la bunyinni Kirisita Yisa Masiiya puuni.

english_verse: So if you belong to Christ, you are now part of Abraham's family, and you will be given what God has promised.
translation_verse: Ya yi nyɛ la Kirisita ŋɔn su seeba, tɔ, ka dinzugu ya nyɛ la Ibrahim nyaaŋŋa dima, ka ya nin ti deaai Naawunni ŋɔn daa basi nangbambasiseesi maa.

english_verse: Children who are under age are no better off than slaves, even though everything their parents own will someday be theirs.
translation_verse: Amaa n yɛtti ya wa, ni, bisɔ yi di u ba faari ka na nyɛ bipɔlli, lala saha maa u yi bɛ la kaman daabri ŋɔn bɛ seem la, halli ŋɔn kur su bunseelli kam maa zaa yɔri.

english_verse: This is because children are placed in the care of guardians and teachers until the time their parents have set.
translation_verse: Ŋɔn yi na nyɛ bipɔlli sahaseaa maa, seeba n yi su u fukumsi ka maanni u yɛla kam zaa n‑tiri u, halli ka u ba maa ŋɔn daa zaali sahaseelli maa yi ti paai.

english_verse: This is how it was with us. We were like children ruled by the powers of this world.
translation_verse: Lala maa taabu n daa nyɛ di n‑tiri tirima, ka ti gba daa bɛ hoo daaba n‑tisi siseeba ban su duniya wa fukumsi pɔi, ka ti daa ti zoaai na n‑sa'ai m‑paai niriba ni yɛlimaŋni.

english_verse: But when the time was right, God sent his Son, and a woman gave birth to him. His Son obeyed the Law,
translation_verse: Amaa nimbirimoaa saha ŋɔn daa ti paai, Naawunni daa tum la u Bii na. U daa kyɛ na kaman ninsaala ka u ma daa dɔ'ai u ni u ti bɛ Yɛhudiyadima zaalikpana la suulinsi ni.

english_verse: so he could set us free from the Law, and we could become God's children.
translation_verse: U daa niŋi lala ni u ti suŋŋi ban daa bɛ zaalikpana maa suulinsi puuni la, ni di kyɛ ka tirima ti leebi Naawunni biisi.

english_verse: Now that we are his children, God has sent the Spirit of his Son into our hearts. And his Spirit tells us that God is our Father.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔ n wulisi, ni, ya siri nyɛ la u biisi, ni, Naawunni daa tum u Biiya Sii Kasi na n‑kpeesi ti sufu ni. Ŋɔna n nyɛ Sisɔ ŋɔn kaasiri m‑boonna, ni, “Abba!”, bee ‘M Ba, m Ba!’

english_verse: You are no longer slaves. You are God's children, and you will be given what he has promised. Paul's Concern for the Galatians
translation_verse: Ka dinzugu pampaŋŋɔ i laa m‑pa la u daabri amaa u biiya. Ka nyin ŋɔn nyɛ u bii maa zugu, Naawunni nin zaŋŋi ŋɔn mari bunseela ni u tisi u biisi la n‑ti i.

english_verse: Before you knew God, you were slaves of gods that are not real.
translation_verse: Daadaa la ya daa na bu mi Naawunni, ka dizugu ya daa nyɛ la daaba, halli ka ban daa su ya daa pa la Naawummaŋni.

english_verse: My friends, I beg you to be like me, just as I once tried to be like you. Did you mistreat me
translation_verse: M mabiisi, n bɛlimni ya ni, ni, ya bɛ ni hoo man bɛ seem wa, dama man gba daa bɛ la hoo yan bɛ seem maa. Ya bu tum ma taaliseaa zaa.

english_verse: when I first preached to you? No you didn't, even though you knew I had come there because I was sick.
translation_verse: Ya teaama man ŋɔn daa daŋŋi m‑mooli lahabasuŋŋu maa n‑ti ya sahanseaa la; di daa kur nyɛ la dooru ŋɔn daa mari ma la zugu.

english_verse: My illness must have caused you some trouble, but you didn't hate me or turn me away because of it. You welcomed me as though I were one of God's angels or even Christ Jesus himself.
translation_verse: Halli ni n ningbina yɛla ŋɔn daa mugsi ya pam maa zaa yɔri, ya daa bu yi n nyaaŋŋa, bee, n‑kari ma. Amaa ya daa deaai mani kaman yan nin deaai arizana ni malaakasɔ seem, bee, hoo yan daa deaai Yisa Masiiya seem la.

english_verse: Where is that good feeling now? I am sure if it had been possible, you would have taken out your own eyes and given them to me.
translation_verse: Ya daa mari sufupeelli pam! Ka bɔ n niŋi? Man mammaŋŋa nin toaai n‑yɛli, ni, ya yi daa naa n‑toaai n‑fugsi ya toori nimbiya n‑ti ma gba, ya daa naa n‑niŋi lala.

english_verse: Am I now your enemy, just because I told you the truth?
translation_verse: Tɔ, ka man yi leebi la ya dindaana, man daa tɔ'asi yɛlimaŋni maa zugu?

english_verse: Those people may be paying you a lot of attention, but it isn't for your good. They only want to keep you away from me, so you will pay them a lot of attention.
translation_verse: Ninvugseeba wulisiri la ba wurilim n‑ti ya nimmoosi, amaa ka ba sufu ni teesa bɛa. Ban boori ba niŋi ya seem kur nyɛ la, ni, ba wɔligi ya ka kyɛ ma, din nin kyɛ ka ya gba wurilim nimmoaa ti leebi ba dinni.

english_verse: It is always good to give your attention to something worthwhile, even when I am not with you.
translation_verse: Tɔ, di sumsi ni ya mari wurilim ni nimbirimoaa, kan nin mari gbinni din veela: ka mari lala saha kam zaa, ka pa la man ŋɔn yi ti bɛ ya saani maa kɔkɔa.

english_verse: I wish I were with you now. Then I would not have to talk this way. You really have me puzzled. Hagar and Sarah
translation_verse: N daa kur boori la n da bɛ ya saani pampaŋŋɔa, din da naa n‑kyɛ ka n takki man ŋɔn tɔ'asiri seem n‑tiri ya. Di mugsi ma pam ya zugu!

english_verse: Some of you would like to be under the rule of the Law of Moses. But do you know what the Law says?
translation_verse: Kyɛ ka n boosi yarim ninvugseeba ban boori ba bɛ zaaligu suulinsi ni la: ya daa bu wum fukumsi zaaligudima maa ŋɔn wulisi seem, bee?

english_verse: In the Scriptures we learn that Abraham had two sons. The mother of one of them was a slave, while the mother of the other one had always been free.
translation_verse: Dama di sɔbi n‑dooli, ni, Ibrahim daa mari la bidibsi ayi; ka yinni daa nyɛ daabpɔ'a biiya, ka ŋɔnla mun daa nyɛ birikyimpɔ'a biiya.

english_verse: The son of the slave woman was born in the usual way. But the son of the free woman was born because of God's promise.
translation_verse: Ba daa kur dɔ'ai u bisɔ ŋɔn daa nyɛ pɔ'adaabri bii maa la hoo pɔ'a ŋɔn kur dɔ'ari bii kam zaa seem maa; amaa u bisɔ ŋɔn daa nyɛ birikyimpɔ'a la bii maa ŋɔna, ba daa dɔ'ai ŋɔnla Naawunni nangbambasiri basibu puuni.

english_verse: All of this has another meaning as well. Each of the two women stands for one of the agreements God made with his people. Hagar, the slave woman, stands for the agreement that was made at Mount Sinai. Everyone born into her family is a slave.
translation_verse: Yɛttɔ'a wa nyɛ la hoo yɛttɔ'anyɛsa, ka a mari la gbinni n‑tiri ya: pɔ'aba ayi wa zɛ la nangbanyinni loobu yɛttɔ'a ayi zaani. Pɔ'asɔ ŋɔn daa dɔ'ai biisi daabtiri puuni la nyɛ la Hagaara, ŋɔna n zɛ Sainayi zoori la zaani.

english_verse: Hagar also stands for Mount Sinai in Arabia and for the present city of Jerusalem. She and her children are slaves.
translation_verse: Tɔ: Sainayi zoori wa zɛ la Arabii tingbaŋŋu la ni - Hagaara nla. Ka ka mun zɛ la Gyɛrusalɛm tiŋŋa zaani - pampaŋŋɔ Gyɛrusalɛm la - dama ŋɔn Hagaara daa nyɛ la daabri, ka Gyɛrusalɛm wa niriba kur bɛ la daabtiri ni.

english_verse: But our mother is the city of Jerusalem in heaven above, and she isn't a slave.
translation_verse: Amaa arizana ni Gyɛrusalɛm la su ka maŋŋa; ti ma maa nla.

english_verse: The Scriptures say about her, “You have never had children, but now you can be glad. You have never given birth, but now you can shout. Once you had no children, but now you will have more children than a woman who has been married for a long time.”
translation_verse: Dama Litaafi yɛliya, ni#:- “Nyin pɔ'akundɔ'ara wa, Na kur mari sufupeelim! Kaasima ka tasiri ni sufumaasim, Nyin ŋɔn na zi n‑nya bidɔ'am beerim! Pɔ'aziiliŋŋa nin ti mari biisi pam n‑gaari pɔ'asɔ ŋɔn bɛ doo yiri.”

english_verse: My friends, you were born because of this promise, just as Isaac was.
translation_verse: Yarim muna, m mabiisi - ya yi nyɛ la Naawunni biisi nangbambasiri basibu zugu, kaman Yisahaaku gba ŋɔn daa nyɛ Ibrahim biiya seem la.

english_verse: But the child who was born in the natural way made trouble for the child who was born because of the Spirit. The same thing is happening today.
translation_verse: Lala saha maa ka bisɔ ban daa dɔ'ai kaman pɔ'a ŋɔn kur dɔ'ari seem maa daa niŋi la alaka n‑niŋi bisɔ ban daa dɔ'ai Naawunni Sii nangbambasiri puuni la; ka pampaŋŋɔ di kur nyɛ la lala taataabu maa.

english_verse: The Scriptures say, “Get rid of the slave woman and her son! He won't be given anything. The son of the free woman will receive everything.”
translation_verse: Amaa wula ka Litaafi yɛtta? - Ka yɛliya, ni, “Karim pɔ'adaabri maa ni u bii la m‑basi kpaŋŋa; dama pɔ'adaabri bii maa bu ti yɛ la'am birikyimpɔ'a bii maa saani n‑di ba ba maa faari.”

english_verse: My friends, we are children of the free woman and not of the slave.
translation_verse: Ka dinzugu, m mabiisi, tirim pa la pɔ'adaabri la biisi amaa ti lee n‑nyɛ la birikyimpɔ'a maa biisi.

english_verse: Christ has set us free! This means we are really free. Now hold on to your freedom and don't ever become slaves of the Law again.
translation_verse: Yɔlisimma nyɛ la ti dinni, Kirisita Masiiya ŋɔn daa yɔlisi ti ni! Dinzugu ya zaanma kaman birikyindima ban su ba mansi, ka di laa n‑zaŋŋi ya mansi n‑leebi daaba yaasa.

english_verse: I, Paul, promise you that Christ won't do you any good if you get circumcised.
translation_verse: Ya wumma! Man Pɔla n yɛtti ya wa, ni, ya yi sakki ka kyɛ ka ba guni ya, dinŋɔna Kirisita ka bukyi n‑ti ya halli beela.

english_verse: And if you try to please God by obeying the Law, you have cut yourself off from Christ and his gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Yarima ban boori ya yiisi ya taalli Naawunni saani zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi fukumsi zaaligudima dɔligu zugu la, ya wɔligri ya mansi ka kyɛ Masiiya. Ya ku laa n‑nya anfaani Naawunni saani.

english_verse: But the Spirit makes us sure God will accept us because of our faith in Christ.
translation_verse: Amaa tirim ŋɔna, ti mari tama, ni, Naawunni nin yiisi ti taalli u saani; dinŋɔ ka ti guusira ti yɛdda niŋbu zugu, Naawunni Vuusim Kasi la puuni.

english_verse: If you are a follower of Christ Jesus, it makes no difference whether you are circumcised or not. All that matters is your faith that makes you love others.
translation_verse: Ka tin ni Yisa yi la'am n‑niŋi yinni, sɔ yi guni, bee, u bu guni, a zaa ka yaa halli beela; kulla yɛdda mara, din mun tumni wurilim zugu.

english_verse: You were doing so well until someone made you turn from the truth.
translation_verse: Ya daa tumni la din tuusi! Ŋɔni n ta'ai ya ni ya di laa n‑wum n‑ti yɛlimaŋni maa?

english_verse: And that person was certainly not sent by the one who chose you.
translation_verse: Di siri pa Naawunni ŋɔn daa booli ya la n‑ta'ai ya lala!

english_verse: A little yeast can change a whole batch of dough,
translation_verse: Ni, “Di kur nyɛ la dabina beela kɔkɔ zugu ka boroboro pitta.”

english_verse: but you belong to the Lord. This makes me certain you will do what I say, instead of what someone else tells you to do. Whoever is causing trouble for you will be punished.
translation_verse: Amaa man niŋi ya yɛdda ti Dugma zugu, ni, ya gba nin sakki lala. Tɔ: ninvugsɔ ŋɔn kyirimni ya wa muna - di daama yi nyɛ la sɔ zaa, u tumbeeri taalli nin kpalim n‑dɔli u.

english_verse: My friends, if I still preach that people need to be circumcised, why am I in so much trouble? The message about the cross would no longer be a problem, if I told people to be circumcised.
translation_verse: M mabiisi, amaa man ŋɔna - ni, n na kur kpalim n‑gyinni m‑moonni, ni, gunibu nyɛ la bunseela din kpa talasi: tɔ, ka di yi bɛ la lala, wula zugu ka n laa m‑bɛ galinsi ni wahala puuni? Dama man yi siri moonni lala, Yisa kum dɔpulli yɛla ku laa m‑bɛ n saani ni ba ti yaai ma di zugu.

english_verse: I wish everyone who is upsetting you would not only get circumcised, but would cut off much more!
translation_verse: Ban kyirimni ya muna - man teesa puuni, ba yi boori lala taabu yɛla, see ka ba foaai ba lana m‑basi!

english_verse: My friends, you were chosen to be free. So don't use your freedom as an excuse to do anything you want. Use it as an opportunity to serve each other with love.
translation_verse: M mabiisi, yarima ŋɔna - ba daa booli ya yɔlisimma zii na, ka mugsigu zaa ka ya saani. Amaa yan di kyɛ ka mugsigu kaalinsi din bɛ ya saani wa leebi soori n‑ti ya, ka ningbina ni kɔribeeri ti deaai ya beebu zaasa. Amaa ya lee n‑kyɛ ka di nyɛ la wurilim zugu ka ya tumni n‑tiri taaba.

english_verse: All the Law says can be summed up in the command to love others as much as you love yourself.
translation_verse: Dama fukumsi zaaligudima maa la'am n‑niŋi zaalikpanni yinni, ni#:- “Wuri i taraana hoo nyin wuri i mammaŋŋa seem la.”

english_verse: But if you keep attacking each other like wild animals, you had better watch out or you will destroy yourselves. God's Spirit and Our Own Desires
translation_verse: Amaa ya bɛ ni hoo mooni bunkɔbri, ka dumni taaba m‑paari taaba dansi; ya baŋŋma, miri ka ya ti sa'am taaba n‑naai zaa zaa.

english_verse: If you are guided by the Spirit, you won't obey your selfish desires.
translation_verse: Man ŋɔn yɛtti seem nŋɔa#:- ya kyɛ ka Sii Kasi maa wulisiri ya ya beebu zaa soori, ka ya ku tum la ninsaala kɔribeeri boorimma tuma.

english_verse: The Spirit and your desires are enemies of each other. They are always fighting each other and keeping you from doing what you feel you should.
translation_verse: Dama ninsaala kɔribeeri ŋɔn za'asiri bunseela ka Siiya Kasi boora, ka Siiya Kasi mun ŋɔn bu boori bunseelli la ka kɔrisi gba boora. Sɔya ayi wa mari taaba dimni, ka dinŋɔ wulisiya, ni, ya ku toaai n‑niŋi yan boori seem.

english_verse: But if you obey the Spirit, the Law of Moses has no control over you.
translation_verse: Ka ya mun yi dɔli la Sii Kasi maa wulisigu la, dinŋɔna ya ku laa m‑bɛ fukumsi zaaligudima maa suulinsi ni.

english_verse: People's desires make them give in to immoral ways, filthy thoughts, and shameful deeds.
translation_verse: Ninsaala kɔrisi tuma ŋɔn bɛ seem kur yi paalu ni. Zina da'ari tuma n nyɛ a, ni kyɔ'ansi beebu, ni ban bu mari ba mansi suŋŋa tuma zaa:

english_verse: They worship idols, practice witchcraft, hate others, and are hard to get along with. People become jealous, angry, and selfish. They not only argue and cause trouble, but they are
translation_verse: m‑paasi buga gyeeŋŋu, ni soo, ni tiima tuma. Niriba leebri la dindaandima ka zabri taaba; ba zabri zinyuu, ka kyɛ ka ba suuri yisigra, ka mari tumbeeri teesa ni ba ti duusi ba mansi. Ba laa m‑boori wɔliginsim.

english_verse: envious. They get drunk, carry on at wild parties, and do other evil things as well. I told you before, and I am telling you again: No one who does these things will share in the blessings of God's kingdom.
translation_verse: Halli ba zabri nyuuri; ka laa n‑nyuuri daam m‑bugra; ka tumni tunkyɔ'ama, ni tumbeeri wa taabu baligu kam zaa. N yɛtti ya ni, kaman man daa pun daŋŋi n‑yɛli ya seem la: ni, ban kam zaa bɛ anŋɔ taataabu beesigu maa ni ku ti di Naawunni naam faari.

english_verse: gentle, and self-controlled. There is no law against behaving in any of these ways.
translation_verse: Niriba sigsiri ba mansi, ka mari ba mansi suŋŋa. Zaalisɛseaa ka ni n‑galimni yɛla wa taataabu.

english_verse: And because we belong to Christ Jesus, we have killed our selfish feelings and desires.
translation_verse: Ka ban kam zaa nyɛ la Kirisita Yisa dina pun zaŋŋi ninsaatiri teesa n‑kpaasi n‑tabli dɔpulli zugu n‑ku - ana ni kɔribeeri boorimma zaa.

english_verse: God's Spirit has given us life, and so we should follow the Spirit.
translation_verse: Siiya Vuusim Kasi maa tiri ti la nyɔvuri; see ka u laa n‑su ti nyɔvuya maa sɔya zaa gba.

english_verse: But don't be conceited or make others jealous by claiming to be better than they are.
translation_verse: Faasee ka ti kyɛ ti karimbaani m‑basi; ka ti di laa n‑yisigri taaba sufu, n‑zabri nyuuri ni taaba m‑paasi.

english_verse: My friends, you are spiritual. So if someone is trapped in sin, you should gently lead that person back to the right path. But watch out, and don't be tempted yourself.
translation_verse: M mabiisi, sɔ yi tumni taalli ka ya baŋŋi lala, see ka yarima ban mari Siiya Kasi maa nin zaŋŋi u n‑zaali n‑wulisi u din tu; amaa faasee ka ya niŋi lala maa baalimm baalimm. Nyin gɔsim i mammaŋŋa suŋŋa, din nin kyɛ ka nyin gba di kpɛ zamsigu puuni.

english_verse: You obey the law of Christ when you offer each other a helping hand.
translation_verse: Ya suŋŋma n‑zi taaba zitibsa, ka ya yi tumni lala, ya nin dɔlisi Kirisita Masiiya zaaligudima zaa.

english_verse: If you think you are better than others, when you really aren't, you are wrong.
translation_verse: Sɔ yi teesi, ni, u nyɛ la bunseelli ka mun siri pa bunseelli, di daama kur yɔmsiri la u mammaŋŋa.

english_verse: Do your own work well, and then you will have something to be proud of. But don't compare yourself with others.
translation_verse: Kyɛ ka sɔkam zaa zamsi m‑baŋŋi u mammaŋŋa tuma an nyɛ seem; an dee n‑yi nyɛ la bunsuma, dinŋɔna u nin toaai n‑nyu bara di zugu: ka mun ku zaŋŋi u yɛla n‑ŋmamsi u taraansɔ gba ŋɔn tum seela.

english_verse: We each must carry our own load.
translation_verse: Dama sɔkam zaa ziiri la u mammantoori ziiri.

english_verse: Share every good thing you have with anyone who teaches you what God has said.
translation_verse: Ba yi zaŋŋni Naawunni lahabasuŋŋu maa n‑wulisiri sɔa, ŋɔn purigma u bunsuma n‑tisi u karimba maa.

english_verse: You cannot fool God, so don't make a fool of yourself! You will harvest what you plant.
translation_verse: Yan di yɔmsiri ya mammansi, ka Naawunni pa la ban niŋni sɔ ansarisi; ka nira yi buri bunseela, ana ka u nin ti kyɛa.

english_verse: If you follow your selfish desires, you will harvest destruction, but if you follow the Spirit, you will harvest eternal life.
translation_verse: Sɔ yi buri ningbina kɔrisi beesigu bumbura, u nin ti nya sa'aŋŋu antaam di zugu; u mun yi buri la Siiya Kasi bumbura, lala nin kyɛ ka u ti nya nyɔvuriseaa kan ka naari.

english_verse: Don't get tired of helping others. You will be rewarded when the time is right, if you don't give up.
translation_verse: Dizugu ti di kyɛ ka ti gyɛ tunsuma tumpu zugu; ka ti yi bu kyɛ tuma maa m‑basi, saha kyɛnni na ka ti nin nya ti antaam.

english_verse: We should help people whenever we can, especially if they are followers of the Lord. Final Warnings
translation_verse: Ka dinzugu, soori ŋɔn kur yoaai n‑ti ti maa zugu, faasee ka ti tumni suŋŋa n‑tiri sɔkam zaa, ka di mun di tam la ti yiri dima maa ban nyɛ yɛdda niŋniba la.

english_verse: You can see what big letters I make when I write with my own hand.
translation_verse: Kur gɔsima man ŋɔn zaŋŋi n mammaŋŋa nuu n‑sɔbri bakyi kɔbkarakara seem n‑ti ya na#:-

english_verse: Those people who are telling you to get circumcised are only trying to show how important they are. And they don't want to get into trouble for preaching about the cross of Christ.
translation_verse: Ninvugseeba ban kur mugsiri ya ya gunibu zugu maa n nyɛ ban kur boori ni ba wulisi ba mansi ka nyu kafuga zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ningbina yɛla. Ban niŋi seem gbinni kur nyɛ la, ni, din nin kyɛ ka niriba ku namsi ba Kirisita dɔpulli maa zugu.

english_verse: They are circumcised, but they don't obey the Law of Moses. All they want is to brag about having you circumcised.
translation_verse: Halli ninvugseeba ban guni maa bu wumni n‑tiri fukumsi zaaligudima maa; ba boori la ya guni ka ba yi nyu bara, ni, ya daa wum n‑ti ba zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ningbina yɛttɔ'a wa yɛla.

english_verse: But I will never brag about anything except the cross of our Lord Jesus Christ. Because of his cross, the world is dead as far as I am concerned, and I am dead as far as the world is concerned.
translation_verse: Amaa man ŋɔna, m bu boori n nyu la bara bunseelli kam zugu, di yi pa la ti Dugma Yisa Masiiya dɔpulli la zugu kɔkɔa. U dɔpulli wa zugu ka duniya wa nyɛ la bunkpiiŋŋu n‑ti ma, ka man gba nyɛ bunkpiiŋŋu n‑ti duniya.

english_verse: It doesn't matter if you are circumcised or not. All that matters is that you are a new person.
translation_verse: Di pa la mugsigu kaman nira guni, bee, u bu guni; din kur mugsi nyɛ la i kur maali n‑niŋi bumpaalli.

english_verse: If you follow this rule, you will belong to God's true people. God will treat you with undeserved kindness and will bless you with peace.
translation_verse: Ninvugseeba ban kur dɔli soori wa, alaafɛ ni sufudoaa nin bɛ ba saani: halli ka laa m‑bɛ niriba zaa saani ban nyɛ Izraɛli dima halaali n‑ti Naawunni la!

english_verse: On my own body are scars that prove I belong to Christ Jesus. So I don't want anyone to bother me anymore.
translation_verse: Din baasi nyaaŋŋa: sɔ di laa n‑ti ma yɛlimugsa m‑paasi, dama kyisiseesi an bɛ n ningbina ni wa wulisiya, ni, n nyɛ la Yisa Kirisita nira.

english_verse: My friends, I pray that the Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you! Amen.
translation_verse: M mabiisi, ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita Masiiya zaŋŋma u piinisuma n‑niŋi ya zaa sufu ni! Ammi.

english_verse: From Paul, chosen by God to be an apostle of Christ Jesus. To God's people who live in Ephesus and are faithful followers of Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Man Pɔla n sɔbri gbaŋŋu wa n‑tiri ya. Mani n nyɛ Yisa Kirisita Masiiya tuumu, Naawunni wurilim zugu. N sɔbri n‑tiri yarima, Naawunni niriba, yaseeba ban bɛ Ɛfɛsusi tiŋŋa n‑niŋi Kirisita Yisa yɛdda.

english_verse: I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! Christ Brings Spiritual Blessings
translation_verse: Ti Ba Naawunni ni ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita nin ti ti ya piinisuma, ni sufudoaa zaa.

english_verse: Praise the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ for the spiritual blessings that Christ has brought us from heaven!
translation_verse: Pɛ'abu bɛ ni n‑ti Naawunni, sɔ ŋɔn nyɛ ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita Ba la: ŋɔn Naawunni tiri ti u bunsuma zaa an yi u Sii maa saani arizana puuni na, tirim ŋɔn bɛ Yisa saani maa zugu.

english_verse: Before the world was created, God had Christ choose us to live with him and to be his holy and innocent and loving people.
translation_verse: U daa yiisi ti ni, n‑niŋi ti u maŋtoori dina pɔi, ka naayi naam duniya wa. U daa yiisi ti lala, ni ti ti leebi u dina, m‑bɛ kasi, ka laa n‑ka taalli u saani. U wurilim zugu

english_verse: God was kind and decided that Christ would choose us to be God's own adopted children.
translation_verse: ka u daa pun daŋŋi n‑niŋi din nin kyɛ ka ti leebi u biisi, Yisa Masiiya zugu, ka di dɔli la u yuubu maa ŋɔn boori seem la.

english_verse: God treated us with undeserved grace because of the Son he dearly loves, and so we should praise God.
translation_verse: Lala zugu ka pɛ'abu zaa sum la ni ŋɔna, ŋɔn daa zaŋŋi u gyirima piini n‑ti ti la zugu, ka daa niŋi lala u Bii maa saani, dama u wuri la u Bii maa pam.

english_verse: Christ sacrificed his life's blood to set us free, which means our sins are now forgiven. Christ did this because of God's gift of undeserved grace to us. God has great wisdom and understanding,
translation_verse: Halli u daa ti ti lala piini maa zaa, ka laa n‑ti ti bamsim ni miilinsi zaa.

english_verse: Then when the time is right, God will do all he has planned, and Christ will bring together everything in heaven and on earth.
translation_verse: ka daa maali anŋɔ zaa siri, ni a ti naayi tum n‑naai. Lala nin niŋi, a saha yi ti paai la. Ka laa m‑maali siri, ni arizana ni tingbaŋŋu buna zaa ti la'am taaba, ka Yisa naayi su a zaa fukumsi.

english_verse: He did this so we Jews would bring honor to him and be the first ones to have hope because of him.
translation_verse: Ka di nin kyɛ ka tirima nin leebi hoo pɛ'abu ni gyirima n‑ti u - tirim ban daŋŋi m‑mari tama Kirisita saani la.

english_verse: Christ also brought you the truth, which is the good news about how you can be saved. You put your faith in Christ and were given the promised Holy Spirit to show you belong to God.
translation_verse: Ka yarima gba daa wum yɛlimaŋni yɛttɔ'a, Naawunni yɛligu tuliginsim lahabasuŋŋu la. Ka yan daa niŋi yɛdda la, ya daa deaai Naawunni Sii Kasi la hoo daalimni din wulisiri, ni, Yisa su ya yɛla. Halli Naawunni daa pun basi noori, ni, u nin niŋi lala.

english_verse: The Spirit also makes us sure we will be given what God has stored up for his people. Then we will be set free, and God will be honored and praised. Paul's Prayer
translation_verse: Lala Sii Kasi maa bɛ la ti saani n‑wulisiri, ni, u nin kyɛ ka ti di faari; ni, u nin kyɛ ka ba yɔ ti samni n‑fa ti m‑basi; ni, u nin kyɛ ka ti yɛla kyɛ ka pɛ'abu bɛ ni n‑tiri Naawunni.

english_verse: I ask the glorious Father and God of our Lord Jesus Christ to give you his Spirit. The Spirit will make you wise and let you understand what it means to know God.
translation_verse: Ti Ba Gyirima Zaa Daana! - Naawunni n nyɛ u n‑ti ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita; ti mun susiri u, ni, u tim ya u Siiya, ka u wulisi ya yɛm ka kasigi u yɛlitibsa n‑ti ya, ka kyɛ ka ya maali m‑baŋŋi u yɛla m‑paasi.

english_verse: My prayer is that light will flood your hearts and you will understand the hope given to you when God chose you. Then you will discover the glorious blessings that will be yours together with all God's people.
translation_verse: Ka n laa n‑susiri, ni, ya sufu nin nya ninneesim ka ya baŋŋi tama seaa zugu ŋɔn booli ya la, ka ya laa m‑baŋŋi ya faari ŋɔn ya zoaai seem m‑mari gyirima la, n‑tiri yaseeba ban nyɛ ŋɔn Naawunni dina maa.

english_verse: I want you to know about the great and mighty power that God has for us followers. It is the same wonderful power he used
translation_verse: M‑paasi, ya nin baŋŋi u yiiko ŋɔn kpeem seem halli n‑ti yakki, n‑tiri tiseeba ban niŋi u yɛdda la.

english_verse: There Christ rules over all forces, authorities, powers, and rulers. He rules over all beings in this world and will rule in the future world as well.
translation_verse: Ka di gaari naam zaa, ni yiiko zaa, ni kpamma ni gɔmnanti zaa fukumsi marigu. Yuseaa ka ni ka ba putti sɔ n‑gaari ŋɔn Yisa yuuri; ka di pa la beesigu kanŋɔ ni kɔkɔa, amaa ni kan na ya kyɛ na la ni gba.

english_verse: God has put all things under the power of Christ, and for the good of the church he has made him the head of everything.
translation_verse: Naawunni siri zaŋŋi bunseelikam n‑niŋi ŋɔn Yisa napɔna ni, ni u ti noora; ka yiisi u, ni u leebi zuguraana nti su yɛttɔ'a zaa fukumsi n‑ti baseeba ban la'am n‑dɔli Naawunni la.

english_verse: The church is the body of Christ and is filled with Christ who completely fills everything.
translation_verse: Ba lala la'aŋŋu maa nyɛ la u ningbiŋŋu; ŋɔn Yisa paali la seelikam, ya'ari kam, ka u niriba la'aŋŋu maa puuni ka u bɛ ni, ka paali ka zaa.

english_verse: In the past you were dead because you sinned and fought against God.
translation_verse: Yarim muna - ya galinsi ni ya tumbeeri taalli daa ku ya.

english_verse: You followed the ways of this world and obeyed the devil. He rules the world, and his spirit has power over everyone who doesn't obey God.
translation_verse: Anŋɔ zaa puuni ka ya daa bɛ ni, yan daa dɔli duniya wa yɛla soori maa, n‑gyeemni Sibɛsɔ ŋɔn su saazugu ni pɛsigu fukumsi. Pampaŋŋɔ ka ŋɔna na tumni ban bu wumni Naawunni noori la sufu ni.

english_verse: Once we were also ruled by the selfish desires of our bodies and minds. We had made God angry, and we were going to be punished like everyone else.
translation_verse: Halli tirim zaa gba daa bɛ la ban puuni sahaseaa, n‑tumni la ti tumbeeri beesigu ŋɔn daa boori seem, n‑dɔli ka boorimma ni ka teesa. Hoo banla, duniya wa ala'akyi dima n daa nyɛ ti gba. Sɛseelli daa bu sumni ti, na'ala Naawunni sugyeaa ni tubdarigri.

english_verse: But God was merciful! We were dead because of our sins, but God loved us so much he made us alive with Christ, and God's gift of undeserved grace is what saves you.
translation_verse: Ka lala zugu u daa kyɛ ka ti la'am Masiiya saani n‑neaai kum ni, halli ni ti tumbeeri daa ku ti maa zaa yɔri. Piiniseaa tin bu sumni ka la zugu ka ya nya tuliginsim.

english_verse: God raised us from death to life with Christ Jesus, and he has given us a place beside Christ in heaven.
translation_verse: Ka ŋɔn Naawunni daa kyɛ ka tin ni Kirisita Yisa yisigi, n‑zaŋŋi ti n‑ziili ti, ni tirim ni ŋɔn zaa zi ŋɔn Naawunni saani u naam zizii maa ni saazugu.

english_verse: God did this so in the future world he could show how truly good and kind he is to us because of what Christ Jesus has done.
translation_verse: U niŋi lala ni di ti kyɛ ka yuuma an kyɛnni na la dima nin ti baŋŋi u piiniseesi an ka taabu la yɛla, ni, ŋɔn zɔ ti namboo seem, Kirisita Yisa zugu.

english_verse: You were saved by faith in God, who treats us much better than we deserve. This is God's gift to you, and not anything you have done on your own.
translation_verse: Dama piiniseaa tin bu sumni ka la zugu ka ya nya tuliginsim, ya yɛdda niŋbu zugu. Ka di pa la ya mammantoori yiiko zugu: piini maa yi la Naawunni saani n‑ti ya na.

english_verse: It isn't something you have earned, so there is nothing you can brag about.
translation_verse: Pa ya tuma zugu; dinŋɔna sɔ di nyu bara dizugu.

english_verse: God planned for us to do good things and to live as he has always wanted us to live. This is why he sent Christ to make us what we are. United by Christ
translation_verse: Dama Naawunni nuusi tuma n nyɛ ti, ka u maali ti la Kirisita Yisa saani. U maali ti, ni ti tumni la tunsuma - tunseesi Naawunni ŋɔn pun daŋŋi n‑zaali ni ti ti tumni maa.

english_verse: At that time you did not know about Christ. You were foreigners to the people of Israel, and you had no part in the promises God had made to them. You were living in this world without hope and without God,
translation_verse: Ka laa n‑teaai, ni, lala saha maa ya daa ka Masiiya, ya daa pa Izraɛli butiri niriba, ka pa seeba ban daa su faari diibu yɛla. Faari wa ka Naawunni daa basi noori, ni, u ti ti bana. Ay! - ya daa bɛ la duniya wa ni hoo seeba ban ka tama, ka laa n‑kɔŋŋi Naawunni.

english_verse: and you were far from God. But Christ offered his life's blood as a sacrifice and brought you near God.
translation_verse: Ya siri daa wa'a ni Naawunni, amaa pampaŋŋɔ ya bɛ la Kirisita Yisa puuni, pampaŋŋɔ ya yi pɔtti Naawunni saani na, ŋɔn Masiiya ziim maa zugu.

english_verse: Christ has made peace between Jews and Gentiles, and he has united us by breaking down the wall of hatred that separated us. Christ gave his own body
translation_verse: Zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi Izraɛli dima ni ban pa Izraɛli niriba yɛla muna - ŋɔn Yisa mammaŋŋa nyɛ la ti sufumaasim ni ti alaafɛa, ŋɔna la'asi babayi maa taaba n‑niŋi nangbanyinni. U daa sa'am din daa waligi ba ni taaba hoo goomni m‑bɛ ba sunsukkuni la, ka zaŋŋi u maŋtoori ningbiŋŋu m‑maai dimni la.

english_verse: to destroy the Law of Moses with all its rules and commands. He even brought Jews and Gentiles together as though we were only one person, when he united us in peace.
translation_verse: U daa zaŋŋi u ningbina n‑tum lala ni u ti baasi zaalikurigu maa yɔri, dama ka daa dɔli la zaalikpana ni kaya sɔya. U daa laa n‑tum lala ni u ti la'am zuliya buyi wa u saani na, m‑maali n‑naam ninvugyinni, bumpaalli, ka lala daa zi sufudoaa ni alaafɛ na.

english_verse: On the cross Christ did away with our hatred for each other. He also made peace between us and God by uniting Jews and Gentiles in one body.
translation_verse: Ka lala ningbiŋŋu yinni wa ni ka u daa kpaasi n‑tabli dɔpulli maa zugu, ka daa zɔ babayi la sindaani Naawunni saani, dama u daa zaŋŋi u mammaŋŋa n‑kpiisi dimni maa.

english_verse: Christ came and preached peace to you Gentiles, who were far from God, and peace to us Jews, who were near God.
translation_verse: U siri daa kyɛ na m‑mooli lahabasuŋŋu, ni, sufudoaa bɛ ni n‑tiri yaseeba ban daa wa'a la, ni ban daa bu wa'a la gba.

english_verse: And because of Christ, all of us can come to the Father by the same Spirit.
translation_verse: Ŋɔna n nyɛ sɔseaa ti bayi zaa ŋɔn la'amni n‑dɔla m‑paari ti Ba Naawunni saani la, ka ŋɔn Naawunni Siiya nyɛ la Sii yinni ka suŋŋni ti.

english_verse: You Gentiles are no longer strangers and foreigners. You are citizens with everyone else who belongs to the family of God.
translation_verse: Dizugu ya laa m‑pa tinzundima, bee, tinseaa saamma: ay! - ya yi la'am n‑nyɛ la Naawunni niriba, halli u yiri dima n nyɛ ya gba.

english_verse: You are like a building with the apostles and prophets as the foundation and with Christ as the most important stone.
translation_verse: U yiri wa mun mɛ n‑tɔm nyeebsuŋŋu zugu, di nyɛ la u tuumudima ni anabidima maa; ka ka sunsukkugri kan gbaari ka zaa la nyɛ la Kirisita Yisa mammaŋŋa.

english_verse: Christ is the one who holds the building together and makes it grow into a holy temple for the Lord.
translation_verse: Ŋɔn Yisa zugu ka yiri maa zaa gbaai taaba n‑du n‑leebi gyeeŋŋu yiri kasikasi, n‑tiri ti Dugma.

english_verse: And you are part of that building Christ has built as a place for God's own Spirit to live.
translation_verse: Ka ŋɔn saani yaasa ka yarima gba la'amni n‑leebri la ya'aseaa Naawunni ŋɔn nin kpɛ m‑bɛ ni, u Sii Kasi maa zugu.

english_verse: You have surely heard about God's gift of undeserved grace in choosing me to help you.
translation_verse: - N siri mi halli, ni, ya pun wum Naawunni ŋɔn zaŋŋi tunseaa n‑zaali ma, ni, yarima zugu ka u dɔli la u wurilim soori ka kyɛ ka n suŋŋni ya.

english_verse: In fact, this letter tells you a little about how God has shown me his mysterious ways.
translation_verse: Ka laa m‑mi, ni, kana n nyɛ yɛlisɔ'ariseaa kan yi paalu n‑ti ma, dama m pun sɔbi lala beela n‑ti ya.

english_verse: As you read the letter, you will also find out how well I really do understand the mystery about Christ.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔ nin kyɛ ka ya karim man ŋɔn daa sɔbi gbanseaa la, nti baŋŋi man ŋɔn mari bamsim seem zaŋŋi n‑kpa Kirisita yɛlisɔ'ara maa.

english_verse: And the mystery is this: Because of Christ Jesus, the good news has given the Gentiles a share in the promises God gave to the Jews. God has also let the Gentiles be part of the same body.
translation_verse: Yɛla wa gbinni muna - di nyɛ la: ni, lahabasuŋŋu maa zugu nin kyɛ ka ban pa Yɛhudiya dima maa ni Yɛhudiya dima maa zaa nin la'am n‑di faari maa. Ba nin la'am n‑labgi ningbiŋŋu yinni, ba nin la'am n‑nyari bunsuma, bunseesi Naawunni ŋɔn basi noori, ni, u nin tisi la zaa.

english_verse: God treated me with kindness. His power worked in me, and it became my job to spread the good news.
translation_verse: Lala lahabasuŋŋu tuma ka man tumna: Naawunni wurilim piini zugu ka n deaai tuma wa ka leebi u tuntumna, pa m mammaŋŋa zugu; ŋɔn Naawunni n daa zaŋŋi u yiiko n‑kpeesi ma, ni n ti tumni lala.

english_verse: I am the least important of all God's people. But God was kind and chose me to tell the Gentiles that because of Christ there are blessings that cannot be measured.
translation_verse: Man muna - halli ni Naawunni niriba zaa ŋɔn gaari ma zaa yɔri, u daa zaŋŋi piini wa n‑ti ma na, ni n ti moonni lahabasuŋŋu n‑tiri ban pa Yɛhudiya dima la. Ka lala ka ba ti baŋŋi Kirisita nya'asim ŋɔn tibsa seem, halli ni sɔ ku toaai m‑baŋŋi di gbinni zaa yɔri.

english_verse: God, who created everything, wanted me to help everyone understand the mysterious plan that had always been hidden in his mind.
translation_verse: Naawunni n daa naam duniya maa zaa, ka yɛla wa soori daa sɔ'ai u saani sahakam: ka yɛlisɔ'ara wa ka n yɛtti paalu ni, ni ya nini ti neaai.

english_verse: Then God would use the church to show the powers and authorities in the spiritual world that he has many different kinds of wisdom.
translation_verse: Naawunni daa niŋi lala, ni u ti kyɛ ka pampaŋŋɔ u yɛm nin ti dɔli la u nyaandɔliba ban la'amni n‑gyeemni u la, m‑paai saazugu naama ni yiiko dima.

english_verse: God did this according to his eternal plan. And he was able to do what he had planned because of all Christ Jesus our Lord had done.
translation_verse: Di zaa nyɛ la hoo ŋɔn Naawunni ŋɔn daa pun gbaai seem, ka ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita puuni ka u lala sufuyuubu yɛla yiiri paalu na.

english_verse: This is why you should not be discouraged when I suffer for you. After all, it will bring honor to you. Christ's Love for Us
translation_verse: Anŋɔ zaa zugu ka n yɛtti ya, ni, yan di gbarigri beesigu ni, man ŋɔn namsiri ya zugu la zugu, dama lala nyɛ la duusigu n‑ti ya.

english_verse: God is wonderful and glorious. I pray that his Spirit will make you become strong followers
translation_verse: N susiri u ni, ni, u nin kyɛ ka u Sii Kasi maa ti kpamsi ya ya sufu ni, hoo u maŋtoori gyirima ŋɔn tibsa n‑veela seem.

english_verse: and that Christ will live in your hearts because of your faith. Stand firm and be deeply rooted in his love.
translation_verse: Ka n laa n‑susiri, ni, Kirisita nin bɛ ya sufu ni la, ya yɛdda niŋbu zugu; ka lala nin kyɛ ka wurilim nin kyɛ ka ya zɛ yummu, hoo tiiya kan mari nya'asuma, bee duu kan mari nyeebkpeema.

english_verse: I want you to know all about Christ's love, although it is too wonderful to be measured. Then your lives will be filled with all that God is.
translation_verse: Ni, ya nin mari yiiko, yan ni Naawunni niriba zaa, n nin nyaŋŋi m‑baŋŋi Yisa wurilim ŋɔn yɛlima seem, n‑wa'a seem, n‑du seem, n‑zulim seem zaa, halli ni di siri yakki n‑gaari ti bamsim zaa zugu gba. Lala bamsim nin kyɛ ka Naawunni beesigu zaa paali ya, ka ya mun beesigu nin wulisi Naawunni yɛla zaasa.

english_verse: I pray that Christ Jesus and the church will forever bring praise to God. His power at work in us can do far more than we dare ask or imagine. Amen.
translation_verse: Lala gyirima ni duusigu ka u nyaandɔliba la'amni n‑tiri u, Yisa Kirisita Masiiya puuni, beoo kam, yuumni kam, halli ni saha din ka tɔriga. Ammi.

english_verse: As a prisoner of the Lord, I beg you to live in a way that is worthy of the people God has chosen to be his own.
translation_verse: Man bɛ sarika ni ti Dugma yɛla zugu, ka n bɛlimni ya ni, ni, ya mari beesiseaa din sumsi ya, dama ŋɔn Naawunni booli ya u saani na.

english_verse: Always be humble and gentle. Patiently put up with each other and love each other.
translation_verse: Ya bɛ baalimm n‑sigsi ya mansi, m‑mari sugru ni taaba, ka kyɛri taaba taalli wurilim zugu.

english_verse: Try your best to let God's Spirit keep your hearts united. Do this by living at peace.
translation_verse: Ya kpaŋŋma ya mansi m‑mari nangbanyinni, hoo Naawunni Sii maa ŋɔn yi zaŋŋi u bansi m‑ba ya ni taaba.

english_verse: All of you are part of the same body. There is only one Spirit of God, just as you were given one hope when you were chosen to be God's people.
translation_verse: Ti zaa nyɛ la ningbiŋŋu yinni niriba, sii yinni dima, hoo ban daa booli ya na la ni ya ti mari tama yinni.

english_verse: We have only one Lord, one faith, and one baptism.
translation_verse: Ya Dugma yinni ka ya gyeemna, yɛdda yinni ka ya niŋna, Naawunni kɔsuubu yinni ka ba daa su ya.
