english_verse: There is one God who is the Father of all people. Not only is God above all others, but he works by using all of us, and he lives in all of us.
translation_verse: Naawunni yinni mun n nyɛ ti zaa Ba, ka u gaari sɔkam, ka tumni sɔkam ni, ka bɛ sɔkam zaa ni.

english_verse: Christ has generously divided out his gifts to us.
translation_verse: Amaa ti sɔkam deaari u piini u piini, hoo Kirisita ŋɔn putti a n‑tisiri seem la.

english_verse: As the Scriptures say, “When he went up to the highest place, he led away many prisoners and gave gifts to people.”
translation_verse: Lala zugu ka di sɔbi n‑dooli, ni#:- “Ŋɔna n daa du saazugu; Di saha ka u daa gbaasi niriba pam, Ka daa zaŋŋi piini n‑tisi niriba.”

english_verse: When it says, “he went up,” it means that Christ had been deep in the earth.
translation_verse: Tɔ. Daŋŋni, ni, ‘U daa du saazugu’: di gbinni nyɛ la bɔa? - di pa la, ni, u daa daŋŋi n‑sigi la duniya wa tiŋni na gba?

english_verse: This also means that the one who went deep into the earth is the same one who went into the highest heaven, so he would fill the whole universe.
translation_verse: Ninvugsɔ ŋɔn daa sigi na maa, di daama n daa nyɛ sɔ ŋɔn daa laa n‑du saazugu n‑gaari halli nti kpɛ arizana puuni la, ni u ti paali ya'ari kam zaa.

english_verse: so his people would learn to serve and his body would grow strong.
translation_verse: Ba deaari la piini wa, ni ba ti sɛ'asi Naawunni niriba ni ba tumna, ka Kirisita ningbiŋŋu maa nin ti mɛa.

english_verse: This will continue until we are united by our faith and by our understanding of the Son of God. Then we will be mature, just as Christ is, and we will be completely like him.
translation_verse: Halli nti paai sahanseaa ti zaa ŋɔn ti ya niŋi nangbanyinni ti yɛdda niŋbu maa ni, ka naayi baŋŋi Naawunni Bii maa yɛla. Lala ka ti nin kyɛ biilim n‑la'am n‑leebi ninvugkurigu m‑bɛ hoo Naawunni ŋɔn boori zaa, ka naayi ŋmanni la Kirisita ŋɔn bɛ seem la zaa.

english_verse: We must stop acting like children. We must not let deceitful people trick us by their false teachings, which are like winds that toss us around from place to place.
translation_verse: Ka ti ku laa n‑nyɛ bileesi, ti ku laa n‑dɔli wulisigu balibubalibu hoo pɛsigu ŋɔn zɛ ti yɔriyɔri seem; ti ku laa n‑kyɛ ka yɔsimyɔmsiriba nin ma'ai ti ziri n‑yɔmsiri ti.

english_verse: Love should always make us tell the truth. Then we will grow in every way and be more like Christ, the head
translation_verse: Ay! - Ti nin lee n‑yɛtti yɛlimaŋni, wurilim zugu. Ti nin zoaai na m‑paai ŋɔn Kirisita ŋɔn sa'ai seem, dama u nyɛ la ti zaa zuguraana.

english_verse: Their minds are in the dark, and they are stubborn and ignorant and have missed out on the life that comes from God. They no longer have any feelings about what is right,
translation_verse: Dama ban bu mi din m bɛ ni; ba bɛ la yɛla ni, ka na zi Naawunni nyɔvuri ŋɔn nyɛ seem, ba ziilinsi ni ba tuppuwumni zugu.

english_verse: But this isn't what you were taught about Jesus Christ. He is the truth, and you heard about him and learned about him.
translation_verse: Ay! - Yan daa wum u yɛla ka daa deaai u wulisigu maa, yɛlimaŋni din bɛ Yisa saani la zugu n‑daa la.

english_verse: You were told that your foolish desires will destroy you and that you must give up your old way of life with all its bad habits.
translation_verse: Ba daa wulisi ya, ni, yan daa nyɛ ninvugseeba sahanseaa la, lala niriba daa bɛ la baasiyɔri soori ni, kɔribeeri ni yɔmsa zugu; ni, ya zaŋŋma lala ninvugkura beesigu maa m‑basi.

english_verse: Let the Spirit change your way of thinking
translation_verse: Ni, ka kyɛ ka ya teesa leebi teesipaala.

english_verse: and make you into a new person. You were created to be like God, and so you must please him and be truly holy. Rules for the New Life
translation_verse: Ni, ka lala ya nin maali n‑naam n‑leebi ninvugpaala Naawunni zugu. Halli ya nin leebi ninvugveela, yɛlimaŋni dima kasikasi.

english_verse: We are part of the same body. Stop lying and start telling each other the truth.
translation_verse: Dinzugu see ka ya kyɛli ziri; ni, “sɔkam yɛtti yɛlimaŋni n‑tiri u taraana”, dama ti zaa nyɛ la ningbiŋŋu yinni tuga.

english_verse: Don't get so angry that you sin. Don't go to bed angry
translation_verse: Ni, “Halli ni ya sufu yi yisigi, yan di tum putoo.”; yan di kyɛ ka ya sugyeaa yuui halli ka wuntaŋŋa ti lu.

english_verse: and don't give the devil a chance.
translation_verse: Yan di tiili dariga n‑ti Sintaani.

english_verse: If you are a thief, quit stealing. Be honest and work hard, so you will have something to give to people in need.
translation_verse: Ŋɔn yi zuuri zaa kyɛli zuubu ka zaŋŋi u nuusi n‑tumni tunsuma: di nin kyɛ ka u mari bunseesi ka u nin toaai n‑zaŋŋi n‑suŋŋi ban kɔŋŋni la.

english_verse: Stop all your dirty talk. Say the right thing at the right time and help others by what you say.
translation_verse: Yan di tɔ'asiri yɛttɔ'abeeri; ya tɔ'asim yɛttɔ'asuma an nin suŋŋi yan tɔ'asiri n‑tiri seeba maa, ni seelli din nin niŋi ba anfaani.

english_verse: Don't make God's Spirit sad. The Spirit makes you sure that someday you will be free from your sins.
translation_verse: Yan di kyɛ ka Naawunni Sii Kasi maa sufu sa'am ya beesiyɔri zugu, dama ŋɔn daa daalim ya n‑wulisi, ni, ya nyɛ la Naawunni dinni, ni, ya maali la siri nti fa-m‑basi dabsiri daari.

english_verse: Stop being bitter and angry and mad at others. Don't yell at one another or curse each other or ever be rude.
translation_verse: Ya yim putoo ni, ni sufu yisigri ni sufugyeaa zaa ni, ni yɛttɔ'abeeri ni nyaanzum ni; halli ya kyɛli yɛlibeeri zaa yɛla.

english_verse: Instead, be kind and merciful, and forgive others, just as God forgave you because of Christ.
translation_verse: Amaa ka ya wuri taaba, ka mari nirilim ni taaba, n‑zɔri taaba namboo, ka kyɛri taaba taalli hoo Naawunni ŋɔn kyɛ ya taalli m‑pɛŋŋi ya seem la, Kirisita zugu.

english_verse: Let love be your guide. Christ loved us and offered his life for us as a sacrifice that pleases God.
translation_verse: Ya kyɛ ka ya beesigu zaa kur nyɛ la wurilim, hoo Kirisita ŋɔn daa wuri ti ka zaŋŋi u maŋŋa m‑maali n‑tisi Naawunni, nti kyɛ ka ŋɔn Naawunni daa wum u sara wa nya'asim.

english_verse: You are God's people, so don't let it be said that any of you are immoral or indecent or greedy.
translation_verse: Amaa yan di kyɛ ka zina bɛ ya ni, bee da'ari tuma bee zinyuu - halli yan di kyɛ ka ba tɔ'asiri m‑boonni anŋɔ taabu yuya ya saani, dama anŋɔ bu sumni Naawunni niriba.

english_verse: Being greedy, indecent, or immoral is just another way of worshiping idols. You can be sure people who behave in this way will never be part of the kingdom that belongs to Christ and to God. Living as People of Light
translation_verse: Ya baŋŋma dinŋɔa: zinyuu daana n nyɛ sɔ ŋɔn gyeemni la buga, ka ŋɔna ni zina nira ni da'ari tuntumna - ba sɔkam ku la'am n‑di faari n‑kpɛ Naawunni naam ni, din nyɛ Kirisita dinni la.

english_verse: Don't let anyone trick you with foolish talk. God punishes everyone who disobeys him and says foolish things.
translation_verse: Tɔ: ka dinŋɔna yan di kyɛ ka sɔsɔ zaŋŋi u yɛttɔ'ayɔya n‑yɔmsi ya; dama lala zugu ka Naawunni sufuyisigri paari ban bu wumni u noori la.

english_verse: So don't have anything to do with anyone like that.
translation_verse: Dinzugu yan di la'amni lala niriba saani.

english_verse: You used to be like people living in the dark, but now you are people of the light because you belong to the Lord. So act like people of the light
translation_verse: Dama ya daa bɛ la zibsim ni saha din gaari la, amaa pampaŋŋɔ ya yi bɛ la ti Dugma neesim ni. Ya kyɛ ka ya beesigu nyɛ la neesim dima dinni.

english_verse: and make your light shine. Be good and honest and truthful,
translation_verse: Neesim din bɛ ya ni zugu, ya tumni la din veela, ka din mari la yɛlimaŋni ka tu la.

english_verse: as you try to please the Lord.
translation_verse: Ka ya booma m‑baŋŋi din pɛligri ti Dugma sufu.

english_verse: Don't take part in doing those worthless things that are done in the dark. Instead, show how wrong they are.
translation_verse: Yan di kyɛ ka ya la'am banŋɔ saani n‑tumni din taasiri zibsim yɛliyɔya na la, amaa ya yiisim tuma wa paalu ni n‑wulisi a beeri ŋɔn bɛ seem.

english_verse: It is disgusting even to talk about what is done in the dark.
translation_verse: Dama tunseesi niriba wa ŋɔn sɔ'ari n‑tumni la muna - halli sɔ yi tɔ'asi a yɛla, di nyɛ la vi.

english_verse: But the light will show what these things are really like.
translation_verse: Amaa seelli zaa neesim ŋɔn neaai n‑niŋi maa bɛ la paalu ni,

english_verse: Light shows up everything, just as the Scriptures say, “Wake up from your sleep and rise from death. Then Christ will shine on you.”
translation_verse: dama neesim n kyɛ ka ti nyari seelikam. Dizugu ka ba yɛtti, ni#:- “Nyin gɔgbisira wa, doaama! Neaam kum ni! - Ka Kirisita nin ti neaai na n‑ti i.”

english_verse: Act like people with good sense and not like fools.
translation_verse: Anŋɔ zaa zugu, ya baŋŋma yan bɛ seem suŋŋasuŋŋa; di tumni gyɛrilim, amaa ka ya tumni yɛm tuma.

english_verse: These are evil times, so make every minute count.
translation_verse: Zuna muna - dabsibeeri saha nla, ka dizugu yan zaŋŋma ya saha zaa n‑niŋni suŋŋa.

english_verse: Don't be stupid. Instead, find out what the Lord wants you to do.
translation_verse: Dizugu yan di leebi gyɛra, amaa ya baŋŋma ti Dugma ŋɔn boori seem maa ka tumni lala.

english_verse: Don't destroy yourself by getting drunk, but let the Spirit fill your life.
translation_verse: Yan di nyuuri daam m‑bugra, dama galagala yɛla nŋɔa, amaa ya kyɛ ka Naawunni Siiya paali ya.

english_verse: When you meet together, sing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs, as you praise the Lord with all your heart.
translation_verse: Ya yuumni n‑tɔ'asiri n‑tiri taaba - Naawunni Litaafi la yuuma, ni pɛ'abu yuuma, ni yuunseesi Naawunni Siiya ŋɔn wulisi ya maa ka ya yuumna; ya sufu ni ka ya yuumni lala n‑tiri ti Dugma.

english_verse: Always use the name of our Lord Jesus Christ to thank God the Father for everything. Wives and Husbands
translation_verse: Naawunni nyɛ la ti Ba; ya puusim u ‘taari’ bunseelikam zugu, ni sahakam, ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita Masiiya yuuri ni.

english_verse: Honor Christ and put others first.
translation_verse: Ya tim Kirisita gyirima, ka wumni n‑tiri taaba#:-

english_verse: A wife should put her husband first, as she does the Lord.
translation_verse: Pɔ'aba, ya wumni n‑tiri ya siridima kpaaŋŋu la, hoo yan wum n‑ti ti Dugma seem.

english_verse: A husband is the head of his wife, as Christ is the head and the Savior of the church, which is his own body.
translation_verse: Kirisita bɛ la u niriba saani hoo zugu ŋɔn bɛ ningbiŋŋu saani seem la, ka u nyɛ la ningbiŋŋu maa tuligra: lala ka doowa n nyɛ hoo zugu n‑ti u pɔ'a.

english_verse: Wives should always put their husbands first, as the church puts Christ first.
translation_verse: Hoo u niriba ŋɔn wumni n‑ti Kirisita seem, lala ka di sumsi ni pɔ'aba gba wumni n‑ti ba siridima seelikam puuni.

english_verse: A husband should love his wife as much as Christ loved the church and gave his life for it.
translation_verse: Ya dɔppa muna - ya wuri ya pɔ'aba hoo Kirisita ŋɔn daa wuri u niriba seem, n‑zaŋŋi u maŋŋa n‑tisi ba zugu.

english_verse: He made the church holy by the power of his word, and he made it pure by washing it with water.
translation_verse: U daa niŋi lala ni u ti kyɛ ka ba leebi Naawunni niriba kasikasi, ka su ba koom m‑peaai ba, yɛligu maa zugu.

english_verse: Christ did this, so he would have a glorious and holy church, without faults or spots or wrinkles or any other flaws.
translation_verse: Yaasa, u daa niŋi lala ni u ti zaŋŋi ba n‑ti u maŋŋa: ba nyɛ la hoo u maŋtoori pɔ'a, pɔ'aveelli ŋɔn ka lasim, bee da'ari, bee lala yɛlibeoo zaa, nti bɛ u dinni ka ka galiŋŋu.

english_verse: In the same way, a husband should love his wife as much as he loves himself. A husband who loves his wife shows he loves himself.
translation_verse: Lala gba ka di sum ni dɔppa wuri ba toori pɔ'aba, hoo ba mammaŋŋa ningbina. Ŋɔnkam wuri u pɔ'a wuri la u maŋŋa.

english_verse: None of us hate our own bodies. We provide for them and take good care of them, just as Christ does for the church,
translation_verse: Ya bu nya? - sɔ n ka ni n‑yaai u mammaŋŋa ningbiŋŋu: ay! - ba yi lee m‑mari ka la suŋŋa, hoo Kirisita ŋɔn mari u niriba suŋŋa seem la.

english_verse: because we are each part of his body.
translation_verse: Dama tirima, u niriba maa, nyɛ la u ningbiŋŋu tuga, ni ka ya'a.

english_verse: As the Scriptures say, “A man leaves his father and mother to get married, and he becomes like one person with his wife.”
translation_verse: Ni, “Dinŋɔ zugu ka doo nin kyɛ u ba, ni u ma, ka di pɔ'a ka ba la'am m‑bɛ ni kaman bunni yinni.”

english_verse: This is a great mystery, but I understand it to mean Christ and his church.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔ baŋŋni tɔ ni; man mun yɛtti, ni, di wulisiri la Kirisita ni u niriba yɛla, ni, ba nyɛ la bunni yinni.

english_verse: So each husband should love his wife as much as he loves himself, and each wife should respect her husband.
translation_verse: Amaa yarim gba, see ka ya sɔkam zaa wuri u pɔ'a hoo ŋɔn wuri u mammaŋŋa seem la, ka u pɔ'a maa mun nin ti u sira gyirima.

english_verse: Children, you belong to the Lord, and you do the right thing when you obey your parents. The first commandment with a promise says,
translation_verse: Biisi, ya wumni n‑tiri ya ba ni ya ma dima, ti Dugma zugu; dama dinŋɔ n nyɛ din tu.

english_verse: and you will have a long and happy life.”
translation_verse: Dama di laa n‑yɛtti, ni, “Lala ka i nin kpalim i nyɔvuri ni n‑yuui tingbaŋŋu maa ni.”

english_verse: Parents, don't be hard on your children. Raise them properly. Teach them and instruct them about the Lord. Slaves and Masters
translation_verse: Yarim biisi badima muna - yan di galimni ka tuuri ya biisi ka ba ti gyɛ suuri, amaa ya mari ba la suŋŋa n‑wulisi ba n‑kpaamni ba ti Dugma zugu.

english_verse: Slaves, you must obey your earthly masters. Show them great respect and be as loyal to them as you are to Christ.
translation_verse: Daaba, ya wumni n‑tiri ya duniya wa dugmadima maa, ni gyirima ni ninzoaa. Yan zaŋŋma ya sufu zaa n‑wumni n‑tiri ba, hoo yan nin wum n‑ti Kirisita seem la.

english_verse: Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. You are slaves of Christ, so with your whole heart you must do what God wants you to do.
translation_verse: Ya gyeemni ba, pa la ban yi gɔsiri ya kɔkɔa, hoo ninvugseeba ban boori ni ba nya duusigu ninsaalidima saani, amaa yɛlimaŋni ni, hoo daaba ban nyɛ Kirisita dinni; ya tumni la Naawunni tuma ya sufu ni.

english_verse: Gladly serve your masters, as though they were the Lord himself, and not simply people.
translation_verse: Ya tumni nimmoosi, hoo yan tumni n‑tiri ti Dugma, pa la saala.

english_verse: You know that you will be rewarded for any good things you do, whether you are slaves or free.
translation_verse: Dama ya mi, ni, ti Dugma nin yɔ sɔkam u tunsuma zugu, di daama yi nyɛ la daabri, bee, u pa daabri gba.

english_verse: Slave owners, you must treat your slaves with this same respect. Don't threaten them. They have the same Master in heaven that you do, and he doesn't have favorites. The Fight against Evil
translation_verse: Yaseeba ban mari daaba la muna - hoo man yɛnni, ni, ba tumma n‑tiri ya seem la, lala ka ya gba tumni ni n‑tiri ba; ya kyɛli tulisigu ni mugsigu. Ya baŋŋma, ni, ya gba nyɛ la Kirisita daaba; yan ni ban zaa mari ya dugma yinni: u bɛ la arizana ni, ka nyɛ sɔ ŋɔn bu gaŋŋni nira ni nira.

english_verse: Finally, let the mighty strength of the Lord make you strong.
translation_verse: Di zaa nyaaŋŋa, ya kpamsim ya mansi ti Dugma saani, ka kyɛ ka u yiiko titaari bɛ ya saani.

english_verse: Put on all the armor that God gives, so you can defend yourself against the devil's tricks.
translation_verse: Ya yeema Naawunni gba'anu ka deaai u tɔppu neema zaa. Anŋɔ nin kyɛ ka ya nyaŋŋi Sintaani yɔmsigu putɔyam zaa.

english_verse: We are not fighting against humans. We are fighting against forces and authorities and against rulers of darkness and powers in the spiritual world.
translation_verse: Dama ti bu moori ni ninsaalidima, amaa saazugu yiiko dima ka ti zabra, ni saazugu naam dima, ni seeba ban su duniya wa fukumsi ka bɛ la zibsim ni la - halli siseeba ban bɛ saazugu m‑mari yɛlibeeri yiiko la zaasa.

english_verse: So put on all the armor that God gives. Then when that evil day comes, you will be able to defend yourself. And when the battle is over, you will still be standing firm.
translation_verse: Dinzugu ya deaam Naawunni tɔppu neema zaa, ka lala nin kyɛ ka ya tuusi dabsibeoo daari tɔppu la n‑zɛ deede; ka di zaa yi ti naai, ya nin nyɛ la ban nin kpalim n‑zɛ ya gbaya zugu.

english_verse: Be ready! Let the truth be like a belt around your waist, and let God's justice protect you like armor.
translation_verse: Dizugu ya zɛ deede. Ya looma ya seaa suŋŋa - yɛlimaŋni maa nyɛ la ya lala sɛlooriga; ka zaŋŋi gba'anu n‑ta'ai ya nyaari - ya beesigu ŋɔn tuusi seem la nla.

english_verse: Your desire to tell the good news about peace should be like shoes on your feet.
translation_verse: Ya pirima mugrikpeema - di nyɛ la: ya maalim siri ni ya mooli sufudoaa lahabasuŋŋu maa.

english_verse: Let your faith be like a shield, and you will be able to stop all the flaming arrows of the evil one.
translation_verse: M‑paasi, Sintaani nin tɔ ya bugum piima, see ka ya mari bunni n‑ta'ai a n‑kpiisi a - ya yɛdda niŋbu mun nla.

english_verse: Let God's saving power be like a helmet, and for a sword use God's message that comes from the Spirit.
translation_verse: Ka laa m‑pili soogyadima kutti zupiliga - di nyɛ la: tuliginsim din ta'ari ya; ka zaŋŋi takoobi n‑kyeera - Naawunni yɛligu maa ŋmanni la u Sii Kasi suu wa n‑ti ya.

english_verse: Never stop praying, especially for others. Always pray by the power of the Spirit. Stay alert and keep praying for God's people.
translation_verse: Ya mari wunsusigu sahakam, n‑susiri m‑bɛlimni Naawunni yan boori seelikam, Sii Kasi maa soori ni. Halli ya galima gɔgala gba, ni ya ti susira; yan bɛlimma u, ka teaai u u maŋtoori niriba zaa yɛla.

english_verse: Pray that I will be given the message to speak and that I may fearlessly explain the mystery about the good news.
translation_verse: Ya laa n‑susiri n‑ti ma gba, n‑yɛli Naawunni ka u ti ma yɛttɔ'a, man ŋɔn tɔ'asi saha kam gba, ni n ti zaŋŋi n sufukpeemni n‑wulisi lahabasuŋŋu maa yɛlisɔ'ara ka a ti yi paalu.

english_verse: I was sent to do this work, and this is the reason I am in jail. So pray that I will be brave and will speak as I should. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Lahabasuŋŋu maa zugu ka n nyɛ ti Dugma tuumu n‑zɛ u zaani n‑tiri niriba, ka ba lɔ ma la kyɔrimi di zugu. Amaa ya susima n‑ti ma, ni, n tɔ'asi paalu ni ka dabeem ka ma, hoo din sumsi ni n tɔ'asi seem.

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and the Lord Jesus Christ will give peace, love, and faith to every follower!
translation_verse: M puusiri ti mabiisi zaa: Naawunni paasim ba alaafɛa, ni wurilim ni yɛdda - anŋɔ zaa ka ti Ba Naawunni tisira, ni ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita Masiiya.

english_verse: May God be kind to everyone who keeps on loving our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Naawunni paasim u piinisuma n‑ti ya zaa ban wuri ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita Masiiya ka ya wurilim bu kpiira.

english_verse: From Paul and Timothy, servants of Christ Jesus. To all God's people who belong to Christ Jesus at Philippi and to all your bishops and deacons.
translation_verse: Gbaŋŋu wa yi la man, Pɔla, saani na - man ni Timɔti gba: tirim mun nyɛ Yisa Kirisita Masiiya daaba, ka ti sɔbri n‑tiri ya Naawunni niriba, yaseeba ban bɛ Filipaai tiŋŋa ka bɛ ni ni Yisa Kirisita taaba, yan ni ya gyeeŋŋu kpamma ni ban suŋŋni ba zaa.

english_verse: Every time I think of you, I thank my God.
translation_verse: N pɛ'ari la m Ba Naawunni saha kam zaa, n yi ti teaari ya yɛla sahanseaa maa.

english_verse: And whenever I mention you in my prayers, it makes me happy.
translation_verse: Man yi puusi u saha kam, n susiri zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ya zaa yɛla; ka n lala susigu bɛ la ni sufumaasim,

english_verse: This is because you have taken part with me in spreading the good news from the first day you heard about it.
translation_verse: yan daa la'am n‑suŋŋi ma zugu - ya suŋŋni ma zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi Naawunni lahabasuŋŋu tuma ziiya, piiligu ni halli ni zuna.

english_verse: God is the one who began this good work in you, and I am certain that he won't stop before it is complete on the day that Christ Jesus returns.
translation_verse: Dama n niŋi yɛdda, ni, Naawunni ŋɔn pun piili tunsunseesi ya saani la, u nin kyɛ ka a na kyɛnni tooni lala halli ni a naari, Kirisita Masiiya Dabsiri daari saha.

english_verse: You have a special place in my heart. So it is only natural for me to feel the way I do. All of you have helped in the work God has given me, as I defend the good news and tell about it here in jail.
translation_verse: Ya bɛ la n sufu ni saha kam, ka di zugu di tuya, ni, n niŋi lala yɛdda zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ya yɛla. Ya la'amni n‑suŋŋni ma n‑nyari Naawunni piinisuma. Di nyɛ la lala man ŋɔn lɔ la kyɔrimi seem ziiya, ni man ŋɔn gyɛrigi sarikatta maa tooni ka wulisiri lahabasuŋŋu maa yɛlimaŋni ŋɔn zɛ seem ziiya m‑paasi.

english_verse: God himself knows how much I want to see you. He knows I care for you in the same way Christ Jesus does.
translation_verse: Halli Naawunni mammaŋŋa nin sakki, ni, n sufu siri boori ya yɛla hoo Yisa Kirisita sufu ŋɔn boori ya yɛla nimmoosi seem la.

english_verse: how to make the right choices. Then you will still be pure and innocent when Christ returns. And until that day,
translation_verse: Lala nin kyɛ ka ya nin toaai m‑baŋŋi din tu, halli nti paai Kirisita Dabsiri daari la; ka lala saha ya nin ti zaani, galinsɛseelli ka ni.

english_verse: Jesus Christ will keep you busy doing good deeds that bring glory and praise to God. What Life Means to Paul
translation_verse: Di saha ka yɛlimaŋni tuma zaa nin paali ya, ka a taabu yi la Yisa Kirisita kɔkɔ saani na: di nin kyɛ ka pɛ'abu ni tibsim ti bɛ ni n‑tiri Naawunni.

english_verse: My dear friends, I want you to know that what has happened to me has helped to spread the good news.
translation_verse: Tɔ: ka dinŋɔna, m mabiisi, m boori ya baŋŋi, ni, yɛttɔ'aseesi an paai ma na zaa - ay! a naari nyɛ la: ni, lahabasuŋŋu yɛla kur kyɛnni tooni.

english_verse: The Roman guards and all the others know I am here in jail because I serve Christ.
translation_verse: Dama dinŋɔ n kyɛ ka sɔkam baŋŋi, ni, di nyɛ la Yisa Kirisita zugu ka ba lɔ ma kyɔrimi lala: halli Naaba Kambɔnsi maa ni ban kpalim zaa ti baŋŋi lala.

english_verse: Some are preaching about Christ because they are jealous and envious of us. Others are preaching because they want to help.
translation_verse: Tɔ, seeba m bɛ ni n‑niŋni lala karimbaani ni nyamaŋŋa zugu, ni ba yuuri ti du n‑gaari ba taaba; ka seeba mun moonni Kirisita yɛla ba sufu ni yɛlimaŋni ni yɛdda zugu.

english_verse: But the ones who are jealous of us are not sincere. They just want to cause trouble for me while I am in jail.
translation_verse: Banla muna moonni la Kirisita yɛla nyuuri zappu zugu; ba sufu ni teesa bu dɔli soori, ka ba yɛtti, ni, man ŋɔn kpalim n‑lɔ zugu ba nin kyɛ ka n sufu sa'am.

english_verse: But that doesn't matter. All that matters is that people are telling about Christ, whether they are sincere or not. This is what makes me glad. I will keep on being glad,
translation_verse: Amaa m ba'a ka ba yɛla maa ni: n nya ka Kirisita yɛla yi paalu, ni niriba ti wum, ka n sufu maai di zugu. Di yi nyɛ ba sufu ni yɔmsigu zugu ka ba moonna, bee, ba sufu yɛlimaŋni zugu gba, di ka taalli. Ii, n sufu nin maai

english_verse: because I know that your prayers and the help that comes from the Spirit of Christ Jesus will keep me safe.
translation_verse: dama m mi, ni, di zaa nin naayi kyɛ ka n nya fa-m‑basi, ka di nyɛ la yarim wunsusigu zugu, ni Yisa Kirisita Sii la suŋŋsim zugu gba.

english_verse: I honestly expect and hope I will never do anything to be ashamed of. Whether I live or die, I always want to be as brave as I am now and bring honor to Christ.
translation_verse: Ii! - m mari la tama ka bu birisira, ni, n bu ya di vi seelikam zaa puuni. Ni, n nin mari dablim n‑tɔ'asi yɛligu maa paalu ni pampaŋŋɔa, hoo man daa pun tɔ'asi ka sahakam. Ka lala nin kyɛ ka Kirisita yuuri du n yɛla zugu, di yi ti nyɛ la man na bɛ ni maa zugu, bee, man ka ni la gba zugu.

english_verse: If I live, it will be for Christ, and if I die, I will gain even more.
translation_verse: Man saani, n yi ti bɛ n nyɔvuri ni, Kirisita nla: man mun yi ti kpi, anfaani n nyɛ di n‑ti ma.

english_verse: It is a hard choice to make. I want to die and be with Christ, because this would be much better.
translation_verse: Sɔya ayi wa n dɔya, ka di mugsi ma ka n ku toaai n‑yiisi yinni: m boori n bakki n‑kyaŋŋi nti bɛ Kirisita saani - lala n sɔa: bee, m ma'ai ni?

english_verse: But I know that all of you still need me. This is why I am sure I will stay on to help you grow and be happy in your faith.
translation_verse: Tɔ: n siri mi halli, ni, lala n nyɛ di. Ni, ka di zugu n nin kpalim n‑na bɛ ya saani, ni ya ti kyɛnni tooni n‑nyari sufupeelim pam ya yɛdda niŋbu zugu.

english_verse: Then, when I visit you again, you will have good reason to take great pride in Christ Jesus because of me.
translation_verse: Dama n nin laa m‑bɛ ya saani yaasa, ka lala zugu nin kyɛ ka ya sufu maai zaa, ka ya tibgri Kirisita Yisa man yɛla zugu.

english_verse: Above all else, you must live in a way that brings honor to the good news about Christ. Then, whether I visit you or not, I will hear that all of you think alike. I will know that you are working together and are struggling side by side to get others to believe the good news.
translation_verse: Yɛttɔ'a seelikam zaa yɔri, ya na kpalimma m‑bɛ beesisuŋŋu din sumsi Kirisita lahabasuŋŋu niriba la. Di yi bɛ lala, man yi kyɛ ya saani na n‑nya yan bɛ seem, bee, n na bɛ wa'aligu ka kur wumni ya damni, di zaa nyɛ la yimmu. Dama n nin baŋŋi, ni, ya la'amni m‑bari n‑zaani Sii maa nangbanyinni ni, n‑tumni lahabasuŋŋu yɛdda tuma ni nimbirimoaa.

english_verse: Be brave when you face your enemies. Your courage will show them that they are going to be destroyed, and it will show you that you will be saved. God will make all of this happen,
translation_verse: Ninvugseeba m bɛ ni m bu boori ya yɛla halli. Amaa yan di zɔri ba yɛla dabeem seelikam zaa zugu. Ba zabboobu wulisiri la ya zaa yɛla, ni, ban nin baasi yɔri, yarim mun nin nya tuliginsim, ka di yi la Naawunni saani na.

english_verse: and he has blessed you. Not only do you have faith in Christ, but you suffer for him.
translation_verse: Ya deaari la piini Kirisita yuuri zugu: di pa la yan niŋi u yɛdda seem la kɔkɔa, amaa halli yan di wahala u zugu gba n nyɛ piinisuŋŋu n‑ti ya.

english_verse: You saw me suffer, and you still hear about my troubles. Now you must suffer in the same way.
translation_verse: Ya bu nya? - yan moori seem la, di nyɛ la yan pun nya ka wumni pampaŋŋɔ, ni, man gba moori lala.

english_verse: Now make me completely happy! Live in harmony by showing love for each other. Be united in what you think, as if you were only one person.
translation_verse: Tɔ: ka anŋɔ zaa yi siri bɛ lala, dinŋɔna n susiri ya ni, ni, ya sakkri taaba, ka laa n‑wuri taaba, ka ya sufu la'am n‑leebi yummu, nti mari nangbanyinni ni taaba: lala nin kyɛ ka n sufu maai zaa.

english_verse: Care about them as much as you care about yourselves
translation_verse: Ya kyɛ ka ya sɔkam ba'a bɛ la u taraana bukyi ni, pa la u mammaŋŋa dinni.

english_verse: Christ was truly God. But he did not try to remain equal with God.
translation_verse: U kur mari la Naawunni beesigu saha kam, Ka di zugu u bu yɛli, ni, u faama lala beesigu Ni u ti sa'ai ni Naawunni beebu.

english_verse: Instead he gave up everything and became a slave, when he became like one of us.
translation_verse: U daa sigsi u maŋŋa n‑kyɛ u toori yuubu yɛla zaa; U daa zaŋŋi u maŋŋa n‑labgi daabri, Ka laa n‑ŋmanni hoo ninsaalidima. Ka ŋɔn daa baŋŋi, ni, u ŋmanni hoo ninsaala,

english_verse: Christ was humble. He obeyed God and even died on a cross.
translation_verse: U daa sigsi u maŋŋa ka daa sakki kum - halli dɔpulli zugu kum gba.

english_verse: Then God gave Christ the highest place and honored his name above all others.
translation_verse: Dinzugu Naawunni daa duusi u n‑tibgi u zaa, Ka ti u yuuri Ka ka gaari yuya zaa.

english_verse: So at the name of Jesus everyone will bow down, those in heaven, on earth, and under the earth.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔ zugu ka sɔkam zaa nin ti gbaani u tooni: Ban bɛ saazugu nin gbaani u tooni, Ban bɛ duniya wa ni gba nin ti gbaani u, Ni ban bɛ tinlɔŋŋu ni gba m‑paasi.

english_verse: And to the glory of God the Father everyone will openly agree, “Jesus Christ is Lord!” Lights in the World
translation_verse: Ka sɔkam zaa nin ti mooli u yuuri Ka sakki, ni, Yisa Kirisita nyɛ la ti Dugma, Ka di kyɛ ka u Ba Naawunni nya gyirima.

english_verse: My dear friends, you always obeyed when I was with you. Now that I am away, you should obey even more. So work with fear and trembling to discover what it really means to be saved.
translation_verse: M mabiisi, di veeli pam yan daa sakki n‑ti ma, man ŋɔn daa bɛ ya saani la, halli ni man laa n‑ka ya saani wa gba. Amaa ya kur kpalimma n‑kpaŋŋni ya mansi n‑tumna, ni ya ti paai ya tuliginsim zaa ni nimmoosi.

english_verse: God is working in you to make you willing and able to obey him.
translation_verse: Dama Naawunni kur kpalim m‑bɛ ya saani, ka ŋɔn la'amni n‑tumna, ni ya ti sakki ŋɔn boori seem ka laa n‑nyaŋŋi n‑tum.

english_verse: Then you will be the pure and innocent children of God. You live among people who are crooked and evil, but you must not do anything they can say is wrong. Try to shine as lights among the people of this world,
translation_verse: Ka lala zugu nin kyɛ ka galinsi seelli ku paai ya, ka ya nin nyɛ la Naawunni bisuma m‑bɛ duniya wa dima sunsukkuni, halli ni ba zaa n nyɛ tumbeeri dima zaa yɔri. Ya nin ŋmanni hoo saŋmariwuusi ŋɔn nɛ seem la, ka ba nin nya.

english_verse: as you hold firmly to the message that gives life. Then on the day when Christ returns, I can take pride in you. I can also know that my work and efforts were not useless.
translation_verse: Ya nin ŋmani lala, yan zaŋŋni nyɔvuri lahabaari n‑tiri ba sahanseaa la. Ya yi niŋi lala, n sufu nin mari yaa Kirisita Dabsiri maa daari, dama din nin ti wulisi, ni, n kpaŋmaŋni ni n tuma maa zaa daa pa yɔri.

english_verse: Your faith in the Lord and your service are like a sacrifice offered to him. And my own blood may have to be poured out with the sacrifice. If this happens, I will be glad and rejoice with you.
translation_verse: Di ŋmanni la yan maanni la sara ka man mun nyɛ ka koom ka ba kpaara - di nyɛ la: ya niŋni yɛdda n‑kyɛnni tooni, halli n kum daari ti paai na. Ni di zaa yɔri, n sufu yi maai ka n sufumaasim wa nin paai ya.

english_verse: In the same way, you should be glad and rejoice with me. Timothy and Epaphroditus
translation_verse: Lala yaasa, ya gba sufu nin maai ka ya sufumaasim wa nin paai ma na.

english_verse: I want to be encouraged by news about you. So I hope the Lord Jesus will soon let me send Timothy to you.
translation_verse: Tɔ: di yi nyɛ ti Dugma Yisa yiiko zugu, m mari tama, ni n nin tum ti mabii Timɔti ya saani na pampaŋŋɔa, ka u nin tiri ma ya lahabaya ka n nin mari sufudoaa.

english_verse: I don't have anyone else who cares about you as much as he does.
translation_verse: Ŋɔn kɔkɔ n nyɛ ŋɔn suŋŋni ma n yɛla kam puuni, ka laa n‑nyɛ ŋɔn gɔsiri ya zugu ni nimbirimoaa.

english_verse: The others think only about what interests them and not about what concerns Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Banla zaa ba'a bɛ la ba maŋtoori yɛla ni, pa Yisa Kirisita yɛla ni.

english_verse: But you know what kind of person Timothy is. He has worked with me like a son in spreading the good news.
translation_verse: Amaa ŋɔn Timɔti muna, yan mi u beebu ŋɔn nyɛ seem, ni, u suŋŋni ma zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi lahabasuŋŋu tuma hoo biiya ŋɔn suŋŋni u ba seem la.

english_verse: I hope to send him to you, as soon as I find out what is going to happen to me.
translation_verse: Dinzugu m mari tama, ni, n tum u ya saani na: ka n nin niŋi lala man ŋɔn mi din kyɛnni seem n‑ti ma sahanseaa.

english_verse: And I feel sure the Lord will also let me come soon.
translation_verse: Halli ni di zaa yɔri, n niŋi Yisa yɛdda, ni, di ku yuui ka n nin kyɛ ya saani na m mammaŋŋa.

english_verse: I think I ought to send my dear friend Epaphroditus back to you. He is a follower and a worker and a soldier of the Lord, just as I am. You sent him to look after me,
translation_verse: M mabiisi, n nya ka di nyɛ la talasi ni n tum ti mabii Ɛpafrɔditusi ni u labi ya saani na. U nyɛ la sɔ ŋɔn la'am ni ma n‑tumna, hoo soogyadima ayi ŋɔn yi suŋŋni taaba seem la. Ŋɔna ka ya daa tum n saani na ni u zɛ ya zaani ni n‑suŋŋni ma.

english_verse: In fact, he was very sick and almost died. But God was kind to him, and also to me, and he kept me from being burdened down with sorrow.
translation_verse: U siri daa ka alaafɛa, ka di daa bu veeli gba - halli ni u ti ya n‑kpi gba. Amaa Naawunni daa zɔ u namboo, halli pa la ŋɔn kɔkɔ amaa man gba daa nya lala namboo maa. Di yi pa lala n naa n‑nya sufusa'aŋŋu m‑paasi n sufusa'aŋŋu ni.

english_verse: Now I am more eager than ever to send Epaphroditus back again. You will be glad to see him, and I won't have to worry any longer.
translation_verse: Anŋɔ zaa zugu ka n yɛli, ni, see ka n tum u ya saani na yooma. Lala nin kyɛ ka ya nin laa n‑nya u ka ya sufu maai di zugu, ka man mun ku laa n‑nya sufusa'aŋŋu u yɛla zugu.

english_verse: Be sure to give him a cheerful welcome, just as people who serve the Lord deserve.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔna ya deaama u ti Dugma zugu, ka kyɛ ka ya sufu maai u zugu. Halli lala taabu niriba zaa ka ya pun deaari n‑tiri ba gyirima.

english_verse: Finally, my dear friends, be glad that you belong to the Lord. It doesn't bother me to write the same things to you that I have written before. In fact, it is for your own good.
translation_verse: Tɔ, m mabiisi, din kpalim nyɛ la: ni, ya mari sufupeelli ti Dugma zugu. M maali n‑sɔbri man pun sɔbi seem n‑ti ya, amaa lala bu tɔ n saani, ka yarima mun nin nya suŋŋsim di zugu, ka yɛttɔ'abeoo ku ti paai ya na.

english_verse: Watch out for those people who behave like dogs! They are evil and want to do more than just circumcise you.
translation_verse: Ya baŋŋma ninvugseeba ban ŋmani la baasi la, tumbeeri zaa tumniba la, ban boori ningbina ŋmaari yɛla kɔkɔa!

english_verse: But we are the ones who are truly circumcised, because we worship by the power of God's Spirit and take pride in Christ Jesus. We don't brag about what we have done,
translation_verse: Ya bu nya? Tirim ŋɔn mari seelli maa nyɛ la gunibu ni yɛlimaŋni - ni, ti mari Naawunni Sii maa suŋŋsim n‑gyeemna, ka zaŋŋi ti sufu zaa n‑tibgri Kirisita ni sufumaasim: di pa la ningbina yɛttɔ'ari, yɛdda niŋbu n nyɛ di.

english_verse: although I could. Others may brag about themselves, but I have more reason to brag than anyone else.
translation_verse: Halli man nyɛ la sɔ ŋɔn nin nyaŋŋi n‑zaŋŋi yɛdda n‑niŋi ningbina yɛla maa. Sɔ zaa yi yɛnni, ni, u mari yɛdda u ningbina yɛla zugu, man gaari u.

english_verse: I was circumcised when I was eight days old, and I am from the nation of Israel and the tribe of Benjamin. I am a true Hebrew. As a Pharisee, I strictly obeyed the Law of Moses.
translation_verse: Ii! - Izraɛli butiri nira n nyɛ ma, ka ba daa dɔli la soori n‑guni ma n dɔ'am dabsa anii daari: Bɛngyamin za'anɔri bii gba n nyɛ ma, Hibrudoowa halaali zaa, ka n daa dɔli la Farisii dima zaaligu bamsim soori la.

english_verse: And I was so eager I even made trouble for the church. I did everything the Law demands in order to please God.
translation_verse: Lala soori nimbirimoaa yɛla zugu muna, n daa kari Yisa nyaandɔliba n‑namsi ba; ka Yɛhudiya dima zaaligu dɔligu beesigu ziiya ka n daa bu pɔsigi seelikam.

english_verse: But Christ has shown me that what I once thought was valuable is worthless.
translation_verse: Anŋɔ zaa daa bɛ la n saani hoo an mari bukyi; amaa di zaa yɔri, pampaŋŋɔ m ba'a ka anŋɔ zaa ni, halli beela, Kirisita yɛla zugu.

english_verse: Nothing is as wonderful as knowing Christ Jesus my Lord. I have given up everything else and count it all as garbage. All I want is Christ
translation_verse: M‑paasi lala, m ba'a ka bunseelikam zaa ni, di yi pa la man mari bamsim seaa m‑baŋŋi n Dugma Yisa Kirisita la - lala gaari a zaa halli nti yakki. Ŋɔn Kirisita zugu ka n gɔsiri bunseelikam hoo sa'ari ni bunkyɔ'ama: m bukyi zaa nyɛ la, ni, n nin nya ŋɔn Kirisita Yisa Masiiya,

english_verse: and to know that I belong to him. I could not make myself acceptable to God by obeying the Law of Moses. God accepted me simply because of my faith in Christ.
translation_verse: ka n laa n‑kpalim m‑bɛ u saani. Ka di pa ni m mari m maŋtoori yɛlimaŋni din yi la n zaaligu soori dɔligu ni na; ay! - n yɛlimaŋni beebu ni kur yi la n Kirisita yɛdda niŋbu ni na. Naawunni saani yɛlimaŋni n nyɛ di, yɛdda niŋbu zugu.

english_verse: All I want is to know Christ and the power that raised him to life. I want to suffer and die as he did,
translation_verse: M boori m baŋŋi u kum yisigri yiiko ŋɔn bɛ seem, ka laa n‑la'am n‑diri u wahala diibu, ka naayi leebi ŋɔn dɔli u soori, halli nti kpi.

english_verse: so that somehow I also may be raised to life. Running toward the Goal
translation_verse: Ka dinŋɔna, di nin kyɛ ka n paai kum yisigri zii la.

english_verse: I have not yet reached my goal, and I am not perfect. But Christ has taken hold of me. So I keep on running and struggling to take hold of the prize.
translation_verse: Tɔ; ka di pa la m pun deaai a; bee, m pun paai anŋɔ zaa ni na; amaa n kpalim n‑kyɛnni tooni n‑katti a nɔba, ni n ti naayi deaai, hoo Kirisita Yisa ŋɔn pun deaai ma seem maa.

english_verse: I run toward the goal, so I can win the prize of being called to heaven. This is the prize God offers because of what Christ Jesus has done.
translation_verse: N ŋmani la hoo ninvugsɔ ŋɔn zɔri zoaa: m moori n‑kyɛnni tooni ni n ti daŋŋi m‑paai tɔriga maa na n‑deaai ŋɔn daŋŋi tooni piini maa. Ka di nyɛ la: Naawunni ŋɔn booli ma ni m paai u saani saazugu na, Kirisita Yisa zugu.

english_verse: All of us who are mature should think in this same way. And if any of you think differently, God will make it clear to you.
translation_verse: Ti zaa yi ti kyɛ biilim ni na'akyimni yɛla ka paai ninvugmaŋni ziiya, lala teesa ka ti zaa nin teesira. Ya sɔ yi bu teesiri lala, anŋɔ gba ka Naawunni nin kasigi n‑wulisi n‑ti u.

english_verse: But we must keep going in the direction that we are now headed.
translation_verse: Amaa tin pun paai zaaziseaa ni, ya kyɛ ka ti bari n‑zaani bɛni.

english_verse: My friends, I want you to follow my example and learn from others who closely follow the example we set for you.
translation_verse: Ka dinŋɔna ya la'am n‑dɔli beesisuŋŋu sɔseaa man ŋɔn pun wulisi ya la, ka laa n‑gɔsiri ninvugseeba ban dɔli lala taabu soori maa.

english_verse: I often warned you that many people are living as enemies of the cross of Christ. And now with tears in my eyes, I warn you again
translation_verse: Dama m pun yɛli ya, ni, niriba pam beebu pa lala: ka n labi n‑yɛtti ya lala yaasa, halli ni sufusa'aŋŋu gba, ni, niriba wa leebi la Kirisita dɔpulli yɛla dindaandima.

english_verse: that they are headed for hell! They worship their stomachs and brag about the disgusting things they do. All they can think about are the things of this world.
translation_verse: Ban gyeemni wunsɔ la nyɛ la ba bundira kɔrisi, halli ka ban boonni seelli, ni, ‘gyirima’ la nyɛ la vi yɛla, dama ba teesa zaa bɛ la duniya wa buna ni: ba naari nyɛ la baasi yɔri zaa.

english_verse: But we are citizens of heaven and are eagerly waiting for our Savior to come from there. Our Lord Jesus Christ
translation_verse: Tirim mun nyɛ arizana timbiisi; ti guusi la ti Tuligra kyɛnni na, ka u nin yi arizana m‑paai na - ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita Masiiya nla.

english_verse: Euodia and Syntyche, you belong to the Lord, so I beg you to stop arguing with each other.
translation_verse: Tɔ; ka nyin, Yuwɔdia, ka n susiri i ni, ni nyin, Sintikyi, gba; n susiri ya ni, ni, ya mari nangbanyinni ni taaba, ti Dugma maa zugu.

english_verse: And, my true partner, I ask you to help them. These women have worked together with me and with Clement and with the others in spreading the good news. Their names are now written in the book of life.
translation_verse: Ka nyin gba, n zɔsuŋŋu, nyin ŋɔn daa bɛ n saani n‑tumni la, n susiri i gba, ni, i suŋŋi ba lala. Dama pɔ'aba ayi wa daa suŋŋi ma pam zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi lahabasuŋŋu tuma, ban ni Klɛmɛnsi ni n tuntuntaaba ban kpalim la m‑paasi. Naawunni siri pun sɔbi ba yuya n‑niŋi nyɔvuri gbaŋŋu la ni.

english_verse: Always be glad because of the Lord! I will say it again: Be glad.
translation_verse: Ya kyɛ ka sufupeelli bɛ ya saani sahakam, ti Dugma zugu. Ii, m maali n‑yɛtti ya, ni, ya mari sufupeelli.

english_verse: Always be gentle with others. The Lord will soon be here.
translation_verse: Ya kyɛ ka sɔkam baŋŋi ya nirilim ŋɔn nyɛ seem. Ti Dugma pɔri ti saani na.

english_verse: Don't worry about anything, but pray about everything. With thankful hearts offer up your prayers and requests to God.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔna yan di kyɛ ka seelli mugsi ya, amaa ya puusim Naawunni ya susigu zaa ni, ka kyɛ ka u baŋŋi yan boori seelikam zaa, ka laa m‑puusi u taari.

english_verse: Then, because you belong to Christ Jesus, God will bless you with peace that no one can completely understand. And this peace will control the way you think and feel.
translation_verse: Naawunni siri tisiri sugru ni sufudoaa ka di gaari ti nin toaai m‑baŋŋi seem zaa. U nin kyɛ ka lala sugru ni sufudoaa guri ya sufu yɛla, ni ya sufu ni teesa zaa, yan bɛ Kirisita Yisa saani zugu.

english_verse: Finally, my friends, keep your minds on whatever is true, pure, right, holy, friendly, and proper. Don't ever stop thinking about what is truly worthwhile and worthy of praise.
translation_verse: Di naari, m mabiisi, ya kyɛ ka ya teesa zaa paali la ni bunseesi an nyɛ bunsuma, ni an sumni pɛ'abu - di nyɛ la: bunseesi an nyɛ yɛlimaŋni, ni bunveela, ni seesi an dɔli soori, m‑paasi niriba ŋɔn wuri bunseesi n‑tibgri a, ni seesi an mari gyirima.

english_verse: You know the teachings I gave you, and you know what you heard me say and saw me do. So follow my example. And God, who gives peace, will be with you. Paul Gives Thanks for the Gifts He Was Given
translation_verse: Ya zaŋŋma man wulisi ya seem maa n‑tumni lala, ka dɔli yan nya ka wum zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi n tuma soori la. Ka Naawunni nin bɛ ya saani, ka ŋɔn mun nyɛ ŋɔn tisiri sufumaasim maa.

english_verse: The Lord has made me very grateful that at last you have thought about me once again. Actually, you were thinking about me all along, but you didn't have any chance to show it.
translation_verse: Di daa niŋi ma nya'asim pam ti Dugma zugu, man ŋɔn daa nya ka ya laa n‑teaari n yɛla maa: halli ya daa pun teaai n yɛla, amaa ya daa kɔŋŋi soori.

english_verse: I am not complaining about having too little. I have learned to be satisfied with whatever I have.
translation_verse: Di pa la n yɛtti, ni, n kɔŋŋi seela, dama n pun bamsi man nin niŋi seem n‑kyɛ ka man mari seesi la ti sakki ma.

english_verse: I know what it is to be poor or to have plenty, and I have lived under all kinds of conditions. I know what it means to be full or to be hungry, to have too much or too little.
translation_verse: N na mi n‑kɔŋŋi seela, ka laa m‑mi m‑mari halli nti yakki. Ya'aseaa, bee, sahaseaa, m bamsi yɛm suŋŋa, ka n nin nyaŋŋi bundira diibu, bee, nangbantoo beebu; n nin nyaŋŋi m‑mari pam, bee, m‑mari beela; a zaa sakki ma.

english_verse: Christ gives me the strength to face anything.
translation_verse: Yisa Kirisita ti ma yaa, ka di kyɛ ka n nyaŋŋi yɛla zaa n beesigu puuni.

english_verse: It was good of you to help me when I was having such a hard time.
translation_verse: Amaa ya daa niŋi suŋŋa pam, yan daa suŋŋi ma n yɛlimugsa puuni la.

english_verse: My friends at Philippi, you remember what it was like when I started preaching the good news in Macedonia. After I left there, you were the only church that became my partner by giving blessings and by receiving them in return.
translation_verse: Ya mi halli, ya Filipaai dima, man ŋɔn daa daŋŋi n‑yi Masidoonya tingbaŋŋu sa m‑moonni lahabasuŋŋu yɛla maa, yan daa suŋŋi ma seem lala saha maa. Ka ya mi, ni, lala piiligu saha maa Yisa nyaandɔliba la'aŋŋu seelli daa bu suŋŋi ma zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi tisibu ni deaari yɛla, na'ala yarima kɔkɔa.

english_verse: Even when I was in Thessalonica, you helped me more than once.
translation_verse: Ya laa m‑mi yaasa, ni, ya daa ti ma suŋŋsim halli man ŋɔn daa bɛ Tɛsalɔnika tiŋŋa gba, ka di daa pa la yummu.

english_verse: I am not trying to get something from you, but I want you to receive the blessings that come from giving.
translation_verse: Di pa la m boori la piini, amaa n nya ka piini tisibu paasiri ya la nyoori.

english_verse: I have been paid back everything, and with interest. I am completely satisfied with the gifts you sent with Epaphroditus. They are like a sweet-smelling offering or like the right kind of sacrifice that pleases God.
translation_verse: Man mun daa pun deaaya, ka di gaari zaa. N nya man boori seelikam, dama Ɛpafrɔditusi daa mari ya piini maa zaa na n‑ti ma. Ka di niŋi Naawunni nya'asim, hoo turaali nyoobu nyunya'asiri, bee, hoo ban maanni maaligu n‑ti u ka u deaai ni sufumaasim.

english_verse: I pray that God will take care of all your needs with the wonderful blessings that come from Christ Jesus!
translation_verse: M Ba Naawunni mari la buna ni arizikki zaa, ka a bɛ la Kirisita Yisa gyirima ziiya, ka u nin zaŋŋi yan boori seelikam zaa n‑ti ya.

english_verse: May God our Father be praised forever and ever. Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Ŋɔn Naawunni ti Ba maa nin nya pɛ'abu, saha din ka tɔriga. Ammi.

english_verse: Give my greetings to all who are God's people because of Christ Jesus. The Lord's followers here with me send you their greetings.
translation_verse: Ya puusima Naawunni niriba la n‑ti ma - ninvugseeba ban nyɛ Yisa Kirisita suulinsi. Ti mabiseeba ban bɛ kpa zaa puusiri ya na.

english_verse: All of God's people send their greetings, especially those in the service of the Emperor.
translation_verse: Naawunni niriba zaa puusiri ya na, halli ban bɛ NaaTitaari yiri maa ni.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you and will bless your life!
translation_verse: Ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita Masiiya piinisuma nin bɛ ya sufu ni sahakam. Ammi.

english_verse: To God's people who live in Colossae and are faithful followers of Christ. I pray that God our Father will be kind to you and will bless you with peace! A Prayer of Thanks
translation_verse: Man Pɔla n‑sɔbri gbaŋŋu wa n‑tiri ya Kɔloosi dima, man ni m mabii Timɔti la; n daa di la Yisa Kirisita Masiiya tuumu, Naawunni sufu yuubu zugu. Yarima mun nyɛ la Naawunni niriba ka laa n‑nyɛ yɛdda dima ni ti mabiisi, Kirisita zugu.

english_verse: Each time we pray for you, we thank God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Tin ŋɔn susiri Naawunni n‑tiri ya sahanseaa zaa, ti teaari ya yɛla ni sufumaasim m‑puusiri ŋɔn ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita Ba la ya yɛla zugu.

english_verse: We have heard of your faith in Christ and of your love for all God's people,
translation_verse: Dama ti wum ya yɛla, ni, ya niŋi Yisa Kirisita yɛdda ka laa m‑mari wurilim n‑tiri Naawunni niriba zaa.

english_verse: because what you hope for is kept safe for you in heaven. You first heard about this hope when you believed the true message, which is the good news.
translation_verse: Ya bɛ lala ya tama zugu, dama ya siri mari tama, ni, ya guusiri ya faari diibu saha, ka di bɛ la arizana ni. Ya daa pun wum di lahabaari maa, yan daa wum yɛlimaŋni lahabasuŋŋu maa sahanseaa la.

english_verse: The good news is spreading all over the world with great success. It has spread in this same way among you, ever since the first day you learned the truth about God's wonderful kindness
translation_verse: Lahabasuŋŋu wa siri pun paai ya saani. Ka bɛ la duniya wa lugrikam zaa ni, n‑wanni ka wala ka zoaara; ka lala ka ka wanni wala yarim gba saani. Ka daa wanni la lala yan daa daŋŋi n‑wum ka yɛla - dabsiseaa yan daa ti baŋŋi Naawunni piini ŋɔn siri nyɛ seem la - halli ni zuna.

english_verse: from our good friend Epaphras. He works together with us for Christ and is a faithful worker for you.
translation_verse: Lahabaari maa ka ya daa wum Ɛpafraasi saani; ŋɔn Ɛpafraasi nyɛ la ti mabisuŋŋu ka ti la'amni n‑tumni Naawunni tuma. Yɛdda daana n nyɛ u, ka u tumni n‑tiri Kirisita yarim zaa zugu.

english_verse: He is also the one who told us about the love that God's Spirit has given you. The Person and Work of Christ
translation_verse: Ŋɔna n daa teaai ma yan mari wurilim Naawunni Sii Kasi puuni seem.

english_verse: We have not stopped praying for you since the first day we heard about you. In fact, we always pray that God will show you everything he wants you to do and that you may have all the wisdom and understanding his Spirit gives.
translation_verse: Lala maa zugu, tin daa wum ya yɛla maa halli ni zuna, ti bu kyɛ ti wunsusigu ya zugu. Ti susiri Naawunni, ni, u kyɛ ka ya nya yɛm ni bamsim din nyɛ Naawunni Sii maa dinni zaa, nti baŋŋi u sufuyuubu yɛla zaa gbinni.

english_verse: Then you will live a life that honors the Lord, and you will always please him by doing good deeds. You will come to know God even better.
translation_verse: Ni, lala nin kyɛ ka ya bɛ beesisuŋŋu din sumsi ti Dugma niriba, ka kyɛnni tooni n‑wanni wala - di nyɛ la: yan tumni tunsuma zaa ka ya Naawunni bamsim gba zoaari sahakam.

english_verse: I pray that you will be grateful to God for letting you have part in what he has promised his people in the kingdom of light.
translation_verse: m‑puusiri ti Ba Naawunni taari, ŋɔn sɛ'asi ti ni ti la'am ni u niriba zaa n‑deaai ti tɔrli, neesim tiŋŋa maa ni sa.

english_verse: God rescued us from the dark power of Satan and brought us into the kingdom of his dear Son,
translation_verse: Ii! - u siri daa pun yiisi ti zibsim yiiko ni na, ka zaŋŋi ti n‑taasi u Biwuttigu naam ni na.

english_verse: who forgives our sins and sets us free.
translation_verse: Ka ŋɔn Naawunni Bii maa saani ka ti nyari tuliginsim ka deaari ti tumbeeri kyɛ-m‑pɛŋŋi.

english_verse: Christ is exactly like God, who cannot be seen. He is the first-born Son, superior to all creation.
translation_verse: Naawunni Bii wa muna - sɔsɔ bu nyari Naawunni, amaa u Bii wa ŋmanni u ni; ka ba daa daŋŋi n‑dɔ'ai u pɔi ka naayi naam bunseelikam zaa, ka u nyɛ la bikpeema.

english_verse: Everything was created by him, everything in heaven and on earth, everything seen and unseen, including all forces and powers, and all rulers and authorities. All things were created by God's Son, and everything was made for him.
translation_verse: Dama ŋɔn saani ka bunseelikam daa naam: aseesi an bɛ arizana ni, ni an bɛ duniya wa ni gba; aseesi an nyara, ni an bu nyari gba; naam ziziisi dima ni suulinsi dima ni zuguraandima ni yiiko dima - Naawunni Bii la zugu ka ba zaa daa naam, ni ba ti bɛ u fukumsi ni.

english_verse: God's Son was before all else, and by him everything is held together.
translation_verse: Ŋɔna siri daŋŋi a zaa tooni ka buna zaa tugi la taaba m‑bɛ ni u zugu.

english_verse: He is the head of his body, which is the church. He is the very beginning, the first to be raised from death, so that he would be above all others.
translation_verse: U bɛ la u niriba ban la'amni taaba n‑dɔli u la saani hoo zugu ŋɔn bɛ ningbiŋŋu saani seem la. Ba toondaana n nyɛ u, sɔ ŋɔn daa daŋŋi ba zaa n‑doaai kum ni; lala daa niŋi nti kyɛ ka u leebi ba toondaana bunseelikam puuni.

english_verse: God himself was pleased to live fully in his Son.
translation_verse: Di mun daa maai Naawunni sufu, ni u ti kyɛ ka u bunseelikam kpalim m‑bɛ u Bii maa ni.

english_verse: And God was pleased for him to make peace by sacrificing his blood on the cross, so that all beings in heaven and on earth would be brought back to God.
translation_verse: Ka daa laa n‑kyɛ ka u Bii wa ti zɔ sindaani u saani, n‑tiri bunseelikam zaa, ni u ti kyɛ sɔkam taalli m‑pɛŋŋi ba - baseeba ban bɛ duniya wa ni, ni ban bɛ arizana ni gba. Ba daa zaŋŋi ŋɔn Yisa n‑kpaasi dɔpulli maa zugu ka u ziim daa yi na ka u kpi - lala ka u leebi sindaanzɔtta.

english_verse: You used to be far from God. Your thoughts made you his enemies, and you did evil things.
translation_verse: Yarim muna, sahanseaa la ya gba daa za'asi Naawunni yɛla ka yaai u, ka di daa nyɛ la ya teesibeeri ni ya tumbeeri zugu.

english_verse: But his Son became a human and died. So God made peace with you, and now he lets you stand in his presence as people who are holy and faultless and innocent.
translation_verse: Amaa pampaŋŋɔ Naawunni Bii la daa zɔ ya sindaani Naawunni saani ka kyɛ ka nangbanyinni maali n‑niŋi. U daa zaŋŋi u ninsaatiri ningbiŋŋu n‑niŋi lala, dama u daa mari ka halli nti kpi. Dinŋɔ zugu ka u mari ya n‑taasi Naawunni saani ka kyɛ ka ya ku mari taaliseaa, ka ya leebi Naawunni niriba kasi, ka ka galiŋŋu u saani.

english_verse: But you must stay deeply rooted and firm in your faith. You must not give up the hope you received when you heard the good news. It was preached to everyone on earth, and I myself have become a servant of this message. Paul's Service to the Church
translation_verse: Ya siri nin kpalim m‑bɛ lala, ya yi bari n‑zaani kpeeŋŋa ya yɛdda maa ni, ka bu birisira. Ya zɛ lala, ka kur kpalim m‑mari tama. Ya teaama lahabasuŋŋu la yɛla, yan daa pun wum lahabaseaa maa - ya tama n‑siri la. Ba daa tɔ'asi lahabasuŋŋu wa yɛla n‑tisi bunvuya zaa duniya wa puuni, halli ka man, Pɔla, leebi la ŋɔn tumni lahabaari maa tuma.

english_verse: I am glad I can suffer for you. I am pleased also that in my own body I can continue the suffering of Christ for his body, the church.
translation_verse: Tɔ: pampaŋŋɔ m mari sufumaasim pam man namsiri ya zugu la. Ii - di nyɛ la Naawunni niriba zaa zugu ka n diri wahala n ningbina wa ni: halli Kirisita ŋɔn daa namsi ba zugu gba, man nin naai namsigu din kpalim n‑ti ba, dama Naawunni niriba taaba la'aŋŋu nyɛ la Kirisita ningbiŋŋu.

english_verse: God's plan was to make me a servant of his church and to send me to preach his complete message to you.
translation_verse: Ka man daa deaai la'aŋŋu maa tuma, dama di nyɛ la Naawunni ŋɔn ti ma tunseaa, u maŋtoori sufuyuubu zugu. Yarim zugu ka u daa ti ma, ni n ti kyɛ ka ŋɔn Naawunni yɛligu zaa paai ya na.

english_verse: For ages and ages this message was kept secret from everyone, but now it has been explained to God's people.
translation_verse: U yɛligu yɛlisɔ'ara maa nla, ka a na bu yi paalu sahanseaa la, piiligu ni halli ni zuna - duniya wa bura zaa daa bu nya a. Ana ka u naayi yiisi paalu ni n‑tiri u toori niriba la.

english_verse: God did this because he wanted you Gentiles to understand his wonderful and glorious mystery. And the mystery is that Christ lives in you, and he is your hope of sharing in God's glory.
translation_verse: Ban muna - ŋɔn Naawunni boori u wulisi yɛlisɔ'ara maa tibsim ni gyirima ŋɔn nyɛ seem maa n‑ti ba, ka a bɛ la ban pa Yɛhudiyadima maa saani gba. Ka di gbinni nyɛ la: ni, Kirisita bɛ la ya saani, ka di nyɛ la tama n‑tiri ya, ni, ya nin nya gyirima.

english_verse: We announce the message about Christ, and we use all our wisdom to warn and teach everyone, so all of Christ's followers will grow and become mature.
translation_verse: Tɔ, ŋɔn Yisa Kirisita nyɛ la ti lahabaseaa tin moonni maa. Ti kpaamni sɔkam, ka zaŋŋni yɛm zaa n‑wulisiri ba, ni ti ti zaŋŋi ba zaa n‑taasi ŋɔn Kirisita saani na, ni ba ti leebi niriba ni yɛlimaŋni.

english_verse: This is why I work so hard and use the mighty power he gives me.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔ zugu ka n zaŋŋi yiikoseaa ŋɔn Yisa ŋɔn zaŋŋi n‑ti ma la n‑tumni ni nimbirimoaa zaa.

english_verse: I want you to know what a struggle I am going through for you, for God's people at Laodicea, and for all of those followers who have never met me.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔna m boori la ya baŋŋi man kpaŋŋni m maŋŋa n‑tumni n‑tiri ya seem, yan ni Leoodisii dima, halli ni ya ninvugseeba ban na bu mi ma la zaa.

english_verse: I do it to encourage them. Then as their hearts are joined together in love, they will be wonderfully blessed with complete understanding. And they will truly know Christ. Not only is he the key to God's mystery,
translation_verse: N tumni lala ni di ti kyɛ ka ba sufu ti kpamsi, ka ba mari la nangbanyinni ni wurilim ni taaba. Lala ka ba nin ti baŋŋi Naawunni bunsuma zaa, birisigu ka ni, halli nti baŋŋi Naawunni yɛlisɔ'ara maa gbinni - din nyɛ Kirisita la.

english_verse: but all wisdom and knowledge are hidden away in him.
translation_verse: Dama ŋɔn Kirisita saani ka yɛm ni miilinsi zaa sɔ'ai, hoo ninsaalidima ŋɔn sɔ'ari ba arizikki seem la.

english_verse: I tell you these things to keep you from being fooled by fancy talk.
translation_verse: N yɛtti ya lala, ni, sɔ di tɔ'asi yɛttɔ'anya'asa n‑yɔmsi ya, dama a siri nyɛ la yɛttɔ'ayɔya.

english_verse: Even though I am not with you, I keep thinking about you. I am glad to know that you are living as you should and your faith in Christ is strong. Christ Brings Real Life
translation_verse: Ni n ziiya ŋɔn wa'a ni ya beebu zii maa zaa, n sufu ni teesa, ni n sii maa, bɛ la ya saani. N sufu maaya pam, man nya yan dɔli soori maa suŋŋa seem, ka laa m‑baŋŋi ya Kirisita yɛdda niŋbu ŋɔn zɛ yummu seem la zaa.

english_verse: You have accepted Christ Jesus as your Lord. Now keep on following him.
translation_verse: Yan daa sakki n‑ti Kirisita Yisa, ni, u nyɛ la ya Dugma la - dinŋɔna, ya kyɛ ka ya dɔli u soori maa.

english_verse: Plant your roots in Christ and let him be the foundation for your life. Be strong in your faith, just as you were taught. And be grateful.
translation_verse: Ya ŋmani la bumbula m‑baari nya'a u tam maa ni; bee ya ŋmani la u duu, m‑mɛ suŋŋa n‑tɔm u zugu. Dinŋɔna ya kyɛm tooni n‑kyɛ ka yɛlimaŋni ni yɛdda bɛ ya ni, hoo ban daa wulisi ya seem la; ka ya puusiri Naawunni halli nti yakki.

english_verse: Don't let anyone fool you by using senseless arguments. These arguments may sound wise, but they are only human teachings. They come from the powers of this world and not from Christ.
translation_verse: Yan mari ya mansi ka di kyɛ ka sɔ yɔmsi ya, ni, u yɛttɔ'a maa mari ninneesim: a zaa nyɛ la yɛm yɔri bunkyɔ'ama an dɔli la ninsaadima teesa ni ba yɛm kɔkɔa. A pa la Kirisita yɛm yɛla, amaa arizimbɛseeba ban su duniya wa yɛla maa yɛm nla.

english_verse: And you are fully grown because you belong to Christ, who is over every power and authority.
translation_verse: Ka yan mun nyari bunseelli kam u saani ka bu kɔŋŋi seela. Ŋɔna n su yiiko ni suulinsi zaa fukumsi.

english_verse: Christ has also taken away your selfish desires, just as circumcision removes flesh from the body.
translation_verse: Ŋɔn Kirisita zugu ka ba daa guni ya, pa la ninsaadima gunibu soori ni, amaa yan daa yeaai ya duniya wa ningbina yɛlibeeri m‑basi - Kirisita gunimaŋni nla.

english_verse: And when you were baptized, it was the same as being buried with Christ. Then you were raised to life because you had faith in the power of God, who raised Christ from death.
translation_verse: N tɔ'asiri Naawunni koom suubu yɛla: ban daa su ya koom la, di gbinni nyɛ la: ni, ba daa la'asi ya ŋɔn Kirisita saani n‑sɔ'ai ya gballi ni; ka dinŋɔna ya nin laa n‑la'am u saani n‑yisigi, dama ya niŋi Naawunni yiiko maa yɛdda, ni, u daa neaai u kum ni.

english_verse: You were dead, because you were sinful and were not God's people. But God let Christ make you alive, when he forgave all our sins.
translation_verse: Yan daa na bu guni gunibu wa sahanseaa la, ka daa kpalim m‑bɛ ya yɛlibeeri ni la, lala saha ka Naawunni daa la'asi ya Kirisita saani n‑ti ya nyɔvuri. U daa kyɛ ti tumbeeri maa zaa taalli m‑pɛŋŋi ti.

english_verse: God wiped out the charges that were against us for disobeying the Law of Moses. He took them away and nailed them to the cross.
translation_verse: Ba daa sɔbi ti taalli sama yɛla n‑dooli, ni zaaligu yɛla zaa an galimni ti: amaa ŋɔn mun daa kpiisi a zaa m‑basi. U daa zaŋŋi ti galiŋŋu gbaŋŋu wa n‑yiisi n‑kpaasi n‑tabli u dɔpulli zugu.

english_verse: There Christ defeated all powers and forces. He let the whole world see them being led away as prisoners when he celebrated his victory.
translation_verse: Dɔpulli maa zugu ka u daa nyaŋŋi: u daa gbaasi ban su fukumsi ni yiiko n‑fa ba tɔppu neema, ka daa sigsi ba n‑kyɛ ka ba dɔli u nyaaŋŋa ka sɔkam nini nya, ka u daa bɛ tooni n‑kyɛnni u nyaŋŋni gyingaari ni la.

english_verse: Don't let anyone tell you what you must eat or drink. Don't let them say you must celebrate the New Moon festival, the Sabbath, or any other festival.
translation_verse: Tɔ: dinŋɔna yan di kyɛ ka sɔ galimni ya zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi bundira yɛla, bee bunnyuura, bee Kyuusi gɔya ni Vuusim Dabsa yɛla.

english_verse: These things are only a shadow of what was to come. But Christ is real!
translation_verse: Anŋɔ zaa daa bɛ ni, ni a ŋmansiri n‑wulisiri la din ti ya kyɛ na; amaa a gbinni yɛlimaŋni nyɛ la Kirisita mammaŋŋa.

english_verse: Don't be cheated by people who make a show of acting humble and who worship angels. They brag about seeing visions. But it is all nonsense, because their minds are filled with selfish desires.
translation_verse: Yan di kyɛ ka ba bugsi ya yɛla n‑yɔmsiri n‑yɛtti, ni, ya lu ni. Ba sigsiri ba mansi n‑gyeemni malaakadima; amaa di zaa yɔri, yɛlimaŋni ba dɔli la ba suntoori teesa, ka wulisiri ban nya bunseesi la yɛla yinniyinni, ka di kpeesiri ba la karimbaani.

english_verse: They are no longer part of Christ, who is the head of the whole body. Christ gives the body its strength, and he uses its joints and muscles to hold it together, as it grows by the power of God. Christ Brings New Life
translation_verse: Ba mun bu kpalim n‑tugi Kirisita, ŋɔn nyɛ ningbiŋŋu maa zaa zugu. Dama ŋɔna n tiri ningbimmunni zaa yaa, ka di dɔli la tuga ni gyiila maa zaa ka a zaa mari kpeeŋŋu n‑tumni ni taaba suŋŋa, n‑zoaari na hoo Naawunni ŋɔn boori seem.

english_verse: You died with Christ. Now the forces of the universe don't have any power over you. Why do you live as if you had to obey such rules as,
translation_verse: Yarima siri daa la'am Kirisita saani n‑kpi. Ya kpiya m‑bakki ka kyɛ duniya wa yiiko dima fukumsi: ka wula zugu ka ya na boori ya dɔli la kaya ni kyisa sɔya? - hoo ban na bɛ duniya wa beebu ni maa ŋɔn dɔli seem la.

english_verse: “Don't handle this. Don't taste that. Don't touch this.”?
translation_verse: Ni, “Yan di di dinŋɔa, ya din lam dinŋɔa, yan di siisi dinla!”, fa!

english_verse: After these things are used, they are no longer good for anything. So why be bothered with the rules that humans have made up?
translation_verse: Ay! - kyisa wa zaa nyɛ la ninsaadima zaaligu, ni ba wulisigu zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi duniya wa yɛla: amaa yɛla wa zaa baligri ni n‑naara.

english_verse: Obeying these rules may seem to be the smart thing to do. They appear to make you love God more and to be very humble and to have control over your body. But they don't really have any power over our desires.
translation_verse: Ban tɔ'asiri mangbaari yɛla, ni mansigsigu, ni ningbina mugsigu yɛla la, di ŋmani la yɛlisuma ka ba yɛtta. Amaa anŋɔ zaa ku toaai m‑mari anfaani zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ningbina kɔribeeri goaari bee za'asigu.

english_verse: You have been raised to life with Christ. Now set your heart on what is in heaven, where Christ rules at God's right side.
translation_verse: Ka dinŋɔna ya pun la'am Kirisita saani n‑yisigi: ka di yi bɛ la lala, see ka ya bɔ bunseesi an bɛ saazugu, bɛni ka ŋɔn Kirisita zi u zizii ni, Naawunni nudirigu ziiya.

english_verse: Think about what is up there, not about what is here on earth.
translation_verse: Ya kyɛ ka ya teesa bɛ saazugu buna wa ni, pa duniya wa buna la ni.

english_verse: You died, which means that your life is hidden with Christ, who sits beside God.
translation_verse: Dama ya kpi ni, ka ya nyɔvuya yi la'amni Kirisita saani n‑sɔ'ai Naawunni beebu zii la ni.

english_verse: Christ gives meaning to your life, and when he appears, you will also appear with him in glory.
translation_verse: Halli ya nyɔvuri n nyɛ Kirisita la, ka ŋɔn Kirisita yi ti yiisi u mammaŋŋa paalu ni, ya gba nin la'am m‑bɛ u saani n‑yi paalu na ni gyirima.

english_verse: Don't be controlled by your body. Kill every desire for the wrong kind of sex. Don't be immoral or indecent or have evil thoughts. Don't be greedy, which is the same as worshiping idols.
translation_verse: Lala zugu, see ka ya ku ya duniya wa ni kɔrisi yɛla zaa - zina nla, ni tumpoosa boobu an mari da'ari, ni kɔribeeri, ni ligri ni neema boobu, ka di ŋmani la wuna gyeeŋŋu la, dama ya boori ana n‑gaari ya Naawunni boobu: ya kyɛ ka a zaa basi yɔri.

english_verse: God is angry with people who disobey him by doing these things.
translation_verse: Dama anŋɔ taabu zaa zugu n kyɛ ka Naawunni sufu yisigra.

english_verse: And this is exactly what you did, when you lived among people who behaved in this way.
translation_verse: Sahanseaa la ya daa bɛ la beesikanŋɔ taabu, ka dɔli lala sɔya la.

english_verse: But now you must stop doing such things. You must quit being angry, hateful, and evil. You must no longer say insulting or cruel things about others.
translation_verse: Amaa pampaŋŋɔ see ka ya za'asi anŋɔ dima: suuri, ni teesibeeri, ni putoo tuma, halli yan di kyɛ ka ya nɔya tɔ'asiri yɛttɔ'ayɔya n‑tuuri Naawunni ni ninsaala gba.

english_verse: And stop lying to each other. You have given up your old way of life with its habits.
translation_verse: Yan di laa m‑ma'ari ziri n‑tiri taaba: ya bu nya? - ba zaŋŋi ya beesikurigu yɛla m‑basi, ni ka tuma zaa, hoo nira ŋɔn yeaai kparibeoo m‑basi seem la;

english_verse: Each of you is now a new person. You are becoming more and more like your Creator, and you will understand him better.
translation_verse: ka laa n‑yɛ kparipaalli, bunveelli. Ka beesipaalli wa mari yɛmpaalli ka di yi Naawunni ŋɔn naam ka maa saani na, ka kur ŋmanni la Ŋɔna.

english_verse: It doesn't matter if you are a Greek or a Jew, or if you are circumcised or not. You may even be a barbarian or a Scythian, and you may be a slave or a free person. Yet Christ is all that matters, and he lives in all of us.
translation_verse: Beesipaalli wa puuni ka wɔligri ka ka saani zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi Griikadima ni Yɛhudiyadima, bee ban guni ni ban bu guni saani: di yi ti nyɛ tinzundima ni Sitiiya tingbaŋŋu moo ni niriba, bee daaba ni ban su ba mansi yɛla - ay! Kirisita nyɛ la bunseelikam n‑tiri ba sɔkam zaa.

english_verse: God loves you and has chosen you as his own special people. So be gentle, kind, humble, meek, and patient.
translation_verse: Naawunni siri yiisi ya, ni ya ti leebi u maŋŋa niriba; ka laa n‑wuri ya. Ka lala zugu ya nin zaŋŋi beesipaalli wa kpariveelli n‑yɛa - di nyɛ la: nambɔzoaa ni kuŋŋa, nirilim, mansigsigu, mangbaari ni sugru.

english_verse: Love is more important than anything else. It is what ties everything completely together.
translation_verse: Anŋɔ zaa n nyɛ bunsuma, amaa see ka ya zaŋŋi wurilim m‑paasi a zugu, ni a zaa ti tɔŋŋni taaba ka niŋi suŋŋa deede.

english_verse: Each one of you is part of the body of Christ, and you were chosen to live together in peace. So let the peace that comes from Christ control your thoughts. And be grateful.
translation_verse: Ya kyɛ ka Kirisita sufudoaa su ya sufu zaa fukumsi, dama di zugu ka ba daa booli ya, ni ya ti leebi hoo ningbiŋŋu yinni. Ka laa n‑leebi seeba ban puusiri Naawunni sahakam.

english_verse: Let the message about Christ completely fill your lives, while you use all your wisdom to teach and instruct each other. With thankful hearts, sing psalms, hymns, and spiritual songs to God.
translation_verse: M‑paasi yaasa, ya kyɛ ka Naawunni yɛligu bɛ ya ni, ni ka bunsuma zaasa. Ya zaŋŋi bamsim zaa n‑wulisiri taaba Naawunni wurilim yɛla, ka kpamsiri taaba sufu. Ya kur yuumni Litaafi yuuma n‑wulisira, ni wungyeeŋŋu yuuma, ni Sii Kasi yuuma gba; ya yuumni ya sufu ni m‑puusiri Naawunni sahakam.

english_verse: Whatever you say or do should be done in the name of the Lord Jesus, as you give thanks to God the Father because of him. Some Rules for Christian Living
translation_verse: Ka ya yi ya tumni seelikam, bee, ya tɔ'asi seelikam zaa, ya kyɛ ka ya niŋni a zaa ti Dugma Yisa yuuri zugu. Ya tim ti Ba Naawunni pɛ'abu ŋɔn Yisa zugu sahakam.

english_verse: A wife must put her husband first. This is her duty as a follower of the Lord.
translation_verse: Pɔ'aba, ya wumni n‑tiri ya siridima kpaaŋŋu la; dama lala yi sumsi ban bɛ ti Dugma saani maa.

english_verse: A husband must love his wife and not abuse her.
translation_verse: Yan mun dɔppa, ya wuri ya pɔ'aba ka di yisigri ya suuri n‑niŋni ba.

english_verse: Parents, don't be hard on your children. If you are, they might give up.
translation_verse: Yan mun ninvugkura, yan di kyɛ ka ya biisi beebu tɔ n‑ti ba; ka di yi pa lala ya nin daam ba sufu.

english_verse: Slaves, you must always obey your earthly masters. Try to please them at all times, and not just when you think they are watching. Honor the Lord and serve your masters with your whole heart.
translation_verse: Daaba, ya wumni n‑tiri ya duniya wa dugmadima, ni gyirima ni ninzoaa. Ya gyeemma ba, pa la ban yi gɔsiri ya kɔkɔa, hoo ninvugseeba ban boori ni ba nya duusigu ninsaalidima saani, amaa ya zaŋŋi ya sufu zaa n‑tumni n‑tiri ba sahakam, ka zɔri Naawunni gba.

english_verse: Do your work willingly, as though you were serving the Lord himself, and not just your earthly master.
translation_verse: Bunseelikam zaa yan niŋna, ya niŋma di ni ya sufu zaa n‑tiri Naawunni, pa la ninsaalidima.

english_verse: In fact, the Lord Christ is the one you are really serving, and you know he will reward you.
translation_verse: Ya mi halli, ni, ya Dugma nin yiisi ya faari na n‑yɔ ya. Ya tumma ya daaba tuma la n‑tiri ya Dugma Kirisita.

english_verse: But Christ has no favorites! He will punish evil people, just as they deserve.
translation_verse: Ŋɔn yi tumni tumbeeri muna, ba nin niŋi u hoo u tuma wa ŋɔn yi sumsi seem la, dama Naawunni bu gamsira.

english_verse: Slave owners, be fair and honest with your slaves. Don't forget that you have a Master in heaven.
translation_verse: Ya ban su daaba la muna, ya dɔli yɛlimaŋni n‑tiri ba, ni an dɔli soori. Ka mi, ni, ya gba mari ya Dugma ka u bɛ arizana ni.

english_verse: Never give up praying. And when you pray, keep alert and be thankful.
translation_verse: See ka ya kur pɛ'ari n‑susiri Naawunni ni nimbirimoaa; yan di gbisi ka kyɛ puusigu. Ka laa m‑puusiri Naawunni barika sahakam.

english_verse: Be sure to pray that God will make a way for us to spread his message and explain the mystery about Christ, even though I am in jail for doing this.
translation_verse: Ka ya puusigu wa ni, see ka ya susiri Naawunni n‑tiri ti gba: ni, u ti maali soori n‑ti ti ni ti ti tɔ'asi u yɛligu maa n‑tiri niriba, n‑toaai n‑kasigri u yɛlisɔ'ara an bɛ Kirisita ni maa. Di nyɛ la lala yɛligu maa zugu ka ba lɔ ma kyɔrimi ka n na kpalim m‑bɛ lala.

english_verse: Please pray that I will make the message as clear as possible.
translation_verse: Ni, Naawunni nin kyɛ ka n nin yiisiri yɛlisɔ'ara wa zaa paalu, hoo din kpa la talasi seem la.

english_verse: When you are with unbelievers, always make good use of the time.
translation_verse: Ya mun kur mari ya mansi ka dɔli yɛm soori n‑tiri ban pa ti niriba la. Yan di kyɛ ka sahasunseaa ti gaari yɔri.

english_verse: Be pleasant and hold their interest when you speak the message. Choose your words carefully and be ready to give answers to anyone who asks questions. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Ya mari azamsuma an nya'asa, hoo zɛseesi an mari yaarim ŋɔn nya'asa seem la: ka mi yan sɔsiri seem ni niriba, n‑labsiri suŋŋa n‑tiri sɔkam.

english_verse: Tychicus is the dear friend, who faithfully works and serves the Lord with us, and he will give you the news about me.
translation_verse: Tɔ. Tikyikusi nin yɛli ya n lahabaya zaa. U nyɛ la ti mabisuŋŋu n‑suŋŋni ti, ka ti la'amni taaba n‑tumni n‑tiri ti Dugma.

english_verse: I am sending him to cheer you up by telling you how we are getting along.
translation_verse: Lala zugu ka n tumni u ya saani na, ni u ti yɛli ya ti lahabaya wa, ka lala ka u nin kpamsiri ya sufu.

english_verse: Onesimus, the dear and faithful follower from your own group, is coming with him. The two of them will tell you everything that has happened here.
translation_verse: Ka n kyɛ ka Ɔneesima gba ti dɔli u n‑kyɛ ya saani na: ŋɔn gba nyɛ la ti mabisuŋŋu, tin mun niŋi u yɛdda n‑wuri u pam gba. Halli u nyɛ la ya timbiiya, ka u nin yɛli ya ti kpa wa yɛttɔ'a zaa.

english_verse: Aristarchus is in jail with me. He sends greetings to you, and so does Mark, the cousin of Barnabas. You have already been told to welcome Mark, if he visits you.
translation_verse: Arisitaakusi gba ka ba paasi n zugu n‑kpari sarika duu ni: ŋɔn gba puusiri ya ni. Maaki gba puusira - ŋɔn nyɛ Baanabasi tunzɔ la. Ŋɔn Maaki yɛla ka ya pun wum, ni, u yi ti paai ya saani na, see ka ya deaai u suŋŋa.

english_verse: Jesus, who is known as Justus, sends his greetings. These three men are the only Jewish followers who have worked with me for the kingdom of God. They have given me much comfort.
translation_verse: Yisa sɔ, ban boonni sɔ ‘Gyasitisi’ la - ŋɔn gba puusiri ya. Ban n nyɛ Yɛhudiyadima ka ba suŋŋni ma Naawunni naam tuma maa ziiya; ba butiri sɔ zaa laa n‑ka ni m‑paasi ba zugu; ban mun kpamsiri ma ni sufudoaa.

english_verse: Your own Epaphras, who serves Christ Jesus, sends his greetings. He always prays hard that you may fully know what the Lord wants you to do and that you may do it completely.
translation_verse: Ya timbisɔ gba bɛ ni, Ɛpafraasi, ka ŋɔn gba puusiri ya ni. U nyɛ la Kirisita Yisa nyaandɔlisuŋŋu. U moori sahakam n‑susiri Naawunni n‑tiri ya, ni, ya nin zɛ yummu Naawunni soori maa ni n‑dɔli Naawunni yuubu zaa sahakam.

english_verse: I have seen how much trouble he has gone through for you and for the followers in Laodicea and Hierapolis.
translation_verse: N nin toaai n‑yɛli ya u tuma pam yɛla, ni, u tumni tunkara n‑tiri yarima, ni Leoodisii dima, ni Heerapɔlisi dima gba.

english_verse: Our dear doctor Luke sends you his greetings, and so does Demas.
translation_verse: Dɔ'ata Luuki gba puusira - ti wuri ŋɔna pam gba - ŋɔn ni Diimasi m puusira.

english_verse: Give my greetings to the followers at Laodicea, especially to Nympha and the church that meets in her home.
translation_verse: Ya puusima ti mabiisi ban bɛ Leoodisiiya la, ka yan di tam Nimfa ni ninvugseeba ban la'amni u yiri maa ni n‑gyeemna.

english_verse: After this letter has been read to your people, be sure to have it read in the church at Laodicea. And you should read the letter that I have sent to them.
translation_verse: Ya yi karim gbaŋŋu wa n‑naai, ya kpaŋŋi ya mansi n‑kyɛ ka Leoodisii dima ti deaai n‑karim, ka yan mun deaai ba dinni n‑karim.

english_verse: Remind Archippus to do the work that the Lord has given him to do.
translation_verse: Ya yɛlim Akyipusi, ni, u na teesim tunseaa ban daa zaŋŋi n‑zaali u Naawunni zugu la, ni, u tumma n‑naai.

english_verse: I am signing this letter myself: PAUL. Don't forget that I am in jail. I pray that God will be kind to you.
translation_verse: Tɔ, ya nyam sɔppu wa - man sɔbri m‑puusiri ya n toori nuu ni sɔppu: Pɔla . Ya teaama man ŋɔn lɔ la kyɔrimi seem. Naawunni piinisuma zaa bɛ ya saani.

english_verse: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God the Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ. I pray that God will be kind to you and will bless you with peace!
translation_verse: Man Pɔla, ni Sailivanisi, ni Timɔti n sɔbri gbaŋŋu wa n‑tiri ya Tɛsalɔnika niriba ban la'amni n‑gyeemni Yisa, yan nyɛ ti Ba Naawunni ni ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita Masiiya ŋɔn su seeba la zugu. Naawunni niŋma yɛlisuma n‑niŋi ya, ka ti ya sufudoaa.

english_verse: We thank God for you and always mention you in our prayers. Each time we pray,
translation_verse: Ti kur pɛ'ari Naawunni ya zugu, ka kur susiri Naawunni n‑tiri ya zaa.

english_verse: we tell God our Father about your faith and loving work and about your firm hope in our Lord Jesus Christ. The Thessalonians' Faith and Example
translation_verse: Ti Ba Naawunni tooni ka ti teaari ya yɛla sahakam, zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ya yɛdda niŋbu la yɛla, ni ya wurilim tuma nimmoosi yɛla, ni yan mari tama seem n‑zɛ yummu n‑tiri ti Dugma Yisa Masiiya.

english_verse: My dear friends, God loves you, and we know he has chosen you to be his people.
translation_verse: Ti mabiisi, Naawunni n wuri ya pam. Ti mi, ni, ya nyɛ la Naawunni ŋɔn yiisi seeba n‑niŋi u mammaŋŋa niriba.

english_verse: When we told you the good news, it was with the power and assurance that come from the Holy Spirit, and not simply with words. You knew what kind of people we were and how we helped you.
translation_verse: Dama lahabasuŋŋu wa'azu seaa tin daa yiisi n‑ti ya la daa pa la yɛttɔ'a kɔkɔa, amaa di daa nyɛ la yiiko ni. Naawunni Sii Kasi siri daa bɛ di ni, nti kyɛ ka ya niŋi di yɛdda zaa. Ya pun mi tin daa bɛ seem ya saani; ka laa m‑mi, ni, ya suŋŋsim zugu ka ti daa bɛ lala.

english_verse: So, when you accepted the message, you followed our example and the example of the Lord. You suffered, but the Holy Spirit made you glad.
translation_verse: Ka ya daa kyɛ ka ya beesigu ŋmanni la hoo ti dinni - hoo ti Dugma beesigu ŋɔn bɛ seem maa. Halli ni yan daa di wahala pam maa zaa yɔri, ya daa deaai yɛligu la ni sufupeeliseaa din yiiri Vuusim Kasi saani na.

english_verse: You became an example for all the Lord's followers in Macedonia and Achaia.
translation_verse: Dizugu ka ya wulisiri beesisuŋŋu ŋɔn bɛ seem n‑tiri yɛddaniŋniba zaa ban bɛ Masidoonya ni Akaaya tingbana maa ni.

english_verse: And because of you, the Lord's message has spread everywhere in those regions. Now the news of your faith in God is known all over the world, and we don't have to say a thing about it.
translation_verse: Ti Dugma yɛligu ŋɔn daa yi ya saani maa, pa Masidoonya ni Akaaya kɔkɔ ka di paai: amaa ya yɛdda niŋbu yɛla pun mooli n‑gyili luginseelli kam zaa, dizugu di bu laa n‑sum ni tirima yɛli seelli m‑paasi.

english_verse: Everyone is talking about how you welcomed us and how you turned away from idols to serve the true and living God.
translation_verse: Dama niriba maa zaa pun mi ka tɔ'asiri tin daa kyɛ ya saani na ka ya deaai ti suŋŋa seem, ni, yan daa ŋmaligi n‑kyaŋŋi Naawunni saani ka kyɛ buga, ni ya ti gyeem Naawummaŋni ŋɔn nyɛ Nyɔvuri Daana wa.

english_verse: They also tell how you are waiting for his Son Jesus to come from heaven. God raised him from death, and on the day of judgment Jesus will save us from God's anger.
translation_verse: Ni, ya laa n‑kpalim n‑guusiri ŋɔn Naawunni Bii la kyɛnni na, ni, u nin ti yi arizana ni sahanseaa n‑labi na. Lala Bii maa nyɛ Yisa, Naawunni ŋɔn daa neaai sɔ kum ni. U nyɛ la ŋɔn fa ti n‑yiisi Naawunni sufuyisigri kan ya n‑kyɛ na la ni m‑basi.

english_verse: As you remember, we had been mistreated and insulted at Philippi. But God gave us the courage to tell you the good news about him, even though many people caused us trouble.
translation_verse: Ya pun mi ban daa feebi ti ka diisi ti vi Filipaai tiŋŋa seem maa pɔi, ka ti daa naayi ti kyɛ ya saani na. Halli ni ban daa namsiri ti maa zaa yɔri, Naawunni daa ti ti sufukpeemni ka ti zaŋŋi lahabasuŋŋu m‑moori n‑wulisiri ya.

english_verse: We didn't have any hidden motives when we won you over, and we didn't try to fool or trick anyone.
