translation_verse: Tin tɔ'asiri ya yɛttɔ'aseesi maa bu yi kyiriŋŋu bee kɔribeeri bee yɔmsigu ni na;

english_verse: You also know we didn't try to flatter anyone. God himself knows what we did wasn't a cover-up for greed.
translation_verse: Ya mi halli, ni, di pa la nangbammalisim yɛttɔ'a ka ti daa mari n‑kyɛ ya saani na; ti mun daa bu zaŋŋi yɛttɔ'ayɔmsa n‑tɔ'asira, ni ti ti di nyoori ya saani - Naawunni mun ya n‑wulisi lala.

english_verse: We were not trying to get you or anyone else to praise us.
translation_verse: Ti daa bu boori pɛ'abu ninsaalisɔ saani, di yi daa nyɛ la ya saani bee seeba saani.

english_verse: But as apostles, we could have demanded help from you. After all, Christ is the one who sent us. We chose to be like children or like a mother nursing her baby.
translation_verse: Halli ti daa mari soori ni ti toaai n‑susi bunseesi ya saani, tin nyɛ Masiiya tuumudima la zugu. Amaa ti daa nyɛ la ban bɛ baalimm ya saani, ka mari ya suŋŋa hoo pɔ'a ŋɔn dɔ'ai ŋɔn mari u bileaa seem la.

english_verse: We cared so much for you, and you became so dear to us, that we were willing to give our lives for you when we gave you God's message.
translation_verse: Tin boori ya yɛla pam zugu n kyɛ ka ti daa lɔ, ni, ti purigi tin mari seelli n‑ti ya. Pa Naawunni lahabasuŋŋu la kɔkɔa, amaa zaŋŋi n‑tabli ti mammaŋŋa nyɔvuya gba, ka di nyɛ la tin kur wuri ya maa zugu.

english_verse: My dear friends, you surely haven't forgotten our hard work and hardships. You remember how night and day we struggled to make a living, so we could tell you God's message without being a burden to anyone.
translation_verse: Ti mabiisi, ya teaama tin daa tumni seem la yɛla, halli ni ti yaa tɔriga, ni tin daa di wahala seem la. Ti daa kur tumni la wuntaŋŋa ni yuŋŋu, ni di kyɛ ka ti yɛla ku mugsi ya, ka ti toaai n‑yiisi lahabasuŋŋu kan yi Naawunni saani la n‑ti ya na.

english_verse: Both you and God are witnesses that we were pure and honest and innocent in our dealings with you followers of the Lord.
translation_verse: Ya nyɛ la ti sɛharadima, ka Naawunni gba di ti sɛhara m‑paasi, ti beesigu ŋɔn daa bɛ seem n‑tiri ya yɛddaniŋniba wa: ni, ti daa dɔli yɛlimaŋni soori ka tumni din tuusi, ka galinsi ka ni.

english_verse: You also know we did everything for you that parents would do for their own children.
translation_verse: Ya mi halli tin daa tumni seem n‑tiri ya maa, ni, di daa ŋmanni hoo dɔsɔ ŋɔn niŋni u mammaŋŋa bii seem la.

english_verse: We begged, encouraged, and urged each of you to live in a way that would honor God. He is the one who chose you to share in his own kingdom and glory.
translation_verse: Ti daa kpaam ya, ka kpamsi ya, ka zaali ya noori, ni, ya mari beesiseelli din kyɛ ka Naawunni nini tigra, dama u boonni ya ni, ni yan ni Ŋɔn ti la'am u naam puuni n‑nya u gyirima.

english_verse: We always thank God that you believed the message we preached. It came from him, and it isn't something made up by humans. You accepted it as God's message, and now he is working in you.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔ zugu ka ti pɛ'ari Naawunni saha kam. Tin daa zaŋŋi Naawunni yɛligu na n‑ti ya la, ya daa deaai yɛligu maa. Ya daa bu deaai ka hoo ninsaala yɛligu, amaa hoo Naawunni dinni; ka di siri nyɛ la lala, ka kur tumni ka tuma ya saani - yarima ban nyɛ yɛddaniŋniba wa.

english_verse: My friends, you did just like God's churches in Judea and like the other followers of Christ Jesus there. And so, you were mistreated by your own people, in the same way they were mistreated by their people.
translation_verse: Ti mabiisi, ya daa nya wahala hoo Naawunni niriba ban bɛ Gyuudiiya tingbaŋŋu ni la ŋɔn daa nya seem la - niriba ban nyɛ Yisa Masiiya ŋɔn su seeba la. Ya daa nya wahala ya mammaŋŋa timbiisi saani, hoo ban gba ŋɔn daa nya wahala ba Izraɛli taaba saani seem la.

english_verse: Those evil people killed the Lord Jesus and the prophets, and they even chased us away. God doesn't like what they do and neither does anyone else.
translation_verse: Ban Izraɛli dima n daa zaŋŋi ti Dugma Yisa n‑ku u, ni anabidima gba, ka daa kari ti n‑yiisi. Ba kur tumni la din kyɛ ka Naawunni nini bu tigra, ka kur ŋmeeri nangbankpeemni ninsaalidima zaa saani.

english_verse: They keep us from speaking his message to the Gentiles and from leading them to be saved. They have always gone too far with their sins. Now God has finally become angry and will punish them. Paul Wants To Visit the Church Again
translation_verse: Halli ba daa kpaŋŋi ba maŋŋa ni ba ta'ai ti ka ti ku toaai m‑mooli tuliginsim lahabaari n‑ti ban pa Izraɛli dima maa. Ba pun tum tumbeeri pam, ka ba ala'akyi tuma wa paasiri tumbeeri anla zugu, ka a paari a tɔriga. Ka Naawunni sufuyisigri naayi paai ba n‑naai.

english_verse: My friends, we were kept from coming to you for a while, but we never stopped thinking about you. We were eager to see you and tried our best to visit you in person.
translation_verse: Ti mabiisi, tin daa wɔligi ka kyɛ ya daba ayi la puuni - kulla ti ningbina taaba wɔligri ka n yɛtti wa, pa ti sufu ni teesa wɔligri. Ti sufu zaa daa bɛ la ya nyaabu ni, ni ti teesa zaa, ni ti ba'aba zaa.

english_verse: You alone are our glory and joy!
translation_verse: Yɛlimaŋni yarima zugu ka ti siri nya ti gyirima ni ti sufupeelli.

english_verse: Finally, we couldn't stand it any longer. We decided to stay in Athens by ourselves
translation_verse: Dinzugu tin daa nya ka ti ku toaai n‑laa n‑guusi yaasa, ti daa sakki ni ti kɔkɔ kpalim m‑bɛ Ateensi tiŋŋa

english_verse: and send our friend Timothy to you. He works with us as God's servant and preaches the good news about Christ. We wanted him to make you strong in your faith and to encourage you.
translation_verse: ka tum ti mabii Timɔti ya saani na, dama u nyɛ la Naawunni tuntumna, ka tin ni ŋɔna la'am n‑tumni Kirisita lahabasuŋŋu mooligu tuma la. Ŋɔna ka ti daa tum ya saani, ni u ti kpaam ya, ka kpamsi ya yɛdda.

english_verse: We didn't want any of you to be discouraged by all these troubles. You knew we would have to suffer,
translation_verse: Ni, lala ti kyɛ ka sɔ ku yɔmsi ya n‑labsi ya nyaaŋŋa, wahala wa nyaabu zugu. Ya mammaŋŋa mi halli, ni, di nyɛ la Naawunni yuubu, ni, ti nya wahala wa tataabu.

english_verse: because when we were with you, we told you this would happen. And we did suffer, as you well know.
translation_verse: Tin daa na bɛ ya saani la, ti daa pun daŋŋi n‑yɛli ya, ni, ti nin nya wahala; ka ya zaa mi, ni, lala n daa siri niŋi.

english_verse: At last, when I could not wait any longer, I sent Timothy to find out about your faith. I hoped Satan had not tempted you and made all our work useless.
translation_verse: Dinzugu man daa nya ka n ku toaai n‑laa n‑guusi m‑paasi zugu ka n daa tum Timɔti ya saani na, ni di kyɛ ka n baŋŋi ya yɛdda ŋɔn nyɛ seem. Dama n kur teesiri, ni, di pa seem ka Sintaani nya sɔseaa ni u ti yɔmsi ya, ka lala zugu nin kyɛ ka ti tuma la kpalim yɔri.

english_verse: Timothy has now come back from his visit with you and has told us about your faith and love. He also said that you always have happy memories of us and that you want to see us as much as we want to see you.
translation_verse: Timɔti mun ŋɔn daa labi na, u daa yɛli ti ya yɛdda ni ya wurilim ŋɔn nyɛ seem. U yɛli ti, ni, ya na kur teesiri ti yɛla, ka boori ni ya nya ti, hoo ti gba sufu ŋɔn boori ya nyaabu seem.

english_verse: My friends, even though we have a lot of trouble and suffering, your faith makes us feel better about you.
translation_verse: Dizugu, ti mabiisi, ti namsigu ni ti wahala diibu puuni, ti nyari kpamsigu ya zugu. Ya yɛdda niŋbu n kpamsiri ti

english_verse: Your strong faith in the Lord is like a breath of new life.
translation_verse: dama ya yi ti bari n‑zaani ya beebu ni, ti Dugma zugu, di nin kyɛ ka ti leebi ban vu.

english_verse: We pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus will let us visit you.
translation_verse: Ti susiri Naawunni ŋɔn nya ti Ba la, ni ti Dugma Yisa, ni, u maalima soori n‑ti ti, ka ti kyɛ ya saani na.

english_verse: May the Lord make your love for each other and for everyone else grow by leaps and bounds. This is how our love for you has grown.
translation_verse: Ti laa n‑susiri ti Dugma, ni, u kyɛ ka ya wuri taaba, halli n‑wuri niriba zaa; ka ya wurilim zoaai m‑paasiri sahakam hoo tin gba ŋɔn wuri ya seem la.

english_verse: And when our Lord comes with all his people, I pray he will make your hearts pure and innocent in the sight of God the Father.
translation_verse: Ka dinŋɔna u nin kpamsi ya, ka kyɛ ka ya bari n‑zaani, ni ya ti bɛ kasi ka ka taalli ti Ba Naawunni saani. Ka di nin ti nyɛ la lala, sahanseaa ti Dugma Yisa ŋɔn ti ya labi na la, ka u toori niriba zaa nin ti dɔli u na.

english_verse: Finally, my dear friends, since you belong to the Lord Jesus, we beg and urge you to live as we taught you. Then you will please God. You are already living that way, but try even harder.
translation_verse: Ti mabiisi, din paasi nyɛ la: ya teaama din sum ni ya bɛ seem n‑tigi Naawunni nini. Ya pun bamsi lala ti saani, halli lala ka ya daa kur niŋna; ka ti susiri ya ka kpaamni ya ti Dugma Yisa yuuri zugu, ni, ya kur niŋma lala m‑paasira.

english_verse: Remember the instructions we gave you as followers of the Lord Jesus.
translation_verse: Dama ya mi wulisigu seaa tin daa zaŋŋi n‑wulisi ya, hoo ti Dugma Yisa ŋɔn zaali ti seem la.

english_verse: God wants you to be holy, so don't be immoral in matters of sex.
translation_verse: Naawunni yuubu ya saani nyɛ la: ya maali n‑leebi u niriba ka bɛ kasi, ka di tum zina.

english_verse: Don't be a slave of your desires or live like people who don't know God.
translation_verse: ka di pa la ya dɔli ningbiŋŋu kɔri soori, hoo ban bu dɔli Naawunni zaaligu ŋɔn tumni seem la.

english_verse: You must not cheat any of the Lord's followers in matters of sex. Remember, we warned you that he punishes everyone who does such things.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔ zugu, sɔ di tum u kpeaa din bu tuusi, bee, u fa u kpeaa. Ti Dugma nin ti darigi ban tumni din bu tuusi wa tuba, hoo tin daa pun kpaam ya seem la.

english_verse: So if you don't obey these rules, you are not really disobeying us. Instead, you are disobeying God, who gives you his Holy Spirit.
translation_verse: Dizugu ŋɔnkam za'asi wulisigu wa, pa ninsaala wulisigu ka u za'asi, amaa Naawunni ŋɔn ti ti u Sii Kasi la wulisigu ka u za'asi.

english_verse: We don't have to write you about the need to love each other. God has taught you to do this,
translation_verse: Di bu kpa talasi ni n‑sɔbi n‑wulisi ya yan nin wuri taaba seem, dama Naawunni pun wulisi ya yan nin wuri ya mabiisi seem, ka ya bamsi lala u saani suŋŋa.

english_verse: and you already have shown your love for all his people in Macedonia. But, my dear friends, we ask you to do even more.
translation_verse: Ka lala ka ya siri wuri ya mabiisi ban bɛ Masidoonya tingbaŋŋu zaa; amaa, ti mabiisi, ti kpaamni ya, ni, ya kur niŋma lala m‑paasira.

english_verse: Try your best to live quietly, to mind your own business, and to work hard, just as we taught you to do.
translation_verse: Ya kpaŋŋma ya maŋŋa m‑bɛ baalimm, ka kyɛ ka ya teesa bɛ ya mammaŋŋa yɛla ni, ka bɔ ya mammaŋŋa nuu tuma n‑tumna, hoo tin daa pun wulisi ya seem la.

english_verse: Then you will be respected by people who are not followers of the Lord, and you won't have to depend on anyone. The Lord's Coming
translation_verse: Ya yi niŋni dinŋɔa, lala nin kyɛ ka ban bɛ kpaŋŋa nin ti ya gyirima, ka ya mun ku pɔsigi bunseelli kam.

english_verse: My friends, we want you to understand how it will be for those followers who have already died. Then you won't grieve over them and be like people who don't have any hope.
translation_verse: Ti mabiisi, ti bu boori ni ya bɛ ziilinsi ni zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ninvugseeba ban gbisiri kum ni la yɛla, ka di nin kyɛ ka ya ku fabinna ban kpi la zugu hoo ban ka tama ŋɔn niŋni seem la.

english_verse: We believe Jesus died and was raised to life. We also believe that when God brings Jesus back again, he will bring with him all who had faith in Jesus before they died.
translation_verse: Dama ti yi niŋi yɛdda, ni, Yisa daa kpiya ka laa n‑neaai yaasa, ti laa n‑niŋi yɛdda, ni, Naawunni nin ti kyɛ ka Yisa ninvugseeba ban gbisiri kum ni la ti dɔli Yisa n‑labi na.

english_verse: Our Lord Jesus told us that when he comes, we won't go up to meet him ahead of his followers who have already died.
translation_verse: Ti Dugma yɛligu ŋɔn wulisi seem ka ti yɛtti ya maa: tiseeba ban ya n‑kpalim m‑mari nyɔvuri halli nti paai ti Dugma lappu na saha la muna - ti ku ti daŋŋi ban pun gbisiri kum ni la tooni.

english_verse: With a loud command and with the shout of the chief angel and a blast of God's trumpet, the Lord will return from heaven. Then those who had faith in Christ before they died will be raised to life.
translation_verse: Dama ba nin tasi pampam, ka niriba nin ti wum malaakadima zuguraana kukɔri ni Naawunni kikaa kunkuma. Di saha ka ti Dugma mammaŋŋa nin ti yi saazugu n‑sigi na; ka Kirisita Masiiya ninvugseeba ban pun kpi la nin ti daŋŋi kum ni neaari.

english_verse: Next, all of us who are still alive will be taken up into the clouds together with them to meet the Lord in the sky. From that time on we will all be with the Lord forever.
translation_verse: Ka tiseeba ban kpalim m‑mari nyɔvuri m‑bɛ duniya wa ni - tin ni ban nin ti la'am n‑kyaŋŋi nti kpɛ sangbana ni, n‑tuusi ti Dugma Yisa soori saazugu sa; lala ka ti nin ti kpalim m‑bɛ ti Dugma maa saani halli ni saha din ka tɔriga.

english_verse: Encourage each other with these words.
translation_verse: Dizugu ya zaŋŋma yɛttɔ'a wa m‑maari taaba sufu.

english_verse: I don't need to write you about the time or date when all this will happen.
translation_verse: Ti mabiisi, di bu laa n‑kpa talasi ni ti laa n‑sɔbi n‑ti ya zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi dabsa ni saha seelli din ti ya n‑niŋi.

english_verse: You surely know that the Lord's return will be as a thief coming at night.
translation_verse: Dama ya mammansi mi halli, ni, ti Dugma lappu na saha dabsiri maa nin ti kyɛ na hoo ta'ayiga ŋɔn yi kyɛ na yuŋŋu seem la.

english_verse: People will think they are safe and secure. But destruction will suddenly strike them like the pains of a woman about to give birth. And they won't escape.
translation_verse: Ni, sahaseaa niriba yi ti yɛtti, ni, sufudoaa ni goom bɛ ni, di saha ka basiyɔri ya m‑paai ba na, ka ba ku toaai n‑fa ba mansi m‑basi. Di nin ti piili katiŋŋa, hoo pɔ'a ŋɔn yi wulisiri, ni, u dɔ'ai ka beerim seelli mari u la.

english_verse: My dear friends, you don't live in darkness, and so that day won't surprise you like a thief.
translation_verse: Amaa, ti mabiisi, ya pa la ninvugseeba ban bɛ zibsim ni ka dabsiri maa nin ti libgi ya hoo ta'ayiga ŋɔn libgri niriba seem la.

english_verse: You belong to the light and live in the day. We don't live in the night or belong to the dark.
translation_verse: Ya nyɛ la neesim ni wuntaŋŋa ni niriba. Ti pa la yuŋŋu bee zibsim ni niriba.

english_verse: People sleep during the night, and some even get drunk.
translation_verse: Dama yuŋŋu ka gɔgbisiriba gbisira, ka danyuuriba mun nyuuri m‑bugri la yuŋŋu gba.

english_verse: But we belong to the day. So we must stay sober and let our faith and love be like a suit of armor. Our firm hope that we will be saved is our helmet.
translation_verse: Amaa tirima n nyɛ wuntaŋŋa ni niriba: di zugu ya kyɛ ka ti mari ti maŋŋa. Ya kyɛ ka ti zaŋŋi yɛdda ni wurilim n‑leebi ti nyɔta'arigu m‑pa ti nyaari zugu, ka zaŋŋi ti tuliginsim tama n‑leebi tɔbtuusira kutti zupiliga la m‑pili.

english_verse: God doesn't intend to punish us, but wants us to be saved by our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Naawunni daa bu maali ti ni u sufuyisigri tubdarigri ti paai ti na, amaa u zaali ti ni ti nya tuliginsim ti Dugma Yisa Masiiya zugu.

english_verse: Christ died for us, so we could live with him, whether we are alive or dead when he comes.
translation_verse: Ŋɔna n daa kpi ti zugu, ni di kyɛ ka ti zaa ti la'am m‑bɛ u saani, di yi nyɛ la ti bɛ la ti nyɔvuri ni, bee, ti kpi ni.

english_verse: This is why you must encourage and help each other, just as you are already doing. Final Instructions and Greetings
translation_verse: Dinŋɔ zugu ya kpamsima taaba sufu ka niŋni din nin suŋŋi ya taaba ka ba zoaai Naawunni dɔligu ni: halli ya siri pun niŋni lala pampaŋŋɔ gba.

english_verse: My friends, we ask you to be thoughtful of your leaders who work hard and tell you how to live for the Lord.
translation_verse: Ti mabiisi, ti susiri ya, ni, ya tim ya toondaandima maa gyirima - ban nyɛ ban tumni Naawunni tuma n‑tiri ya, ka kpaamni ya suŋŋa.

english_verse: Show them great respect and love because of their work. Try to get along with each other.
translation_verse: Ya gyeemni ba ka tiri ba gyirima, ka laa n‑wuri ba pam ban tumni seelli la zugu; ka mari nangbanyinni ni taaba.

english_verse: My friends, we beg you to warn anyone who isn't living right. Encourage anyone who feels left out, help all who are weak, and be patient with everyone.
translation_verse: Ti mabiisi, ya kpaamni gbinnya'a dima. Ka ban sufu miligi la muna - ya maari ba sufu n‑tiri ba: halli ya suŋŋma ban gbarigi la, ka mari sugru ni sɔkam zaa.

english_verse: Don't be hateful to people, just because they are hateful to you. Rather, be good to each other and to everyone else.
translation_verse: Sɔ di boosiri u kpeaa beeri, amaa ya niŋma nirilim n‑tiri taaba - halli n‑tiri sɔkam zaa.

english_verse: Always be joyful
translation_verse: Ya mari sufupeelli sahakam;

english_verse: and never stop praying.
translation_verse: ya susima Naawunni sahakam;

english_verse: Whatever happens, keep thanking God because of Jesus Christ. This is what God wants you to do.
translation_verse: ka pɛ'ari Naawunni seelikam zaa puuni. Dama lala ka Naawunni boori ni ya niŋni ya beebu ni, Yisa Masiiya zugu.

english_verse: or ignore prophecies.
translation_verse: yan di zeem anabitiri yɛttɔ'a yɛla.

english_verse: Put everything to the test. Accept what is good
translation_verse: Amaa ya bugsima bunseelikam m‑baŋŋi di yɛlimaŋni ŋɔn nyɛ seem; ka mari din veela suŋŋasuŋŋa;

english_verse: and don't have anything to do with evil.
translation_verse: ka naayi yi bunseelli kam din nyɛ bumbeoo ni.

english_verse: I pray that God, who gives peace, will make you completely holy. And may your spirit, soul, and body be kept healthy and faultless until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: Naawunni n tiri sufudoaa: kyɛ ka u maali ya ka ya bɛ kasi zaa, ka mari ya siisi ni ya sufu ni ya ningbina ka a ku ti mari taalli ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita lappu na saha.

english_verse: The one who chose you can be trusted, and he will do this.
translation_verse: Ŋɔn booli ya maa nyɛ la ŋɔn nin niŋi di, dama yɛdda daana n nyɛ u, ka zɛ yummu.

english_verse: Friends, please pray for us.
translation_verse: Ti mabiisi, ya susima Naawunni n‑tiri ti gba.

english_verse: Give the Lord's followers a warm greeting.
translation_verse: Ya puusima ti mabiisi la zaa mabiitiri puusigu suŋŋa n‑ti ti.

english_verse: In the name of the Lord I beg you to read this letter to all his followers.
translation_verse: Ya wumma yaa! Ti yɛtti ya ti Dugma zugu, ni, ya kyɛ ka ba karim gbaŋŋu wa n‑ti ti mabiisi la zaa.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to you!
translation_verse: Ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita Masiiya piinisuma kpalim m‑bɛ ya saani.

english_verse: From Paul, Silas, and Timothy. To the church in Thessalonica, the people of God our Father and of the Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Man Pɔla, ni Sailivanisi, ni Timɔti n sɔbri gbaŋŋu wa n‑tiri ya Tɛsalɔnika niriba ban la'amni n‑gyeemni Yisa maa. Ya nyɛ ti Ba Naawunni ni ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita Masiiya ŋɔn su seeba la.

english_verse: My dear friends, we always have good reason to thank God for you, because your faith in God and your love for each other keep growing all the time.
translation_verse: Ti mabiisi, ti kur pɛ'ari Naawunni ya zugu, ka di sum ni lala, dama ya yɛdda kur zoaari m‑paasira, ka ya wurilim zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ya taaba saani gba zoaari pam.

english_verse: This is why we brag about you to all of God's churches. We tell them how patient you are and how you keep on having faith, even though you are going through a lot of trouble and suffering.
translation_verse: Dinzugu ti kur nyuuri la bara n‑yɛtti Naawunni niriba zaa n‑wulisiri ba yan zɛ yummu seem, ni ya yɛdda niŋbu yɛla, halli ni ya nyari namsigu ka diri wahala zaa.

english_verse: All this shows that God judges fairly and is making you fit to share in his kingdom for which you are suffering.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔ n wulisi, ni, Naawunni sariya karibu tuusiya zaa, ni, ya nyɛ la ban sum ni Naawunni naam, halli ni ya diri wahala u naam la zugu.

english_verse: It is only right for God to punish everyone who is causing you trouble,
translation_verse: Naawunni nin niŋi din tuusi. U nin kyɛ ka ban namsiri ya la ti nya namsigu.

english_verse: but he will give you relief from your troubles. God will do the same for us, when the Lord Jesus comes from heaven with his powerful angels
translation_verse: Ka yarima muna, yan ŋɔn nya namsigu la, u nin taasi yɔlisimma na nti ya, ka laa n‑zaŋŋi n‑ti tirima gba. U nin niŋi lala ti Dugma Yisa ni u malaaka yiikodaandima ŋɔn yi ti yi arizana ni na sahanseaa.

english_verse: and with a flaming fire. Our Lord Jesus will punish anyone who doesn't know God and won't obey his message.
translation_verse: U nin zaŋŋi bugum din dira n‑kyɛ na, ni u ti darigi ban bu mi Naawunni maa tuba, ni ban za'asi ti Dugma Yisa lahabasuŋŋu maa tuba gba.

english_verse: Their punishment will be eternal destruction, and they will be kept far from the presence of our Lord and his glorious strength.
translation_verse: Ba nin ti yɔ ba ba taalli samni m‑basi ba yɔri, saha kan ka naari; ka ba nin kpalim n‑zɛ wa'aligu n‑kɔŋŋi ti Dugma gyirima ni u yiiko ni beebu maa.

english_verse: This will happen on the day when the Lord returns to be praised and honored by all who have faith in him and belong to him. This includes you, because you believed what we said.
translation_verse: Ti Dugma Yisa nin labi na di daari maa, nti nya gyirima u niriba saani, ni tibgri ban pun niŋi u yɛdda saani. Ya gba nin ti bɛ niriba wa sunsukkuni, yan daa deaai lahabaseelli tin daa tɔ'asi n‑ti ya la zugu.

english_verse: God chose you, and we keep praying that God will make you worthy of being his people. We pray for God's power to help you do all the good things you hope to do and your faith makes you want to do.
translation_verse: Di zugu ka ti kur susiri Naawunni n‑tiri ya. Ti susiri Naawunni, ni, u ti kyɛ ka ya bɛ beesisuŋŋu hoo ŋɔn booli ya ni ya bɛ seem la, ka zaŋŋi u yiiko n‑suŋŋi ya ka ya tum ya sufu yuubu tuma, ni ya yɛdda tuma, n‑naai; ka bu pɔsigi seela.

english_verse: Then, because of the undeserved grace of God and our Lord Jesus Christ, you will bring honor to the name of our Lord Jesus, and he will bring honor to you.
translation_verse: Ka ti susiri Naawunni lala, ni, ti Dugma Yisa yuuri nin nya gyirima, ka ya gba nya gyirima u saani, ti Dugma Naawunni ni ti Dugma Yisa Masiiya suŋŋsim la zugu.

english_verse: When our Lord Jesus returns, we will be gathered up to meet him. So I ask you, my friends,
translation_verse: N ya n‑tɔ'asi n‑ti ya zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ti Dugma Yisa Masiiya lappu na, ni tin ti ya la'am n‑tuusi u soori la. Ti susiri ya ni, ti mabiisi,

english_verse: not to be easily upset or disturbed by people who claim the Lord has already come. They may say they heard this directly from the Holy Spirit, or from someone else, or even that they read it in one of our letters.
translation_verse: ni, yan di kyɛ ka ya yɛm ŋmaara, bee, n‑gyigra, seeba ŋɔn yɛtti, ni, ti Dugma lappu na pun gaari la zugu, halli sɔ yi ti tɔ'asi anabitiri n‑yɛli lala, bee, sɔ yi tɔ'asi Yɛligu maa yɛttɔ'a n‑yɛli lala, bee, ba yi ti sɔbi gbaŋŋu, ni, ka yiiri la tirima saani na, n‑yɛli lala ka puuni.

english_verse: But don't be fooled! People will rebel against God. Then before the Lord returns, the wicked one who is doomed to be destroyed will appear.
translation_verse: Yan di kyɛ ka sɔ yɔmsi ya seelli ni, dama dabsiri maa ku toaai m‑paai na, di yi pa la niriba pam daŋŋi n‑la'am taaba n‑za'asiri Naawunni noori pɔi, ka ninvugsɔ ŋɔn nyɛ Zaaliguza'asira ni Baasiyɔri Daana maa naayi yi paalu.

english_verse: He will brag and oppose everything holy or sacred. He will even sit in God's temple and claim to be God.
translation_verse: Ŋɔnŋɔ nin ti za'asi bunseelikam din zɛ Naawunni zugu, ni Naawunni gyeeŋŋu, ka duusi u maŋŋa n‑gaari seelikam. U nin ti kpɛ Naawunni Gyeeŋŋu Duu n‑yɛli, ni, ŋɔna n‑nyɛ Naawunni.

english_verse: Don't you remember I told you this while I was still with you?
translation_verse: Ya bu teaai man ŋɔn daa bɛ ya saani ka yɛli ya seem la?

english_verse: You already know what is holding this wicked one back until it is time for him to come.
translation_verse: Ka pampaŋŋɔ ya pun mi din goaari u, ni, di kyɛ ka u ku ti yi paalu see sahasuŋŋu maa deede.

english_verse: His mysterious power is already at work, but someone is holding him back. And the wicked one won't appear until this someone is out of the way.
translation_verse: Yɛlisɔ'ara an nyɛ zaaligu za'asigu yɛla pun piili a tuma, amaa ŋɔn goaari a maa kur nin bɛ ni, halli nti paai sahaseaa ban nin yiisi u soori ni.

english_verse: Then he will appear, but the Lord Jesus will kill him simply by breathing on him. He will be completely destroyed by the Lord's glorious return.
translation_verse: Di saha ka Zaaliguza'asira maa nin yi paalu. Di saha ka ti Dugma Yisa nin ti zaŋŋi u vuusim pɛsiŋŋu din yiiri u noori ni na n‑ku u, ka u lappu na gyirima nin ti sa'am u yɛla zaa.

english_verse: When the wicked one appears, Satan will pretend to work all kinds of miracles, wonders, and signs.
translation_verse: Ŋɔn Zaaliguza'asira maa kyɛnni na nin ti dɔlisi la ni Sintaani yiiko soori, nti mari kpeeŋŋu ni alahazibu tuma balibu kam, ni sisa, ka a zaa nyɛ la ziri.

english_verse: Lost people will be fooled by his evil deeds. They could be saved, but they will refuse to love the truth and accept it.
translation_verse: Ka u nin ti zaŋŋi ala'akyi tuma n‑yɔmsiri ninvugseeba ban baasiri yɔri. Ba nin baasi yɔri dama ba za'asiya, ni, ba ku wuri yɛlimaŋni maa ka nya tuliginsim.

english_verse: So God will make sure they are fooled into believing a lie.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔ zugu ka Naawunni tum la kyiriŋŋu din mari yiiko nti ba, ka ba niŋi ziri maa yɛdda.

english_verse: All of them will be punished, because they would rather do evil than believe the truth. Be Faithful
translation_verse: Ka di naari ti ya nyɛ la: ba kari ba sariya n‑lusi ba - ninvugseeba ban ku sakki, ni, ba niŋi yɛlimaŋni maa yɛdda, ka ba sufu boorim nyɛ la ba tum ala'akyi.

english_verse: My friends, the Lord loves you, and it is only natural for us to thank God for you. God chose you to be the first ones to be saved. His Spirit made you holy, and you put your faith in the truth.
translation_verse: Amaa tirima muna - di kpa la talasi ni ti pɛ'ai Naawunni ya zugu, yaseeba ban nyɛ ti mabiisi. Ka ti Dugma wuri ya, dama piiligu ni ka u daa pun yiisi ya, ni ya ti nya tuliginsim Naawunni Sii Kasi tuma puuni, ni yan niŋi yɛlimaŋni maa yɛdda zugu.

english_verse: God used our preaching as his way of inviting you to share in the glory of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: U daa kyɛ ka ti wulisi ya u lahabasuŋŋu, ka lala ka u daa booli ya ni ya ti nya lala tuliginsim; ni yan ni ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita nin ti la'am n‑nya gyirima.

english_verse: My friends, this is why you must remain faithful and follow closely what we taught you in person and by our letters.
translation_verse: Dizugu, m mabiisi, ya zɛ yummu ka mari wulisigu seelli tin daa zaŋŋi n‑wulisi ya la, di yi daa nyɛ yɛttɔ'a maa ni, bee, ti daa sɔbi nti ya.

english_verse: Finally, our friends, please pray for us. This will help the message about the Lord to spread quickly, and others will respect it, just as you do.
translation_verse: Ti mabiisi, din kpalim nyɛ la nŋɔa: ya susim Naawunni n‑ti ti, ka lala nin kyɛ ka ti Dugma yɛligu moonni n‑kyɛnni tooni yooma, ka ba deaai di ni gyirima, hoo yarima ŋɔn daa deaai seem la.

english_verse: Pray that we may be kept safe from worthless and evil people. After all, not everyone has faith.
translation_verse: Ka laa n‑susiri Naawunni n‑tiri ti, ni, u yiisi ti putoo dima ni ninvugbeeri nuusi ni, dama pa sɔkam zaa n‑niŋi ti lahabaari maa yɛdda.

english_verse: But the Lord can be trusted to make you strong and protect you from harm.
translation_verse: Amaa ti Dugma nyɛ la ŋɔn zɛ yummu, ka u nin ti ya yaa, ka ta'ai ya Yɛlibeoo Daana maa nuusi ni.

english_verse: He has made us sure that you are obeying what we taught you and that you will keep on obeying.
translation_verse: Halli ti siri niŋi ti Dugma maa yɛdda zaa, ni, ya tumni hoo tin daa wulisi ya seem la, ka kur nin niŋni lala sahakam.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will guide you to be as loving as God and as patient as Christ. Warnings against Laziness
translation_verse: Ti Dugma kyɛ ka ya baŋŋi u wurilim ŋɔn nyɛ seem, ka ya diri sugru hoo Kirisita Masiiya ŋɔn diri di seem la zaa.

english_verse: My dear friends, in the name of the Lord Jesus, I beg you not to have anything to do with any of your people who loaf around and refuse to obey the instructions we gave you.
translation_verse: Ti mabiisi, ti kpaamni ya ni, ti Dugma Yisa Masiiya zugu, ni, ya gbaam ya maŋŋa ka kyɛ ya mabiseeba ban nyɛ gbinnya'ari dima, baseeba ban bu dɔli wulisigu seelli tin daa wulisi ba la.

english_verse: You surely know that you should follow our example. We didn't waste our time loafing,
translation_verse: Ya mammaŋŋa mi, ni, di sum ni ya niŋi hoo tin daa niŋi seem la. Ti daa pa gbinnya'a dima, tin daa bɛ ya saani sahanseaa la.

english_verse: and we didn't accept food from anyone without paying for it. We didn't want to be a burden to any of you, so night and day we worked as hard as we could.
translation_verse: Ti daa bu di diseelli sɔ saani ka bu yɔ di samni. Amaa ti daa yi tumni ti tuma halli ka di wum ti; ti daa tumni la sahakam zaa, ni ti di ziili ya zitibsiri.

english_verse: We also gave you this rule: If you don't work, you don't eat.
translation_verse: Tin daa bɛ ya saani, ti daa yi yɛtti ya ni, ni, “Ŋɔn za'asi, ni, u ku tum, ba di kyɛ ka u di!”

english_verse: Now we learn that some of you just loaf around and won't do any work, except the work of a busybody.
translation_verse: Ti wumiya, ni, ninvugseeba ban bɛ ya saani n‑nyɛ gbinnya'a dima: ba bu boori ni ba tum seelli, ka na'a gyinni n‑kpeeri la niriba yɛla ni.

english_verse: So, for the sake of our Lord Jesus Christ, we ask and beg these people to settle down and start working for a living.
translation_verse: Lala taabu niriba ka ti kpaamni ka susiri ba ti Dugma Yisa Masiiya zugu, ni, ba zinnma baalimm ka tum ba tuma n‑gɔsi ba maŋŋa.

english_verse: Dear friends, you must never become tired of doing right.
translation_verse: Ti mabiisi, yan di gyɛ ya tunsuma tumpu ni.

english_verse: Be on your guard against any followers who refuse to obey what we have written in this letter. Put them to shame by not having anything to do with them.
translation_verse: Ka sɔ yi bu deaai ti wulisigu seelli tin sɔbi wa, yan kpasim u ka di laa m‑puusiri u; lala nin kyɛ ka vi gbaai u.

english_verse: Don't consider them your enemies. Instead, speak kindly to them as you would to any other follower. Final Prayer
translation_verse: Yan di zaŋŋi u ka u leebi ya dindaana, amaa ya kpaam u hoo ya mabiiya.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord, who gives peace, will always bless you with peace. May the Lord be with all of you.
translation_verse: Ti Dugma nyɛ la sufudoaa daana: ŋɔn mammaŋŋa tim ya sufudoaa sahakam zaa, ni yɛlikam puuni. Ti Dugma nin bɛ ya zaa saani.

english_verse: I pray that our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind to all of you.
translation_verse: Ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita Masiiya wurilim nin bɛ ya zaa saani.

english_verse: From Paul. God our Savior and Christ Jesus commanded me to be an apostle of Christ Jesus, who gives us hope.
translation_verse: Man Pɔla n sɔbri gbaŋŋu ŋɔa: Yisa Kirisita Masiiya tuumu n nyɛ ma, ka Naawunni ŋɔn nyɛ ti tuligra wa daa zaali ma lala tuma, ŋɔn ni Yisa Masiiya ŋɔn nyɛ ti tama la.

english_verse: Timothy, because of our faith, you are like a son to me. I pray that God our Father and our Lord Jesus Christ will be kind and merciful to you. May they bless you with peace! Warning against False Teaching
translation_verse: N sɔbri ka n‑tiri nyini, Timɔti, m bimaŋni ti yɛdda niŋbu soori maa ni. Ti Ba Naawunni ni ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita nin zɔ i namboo ka niŋi bunsuma n‑niŋi i ni, ka ti i sufudoaa.

english_verse: When I was leaving for Macedonia, I asked you to stay on in Ephesus and warn certain people there to stop spreading their false teachings.
translation_verse: Tɔ, teaama man daa gatti n‑kyaŋŋi Masidoonya ka yɛli i seem la. Ni, see ka i kpalim m‑bɛ Ɛfɛsusi timpuuni sa: ni, ninvugseeba m bɛ bɛni n‑wulisiri ziri wulisigu. Ka dizugu m boori ni i yɛli ba, ka ba kyɛ lala wulisigu maa.

english_verse: You needed to warn them to stop wasting their time on senseless stories and endless lists of ancestors. Such things only cause arguments. They don't help anyone to do God's work that can only be done by faith.
translation_verse: Ni, ba kyɛli daadaa yɛla bamsigu - lahabaseesi an ka yɛlimaŋni, ni dɔ'am kpamma yuya kaaligu din ka tɔriga la. Dama a kur taasiri la nangbankpeemni kɔkɔ na, ka bu wulisiri Naawunni yuubu soori, dama dinŋɔ nyɛ la yɛdda niŋbu puuni.

english_verse: You must teach people to have genuine love, as well as a good conscience and true faith.
translation_verse: Naawunni yuubu wa daliiri nyɛ la, ni, di kpamsi wurilim; wurilim mun yiiri sufu kasi ni na, ni sufu ni teesa an ka galiŋŋu, ni yɛddamaŋni niŋbu ni na.

english_verse: There are some who have given up these for nothing but empty talk.
translation_verse: Ninvugseeba mun ŋmaligi ni, ka kyɛ anŋɔa zaa; ka bɔrigi n‑kpalim la yɛttɔ'akyɔ'ama tɔ'asigu ni.

english_verse: They want to be teachers of the Law of Moses. But they don't know what they are talking about, even though they think they do.
translation_verse: Ba sufu kur yɛnni, ni, ba leebi Naawunni zaaligu karimbadima, amaa ka bu baŋŋi ban mari yɛttɔ'aseesi n‑tɔ'asiri maa gbina: halli ni bunseesi ban tɔ'asiri a yɛla maa ni nimmoaa - ba bu mi a gba gbina.

english_verse: We know the Law is good, if it is used in the right way.
translation_verse: Ti mi halli, ni, Naawunni zaaligu maa veela, nira yi dɔli ka, n‑tumni kan wulisiri seem.

english_verse: We also understand it wasn't given to control people who please God, but to control lawbreakers, criminals, godless people, and sinners. It is for wicked and evil people, and for murderers, who would even kill their own parents.
translation_verse: Ka di kpa la talasi ni ti baŋŋi, ni, Naawunni bu zaali u zaaligu dima maa ninvugsuma zugu, amaa u zaali a la zaaligu za'asiriba zugu, ni tuppuwumni dima, ni ban bu gyeemni Naawunni, ni ala'akyi dima zugu. U laa n‑zaali a la ban beebu bu bɛ kasi ka ba ba'a ka Naawunni yɛla ni la zugu, ni ban nyɛ ninvugkuuriba n‑kuuri ba badima ni ba madima la.

english_verse: The Law was written for people who are sexual perverts or who live as homosexuals or are kidnappers or liars or won't tell the truth in court. It is for anything else that opposes the correct teaching
translation_verse: Zaŋŋi n‑tabli ban tumni ningbiŋŋu kɔrisi tuma, ni dɔppa ban doontiri dɔppa bee pɔ'aba ban doontiri pɔ'aba, ni ban zaŋŋni mugsigu n‑gbaasiri niriba, ni ziri ma'ariba, ni ban diri ziri sɛhara - banŋɔ zaa zugu ka Naawunni na zaali u zaaligu dima wa. A nyɛ la bankam niŋni din kyiisiri wulisimaŋni la zugu.

english_verse: of the good news the glorious and wonderful God has given me. Being Thankful for God's Kindness
translation_verse: Wulisigu wa mun bɛ la lahabasuŋŋu ni ka mari gyirima, lahabaseelli Naawunni ŋɔn nyɛ Alibarika Daana wa ŋɔn zaŋŋi n‑niŋi man nuusi ni, ni m moonni ka.

english_verse: I thank Christ Jesus our Lord, who has given me the strength for my work because he knew he could trust me.
translation_verse: M puusiri ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita ŋɔn tiri ma yaa ni n tum tuma wa. M puusiri u ŋɔn nya ka yɛdda daana n nyɛ ma, ka dizugu di sumni ni u gaŋŋi ma ka zaali ma u tuma wa ni maa.

english_verse: I used to say terrible and insulting things about him, and I was cruel. But Christ had mercy on me because I didn't know what I was doing, and I had not yet put my faith in him.
translation_verse: Halli ni man daa daŋŋi n‑yɛtti u zulima, ka katti u niriba m‑mugsiri ba, ka tuuri u la zaa yɔri, ŋɔn Naawunni daa zɔ ma namboo, dama n daa niŋni di la ziilinsi zugu, ni man daa na bu niŋi yɛdda la zugu.

english_verse: Christ Jesus our Lord treated me with undeserved grace and has greatly blessed my life with faith and love just like his own.
translation_verse: Di saha maa ka ti Dugma daa zaŋŋi u wurilim piinisuma, an galisi nti yakki la, n‑ti ma; ka ti ma yɛdda ni wurilim din bɛ Yisa Masiiya ni la.

english_verse: “Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners.” This saying is true, and it can be trusted. I was the worst sinner of all!
translation_verse: Yɛttɔkku wa nyɛ la yɛlimaŋni, ka sumni ni nira deaai ka zaa; ni, Yisa Kirisita daa kyɛ duniya wa na ni u ti tuligi tumbeeri dima. Man muna n nyɛ ŋɔn tum tumbeeri wa n‑gaari sɔkam.

english_verse: But since I was worse than anyone else, God had mercy on me and let me be an example of the endless patience of Christ Jesus. He did this so that others would put their faith in Christ and have eternal life.
translation_verse: Amaa lala zugu daa kyɛ ka Naawunni daa zɔ ma namboo, ni Yisa Masiiya ŋɔn yi ti kyɛ n taalli m‑pɛŋŋi ma, halli ni man ŋɔn tum tumbeeri n‑gaari sɔkam zaa yɔri. Ka lala nin kyɛ ka niriba zaa ti nya u sugrudiibu zaa ŋɔn nyɛ seem. Ka di ti daŋŋi n‑leebi sɔseaa din nin kyɛ ka ninvugseeba ban na yɛ n‑niŋi u yɛdda nin naayi dɔli ka, ka ba nya nyɔvuri kan ka tɔriga la.

english_verse: I pray that honor and glory will always be given to the only God, who lives forever and is the invisible and eternal King! Amen.
translation_verse: Naawunni n nyɛ saha kam zaa naaba, ka ŋɔn kɔkɔ n nyɛ ŋɔn kur bɛ saha zaa ka bu kpiira, ka sɔsɔ ku toaai n‑nya u: ti tim u tibsim ni gyirima, saha din ka naari. Ammi!

english_verse: Timothy, my son, the instructions I am giving you are based on what some prophets once said about you. If you follow these instructions, you will fight like a good soldier.
translation_verse: M bii Timɔti, n zaŋŋi zaaligu wa n‑niŋi i nuusi ni ka di mun dɔli la anabitiri yɛttɔ'a ŋɔn daa yɛli seem zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi i yɛla: ni, lala ti kyɛ ka i zaŋŋi ana, ni a ti leebi hoo i tɔppu neema ka i mari a n‑tuusi tɔppu suŋŋa.

english_verse: You will be faithful and have a clear conscience. Some people have made a mess of their faith because they didn't listen to their consciences.
translation_verse: Mari i yɛdda niŋbu ni i sufu ni teesa kasi, ka galiŋŋu ka ni. Ninvugseeba mun pun za'asi sufu ni teesa wa taabu ŋɔn wulisiri seem, ka ba yɛdda niŋbu zaa baasi yɔri di zugu.

english_verse: Two of them are Hymenaeus and Alexander. I have given these men over to the power of Satan, so they will learn not to oppose God.
translation_verse: Ba puuni seeba n nyɛ Haamɛneesi ni Alɛkzanda. Ban ka n zaŋŋi n‑niŋi Sintaani nuusi ni, ni di kyɛ ka ba baŋŋi, ni, di bu sum ni ba mɔ Naawunni.

english_verse: First of all, I ask you to pray for everyone. Ask God to help and bless them all, and tell God how thankful you are for each of them.
translation_verse: Din daŋŋi tooni ka n kpamsiri sɔkam nyɛ la nŋɔa#:- Yan susim Naawunni n‑tiri ninsaalidima zaa, ka puusiri u ba zugu, ka zɔri ba sindaani u saani.

english_verse: Pray for kings and others in power, so we may live quiet and peaceful lives as we worship and honor God.
translation_verse: Ka ya laa m‑puusiri u lala n‑tiri nadima ni bankam su fukumsi la. Dina nin kyɛ ka ti bɛ baalimm ka yɛttɔ'aseaa ka ti, ka ti kpalim n‑dɔli la Naawunni soori n‑gyeemni u suŋŋasuŋŋa.

english_verse: This kind of prayer is good, and it pleases God our Savior.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔ n veela ka Naawunni nini n tigri di. Ka ŋɔn Naawunni n nyɛ ti tuligra,

english_verse: God wants everyone to be saved and to know the whole truth, which is,
translation_verse: ka boori ni sɔkam zaa ti tuligi ka baŋŋi yɛlimaŋni ŋɔn nyɛ seelli.

english_verse: There is only one God, and Christ Jesus is the only one who can bring us to God. Jesus was truly human, and he gave himself to rescue all of us.
translation_verse: Dama Naawunni yinni m bɛ ni, ka sindaantumna yinni kɔkɔ mun bɛ Naawunni ni ninsaalidima sunsukkuni; ŋɔna n nyɛ Yisa Kirisita, ka u gba nyɛ la ninsaala.

english_verse: This is why God chose me to be a preacher and an apostle of the good news. I am telling the truth. I am not lying. God sent me to teach the Gentiles about faith and truth.
translation_verse: Ka lala zugu ka Naawunni daa gaŋŋi ma ka n leebi u tuumu sɔ ŋɔn tum ni m moonni di lahabaari n‑wulisiri n‑tiri ban pa Yɛhudiyadima maa. U daa niŋi lala ni ba ti baŋŋi yɛdda ni yɛlimaŋni soori maa. Yɛlimaŋni ka n yɛtti i maa; m bu ma'ari la ziri!

english_verse: I want everyone everywhere to lift innocent hands toward heaven and pray, without being angry or arguing with each other.
translation_verse: M boori la dɔppa ban bɛ lugri kam zaa n nyɛ Naawunni niriba maa ti wukki ba nuusi saazugu m‑puusiri Naawunni, ka sufugyeaa bee nangbankpeemni ŋmeebu ka di puuni.

english_verse: I would like for women to wear modest and sensible clothes. They should not have fancy hairdos, or wear expensive clothes, or put on jewelry made of gold or pearls.
translation_verse: N laa m‑boori la pɔ'aba gba yeeri suturiveela an sumni ba, seesi an ka galinsi, bee, vi - pa la zugri paaŋŋu, bee salima ni anzulifa nangɔkɔrisi yeebu, bee, kyinkyina an mari ligri pam soobu.

english_verse: Women who claim to love God should do helpful things for others,
translation_verse: Ay! See ka ba zaŋŋi tunsuma m‑maanni ba mansi: lala ka di sum ni pɔ'aba ban gyeemni Naawunni bɛ ni.

english_verse: and they should learn by being quiet and paying attention.
translation_verse: Ya kyɛ ka pɔ'aba maa sini baalimm n‑sigsi ba mansi ka bamsira.

english_verse: They should be silent and not be allowed to teach or to tell men what to do.
translation_verse: M bu ti pɔ'aba soori ni ba leebi karimbadima, bee, ba su dɔppa fukumsi. Di kpa la talasi ni ba sini la baalimm.

english_verse: After all, Adam was created before Eve,
translation_verse: Dama Adam ka Naawunni daa daŋŋi n‑naam, ka naayi naam Hawa.

english_verse: and the man Adam wasn't the one who was fooled. It was the woman Eve who was completely fooled and sinned.
translation_verse: Ka di pa la Adam ka Sintaani daa yɔmsi, amaa Hawa ka u daa yɔmsi ka u leebi ŋɔn burigi Naawunni zaaligu.

english_verse: But women will be saved by having children, if they stay faithful, loving, holy, and modest.
translation_verse: Amaa pɔ'aba yi kur kpalim m‑mari yɛdda, ni wurilim, ka bɛ kasi, ka mari ba mansi suŋŋa, ba nin nya tuliginsim, biisi dɔ'am puuni.

english_verse: It is true that anyone who desires to be a church official wants to be something worthwhile.
translation_verse: Yɛttɔkku wa nyɛ la yɛlimaŋni. Ninvugsɔ sufu yi boori nimmoaa, ni, u leebi Naawunni niriba toondaana, ŋɔn boori seelli maa nyɛ la tunsuŋŋu.

english_verse: They must not be heavy drinkers or troublemakers. Instead, they must be kind and gentle and not love money.
translation_verse: Di bu sumni ni u nyɛ ŋɔn nyuuri daam m‑bugra, bee ŋɔn nyɛ zabboora; amaa di sumni ni u nyɛ la ŋɔn bɛ baalimm ka pa ŋɔn ŋmeeri nangbankpeemni, bee, ŋɔn sufu wuri ligri nti yakki.

english_verse: Church officials must be in control of their own families, and they must see that their children are obedient and always respectful.
translation_verse: Di kpa la talasi ni u nyɛ la ŋɔn mari u maŋtoori yiri suŋŋa, ka u biisi deaari u noori ka tiri u gyirima bunseelli kam zaa ni.

english_verse: If they don't know how to control their own families, how can they look after God's people?
translation_verse: Dama nira yi bu nyaŋŋi m‑mari u toori yiri maa, u ya niŋi la wula n‑toaai m‑mari Naawunni niriba maa n‑gɔsiri ba yɛla?

english_verse: They must not be new followers of the Lord. If they are, they might become proud and be doomed along with the devil.
translation_verse: Di mun bu sum ni di daama nyɛ la ŋɔn na yooli n‑niŋi tuuba; di yi pa lala u nin nyu bara n‑duusi u maŋŋa ka lala zugu nin kyɛ ka ba kari u sariya n‑lusi u, hoo Sintaani ŋɔn daa lu seem la.

english_verse: Finally, they must be well-respected by people who are not followers. Then they won't be trapped and disgraced by the devil. Church Officers
translation_verse: Ka din paasi dinŋɔ zaa zugu nyɛ la, di kpa la talasi ni u nyɛ la sɔ ŋɔn yuuri du ban bɛ kpaŋŋa saani: di yi pa lala, u nin ti tum vi tuma, ka Sintaani kyɛ'ariga gbaai u.

english_verse: And they must have a clear conscience and hold firmly to what God has shown us about our faith.
translation_verse: Di laa n‑kpa la talasi ni ba sufu ni teesa bɛ deede, ka ba deaai yɛttɔ'azulima an bɛ ti wulisigu puuni la m‑mari suŋŋa.

english_verse: They must first prove themselves. Then if no one has anything against them, they can serve as officers.
translation_verse: Dizugu ya kyɛ ka ba ma'asi lala niriba pɔi, ka ba beesigu yi wulisi, ni, ba ka galinsi, yan naayi kyɛ ka ba tum toondaandima suŋŋniba tuma maa.

english_verse: Church officers must be faithful in marriage. They must be in full control of their children and everyone else in their home.
translation_verse: Di sum ni ŋɔn suŋŋni ya toondaandima maa mari la pɔ'a yinni, ka nyaŋŋi m‑mari u biisi ni u yiri dima suŋŋa.

english_verse: Those who serve well as officers will earn a good reputation and will be highly respected for their faith in Christ Jesus. The Mystery of Our Religion
translation_verse: Ninvugseeba ban tumni tuma wa suŋŋa nin nya yusuma, ka nyaŋŋi m‑mari sufukpeemni n‑tɔ'asira, ban niŋi Yisa Masiiya yɛdda seem la zugu.

english_verse: Here is the great mystery of our religion: Christ came as a human. The Spirit proved that he pleased God, and he was seen by angels. Christ was preached to the nations. People in this world put their faith in him, and he was taken up to glory.
translation_verse: Sɔ ku toaai n‑kyiisi, ni, ti Naawunni soori yɛlisɔ'ara wa bu galisi. Dina n nyɛ, ni#:- “U daa leebi ninsaala n‑yi paalu, Naawunni Sii Kasi mun daa zɛ u nyaaŋŋa: Malaakadima gba daa nya u. Ba daa mooli u yɛla n‑tiri bura kam zaa, Ka niriba daa niŋi u yɛdda duniya wa ni. Naawunni daa ti duusi u saazugu N‑taasi gyirima zaa ziiya arizana ni.”

english_verse: God's Spirit clearly says that in the last days many people will turn from their faith. They will be fooled by evil spirits and by teachings that come from demons.
translation_verse: Naawunni Sii maa daa pun wulisi ti n‑yɛli, ni, sahanseesi an ti paari nyaaŋŋa, ninvugseeba nin ti kyɛ ba yɛdda niŋbu soori. Ni, ba nin ti dɔli siseeba ban yɔmsiri niriba, ni bunseesi arizimbeeri ŋɔn wulisiri maa.

english_verse: They will also be fooled by the false claims of liars whose consciences have lost all feeling. These liars
translation_verse: Lala wulisigu maa yiiri la ninvugyɔmsiriba saani na, baseeba ban nyɛ ziri dima, ka ba sufu ni teesa bu laa n‑teesiri bunsuma, hoo nira yi ti zaŋŋi kurituulli n‑vuuli u ningbina seem.

english_verse: will forbid people to marry or to eat certain foods. But God created these foods to be eaten with thankful hearts by his followers who know the truth.
translation_verse: Niriba wa taabu wulisigu yɛtti la, ni, di bu tuusi ka nira di pɔ'a, bee, pɔ'a kuli doowa. Ni, bundiriseesi kyisiri n‑tiri niriba, ka ba di diri a. Amaa Naawunni mun daa naam bundira maa zaa n‑tisi niriba, ni ba ti deaai m‑puusi u a zugu, dama ba laa n‑niŋi u yɛdda ka baŋŋi yɛlimaŋni maa.

english_verse: Everything God created is good. And if you give thanks, you may eat anything.
translation_verse: Naawunni ŋɔn naam bunseelli kam zaa veela. Ka di bu sum ni ti za'asiri a ni; amaa ti puusima Naawunni ka deaari a ni;

english_verse: What God has said and your prayer will make it fit to eat. Paul's Advice to Timothy
translation_verse: dama Naawunni yɛligu ni wunsusigu nin kyɛ ka a bɛ kasi Naawunni saani.

english_verse: If you teach these things to other followers, you will be a good servant of Christ Jesus. You will show you have grown up on the teachings about our faith and on the good instructions you have obeyed.
translation_verse: I yi zaŋŋi yɛla wa zaa n‑wulisiri ti mabiisi maa, i nin leebi Kirisita Yisa tuntunsuŋŋu. Lala ŋmanni la hoo nyin diisiri i mammaŋŋa n‑kpamsira; nyin ŋɔn daa pun wum yɛlisuma zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi yɛdda soori, ka laa n‑wum yɛlimaŋni wulisigu ka dɔli ka.

english_verse: Don't have anything to do with worthless, senseless stories. Work hard to be truly religious.
translation_verse: Amaa zɔma n‑yi ka kyɛ lahabayɔya ni sɔlinseesi an bu sum ni Naawunni nyaandɔliba. Kur kpaŋŋma i maŋŋa m‑bamsi Naawunni soori dɔligu.

english_verse: As the saying goes, “Exercise is good for your body, but religion helps you in every way. It promises life now and forever.” These words are worthwhile and should not be forgotten.
translation_verse: Yɛttɔkku wa nyɛ la yɛlimaŋni, ka sum ni nira deaai ka zaa, ka niŋi ka yɛdda.

english_verse: We have put our hope in the living God, who is the Savior of everyone, but especially of those who have faith. This is why we work and struggle so hard.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔa zugu ka ti diri wahala ka tumni ni ti yaa tɔriga, dama ti zaŋŋi ti tama zaa n‑niŋi Naawunni Nyɔvuri Daana wa ni. Ŋɔn Naawunni n nyɛ sɔkam zaa tuligra, halli ni u tuligri ninvugseeba ban niŋi u yɛdda la zaa, halli nti yakki.

english_verse: Teach these things and tell everyone to do what you say.
translation_verse: Zaŋŋma anŋɔa zaa n‑wulisi ba, ka zaali ba, ni, ba dɔli a.

english_verse: Don't let anyone make fun of you, just because you are young. Set an example for other followers by what you say and do, as well as by your love, faith, and purity.
translation_verse: Di kyɛ ka sɔ zeemni i, nyin ŋɔn bu kurigi zaa zugu. Amaa kyɛ ka i yɛttɔ'a wulisi yɛddaniŋniba maa din sum ni ba bɛ seem - i yɛttɔ'a, ni i beebu, ni i wurilim, ni i yɛdda niŋbu, ni i tuma kasikasi tumpu la zaa.

english_verse: Until I arrive, be sure to keep on reading the Scriptures in worship, and don't stop preaching and teaching.
translation_verse: Kur kpalimma n‑karimni Naawunni yɛligu maa n‑tiri niriba ni nimbirimoaa, ka kpamsiri ba sufu, ka wulisiri ba, halli ni n ti kyɛ na.

english_verse: Use the gift you were given when the prophets spoke and the group of church leaders blessed you by placing their hands on you.
translation_verse: Di tam nyin daa deaai Naawunni piiniseelli la, see ka i kyɛ ka i ba'a bɛ ka ni: ni, ba daa tɔ'asi anabitiri yɛttɔ'a zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi i yɛla, ka toondaandima daa zaŋŋi ba nuusi m‑pa i zugu ka i daa deaai ka.

english_verse: Remember these things and think about them, so everyone can see how well you are doing.
translation_verse: Dɔli anŋɔ zaa ka zaŋŋi i maŋŋa n‑tiri a. Dina nin kyɛ ka sɔkam nya ka baŋŋi, ni, i tuma maa kyɛnni tooni.

english_verse: Be careful about the way you live and about what you teach. Keep on doing this, and you will save not only yourself, but the people who hear you.
translation_verse: Kur mari i maŋŋa n‑gɔsi i beebu ni i wulisigu suŋŋa. Kpalimma n‑niŋni anŋɔ dima, dama i yi niŋi lala i nin tuligi i maŋŋa, ni ninvugseeba ban wumni i wulisigu maa gba.

english_verse: Don't correct an older man. Encourage him, as you would your own father. Treat younger men as you would your own brother,
translation_verse: Di tasi ninvugkurigu n‑nyikki u; amaa kpamsim u kaman i ba. Ka laa n‑deaai na'akyimbisi la hoo i tunzɔppa,

english_verse: and treat older women as you would your own mother. Show the same respect to younger women that you would to your sister.
translation_verse: ka kyɛ ka pɔ'akura la leebi i madima, ka pɔ'asara mun leebi i tunzɔpɔ'aba, halli ka i dɔli sɔsuŋŋu n‑tiri ba.

english_verse: Take care of any widow who is really in need.
translation_verse: Gɔsim pukɔya ban siri boori suŋŋsim la suŋŋa.

english_verse: But if a widow has children or grandchildren, they should learn to serve God by taking care of her, as she once took care of them. This is what God wants them to do.
translation_verse: Amaa pukɔsɔ yi mari biisi bee ya'ansi, nyin kyɛ ka ba baŋŋi, ni, see ka ba daŋŋi n‑gɔsi ba toori yiri dima suŋŋa. Ba yi niŋi lala ba nin labsi n‑yɔ sanseaa ba badima ni ba yaadima maa ŋɔn daa tum tunseelli zaa n‑ti ba la. Lala n kyɛ ka Naawunni nini tigra.

english_verse: A widow who is really in need is one who doesn't have any relatives. She has faith in God, and she keeps praying to him night and day, asking for his help.
translation_verse: Amaa pukɔsɔ ŋɔn bɛ u kɔkɔ ka ka suŋŋna nyɛ la ŋɔn siri boori suŋŋsim. Lala pukoori maa zaŋŋi la u tama zaa n‑niŋi Naawunni nuusi ni, ka kur puusiri Naawunni n‑susiri u, yuŋŋu ni wuntaŋŋa zaa.

english_verse: A widow who thinks only about having a good time is already dead, even though she is still alive.
translation_verse: Pukɔsɔ mun ŋɔn zaŋŋi u maŋŋa n‑ti u ningbinkɔrisi tuma la, ŋɔna pun kpi ni halli ni ŋɔn na nɛ maa zaa yɔri.

english_verse: Tell all this to everyone, so they will do the right thing.
translation_verse: Dizugu zaalima yɛla wa gba n‑tiri niriba, ka ba yi ti dɔli a, sɔsɔ ku galim ba.

english_verse: People who don't take care of their relatives, and especially their own families, have given up their faith. They are worse than someone who doesn't have faith in the Lord.
translation_verse: Ninvugsɔ yi bu gɔsiri u dɔ'ariba, halli m‑bu gɔsiri u toori yiri dima gba, u kyiisiri la u yɛdda niŋbu soori, halli ni ninvugsɔ ŋɔn pa Yisa nyaandɔla n nyɛ bunsuŋŋu n‑gaari u.

english_verse: For a widow to be put on the list of widows, she must be at least
translation_verse: Di zaŋŋi pukɔsɔ n‑sɔbi u yuuri m‑paasi pukɔya ni, di yi pa la u pun paai u yuuma pisiyoobu, ka kuli doo yinni kɔkɔa.

english_verse: She must also be well-known for doing all sorts of good things, such as raising children, giving food to strangers, welcoming God's people into her home, helping people in need, and always making herself useful.
translation_verse: See ka sɔkam mi u tunsuma yɛla - tunsuma wa nyɛ la: u wulisi u biisi suŋŋa, n‑deaari saamma, n‑tumni n‑tiri Yisa nyaandɔliba, n‑suŋŋni ban bɛ wahala ni, ka zaŋŋi u maŋŋa zaa n‑tum la tunsuma balibu kam.

english_verse: Don't put young widows on the list. They may later have a strong desire to get married. Then they will turn away from Christ
translation_verse: Di bu laa n‑sumni ni i zaŋŋi pukɔya ban na bu kurigi la yuya n‑sɔbi m‑paasi pukɔya maa ni. Dama ba kɔrisi yi ti bɛ dɔppa kulibu ni, ba nin ŋmaligi ka kyɛ Kirisita yɛla;

english_verse: Besides, they will become lazy and get into the habit of going from house to house. Next, they will start gossiping and become busybodies, talking about things that are none of their business.
translation_verse: Din paasi dinŋɔ zugu nyɛ la#:- ba bamsiri la gbinnya'ari sɔya, ka sa'amni la ba saha n‑gyinni n‑kpeeri yiya, ka laa n‑zuuri niriba nyaansi, ka kpeeri ba yɛla ni yɔri, ka tɔ'asiri yɛttɔ'aseesi an bu sumni ni ba tɔ'asi.

english_verse: I would prefer that young widows get married, have children, and look after their families. Then the enemy won't have any reason to say insulting things about us.
translation_verse: Dinzugu n kpamsiri pukɔya ban na bu kurigi la, ni, ba kulima dɔppa, n‑dɔ'ai biisi, n‑gɔsiri ba toori yiya. Dinŋɔ nin kyɛ ka ti dindaandima ku nya soori ni ba tuuri ti.

english_verse: If a woman who is a follower has any widows in her family, she should help them. This will keep the church from having that burden, and then the church can help widows who are really in need. Church Leaders
translation_verse: Ka pɔ'asɔ ŋɔn nyɛ Yisa nyaandɔla yi mari pukɔya u yiri puuni, ŋɔn suŋŋma ba, ka di kyɛ ka mugsigu bɛ Yisa niriba zugu; lala nin kyɛ ka ba nin toaai n‑suŋŋi pukɔseeba ban siri boori suŋŋsim la.

english_verse: Church leaders who do their job well deserve to be paid twice as much, especially if they work hard at preaching and teaching.
translation_verse: Kpamseeba ban tumni toondaana tuma suŋŋa sumni la ba nya yoori buyi, ka di siri bɛ la lala n‑tiri ban tumni suŋŋa n‑yiisiri wa'azu ka wulisiri Naawunni yɛligu.

english_verse: It is just as the Scriptures say, “Don't muzzle an ox when you are using it to grind grain.” You also know the saying, “Workers are worth their pay.”
translation_verse: Dama Naawunni yɛligu yɛliya, ni, “Di lɔ na'akoorigu noori, u yi tumni puu tuma sahanseaa.” Ni, “Tuntumna zaa sumni u deaai u tuma yoori.”

english_verse: Don't listen to any charge against a church leader, unless at least two or three people bring the same charges.
translation_verse: Sɔ yi galim toondaansɔ i saani, nyin di deaai yɛttɔ'a maa, na'ala niriba ayi bee babata n la'am n‑di di sɛhara.

english_verse: But if any of the leaders should keep on sinning, they must be corrected in front of the whole group, as a warning to everyone else.
translation_verse: Kpaasima ban tumni ala'akyi la zugri paalu ni, ka lala nin kyɛ ka dabeem gbaai ban kpalim la.

english_verse: In the presence of God and Christ Jesus and their chosen angels, I order you to follow my instructions! Be fair with everyone, and don't have any favorites.
translation_verse: N tɔ'asiri wa ni Naawunni ti wumna, ni Yisa Masiiya, ni malaaka seeba ŋɔn gamsi maa m‑paasi. N ya zaali i, ni, i dɔli wulisigu wa ka di daŋŋi n‑yɛli, ni, ninvugsɔ galimiya pɔi, ka naayi wum u yɛttɔ'a; bee, n‑gaŋŋi sɔ n‑wuri, ka kyɛ sɔa.

english_verse: Don't be too quick to accept people into the service of the Lord by placing your hands on them. Don't sin because others do, but stay close to God.
translation_verse: Di boori yooma ni i zaŋŋi i nuusi m‑pa sɔ zugu ni u tum Naawunni tuma. I mun di kyɛ ka i nuu bɛ i taaba tumbeeri tumpu ni. Kur mari i maŋŋa m‑bɛ kasi.

english_verse: Stop drinking only water. Take a little wine to help your stomach trouble and the other illnesses you often have.
translation_verse: I puu ŋɔn beera, ka i ningbina bu tigi alaafɛ sahaseesi la zugu, di laa n‑nyuuri koom kɔkɔa, amaa nyuuma daam beela m‑paasira.

english_verse: Some people get caught in their sins almost at once, even before the time of judgment. But other people's sins don't show up until later.
translation_verse: Ninvugseeba tumbeeri yi yi paalu n‑daŋŋi ba tooni m‑paai sariya karibu ziiya; amaa seeba mun dina dɔli la ba nyaaŋŋa.

english_verse: It is the same with good deeds. Some are easily seen, but none of them can be hidden.
translation_verse: Lala ka tunsuma gba yiiri paalu ni, ka halli tunsunseaa yi bɛ ni kan bu yi paalu yooma, ka mun kur ku naayi n‑kpalim n‑sɔ'ai.

english_verse: If you are a slave, you should respect and honor your owner. This will keep people from saying bad things about God and about our teaching.
translation_verse: Di kpa la talasi ka ninvugseeba ban nyɛ daaba la tisiri ba duniya wa dugmadima gyirima, lala ka ya ku kyɛ ka sɔ tɔ'asiri yɛttɔ'aseaa din bɛ n‑sa'amni Naawunni yuuri, bee, ti wulisigu wa yuuri.

english_verse: If any of you slaves have owners who are followers, you should show them respect. After all, they are also followers of Christ, and he loves them. So you should serve and help them the best you can. False Teaching and True Wealth These are the things you must teach and tell the people to do.
translation_verse: Halli daaba ban duniya wa dugmadima ŋɔn nyɛ yɛddaniŋniba maa gba - di sum ni ba tiri ba lala gyirima; ba di zeemni ba, ban nyɛ mabiisi ni taaba zugu. Ay! see ka ba tumni n‑tiri ba halli n‑gaari ban dugmadima pa yɛddaniŋniba maa ŋɔn gyeemni ba seem la; dama ban diri ba tuma maa anfaani nyɛ la yɛddaniŋniba ban wuri seeba. Wulisima ba ka kpamsi ba ka ba niŋni anŋɔ dima zaa.

english_verse: Anyone who teaches something different disagrees with the correct and godly teaching of our Lord Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Ka ŋɔnkam wulisiri wulisigu din bɛ di kɔkɔa, ka bu dɔli ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita yɛligu din mari alaafɛ la, bee, Naawunni soori wulisigu tin dɔli seaa la,

english_verse: Those people who disagree are proud of themselves, but they don't really know a thing. Their minds are sick, and they like to argue over words. They cause jealousy, disagreements, unkind words, evil suspicions,
translation_verse: di daama nyɛ la karimbaani daana ka na zi bunseela. U naa n‑nyɛ la kɔribeeri daana ŋɔn sufu kur bɛ la nangbankpeemni ŋmeebu ni, ni zabkyɔ'ama zappu zugu. Dinŋɔ taasiri la nyuuri zappu na, ni taaba nyaanzum, ni wɔligri, ni zulisigu.

english_verse: and nasty quarrels. They have wicked minds and have missed out on the truth. These people think religion is supposed to make you rich.
translation_verse: Niriba wa taabu teesa sa'amiya zaa, ka ba daamni la taaba dizugu; ba kɔŋŋni la yɛlimaŋni zaa gba, ka teesiri, ni, Naawunni soori zugu nin kyɛ ka ba nya arizikki n‑niŋi bundaandima.

english_verse: And religion does make your life rich, by making you content with what you have.
translation_verse: Tɔ: Naawunni soori siri nyɛ la arizikki titaari n‑tiri ninvugsɔ ŋɔn nini tigi ŋɔn mari seela.

english_verse: We didn't bring anything into this world, and we won't take anything with us when we leave.
translation_verse: Dama ti daa bu zi bunseelli n‑kyɛ duniya wa ni na; ti mun ku laa n‑zi bunseelli n‑labi.

english_verse: So we should be satisfied just to have food and clothes.
translation_verse: Ka ti yi mari bundirigu ni sutura, dinŋɔna di sakkiya n‑ti ti.

english_verse: People who want to be rich fall into all sorts of temptations and traps. They are caught by foolish and harmful desires that drag them down and destroy them.
translation_verse: Ninvugseeba ban sufu kur boori ni ba leebi bundaandima maa pun zaŋŋi ba mansi n‑kpeesi zamsigu ni, hoo kyɛ'ariga ni. Ba laa n‑zaŋŋni ba mansi n‑kpeesiri la gyɛrilim ni, ni kɔriseesi an lusiri daadam ka basiri ba yɔri.

english_verse: The love of money causes all kinds of trouble. Some people want money so much they have given up their faith and caused themselves a lot of pain. Fighting a Good Fight for the Faith
translation_verse: Dama ligri boobu nyɛ la bumbeeri kam zaa nya'ari. Ka ninvugseeba ban sufu daa kur bɛ ligri nyaabu zugu daa burigiya ni, ka kyɛ ba yɛdda halli nti zaŋŋi sufusa'aŋŋu pam n‑kusi ba mansi hoo piima la.

english_verse: Timothy, you belong to God, so keep away from all these evil things. Try your best to please God and to be like him. Be faithful, loving, dependable, and gentle.
translation_verse: Amaa nyin ŋɔn nyɛ Naawunni nira wa, kur gbaam i maŋŋa ka kyɛ anŋɔ zaa. Kpaŋŋma i maŋŋa n‑dɔli yɛlimaŋni soori maa; ka zaŋŋi yɛdda, ni wurilim, n‑gyeemni Naawunni ka laa n‑zɛ yummu m‑bɛ baalimm.

english_verse: Fight a good fight for the faith and claim eternal life. God offered it to you when you clearly told about your faith, while so many people listened.
translation_verse: Kur bari n‑zaani m‑mɔ suŋŋasuŋŋa. Gbaam nyɔvuri kan ka tɔriga yɛla gba kirikiri. Naawunni daa booli i, ni i ti mari lala nyɔvuri maa, ka nyin mun daa tɔ'asi n‑wulisi lala paalu ni, ka niriba pam daa wum.

english_verse: Now I ask you to make a promise. Make it in the presence of God, who gives life to all, and in the presence of Christ Jesus, who openly told Pontius Pilate about his faith.
translation_verse: Naawunni zaŋŋi nyɔvuri n‑tisiri bunseelli kam zaa; Yisa Masiiya mun daa zaani Gɔmna Pɔntiyusi Pailiti tooni n‑tɔ'asi n‑wulisi Naawunni yɛla paalu ni: dizugu ka man zaantiri zaaligu wa n‑tiri i,

english_verse: Promise to obey completely and fully all that you have been told until our Lord Jesus Christ returns.
translation_verse: ni, i dɔli soori maa ni beesikasi ka galiŋŋu ka ni, halli ka ti Dugma Yisa ti yi paalu na.

english_verse: The glorious God is the only Ruler, the King of kings and Lord of lords. At the time that God has already decided, he will send Jesus Christ back again.
translation_verse: Naawunni nin wulisi u n‑ti ti na, sahaseelli ŋɔn ti gbaai, ni, sahasuŋŋu deede nla. Ŋɔn kɔkɔ nyɛ la Naawunni Alibarika Daana, ŋɔn su bunseelli kam; u nyɛ la nadima zaa Naaba ni dugmadima zaa Dugma.

english_verse: Only God lives forever! And he lives in light that no one can come near. No human has ever seen God or ever can see him. God will be honored, and his power will last forever. Amen.
translation_verse: Ŋɔn kɔkɔ n laa n‑nyɛ ŋɔn bu kpiira, ka bɛ la neesim ni, halli ka sɔsɔ ku toaai m‑pɔri m‑paai u na, neesim maa gyirima zugu. Ninsaalisɔ na zi n‑nya u, ka sɔ mun ku toaai nya u. Ŋɔna n sumni ni ba gyeemni u, ka u su yiiko halli ni saha din ka tɔriga. Ammi.

english_verse: Warn the rich people of this world not to be proud or to trust in wealth that is easily lost. Tell them to have faith in God, who is rich and blesses us with everything we need to enjoy life.
translation_verse: See ka i kpaam duniya wa bundaandima maa, ni, ba di mari karimbaani, bee, n‑zaŋŋi ba tama n‑niŋi arizikki din bu ya yuui saha zaa. Amaa ba zaŋŋma ba tama n‑niŋi Naawunni ŋɔn tiri ti bunseelli kam din nin nya'asa n‑ti ti.

english_verse: Instruct them to do as many good deeds as they can and to help everyone. Remind the rich to be generous and share what they have.
translation_verse: See ka i kpaam ba yaasa, ni, ba tumma din veela; ka nyɛ bundaandima tunsuma tumpu ziiya. Di nyɛ la: ba putti ban mari bunseela la n‑tiri niriba.

english_verse: Timothy, guard what God has placed in your care! Don't pay any attention to godless and stupid talk that sounds smart but really isn't.
translation_verse: M bii Timɔti, mari Naawunni ŋɔn zaŋŋi bunseelli n‑niŋi i nuu ni, ni i guri maa. Ŋmaligma ka kyɛ yɛttɔ'akyɔ'ama an bu sum ni Naawunni yɛla ni, ka za'asi nangbankpeemni zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi yɛttɔ'aseesi ninvugseeba ŋɔn kyirimni m‑boonni ‘bansim’ la.

english_verse: Some people have even lost their faith by believing this talk. I pray that the Lord will be kind to all of you!
translation_verse: Dama, ninvugseeba ban yɛtti, ni, ba mari bamsim wa burigiya ka kyɛ yɛdda niŋbu soori. Naawunni piinisuma nin kpalim m‑bɛ ya saani.

english_verse: From Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus. God himself chose me to be an apostle, and he gave me the promised life that Jesus Christ makes possible.
translation_verse: Mani Pɔla n sɔbri gbaŋŋu wa n‑ti i, man ŋɔn nyɛ Kirisita Yisa tuumu, ka Naawunni daa yiisi ma ni u ti diisi ma lala kpamni maa. Ŋɔn Naawunni mun daa pun basi nangbambasiri zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi nyɔvuri din bɛ Kirisita Yisa saani yɛla.

english_verse: Timothy, you are like a dear child to me. I pray that God our Father and our Lord Christ Jesus will be kind and merciful to you and will bless you with peace! Do Not Be Ashamed of the Lord
translation_verse: N sɔbri n‑tiri nyini, m biwuttigu Timɔti. Ti Ba Naawunni ni ti Dugma Kirisita Yisa nin zaŋŋi piinisuma n‑ti i ka zɔ i namboo, ka ti i sufudoaa ni alaafɛa!

english_verse: Night and day I mention you in my prayers. I am always grateful for you, as I pray to the God my ancestors and I have served with a clear conscience.
translation_verse: N gyeemni la Naawunni kaman n yaadima ŋɔn daa gyeemni u seem la, ka n sufu ni teesa bɛ la u saani ka ka galiŋŋu: ka n pɛ'ari ŋɔn Naawunni ka laa n‑teaari i yɛla n wunsusigu ni, yuŋŋu ni wuntaŋŋa zaa.

english_verse: I remember how you cried, and I want to see you, because this would make me truly happy.
translation_verse: N yi ti teaai i yɛla, ni, nyin daa kum nintam seem la, n yi kur boori la n nya i, ka di kyɛ ka n sufu maai.

english_verse: I also remember the genuine faith of your mother Eunice. Your grandmother Lois had the same sort of faith, and I am sure you have it as well.
translation_verse: Dinzugu n teaai nyin ŋɔn mari yɛdda seem maa, ka ziri ka di ni. Halli i yaapɔ'a Loosi daa daŋŋi m‑mari yɛdda wa taabu, ni i ma Yuunisi la; ka m mi, ni, nyin gba mara.

english_verse: Don't be ashamed to speak for our Lord. And don't be ashamed of me, just because I am in jail for serving him. Use the power that comes from God and join with me in suffering for telling the good news.
translation_verse: Dizugu di kyɛ ka vi mari i, nyin tɔ'asiri ti Dugma yɛla zugu, bee, man zugu gba, man ŋɔn bɛ dansarika duu wa ni maa. See ka Naawunni yiiko kyɛ ka man ni nyin la'am n‑di wahala lahabasuŋŋu maa zugu.

english_verse: God saved us and chose us to be his holy people. We did nothing to deserve this, but God planned it because he is so kind. Even before time began God planned for Christ Jesus to show kindness to us.
translation_verse: Ŋɔn Naawunni n daa tuligi ti ka booli ti, ni di kyɛ ka ti bɛ kasi. Di pa la ti tunsuma zugu, amaa di nyɛ la u mammaŋŋa ŋɔn daa pun gbaai seem: dama u daa daŋŋi n‑yiisi u bunsuma, ni u ya n‑zaŋŋi n‑ti ti Kirisita Yisa zugu pɔi, ka sahaseelli din daa pun gaari la daa na bu piili.

english_verse: Now Christ Jesus has come to offer us God's gift of undeserved grace. Christ our Savior defeated death and brought us the good news. It shines like a light and offers life that never ends.
translation_verse: Halli nti paai zuna, ka pampaŋŋɔ di yi kasigi n‑wulisi ti, Kirisita Yisa Masiiya, ŋɔn nyɛ ti Tuligra, kyɛnni na la zugu. Ŋɔna n nyɛ ŋɔn daa nyaŋŋi kum zaa, ka laa n‑kyɛ ka ti nini neaai. U lahabasuŋŋu puuni u wulisi ti nyɔvuri yɛla, nyɔvuri seaa kum ŋɔn laa n‑ka ni la.

english_verse: My work is to be a preacher, an apostle, and a teacher.
translation_verse: Lahabasuŋŋu wa zugu ka Naawunni daa yiisi ma n‑leebi lahabaari maa tuumu, ni n ti moonni ka n‑wulisiri n‑tiri niriba.

english_verse: This is why I am suffering now. But I am not ashamed! I know the one I have faith in, and I am sure he can guard until the last day what he has trusted me with.
translation_verse: Ka lala zugu ka n diri wahala wa. Amaa vi bu mari ma, dama n mi man ŋɔn niŋi sɔ yɛdda, ka mi, ni, u nin toaai mari bunseelli man ŋɔn zaŋŋi n‑niŋi u nuu ni la, halli nti paai Zaadaari.

english_verse: Now follow the example of the correct teaching I gave you, and let the faith and love of Christ Jesus be your model.
translation_verse: I pun wum yɛttɔ'asuma man saani. Kur kyɛ ka a wulisi i bunseesi an mari alaafɛ ŋɔn bɛ seem. Ka kpalim m‑mari yɛdda ni wurilim, dama lala ka Kirisita Yisa boori ni ti tumna.

english_verse: You have been trusted with a wonderful treasure. Guard it with the help of the Holy Spirit, who lives within us.
translation_verse: Naawunni Sii Kasi ŋɔn bɛ ti ni la pun zaŋŋi yɛlimaŋni bunsuŋŋu n‑niŋi i nuu ni; kur kpalimma n‑gura suŋŋasuŋŋa.

english_verse: You know that everyone in Asia has turned against me, especially Phygelus and Hermogenes.
translation_verse: I mi halli, ni, Faagyilusi ni Hɛmɔgyiniisi daa bakki ka kyɛ ma, ban ni ban bɛ Ɛseaa tingbaŋŋu zaa m‑paasi ba zugu.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord will be kind to the family of Onesiphorus. He often cheered me up and wasn't ashamed of me when I was put in jail.
translation_verse: Amaa n susiri ti Dugma Naawunni, ni, u zɔma Ɔneesifɔru ni u yiri dima namboo, dama u daa kur nyɛ la ŋɔn kpamsiri n sufu sahakam; ka vi bu mari u ban kpari ma dansarika duu wa zugu.

english_verse: Then after he arrived in Rome, he searched everywhere until he found me.
translation_verse: Halli ŋɔn daa paai Room na sahanseaa la, u daa bɔ n ziiya ni nimmoaa, halli nti nya ma.

english_verse: I pray that the Lord Jesus will ask God to show mercy to Onesiphorus on the day of judgment. You know how much he helped me in Ephesus.
translation_verse: Ti Dugma kyɛ ka u ti nya namboo ŋɔn ti Dugma saani Zaadaari maa! Ka nyin mun mi ŋɔn daa tum tunsunseesi Ɛfɛsusi n‑suŋŋi ma.

english_verse: Timothy, my child, you must let Christ Jesus make you strong by his gift of undeserved grace.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔ zugu m biiya, piinisuma m bɛ la Kirisita Yisa ni; kur kyɛ ka a kpamsi i, ni kpeeŋŋu zaa.

english_verse: You have often heard me teach. Now I want you to tell these same things to followers who can be trusted to tell others.
translation_verse: I pun wum Naawunni yɛttɔ'asuma man saani, ka niriba pam gba daa la'amni i saani n‑wumna. Tɔ: ka dinŋɔna zaŋŋma anŋɔ n‑wulisiri ninvugseeba ban zɛ yummu ka nyɛ ban gba nin toaai n‑zaŋŋi a n‑wulisiri ba taaba.

english_verse: As a good soldier of Christ Jesus you must endure your share of suffering.
translation_verse: Nyini n nyɛ Kirisita Yisa tɔbbiiya ka zɛ yummu; dizugu kur paasima ti zugu nti diri wahala.

english_verse: And farmers who work hard are the first to eat what grows in their field.
translation_verse: Ka pukpaara ŋɔn tumni suŋŋa nyɛ la ŋɔn sumni ni u daŋŋi n‑deaai bundiripaala maa seesi n‑di.

english_verse: If you keep in mind what I have told you, the Lord will help you understand completely.
translation_verse: Teesima man yɛtti i seem wa yɛla, dama ti Dugma nin kyɛ ka i baŋŋi seelikam zaa gbinni.

english_verse: Keep your mind on Jesus Christ! He was from the family of David and was raised from death, just as my good news says.
translation_verse: Teaama Yisa Masiiya yɛla#:- ni, u daa yi NaaDauda za'anɔri ni na, ka daa kpi n‑neaai kum ni. Lala ka n daa wulisi n‑ti i, n lahabasuŋŋu mooligu la yɛla ni.

english_verse: And because of this message, I am locked up in jail and treated like a criminal. But God's good news isn't locked in jail,
translation_verse: Lahabasuŋŋu wa zugu ka n diri wahala, ka ba ba ma bansi kaman tumbɛtumna n nyɛ ma la. Amaa sɔ ku toaai m‑ba Naawunni yɛligu bansi, halli beela!

english_verse: and so I am willing to put up with anything. Then God's special people will be saved and given eternal glory because they belong to Christ Jesus.
translation_verse: Dizugu ka n niŋni sugru, wahala yɛla zaa puuni. N niŋni lala ni n ti suŋŋi ninvugseeba Naawunni ŋɔn daa gamsi la, ni di kyɛ ka ba gba nin toaai n‑nya tuliginsim din bɛ Kirisita Yisa saani, ka mari gyirima din ku naai la.

english_verse: Here is a true message: “If we died with Christ, we will live with him.
translation_verse: Yɛttɔ'a wa nyɛ la yɛlimaŋni, ni#:- “Tin ni ŋɔna yi daa la'am n‑kpi, Ti nin ti la'am m‑bɛ ni yaasa.

english_verse: If we don't give up, we will rule with him. If we deny that we know him, he will deny that he knows us.
translation_verse: Ti yi kpalim n‑niŋni sugru, Tin ni ŋɔna nin ti la'am n‑di naam. Ti mun yi za'asi u, Ŋɔn gba nin za'asi ti.

english_verse: If we are not faithful, he will still be faithful. Christ cannot deny who he is.” An Approved Worker
translation_verse: Ti yi bu zɛ yummu, Ŋɔn kur zɛ la yummu, Dama u ku toaai n‑za'asi u mammaŋŋa.”

english_verse: Don't let anyone forget these things. And with God as your witness, you must warn them not to argue about words. These arguments don't help anyone. In fact, they ruin everyone who listens to them.
translation_verse: Tɔ'asima n‑tiri i niriba la, n‑teaari ba anŋɔ zaa yɛla. See ka i kpaam ba, Naawunni zugu, ni, ba zɔma n‑yi yɛttɔ'ayɔya ni. A ka bukyi; a laa n‑sa'amni la ninvugseeba ban wumni a maa.

english_verse: Do your best to win God's approval as a worker who doesn't need to be ashamed and who teaches only the true message.
translation_verse: Zaŋŋma i maŋŋa n‑ti Naawunni n‑wulisi, ni, i nyɛ la tuntumnisɔ ŋɔn ku di vi u tuma ni, ka tumni suŋŋa n‑wulisiri Naawunni yɛlimaŋni ŋɔn nyɛ seem.

english_verse: Keep away from worthless and useless talk. It only leads people farther away from God.
translation_verse: Zɔma ka kyɛ yɛttɔ'akyɔ'ama wa seesi an bu tiri Naawunni gyirima la. A nyɛ la an kyɛri ka niriba maali m‑burigri ka kyɛri Naawunni soori.

english_verse: That sort of talk is like a sore that won't heal. And Hymenaeus and Philetus have been talking this way
translation_verse: Niriba wa wulisigu maa ŋmanni la nɔriseaa kan diri n‑kpeeri ningbiŋŋu ni la. Ba seeba n‑nyɛ Haamɛneesi ni Filituusi,

english_verse: by teaching that the dead have already been raised to life. This is far from the truth, and it is destroying the faith of some people.
translation_verse: ban kyɛ yɛlimaŋni soori m‑burigi: ba yɛtti, ni, kpiimma kum ni neaari saha pun gaari. Lala ka ba niŋni n‑gbarigri seeba yɛdda.

english_verse: But the foundation God has laid is solid. On it is written, “The Lord knows who his people are. So everyone who worships the Lord must turn away from evil.”
translation_verse: Amaa Naawunni pun zaali nyeebri, ka ka zaani suŋŋa. Ba sɔbi yɛttɔ'asuma m‑pa ka zugu, ka a nyɛ daalimni: ni, “Ti Dugma mi u niriba ŋɔn nyɛ seeba.”, ni “Ŋɔnkam zaa yɛli, ni, u dɔli la ti Dugma, ŋɔn zɔma ka kyɛ tumbeeri.”

english_verse: In a large house some dishes are made of gold or silver, while others are made of wood or clay. Some of these are special, and others are not.
translation_verse: I bu nya? - Yirititaari puuni ka laasi balibubalibu bɛ ni: pa salima ni anzulifa buna kɔkɔa, amaa a seesi bɛ ni an nyɛ la ban zaŋŋi daari m‑maali, ka seesi mun nyɛ ban zaŋŋi ya'ari m‑mɛa. Aseesi ka ba mari n‑tumni gyirima tuma, ka mari seesi mun n‑tumni din pa gyirima tuma.

english_verse: This is also how it is with people. The ones who stop doing evil and make themselves pure will become special. Their lives will be holy and pleasing to their Master, and they will be able to do all kinds of good deeds.
translation_verse: Ka ninvugsɔ yi mari u sufu kasi, ka yi man pun yɛli bumpoosiseesi zaa yɛla ni, dinŋɔna u nin leebi hoo laseaa kan mari gyirima, ka maali siri ni ka tum tunsuma. Kana n veela, ka ka yiridaana nin zaŋŋni ka n‑tumni u tuma.

english_verse: Run from temptations that capture young people. Always do the right thing. Be faithful, loving, and easy to get along with. Worship with people whose hearts are pure.
translation_verse: Dizugu gbaam i maŋŋa ni na'akyimbisi kɔribeeri tuma; ka kpaŋŋi i maŋŋa n‑dɔli yɛlimaŋni soori, ni yɛdda, ni wurilim, ni sufudoaa. Ka lala nin kyɛ ka i paasi ban dɔli ti Dugma ka ba sufu ka da'ari la zugu.

english_verse: and God's servants must not be troublemakers. They must be kind to everyone, and they must be good teachers and very patient.
translation_verse: Ka ti Dugma tuntumna mun bu sum ni u ŋmeeri nangbankpeemni. Di laa n‑sumni ni u mari nirilim zaŋŋi kyaŋŋi sɔkam zaa saani, ka mi wulisigu suŋŋa, ka nyɛ la ŋɔn diri sugru halli bumbeeri puuni gba.

english_verse: Be humble when you correct people who oppose you. Maybe God will lead them to turn to him and learn the truth.
translation_verse: Di laa n‑sumni ni u bɛ la baalimm n‑wulisiri ban ŋmeeri nangbankpeemni, ni, ba ti baŋŋi din tuusi. Dama di pa seelli ka Naawunni ti kyɛ ka ba takki ba teesibeeri ni ba ala'akyi soori nti baŋŋi yɛlimaŋni ŋɔn nyɛ seelli.

english_verse: They have been trapped by the devil, and he makes them obey him, but God may help them escape.
translation_verse: Sintaani daa pun bɛri u kyɛ'ariga n‑gbaai ba, ka kyɛ ka ba tum u sufu yuubu zaa; amaa di yi pa seem Naawunni nin ti kyɛ ka ba labi n‑teesiri teesisuma yaasa.

english_verse: You can be certain that in the last days there will be some very hard times.
translation_verse: M biiya, kur baŋŋma, ni, duniya wa yi ti ya naai sahanseaa, wahala ni sufusa'aŋŋu pam nin bɛ duniya wa ni.

english_verse: People will love only themselves and money. They will be proud, stuck-up, rude, and disobedient to their parents. They will also be ungrateful, godless,
translation_verse: Niriba nin ti mari beem, ka wuri ligri n‑gaari ninsaalidima. Ba nin nyuuri bara n‑duusiri ba mansi ka tuuri Naawunni ni niriba. Biisi nin ti za'asi ba badima ni ba madima yɛligu ka ba bu ya puusi ban tum tunsuma n‑ti ba. Ba nin za'asi Naawunni beesikasi yɛla.

english_verse: heartless, and hateful. Their words will be cruel, and they will have no self-control or pity. These people will hate everything good.
translation_verse: Ba bu ti ya boori taaba, bee, n‑kyɛ taaba taalli m‑pɛŋŋni. Ba nin zuuri niriba nyaaŋŋa, amaa ka ku mari ba mansi. Ba nin tumni taaba putoo gba. Ba ku laa m‑boori bunsuma halli beela.

english_verse: They will be sneaky, reckless, and puffed up with pride. Instead of loving God, they will love pleasure.
