translation_verse: Yarima gba ka ba daa sɔbi ya yɛla, ni, ‘zuliyaseaa ban yiisi maa, naam gyeeŋŋu toondaandima, Naawunni niriba butiri, ban daa yiisi ninvugseeba n‑zaali kpaŋŋa n‑ti Naawunni ni ba ti mooli Naawunni gyirima yɛla’ - dama ŋɔn Naawunni daa booli ya n‑yiisi ya zibsim ni, ni ya ti kpɛ u alahazibu neesim ni la.

english_verse: “Once you were nobody. Now you are God's people. At one time no one had mercy on you. Now God has treated you with kindness.” Live as God's Servants Should
translation_verse: Ya yɛla gba ka u daa tɔ'asi, ni#:- “Sahanseaa sa la ya daa pa u niriba, Amaa pampaŋŋɔ ya yi nyɛ la Naawunni niriba. Sahanseaa sa maa Naawunni sugru daa ka ya ni, Amaa pampaŋŋɔ u sugru maa paai ya na.”

english_verse: Dear friends, you are foreigners and strangers on this earth. So I beg you not to surrender to those desires that fight against you.
translation_verse: N kpaamni ya ni, m mabiisi, dama ya kur nyɛ la saamma m‑bɛ ya kyɛnni ni, duniya wa puuni, ni, ya gbaam ya mansi ka kyɛ ningbina kɔri kan zabri n‑sa'amni ya siiya yɛla.

english_verse: Always let others see you behaving properly, even though they may still accuse you of doing wrong. Then on the day of judgment, they will honor God by telling the good things they saw you do.
translation_verse: Ka bɛ beesisuŋŋu ban bu dɔli Naawunni maa saani. Ka halli ba yi daŋŋi n‑tuuri ya m‑boonni ya, ni, ninvugbeeri, lala nin kyɛ ka ba nin laa n‑nya ya tunsuma ka mari pɛ'abu n‑tiri Naawunni, u kyɛnni na dabsiri daari maa.

english_verse: The Lord wants you to obey all human authorities, especially the Emperor, who rules over everyone.
translation_verse: Ya zaŋŋma ya mansi n‑sakki n‑ti fukumsi yiiko kam zaa an bɛ saalidima saani, ti Dugma maa zugu. Di yi nyɛ la Naaba,

english_verse: You must also obey governors, because they are sent by the Emperor to punish criminals and to praise good citizens.
translation_verse: bee, u tuumuseeba ŋɔn daa tum ni ba darigi ban niŋi taalli la tuba ka pɛ'ai ban niŋi suŋŋa maa.

english_verse: You are free, but still you are God's servants, and you must not use your freedom as an excuse for doing wrong.
translation_verse: Ya bɛ ni hoo ban su ba maŋŋa la, amaa yan di zaŋŋi ya mansuulinsi maa n‑ligi ya mansi ka tumni tumbeeri. Kur kyɛ ka ya bɛ ni hoo Naawunni tuntumniba.

english_verse: Respect everyone and show special love for God's people. Honor God and respect the Emperor. The Example of Christ's Suffering
translation_verse: Ya tim sɔkam gyirima hoo din sum ni u seem. Ya yɛddaniŋniba maa - ya wuri taaba; ya zɔm Naawunni; ya gyeemni NaaTitaari maa.

english_verse: Servants, you must obey your masters and always show respect to them. Do this, not only to those who are kind and thoughtful, but also to those who are cruel.
translation_verse: Ya seeba ban nyɛ daaba, ya zaŋŋma ya mansi n‑wumni n‑tiri ya dugudima ni gyirima, pa la ban niŋni ya suŋŋa la kɔkɔa, amaa halli ban mari ya ni putoo la gba.

english_verse: God will bless you, even if others treat you unfairly for being loyal to him.
translation_verse: Dama di mari la pɛ'abu, ninsaala yi bu tum taalli ka deaai putoo tubdarigri ni sugru, ŋɔn mi Naawunni zugu.

english_verse: You don't gain anything by being punished for some wrong you have done. But God will bless you, if you have to suffer for doing something good.
translation_verse: Ya bu nya? - ya yi tum taalli ka ba bu ya di zugu, ya yi deaai di ni sugru, ba nin pɛ'ai ya di zugu, bee? - Ay, pa lala! Amaa ya yi nya namsigu ya tunsuma zugu ka deaai di ni sugru, dina m mari pɛ'abu Naawunni saani.

english_verse: After all, God chose you to suffer as you follow in the footsteps of Christ, who set an example by suffering for you.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔ zugu ka ba daa booli ya, dama Kirisita daa nya namsigu ya zugu, ka lala u daa kyɛ n‑zaali n‑wulisiri, ni, ya gba dɔli u soori maa.

english_verse: Christ did not sin or ever tell a lie.
translation_verse: Ni#:- “Ŋɔna daa bu niŋi taaliseaa, Ka ziri bee yɔmsa mun daa zi n‑yi u noori ni na.”

english_verse: Although he was abused, he never tried to get even. And when he suffered, he made no threats. Instead, he had faith in God, who judges fairly.
translation_verse: Ban daa tu u maa, u daa bu tu n‑labsi; ban daa namsi u la, u daa bu vɔlisi sɔa. Amaa u daa zaŋŋi u maŋŋa n‑ti la Ŋɔn katti sariya ni yɛlimaŋni maa.

english_verse: Christ carried the burden of our sins. He was nailed to the cross, so we would stop sinning and start living right. By his cuts and bruises you are healed.
translation_verse: U daa deaai ti tumbeeri taalli n‑niŋi u saani u kum dɔpulli maa zugu; ni di ti kyɛ ka ti kpi zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ala'akyi ni, ka laa n‑doaai na nti bɛ yɛlimaŋni soori ni. U dansi maa zugu kyɛ ka ti nya alaafɛa.

english_verse: You had wandered away like sheep. Now you have returned to the one who is your shepherd and protector.
translation_verse: Ya daa ŋmanni la hoo peesi ban bɔrigi; amaa pampaŋŋɔ ya labi ya pɛgura saani na, pɛgurisɔ ŋɔn guri ya nyɔvuya suŋŋa.

english_verse: If you are a wife, you must put your husband first. Even if he opposes our message, you will win him over by what you do. No one else will have to say anything to him,
translation_verse: Ya pɔ'aba, di bɛ la lala maa taabu ya saani gba: ya wumma n‑ti ya siridima. Ka di yi nyɛ la ba sɔ m bu niŋi Naawunni yɛligu maa yɛdda, u pɔ'a beesigu nin kyɛ ka u niŋi tuuba ka di nin nyɛ la ya beesisuŋŋu zugu, amaa pa la ya yɛttɔ'a zugu.

english_verse: because he will see how you honor God and live a pure life.
translation_verse: Dama ba nin nya ya beesisuŋŋu, ni, ya dɔli la sɔseesi an mari gyirima ni veelim n‑tiri ba.

english_verse: Don't depend on things like fancy hairdos or gold jewelry or expensive clothes to make you look beautiful.
translation_verse: Yan di kyɛ ka ya veelim yiiri la ya sutura bɔbri ni, hoo zugu paaŋŋu bee salima bansi ni nangɔkɔrisi ni kyinkyinveela soobu;

english_verse: Be beautiful in your heart by being gentle and quiet. This kind of beauty will last, and God considers it very special.
translation_verse: amaa di sum ni di nyɛ la ya sufu ni beesigu bunsɔ'ara zugu, ka ya kpalim n‑sigsiri ya maŋŋa baalimm. Lala sufuveelli maa ku toaai n‑sa'am, ka nyɛ la din mari gyirima Naawunni saani.

english_verse: Long ago those women who worshiped God and put their hope in him made themselves beautiful by putting their husbands first.
translation_verse: Dama lala taabu ka pɔ'aseeba daa bɛ ni, sahanseaa din gaari la. Ba daa nyɛ kasi ka zaŋŋi ba tama n‑niŋi Naawunni ni, ka daa kpalim m‑bɛ lala n‑wulisiri ba veelim ŋɔn daa nyɛ seem. Ba daa wumni n‑tiri ba toori siridima.

english_verse: For example, Sarah obeyed Abraham and called him her master. You are her true children, if you do right and don't let anything frighten you.
translation_verse: Hoo Zaraatu ŋɔn daa wum n‑ti Ibrahim, ka boonni u ‘n daana’ la seem. Ya nin leebi la u bipunsi, ya yi ti tum din sumsi seem ka di kyɛ ka dabeem mari ya.

english_verse: If you are a husband, you should be thoughtful of your wife. Treat her with honor, because she isn't as strong as you are, and she shares with you in the gift of life. Then nothing will stand in the way of your prayers. Suffering for Doing Right
translation_verse: Ya pɔ'a daandima, see ka ya gba bɛ lala maa taabu: ya teesim pam zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi yan ni ya pɔ'aba beesigu ziiya. Ya niŋni ba hoo ya suŋŋniba ban yaa bu paai, amaa ka yan ni ban nin la'am n‑di nyɔvuri hoo ya faari - di nyɛ la Naawunni piini zaa - Ŋɔn tiri ya bunseaa u wurilim zugu. Ka lala nin kyɛ ka seelli ku ta'ai ya wunsusigu.

english_verse: Finally, all of you should agree and have concern and love for each other. You should also be kind and humble.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔ zaa nyaaŋŋa, ya zaa la'am m‑bɛ ni taaba suŋŋa. Ya zɔm taaba namboo. Ya wuri taaba hoo mabiitiri. Ya mari namboo ni taaba ka di duusiri ya mansi.

english_verse: Don't be hateful and insult people just because they are hateful and insult you. Instead, treat everyone with kindness. You are God's chosen ones, and he will bless you. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Yan di zaŋŋi beeri n‑yɔ beeri, bee, tuuri n‑labsi tuuri; amaa kyɛ ka ya labsigu nyɛ la: ya susi bunsuma n‑tiri ba. Dama dinŋɔ zugu ka ba daa booli ya, ni ya ti di Naawunni bunsuma maa faari.

english_verse: “Do you really love life? Do you want to be happy? Then stop saying cruel things and quit telling lies.
translation_verse: Dama di sɔbi n‑dooli, ni#:- “Sɔkam ŋɔn nin wuri duniya wa beesigu Ni u ti nya dabsisuma - Di sumni u gbaai la u zilimni ka kyɛ yɛttɔ'abeoo, Ka u noori mun di mi ziri yɛla.

english_verse: Give up your evil ways and do right, as you find and follow the road to peace.
translation_verse: U yim tumbeeri ni Ka tumni la tunveela; U boom beesisuŋŋu n‑dɔli ka.

english_verse: The Lord watches over everyone who obeys him, and he listens to their prayers. But he opposes everyone who does evil.”
translation_verse: Dama Naawunni nini gɔsiri la yɛlimaŋni dima yɛla, Ka u tuba wumni la ba wunsusigu. Amaa u nindaa ŋmaligi ni Ka kyɛ u kpaari m‑basi tumbeeri dima la.”

english_verse: Can anyone really harm you for being eager to do good deeds?
translation_verse: Ya nini yi moaai tunsuma tumpu ni, ŋɔni nin daam ya?

english_verse: Even if you have to suffer for doing good things, God will bless you. So stop being afraid and don't worry about what people might do.
translation_verse: Halli ya yi ti nya wahala ya tunsuma maa zugu, ya mari la zugsuŋŋu. Ni, “Ya di zɔ dabeem zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ban ŋɔn zɔri bunseesi la zugu; di kyɛ ka ba kpeesi ya dabeem.”

english_verse: Honor Christ and let him be the Lord of your life. Always be ready to give an answer when someone asks you about your hope.
translation_verse: Ya sufu ni teesa puuni ya tim Kirisita gyirima hoo ya Dugma. Sɔkam yi ti boosi ya zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi yan mari tama seem maa, ya kyɛ ka ya pun sɛ'asi ni ya labsi n‑wulisi lala nira di gbinni ŋɔn nyɛ seem.

english_verse: Give a kind and respectful answer and keep your conscience clear. This way you will make people ashamed for saying bad things about your good conduct as a follower of Christ.
translation_verse: Amaa ya tɔ'asim yɛttɔ'anya'asa n‑ti u baalimm, ka ti u gyirima. Ka di kyɛ ka ya tum taalli ka ya sufu daamni ya; lala nin kyɛ ka ninvugseeba ban zaŋŋi ya Kirisita puuni beesisuŋŋu n‑galimni ya la nin ti di vi dizugu.

english_verse: You are better off to obey God and suffer for doing right than to suffer for doing wrong.
translation_verse: Ya yi ti tum tunsuma ka ba namsi ya dizugu, Naawunni yuubu yi ti zaali ya lala, di sɔ ni ya tum tumbeeri ka nya namsigu dizugu.

english_verse: Christ died once for our sins. An innocent person died for those who are guilty. Christ did this to bring you to God, when his body was put to death and his spirit was made alive.
translation_verse: Ya bu nya? Kirisita daa kpi yimmu ti tumbeeri zugu, ka a yɛla naai; ŋɔna yɛlimaŋni zaa daana daa kpi tirim halibeoo dima zugu, ni u ti zaŋŋi ti n‑taasi Naawunni saani. Ba daa ku u ningbiŋŋu, amaa u siiya daa doaai n‑na vu.

english_verse: Christ then preached to the spirits that were being kept in prison.
translation_verse: Ka lala ka u daa kyaŋŋi nti mooli yɛligu n‑ti ninvugseeba ban kpari dansarika ni la siisi.

english_verse: They had disobeyed God while Noah was building the boat, but God had been patient with them. Eight people went into that boat and were brought safely through the flood.
translation_verse: Ban n nyɛ seeba ban daa za'asi Naawunni noori sahanseaa din gaari la, Nuhu saha maa; halli ni Naawunni daa di sugru n‑yuui, Nuhu ŋɔn daa maanni nyarintitaari maa dahinseesi la. Ka lala nyariŋŋu puuni ka niriba beela kɔkɔa - di nyɛ la babanii - daa nya fa m‑basi, ka koom maa daa bu di ba.

english_verse: Those flood waters were like baptism that now saves you. But baptism is more than just washing your body. It means turning to God with a clear conscience, because Jesus Christ was raised from death.
translation_verse: Tɔ, ka lala koom wulisi ya ya Naawunni kɔsuubu yɛla, din fa ya m‑basi seem. Di pa la ya su koom m‑peaai ya ningbina da'ari m‑basi, amaa ya ŋmaligi Naawunni saani ni u ti peaai ya sufu ni taalli m‑basi. Ka u niŋi lala Yisa Kirisita kum yisigri zugu.

english_verse: Christ is now in heaven, where he sits at the right side of God. All angels, authorities, and powers are under his control.
translation_verse: Ŋɔn Yisa daa pun paai arizana ni nti bɛ Naawunni nudirigu ziiya, ka u su malaakadima fukumsi, ni naama ni kpamni zaa dinni m‑paasi.

english_verse: Christ suffered here on earth. Now you must be ready to suffer as he did, because suffering shows that you have stopped sinning.
translation_verse: Ti sakkiya, ni, Yisa Kirisita daa namsiya pam, ŋɔn daa bɛ ni hoo ninsaala sahaseaa la: dinŋɔna ya gba sɛ'asim ya mansi n‑di namsigu; dama ŋɔnkam sakki n‑ti ningbiŋŋu namsigu pun yiisi u maŋŋa tumbeeri yɛla ni.

english_verse: It means you have turned from your own desires and want to obey God for the rest of your life.
translation_verse: Lala nin kyɛ ka u tumni Naawunni yuubu halli ni u nyɔvuri naari saha, ka pa la ningbiŋŋu kɔrisi tuma.

english_verse: You have already lived long enough like people who don't know God. You were immoral and followed your evil desires. You went around drinking and partying and carrying on. In fact, you even worshiped disgusting idols.
translation_verse: Ya daa yuui pam, dabsa an gaari la, ka ya beesigu daa ŋmani la hoo ban bu mi Naawunni beesigu la, m‑bɛ ni ya yuubu zugu, m‑mari ningbiŋŋu kɔribeeri, n‑nyuuri daam, n‑deemni deenyɔya, ka gyeemni ba'ayuya an bu dɔli soori.

english_verse: Now your former friends wonder why you have stopped running around with them, and they curse you for it.
translation_verse: Di yi niŋi ba alahazibu pam, yan bu laa n‑la'amni ba saani m‑bɛ ban bɛ beesiseaa ni maa, kan nyɛ bumbeoo zaa maa zugu; ka ba tuuri ya di zugu.

english_verse: The good news has even been preached to the dead, so that after they have been judged for what they have done in this life, their spirits will live with God.
translation_verse: Lala zugu ka ba daa yiisi lahabasuŋŋu wa'azu n‑ti ninvugseeba ban pun kpi la gba. Ban daa bɛ ninsaalidima beebu sahanseaa la, ba daa kari ba sɔkam duniya wa ni sariya maa, di nyɛ la kum sariya. Amaa Sii Kasi yiiko zugu ba nin ti bɛ nyɔvuri ni Naawunni saani.

english_verse: Everything will soon come to an end. So be serious and be sensible enough to pray.
translation_verse: Bunseelli kam zaa naari ni maa, dizugu ya mari ya mansi n‑guri suŋŋa, ka susiri Naawunni.

english_verse: Most important of all, you must sincerely love each other, because love wipes away many sins.
translation_verse: Din gaari a zaa nyɛ la, ya zaŋŋma ya sufu zaa n‑wuri taaba ni yɛlimaŋni, dama wurilim sɔ'ai la tumbeeri pam taalli.

english_verse: Welcome people into your home and don't grumble about it.
translation_verse: Ya deaam taaba ya yiya ni hoo saamma, ka di fabli di zugu m‑mɔŋŋi taaba.

english_verse: Each of you has been blessed with one of God's many wonderful gifts to be used in the service of others. So use your gift well.
translation_verse: Dama Naawunni ŋɔn zaŋŋi piiniseesi n‑ti ya la, ya sɔkam zaŋŋma ŋɔn deaai piiniseaa n‑tumni n‑suŋŋi u taaba - hoo yiri dima ŋɔn suŋŋni taaba n‑tumni ba yiri tuma zaa seem.

english_verse: If you have the gift of speaking, preach God's message. If you have the gift of helping others, do it with the strength that God supplies. Everything should be done in a way that will bring honor to God because of Jesus Christ, who is glorious and powerful forever. Amen. Suffering for Being a Christian
translation_verse: Dinŋɔna ŋɔn tɔ'asiri yɛttɔ'a, ŋɔn tɔ'asim Naawunni ŋɔn zaŋŋi yɛttɔ'aseesi n‑ti u la; ka ŋɔn tumni n‑suŋŋni niriba, ŋɔn zaŋŋma yaseaa Naawunni ŋɔn zaŋŋi n‑ti u la n‑tumna. Lala zugu ka Naawunni nin nya pɛ'abu Yisa Kirisita zugu, dama ŋɔn Yisa nyɛ yiiko daana ni gyirima daana, n‑su a ni, halli ni saha din ka naari. Ammi.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't be surprised or shocked that you are going through testing that is like walking through fire.
translation_verse: M mabiwutta, ya yi nyari wahala hoo bugum ŋɔn vuuli ŋɔn paari ya seem la, yan di teesiri, ni, din na zi n‑niŋi sɔ n niŋi ya maa.

english_verse: Be glad for the chance to suffer as Christ suffered. It will prepare you for even greater happiness when he makes his glorious return.
translation_verse: Amaa ya mari sufupeelli, yan ni Masiiya maa ŋɔn la'am n‑namsi la zugu, dama ya nin mari sufumaasim pam sahanseaa u gyirima ŋɔn ti yi paalu na la.

english_verse: Count it a blessing when you suffer for being a Christian. This shows that God's glorious Spirit is with you.
translation_verse: Ba yi galim ya ka tuuri ya Kirisita yuuri zugu, ya mari la zugsuŋŋu, dama Naawunni Sii Kasi ni u gyirima bɛ ya ni.

english_verse: But you deserve to suffer if you are a murderer, a thief, a crook, or a busybody.
translation_verse: Tɔ; amaa ya sɔ di leebi ŋɔn kuuri niriba, bee n‑zuura, bee n‑tumni tumbeeri zaa, halli yan di kpeeri niriba yɛla ni gba, ka nya namsigu lala taalli zugu.

english_verse: Don't be ashamed to suffer for being a Christian. Praise God that you belong to him.
translation_verse: Amaa nira yi nya namsigu ŋɔn nyɛ Kirisita dinni zugu, ŋɔn di kyɛ ka vi mari u, amaa ŋɔn pɛ'am Naawunni ba n zaŋŋi Kirisita yuuri m‑boonni u la zugu.

english_verse: God has already begun judging his own people. And if his judgment begins with us, imagine how terrible it will be for those who refuse to obey his message. The Scriptures say,
translation_verse: Saha paaya ni sariya karibu piili. Naawunni niriba mun ya daŋŋi tooni sariya maa ni: tɔ - ka di yi piili ti saani, wula ka di ti ya n‑naai ban bu sakki n‑wum Naawunni yɛligu lahabasuŋŋu la saani?

english_verse: “If good people barely escape, what will happen to sinners and to others who don't respect God?”
translation_verse: Di sɔbi n‑dooli, ni#:- “Di yi tɔa, ni ban dɔli Naawunni la n‑nya tiliginsim: Tɔ, ka ban za'asi u yɛla, ni ala'akyi dima muna - Di ya n‑niŋi ba la wula?”

english_verse: If you suffer for obeying God, you must have complete faith in your faithful Creator and keep on doing right.
translation_verse: Dinzugu ninvugseeba ban nyari namsigu Naawunni yuubu la zugu. Tɔ - di sumni ni ba kur tumni din tuusi ka zaŋŋi ba nyɔvuri n‑niŋi ba Naamna nuusi ni, Sɔ ŋɔn kur zɛ u nangbambasiri nyaaŋŋa la.

english_verse: Church leaders, I am writing to encourage you. I too am a leader, as well as a witness to Christ's suffering, and I will share in his glory when it is shown to us.
translation_verse: N tɔ'asiri n‑tiri yaseeba ban nyɛ kpamma Yisa nyaandɔliba la'aŋŋu puuni, dama man gba nyɛ la kpeema. N nini daa nya Yisa ŋɔn daa namsi seem, ka u gyirima maa yi ti yi paalu ni sahanseaa, man nin mari n tɔrli.

english_verse: Just as shepherds watch over their sheep, you must watch over everyone God has placed in your care. Do it willingly in order to please God, and not simply because you think you must. Let it be something you want to do, instead of something you do merely to make money.
translation_verse: Ya niŋi hoo bunkɔbguriba n‑guri Naawunni peesi n‑ti u: ba bɛ la ya saani, dizugu see ka ya guri ba suŋŋa hoo Naawunni ŋɔn boori seem, pa la sɔ ŋɔn mugsi ya zugu amaa ya sufu yuubu. Ya tumma ya tuma suŋŋa, pa la ligri boobu zugu, amaa ya maŋŋa ŋɔn boori nimmoosi ka ya tumni zugu.

english_verse: Don't be bossy to those people who are in your care, but set an example for them.
translation_verse: Yan di leebi ban diisi ya mansi nadima n‑su ba fukumsi, amaa ya kyɛ ka ya beebu maa nyɛ bunveelli, ka ba nin nya ka dɔla.

english_verse: Then when Christ the Chief Shepherd returns, you will be given a crown that will never lose its glory.
translation_verse: Ka Bunkɔbgura Zuguraana maa yi ti yi paalu na, u nin zaŋŋi ban nyaŋŋi la laara piini n‑ti ya, ka a ku baasi sahakam.

english_verse: All of you young people should obey your elders. In fact, everyone should be humble toward everyone else. The Scriptures say, “God opposes proud people, but he helps everyone who is humble.”
translation_verse: Ya na'akyimbisi la, ya sakkma n‑tisi ban gaari ya la. Ya zaa kyɛ ka mansigsigu bɛ ya saani, ka tumni n‑tiri taaba, dama Litaafi ni ka di yɛli#:- “Naawunni za'asiri karimbaani dima, Ka u tumni la wurilim n‑suŋŋni ban sigsi ba mansi.”

english_verse: Be humble in the presence of God's mighty power, and he will honor you when the time comes.
translation_verse: Lala zugu ya sigsim ya mansi Naawunni Yiikodaana tooni, ka u nin ti duusi ya u toori sahasuŋŋu.

english_verse: God cares for you, so turn all your worries over to him.
translation_verse: Ya zaŋŋma ya yɛla zaa n‑niŋi u nuu ni, dama u ba'a zaa bɛ la ya yɛla ni.

english_verse: Be on your guard and stay awake. Your enemy, the devil, is like a roaring lion, sneaking around to find someone to attack.
translation_verse: Ya gbaam ya mansi suŋŋa sahakam, dama Sintaani ŋɔn nyɛ ya dindaana maa kur goori hoo gbigimni la n‑kaasiri m‑boori sɔ ni u gbaai n‑ŋɔbi.

english_verse: But you must resist the devil and stay strong in your faith. You know that all over the world the Lord's followers are suffering just as you are.
translation_verse: Ya za'asim u yɛla, ka zɛ yimmu ya yɛdda maa puuni. Ya mi halli, ni, di nyɛ la lala n‑ti ya nyaandɔlitaaba maa, duniya wa ni lugri kam zaa.

english_verse: But God shows undeserved kindness to everyone. That's why he appointed Christ Jesus to choose you to share in his eternal glory. You will suffer for a while, but God will make you complete, steady, strong, and firm.
translation_verse: Ka ya yi sakki n‑namsi beela, ti Dugma Naawunni nin mari ya suŋŋa n‑ti ya yaa, ka seelli ku daam ya. Ŋɔn Naawunni n nyɛ sɔ ŋɔn tiri piinisuma zaa maa, ka u daa booli ya ni ya laa n‑di u nya'asim din ku naai, Yisa Kirisita zugu.

english_verse: God will be in control forever! Amen. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Yiiko zaa nyɛ la u dinni sahakam, sahakam. Ammi.

english_verse: Silvanus helped me write this short letter, and I consider him a faithful follower of the Lord. I wanted to encourage you and tell you how kind God really is, so you will keep on having faith in him.
translation_verse: Mani n sɔbi gbambila wa n‑zaŋŋni n‑tiri Sailivanisi ni u mari na n‑ti ya. U nyɛ la m mabiiya, ka n niŋi u yɛdda. N sɔbi ka, ni n ti suŋŋi ya ka kpamsi ya, ka kyɛ ka ya baŋŋi, ni, Naawunni wurilim yɛla siri bɛ la lala, ka ana n nyɛ an nin kyɛ ka ya zɛ yummu.

english_verse: Greetings from the Lord's followers in Babylon. They are God's chosen ones. Mark, who is like a son to me, sends his greetings too.
translation_verse: Yisa nyaandɔliseeba ban la'amni la tiŋŋa wa puuni, ni, ‘Babɛlɔn’ la, - ba zaa puusiri ya: m bii Maaki gba puusiri ya.

english_verse: Give each other a warm greeting. I pray that God will give peace to everyone who belongs to Christ.
translation_verse: Ya puusima taaba suŋŋasuŋŋa, ti wurilim puusigu ni. Sufudoaa ni alaafɛ bɛ ya saani, ya zaa ban bɛ Yisa puuni.

english_verse: From Simon Peter, a servant and an apostle of Jesus Christ. To everyone who shares with us in the privilege of believing that our God and Savior Jesus Christ will do what is just and fair.
translation_verse: Mani Saimoon Piita, Yisa Kirisita Masiiya tuumu, ni u daabri - mani n sɔbri n‑tiri ya. Yarima ka Naawunni Yɛlimaŋni Daana ni ti Tiligra Yisa Kirisita, daa kyɛ ka ya nya soori ni ya niŋi yɛdda - yɛdda tibsiri din ŋmanni ti dinni wa.

english_verse: I pray that God will be kind to you and will let you live in perfect peace! May you keep learning more and more about God and our Lord Jesus. Living as the Lord's Followers
translation_verse: Naawunni wurilim piini ni u sufudoaa bɛ ya saani, n‑kyɛ ka ya mi ti Dugma Naawunni ni ti Dugma Yisa Masiiya yɛla wa, halli zaa.

english_verse: We have everything we need to live a life that pleases God. It was all given to us by God's own power, when we learned he had invited us to share in his wonderful goodness.
translation_verse: Ŋɔn Naawunni yiiko tiri ti tin boori seelli zaa zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ti beesigu ni ti gyeeŋŋu yɛla. Dama ti baŋŋi u, ni, u booli ti ni ti ti paai u maŋtoori gyirima ni u veelim saani na.

english_verse: God made great and marvelous promises, so his nature would become part of us. Then we could escape our evil desires and the corrupt influences of this world.
translation_verse: Ka dizugu ka ti deaai u nangbambasiri la an galisi ka tibsa zaa. Anŋɔ zugu ka ya mari tɔrli u beesigu la ni, ka ya za'asi duniya wa kɔribeeri ni Sintaani yɔmsa an mari sa'aŋŋu la.

english_verse: If you keep growing in this way, it will show that what you know about our Lord Jesus Christ has made your lives useful and meaningful.
translation_verse: Ya yi mari anŋɔ zaa ka a yi bɛ ya saani n‑zoaai, ya ku zi yɔri n‑ka bukaata; ya nin mi ti Dugma Yisa Kirisita ni yɛlimaŋni.

english_verse: But if you don't grow, you are like someone who is nearsighted or blind, and you have forgotten that your past sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: Ŋɔnkam zaa bu mi anŋɔa, u nyɛ la zooma ka u nini bu neaai suŋŋa; ka u laa n‑tam, ni, u daa su koom n‑yi kasi u tumbɛseesi ŋɔn daa pun tum la puuni.

english_verse: My friends, you must do all you can to show God has really chosen and selected you. If you keep on doing this, you won't stumble and fall.
translation_verse: Lala zugu, m mabiisi, ya kpaŋŋma ya mansi sahakam zaa n‑sakkri ti Dugma Naawunni booligu, dama ŋɔna n yiisi ya. Ya kyɛ ka u yɛla zɛ suŋŋa ya saani. Ya yi niŋi lala ya ku laa n‑labi nyaaŋŋa.

english_verse: Then our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ will give you a glorious welcome into his kingdom that will last forever.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔ nin kyɛ ka ya nin nya soori n‑kpɛ Naawunni yiri naam maa ni, Yisa Kirisita ŋɔn nyɛ ti Dugma ni ti Tiligra zugu. Ka u mun naam ka naari.

english_verse: You are holding firmly to the truth you were given. But I am still going to remind you of these things.
translation_verse: Lala zugu man na kpalim n‑teaari ya anŋɔ yɛla - halli ni ya mun pun mi a ni, ka kpalim n‑zɛ yummu n‑kpamsi yɛlimaŋni zugu, yɛlimaŋni seaa yan mari pampaŋŋɔ la.

english_verse: In fact, I think I should keep on reminding you until I leave this body.
translation_verse: N teesiya, ni, di tuya, ni, sahanseaa man ŋɔn na kpalim m‑bɛ n nyɔvuri ni la, ka bɛ n ningbiŋŋu wa puuni, n nin kpalim n‑teaari ya sahakam zaa.

english_verse: And our Lord Jesus Christ has already told me that I will soon leave it behind.
translation_verse: M mi halli, ni, di ku yuui ka n nin ti ka ni, hoo ti Dugma Yisa Masiiya ŋɔn wulisi ma seem la.

english_verse: This is why I am doing my best to make sure that each of you remembers all of this after I am gone. The Message about the Glory of Christ
translation_verse: Amaa n nin kpaŋŋi m maŋŋa n‑kyɛ ka ya na kur nin nyari teaari zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi yɛla wa ni - halli n yi ti laa n‑ka ni.

english_verse: When we told you about the power and the return of our Lord Jesus Christ, we were not telling clever stories someone had made up. But with our own eyes we saw his true greatness.
translation_verse: Ya bu nya? - Ti daa bu dɔli sɔlinseesi ninsaala ŋɔn zaŋŋi u putɔyam n‑tɔ'asi, ni a ti yɔmsi niriba. Ay! Ti daa yɛli ya yɛlimaŋni lahabaari zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ti Dugma Yisa Masiiya yiiko, ni u lappu na yɛla. U gyirima yɛla ka ti nini daa nya, ka ti mammansi diri la a zaa sɛhara.

english_verse: God, our great and wonderful Father, truly honored him by saying, “This is my own dear Son, and I am pleased with him.”
translation_verse: Dama u daa deaai gyirima, ni naam tibsim, ti Ba Naawunni saani; kukɔri la ŋɔn daa yi Naawunni Yiiko Daana saani m‑paai ti na n‑yɛli, ni, “M Bii nŋɔa; n wuri u ni. N nini n tigi u pam.”

english_verse: We were there with Jesus on the holy mountain and heard this voice speak from heaven.
translation_verse: Ka lala kukɔri daa yi sangbana ni na ka tirima mammaŋŋa daa wum ka, tin ni ŋɔna n daa la'am m‑bɛ Naawunni zoori zugu la.

english_verse: All of this makes us even more certain that what the prophets said is true. So you should pay close attention to their message, as you would to a lamp shining in some dark place. You must keep on paying attention until daylight comes and the morning star rises in your hearts.
translation_verse: Lala ka ti nin toaai m‑paasi ti yɛdda niŋbu zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi anabidima yɛttɔ'a maa yɛlimaŋni la. Dizugu ya nin kpaŋŋi ya mansi ka wum n‑ti ba yɛla - hoo yan yi nya neesim ŋɔn yi neaai zibsim ni seem la, halli ka beoo ti neaai ka bɛŋmariga maa ŋɔn ya pusi n‑neaari ya sufu ni la.

english_verse: But you need to realize that no one alone can understand any of the prophecies in the Scriptures.
translation_verse: See ka ya daŋŋi m‑baŋŋi dinŋɔa: Litaafi yɛttɔ'azaala gbinni bamsim pa la ninvugyinni kɔkɔ yɛttɔ'a - sɔ ku toaai n‑su a.

english_verse: The prophets did not think these things up on their own, but they were guided by the Spirit of God.
translation_verse: Dama anabi sɔsɔ bu zaŋŋi u maŋtoori sufu yuubu n‑yiisiri u yɛttɔ'azaala maa na; Naawunni saani ka ninsaalidima wa daa deaari yɛttɔ'a maa, sahanseaa Naawunni Sii Kasi yiiko ŋɔn daa wulisiri ba a yɛla.

english_verse: Sometimes false prophets spoke to the people of Israel. False teachers will also sneak in and speak harmful lies to you. But these teachers don't really belong to the Master who paid a great price for them, and they will quickly destroy themselves.
translation_verse: Amaa ziri anabidima daa bɛ Naawunni niriba maa ni lala saha maa. Dizugu di yi pa seem lala ziri karimbadima nin ti bɛ ya gba sunsukkuni. Ba nin zi sa'aŋŋu na, ni ziri yɛttɔ'a an wɔligri niriba. Ka ba nin kyiisi, ni, ba bu mi ba Daana sɔ ŋɔn daa fa ba m‑basi la, ka za'asi u yɛla maa. Dizugu ba nin sa'am ba maŋtoori yɛla m‑basi yooma.

english_verse: Many people will follow their evil ways and cause others to tell lies about the true way.
translation_verse: Lala maa zugu, niriba pam gba nin ti dɔli ba tunyɔya maa, ka lala maa zugu nin kyɛ ka seeba nya soori ka ba tɔ'asi yɛttɔ'abeeri n‑tuuri yaseeba ban dɔli yɛlimaŋni soori maa.

english_verse: They will be greedy and cheat you with smooth talk. But long ago God decided to punish them, and God doesn't sleep.
translation_verse: Ba zinyuu maa puuni ka ziri karimbadima wa nin sɔlim ziri sɔlima ni ba ti nya nyoori ya saani; amaa m‑mari nti paai zuna, Ŋɔn ya kari ba sariya gba siri biiya; ka din sa'amni ba maa gba bu gbisira.

english_verse: God did not have pity on the angels that sinned. He had them tied up and thrown into the dark pits of hell until the time of judgment.
translation_verse: Naawunni daa bu kyɛ halli malaakadima galiŋŋu n‑ti ba - baseeba ban daa tum taalli maa - amaa u daa zaŋŋi ba n‑niŋi la mugsigu ni, ka ba ba ba zibsim ni. Bɛni ka u guri ba halli ni ba sariya karibu daari.

english_verse: And during Noah's time, God did not have pity on the ungodly people of the world. He destroyed them with a flood, though he did save eight people, including Noah, who preached the truth.
translation_verse: M‑paasi lala, Naawunni daa bu kyɛ duniyakurigu dima taalli, amaa u daa zi saa koom na ka bu ti di ninvugyɔya wa zaa; ŋɔn daa kyɛ sɔ maa mun daa nyɛ la Nuhu, dɔsɔ ŋɔn daa mooli Naawunni yɛlimaŋni soori la. Nuhu daa tiligi - ŋɔn ni niriba ayɔpɔi kɔkɔa, seeba ban daa zɛ kasi.

english_verse: God punished the cities of Sodom and Gomorrah by burning them to ashes, and this is a warning to anyone else who wants to sin.
translation_verse: Naawunni daa laa n‑sa'am Sɔdoom ni Gɔmɔra tinsi, ka daa zaŋŋi bugum n‑nyɔ a zaa. Lala ka u daa wulisi bunseelli din nin niŋi ninvugseeba ban za'asi u soori maa.

english_verse: Lot lived right and was greatly troubled by the terrible way those wicked people were living. He was a good man, and day after day he suffered because of the evil things he saw and heard. So the Lord rescued him.
translation_verse: Dɔsuŋŋu wa daa kur bɛ la ba saani dabsiri kam zaa. U daa bɛ ni n‑nyari ba tunkyɔ'ama ka wumni ba ala'akyi damni, ka di daa diisi u wahala pam.

english_verse: This shows that the Lord knows how to rescue godly people from their sufferings and to punish evil people while they wait for the day of judgment.
translation_verse: Anŋɔ zaa zugu ka ya ti baŋŋi, ni, ti Dugma siri mi ŋɔn nin niŋi seem n‑fa ninvugsuma m‑basi; ka laa m‑mi sariya karibu yɛla, ka kyɛ ka ninvugseeba ban bu dɔli soori la bɛ wahala puuni halli ni ba sariya karibu daari.

english_verse: The Lord is especially hard on people who disobey him and don't think of anything except their own filthy desires. They are reckless and proud and are not afraid of cursing the glorious beings in heaven.
translation_verse: Ka niriba wa seeba gaari ba zaa - di nyɛ la: baseeba ban zaŋŋi ba zikki zaa n‑niŋi ningbiŋŋu kɔrisi ni, ka za'asi kpamma nɔya wumpu. Lala niriba ba'a ka sɔsɔ yɛla ni, saazugu gyirima daandima ka ba bu zɔra, ka laa n‑tɔ'asiri yɛttɔ'abeeri ka zaŋŋi ba sufukpeemni n‑tuuri ba.

english_verse: Although angels are more powerful than these evil beings, even the angels don't dare to accuse them to the Lord.
translation_verse: Halli malaakadima gba - ka ba mari yaa ni kpeeŋŋu n‑gaari ziri karimbadima wa - malaakadima maa bu tuuri n‑figsiri gyirima daandima wa, see ka ba boonni ba Naawunni sariya karibu zii na n‑fabinni n‑wulisiri ba taalli ŋɔn nyɛ seem.

english_verse: These people are no better than senseless animals that live by their feelings and are born to be caught and killed. They speak evil of things they don't know anything about. But their own corrupt deeds will destroy them.
translation_verse: Niriba wa tataabu kur ŋmanni la hoo moo ni bunkɔbri. Ba dɔ'am ka anfaani see ka niriba nin ti gbaai ba n‑kɔri. Ba nyɛ la ban zeemni n‑tuuri bunseesi ban bu mi a gbinni la. Ba nin ti baasi yɔri.

english_verse: They have done evil, and they will be rewarded with evil. They think it is fun to have wild parties during the day. They are immoral, and the meals they eat with you are spoiled by the shameful and selfish way they carry on.
translation_verse: Ba nin ti di wahala, ba n daa niŋi niriba wahala maa zugu. Ba nini ku ti tigi, di yi pa la ba tumni ba ningbiŋŋu kɔrisi tumbeeri paalu ni. Ka halli ba yi paasi ya zugu, ya bundira diibu la'aŋŋu ni, ba laa n‑kpalim n‑nyɛ da'ari dima ban tumni vi tuma: ka ba sufu maai, ban yɔmsiri ya la zugu.

english_verse: All they think about is having sex with someone else's husband or wife. There is no end to their wicked deeds. They trick people who are easily fooled, and their minds are filled with greedy thoughts. But they are headed for trouble!
translation_verse: Ba nini kur gɔsiri niriba pɔ'aba ka boori ba; ba dɔli la tumbeeri nimbirimoaa. Ba bɛtti ba yɛla hoo kyɛ'ariga ni ba ti gbaasi ninvugseeba ban bu zɛ yummu. Ba moori ni ba ti bamsi tumbeeri sɔya zaa an nyɛ seem. Mbusu bɛ ba zugu!

english_verse: They have left the true road and have gone down the wrong path by following the example of the prophet Balaam. He was the son of Beor and loved what he got from being a crook.
translation_verse: Lala niriba pun kyɛ sɔsuŋŋu m‑burigi, ka dɔli la Beelɛm soori. Ŋɔn Beelɛm daa nyɛ Beoori biiya. Anabi n daa nyɛ u, amaa u daa boori la ligri yoori - bunseaa ka u ya n‑deaai taalli tuma zugu.

english_verse: But a donkey corrected him for this evil deed. It spoke to him with a human voice and made him stop his foolishness.
translation_verse: Lala zugu ka Naawunni daa kyɛ ka - halli ni buŋŋa bu tɔ'asiri maa zaa yɔri - u buŋŋa maa daa tɔ'asi n‑ti u dirindaari maa. Buŋŋa daa tɔ'asi hoo ninsaala n‑ta'ai anabi maa yinyaari tuma.

english_verse: These people are like dried up water holes and clouds blown by a windstorm. The darkest part of hell is waiting for them.
translation_verse: Yaasa, lala niriba ŋmanni la hoo kuliseesi an ka koom, bee, hoo sangbanseesi sanzeoo ŋɔn zeeri ka a kyɛnni la. Ba gbeebu ziiya pun maali siri ni ka ti deaai ba, zibɛseaa kan zibsa libilibi.

english_verse: They brag out loud about their stupid nonsense. And by being vulgar and crude, they trap people who have barely escaped from living the wrong kind of life.
translation_verse: Ba tɔ'asiri la karimbaani yɛttɔ'aseesi an mari gyɛrilim. Ka ba zaŋŋni ba ningbinkɔrisi tuma n‑yɔmsiri niriba - ninvugseeba ban na yi ziri yɛla ni n‑niŋni tuuba ka di bu yuui.

english_verse: When they learned about our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ, they escaped from the filthy things of this world. But they are again caught up and controlled by these filthy things, and now they are in worse shape than they were at first.
translation_verse: Ka dinŋɔna, ba nyɛ la seeba ban daa daŋŋi n‑zɔ n‑yi duniya wa yɛla ni, hoo sɔkyɛnniba ŋɔn yi pa'ari ni m‑paai neesim zii seem maa. Ka ba daa baŋŋi ti Dugma Yisa Masiiya, ti Tiligra la, yɛla pɔi, amaa ka naayi labi nyaaŋŋa ka kyɛ ka duniya yɛlibeeri laa n‑nyaŋŋi ba. Di yi bɛ lala, ba naari nyɛ la bumbeoo, ka gaari ba piiligu beeri ŋɔn daa nyɛ seem la.

english_verse: They would have been better off if they had never known about the right way. Even after they knew what was right, they turned their backs on the holy commandments they were given.
translation_verse: Ba yi daa bu mi Naawunni sɔseaa kan basiri la taalli ni galiŋŋu, di naa n‑sɔa. Amaa pampaŋŋɔ ba pun mi soori pɔi, ka laa n‑ŋmaligi n‑labi ka za'asi zaalisunseaa ban daa deaai Naawunni nuusi ni la.

english_verse: What happened to them is just like the true saying, “A dog will come back to lick up its own vomit. A pig that has been washed will roll in the mud.”
translation_verse: Yɛlimaŋni ka ti kpamma yɛliya, ni#:- “Baa tiira, ka laa n‑ŋmaligi n‑diri di.” ka laa n‑yɛtti, ni#:- “I yi peaai kurikyuu, u nin labi n‑sigi baya'ari ni.” Niriba wa yɛla wulisiri ti lala nyɛsa yɛlimaŋni ŋɔn nyɛ seem.

english_verse: what God's prophets said would happen. You must never forget what the holy prophets taught in the past. And you must remember what the apostles told you our Lord and Savior has commanded us to do.
translation_verse: M boori la ya teaai Naawunni anabisuma maa ŋɔn daa tɔ'asi yɛttɔ'aseesi sahanseaa sa la; ka laa n‑teaai Naawunni tuumudima maa ŋɔn daa yɛli yɛliseesi n‑ti ya zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi ti Dugma, ti Tiligra, zaaligu la.

english_verse: But first you must realize that in the last days some people won't think about anything except their own selfish desires. They will make fun of you
translation_verse: Tɔ: man ya n‑daŋŋi n‑yɛli ya seem nŋɔa: ni, n boori la ya baŋŋi, ni, naari dabsa yi ti paai na, ninvugseeba nin yi na ban nin dɔli ba sufu ni teesibeeri n‑niŋni ansarisi ka fiilimni bunsuma.

english_verse: and say, “Didn't your Lord promise to come back? Yet the first leaders have already died, and the world hasn't changed a bit.”
translation_verse: Ka ba nin boosi, ni, “U daa basi noori, ni, u nin kyɛ na. Ammi, u kyɛ na? Ka u lee? Ti badima pun ka ni, ka seelli kam zaa na kpalim n‑nyɛ la hoo din daa pun nyɛ seem duniya piiligu ni la.”

english_verse: They will say this because they want to forget that long ago the heavens and the earth were made at God's command. The earth came out of water and was made from water.
translation_verse: Ba mi halli, ka za'asiri di yɛlimaŋni maa, ni, sahanseaa sa la Naawunni daa yɛli la u yɛligu ka arizana ni duniya daa naam; koom ka u daa zaŋŋi m‑maali lala duniya maa, ka ka yi koom ni na.

english_verse: Later it was destroyed by the waters of a mighty flood.
translation_verse: Di mun daa nyɛ la koom ni ka lala duniyakurigu maa daa sa'am n‑naai.

english_verse: But God has commanded the present heavens and earth to remain until the day of judgment. Then they will be set on fire, and ungodly people will be destroyed.
translation_verse: Amaa sangbana ni duniya seesi an bɛ ni wa muna - Naawunni daa yɛli u yɛligu yaasa, ni, u ti mari a n‑guri ni a ti nyɔ bugum. Ba mari a n‑guri la ninvugbeeri maa sariya karibu daari, ni ba kari ba sariya ka sa'am ba.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't forget that for the Lord one day is the same as
translation_verse: M mabiisi, yan di tam yɛlli yinni wa, ni, wɔligri ka ni Naawunni saani: dabsiri yinni ni yuuma tusiri - Ŋɔn saani a zaa nyɛ la yummu.

english_verse: The Lord isn't slow about keeping his promises, as some people think he is. In fact, God is patient, because he wants everyone to turn from sin and no one to be lost.
translation_verse: Ti Dugma Naawunni bu maasi ni u nangbambasiri, hoo seeba ŋɔn teesiri seem maa. Ay! - u kur mari la sugru n‑tiri ya, dama u bu boori sɔ sa'aŋŋu, amaa u boori la sɔkam zaa ti ŋmaligi ka kyɛ u tumbeeri.

english_verse: The day of the Lord's return will surprise us like a thief. The heavens will disappear with a loud noise, and the heat will melt the whole universe. Then the earth and everything on it will be seen for what they are.
translation_verse: Amaa ti Dugma dabsiri maa siri ya sɔ'ai ni n‑kyɛ na hoo na'ayiga ŋɔn yi sɔ'ari n‑tumni seem la. Lala dabsiri maa ka saazugu nin ti tasi n‑niŋi vuuri pam ka gaari; saazugu ni tingbaŋŋu zaa tuga, ni a neema kam zaa, nin ti di bugum ka lakki m‑basi. Tiŋŋa maa, ni bunsɔ'ara zaa an bɛ ka ni la, nin ti yi paalu.

english_verse: You should look forward to the day when God judges everyone, and you should try to make it come soon. On that day the heavens will be destroyed by fire, and everything else will melt in the heat.
translation_verse: Yan guri ti Dugma Naawunni kyɛnni dabsiri na maa, ya kpaŋŋma ya mansi ka ka kyɛ na yooma. Di daari maa ka sangbana nin di bugum n‑sa'am, ka saazugu ni tingbaŋŋu tuga ni a neema zaa nin nyɛligi m‑basi.

english_verse: But God has promised us a new heaven and a new earth, where justice will rule. We are really looking forward to this!
translation_verse: Amaa tirima n guri la Naawunni ŋɔn basi noori, ni, u ti tisi bunseelli kam zaa maa: ni, sangbampaala ni duniyapaalli ka u nin ti tisi, bɛni ka yɛlimaŋni nin ti mari ka yiri n‑gbeeri sahakam.

english_verse: Don't forget that the Lord is patient because he wants people to be saved. This is also what our dear friend Paul said when he wrote you with the wisdom God had given him.
translation_verse: Kur teaama, ni, di nyɛ la ti Dugma ŋɔn di sugru zugu ka ninsaalidima nin nya tiliginsim. Lala ka ti zɔsuŋŋu Pɔla gba daa pun sɔbi n‑wulisi ya. Ti Dugma zaŋŋi bamsim n‑ti u, ka suŋŋi u ni u ti wulisiri yɛlimaŋni yɛla.

english_verse: Paul talks about these same things in all his letters, but part of what he says is hard to understand. Some ignorant and unsteady people even destroy themselves by twisting what he said. They do the same thing with other Scriptures too.
translation_verse: U sɔbri anŋɔ taabu n‑niŋi u gbana zaasa puuni. Amaa u gbana maa ni ka ya'aseesi m bɛ ni an bamsim tɔ ni: ninvugseeba ban ka yam ka ku toaai n‑zɛ yummu bɛ ni, ka lala niriba zaŋŋni Pɔla yɛla n‑takkri n‑gyɛtta - hoo ban takkri Naawunni yɛliseesi zaa gba - ka dizugu ba sa'amni ba maŋtoori yɛla m‑basira.

english_verse: My dear friends, you have been warned ahead of time! So don't let the errors of evil people lead you down the wrong path and make you lose your balance.
translation_verse: Yarima muna, m mabiisi - ya pun wum yɛla wa yɛlimaŋni ŋɔn nyɛ seem. Dizugu ya mari ya mansi ka di kyɛ ka ninvugbeeri wa daamni ya. Ba za'asiri wumpu, yan di kyɛ ka ba yɔmsi ya n‑lusi ya, ka ya yi ya zaazisuŋŋu ni.

english_verse: Let the gift of undeserved grace and the understanding that come from our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ help you keep on growing. Praise Jesus now and forever! Amen.
translation_verse: Ya kyɛ ka ya kur kyɛnni tooni, yan bɛ ni n‑deaari piinisuma ti Dugma ni Tiligra Yisa Kirisita saani sahanseaa la, m‑paasiri bamsim zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi u yɛla gba. Ŋɔnŋɔ nin mari gyirima Zuna, ni saha din ka tɔriga. Ammi.

english_verse: The Word that gives life was from the beginning, and this is the one our message is about. Our ears have heard, our eyes have seen, and our hands have touched this Word.
translation_verse: Ti sɔbri n‑tiri ya la nyɔvuri yɛligu maa zugu. Yɛligu maa daa bɛ ni piiligu ni sa. Tin daa wum bunseesi maa ka ti ya n‑sɔbi zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi u yɛla maa, ni tin daa gɔsi seesi, ka ti nini nya, ka ti daa zaŋŋi ti nuusi n‑siisi.

english_verse: The one who gives life appeared! We saw it happen, and we are witnesses to what we have seen. Now we are telling you about this eternal life that was with the Father and appeared to us.
translation_verse: Nyɔvuri maa n daa yi paalu na, ka ti daa nya; di zugu ka ti tɔ'asiri m‑moonni lahabaari n‑tiri ya. Ti lahabaari nyɛ la nyɔvuri kan ka naari wa yɛla, nyɔvuridaansɔ ŋɔn daa bɛ Naawunni ti Ba saani la, ka pampaŋŋɔ u yi paalu na ka ti nya.

english_verse: We are telling you what we have seen and heard, so you may share in this life with us. And we share in it with the Father and with his Son Jesus Christ.
translation_verse: Tin nya ka wum seelli maa ka ti moonni n‑tiri ya gba, ni ti ti kyɛ ka tin ni yan nin la'am m‑bɛ ni. Halli ti beebu nin ti bɛ ti Ba saani, ni u Bii Yisa Kirisita Masiiya saani.

english_verse: We are writing to tell you these things, because this makes us truly happy. God Is Light
translation_verse: Ti sɔbi kanŋɔ ni ti zaa sufumaasim leebi bummunni zaa.

english_verse: Jesus told us God is light and doesn't have any darkness in him. Now we are telling you.
translation_verse: Tɔ; lahabaseaa tin daa wum Naawunni Bii maa saani ka moonni n‑tiri ya nŋɔa#:- Naawunni nyɛ la neesim, ka zibsim halli fiiŋ ka u saani.

english_verse: If we say we share in life with God and keep on living in the dark, we are lying and are not living by the truth.
translation_verse: Dinzugu, ti yi yɛtti, ni, ti bɛ la u beesigu maa taabu amaa ka na kpalim m‑bɛ zibsim ni lala saha maa, ti ma'ari la ziri ti yɛttɔ'a maa ni, ni ti beesigu maa ni m‑paasi.

english_verse: But if we live in the light, as God does, we share in life with each other. And the blood of his Son Jesus washes all our sins away.
translation_verse: Amaa ti yi bɛ neesim ni - hoo Ŋɔn bɛ neesim ni seem maa - dinŋɔna tin ni ŋɔn beesigu maa sakkri n‑tiri taaba. Ka Naawunni Bii Yisa ŋɔn daa kpi n‑ti ti maa zugu, u ziim nin ti peaari ti n‑yiisiri ti tumbeeri zaa taalli ni.

english_verse: If we say we have not sinned, we are fooling ourselves, and the truth isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Ti yi ti yɛli, ni, ti ka la tumbeeri, ti yɔmsiri la ti maŋŋa ka yɛlimaŋni ka ti ni.

english_verse: If we say we have not sinned, we make God a liar, and his message isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Amaa ti yi yɛtti, ni, ti bu tum tumbeeri, lala gbinni n nyɛ, ni, Naawunni nyɛ la ziri daana; dizugu ti yi yɛli lala di wulisi, ni, u yɛligu ka ti ni.

english_verse: My children, I am writing this so you won't sin. But if you do sin, Jesus Christ always does the right thing, and he will speak to the Father for us.
translation_verse: Tɔ, m biisi, dinŋɔ ka n sɔbri n‑tiri ya na, ni ya di tum tumbeeri. Amaa sɔ yi ti tum tumbeeri, u mari la sɔ ŋɔn zɔri sindaani u zugu n‑tiri Naawunni ti Ba maa - Yisa Kirisita nla, sɔ ŋɔn tumni yɛlimaŋni tuma deede.

english_verse: Christ is the sacrifice that takes away our sins and the sins of all the world's people.
translation_verse: Ka ŋɔn Kirisita leebi la maaligu kan ti ti soori n‑kyɛ ka ti nya kyɛ-m‑pɛŋŋi ti tumbeeri zugu. Ka di pa la tirima kɔkɔ tumbeeri, amaa sɔkam zaa dina.

english_verse: When we obey God, we are sure we know him.
translation_verse: Tin dɔli Naawunni zaaligu zugu nin wulisi, ni, ti siri mi u.

english_verse: But if we claim to know him and don't obey him, we are lying and the truth isn't in our hearts.
translation_verse: Ninvugsɔ yi yɛli, ni, “M mi u.”, ka bu dɔli u zaaligu maa, lala nira nyɛ la ziri daana ka yɛlimaŋni ka u ni.

english_verse: We truly love God only when we obey him as we should, and then we know we belong to him.
translation_verse: Amaa ŋɔn dɔli u yɛligu maa nyɛ la sɔ Naawunni wurilim maa ŋɔn siri paali u zaa. Dinŋɔ nin kyɛ ka ti niŋi yɛdda, ni, ti la'am m‑bɛ Naawunni saani.

english_verse: If we say we are his, we must follow the example of Christ. The New Commandment
translation_verse: Ŋɔnkam yɛnni, ni, u la'am m‑bɛ la Yisa saani, di sumni ni di daama bɛ la hoo Yisa ŋɔn daa bɛ seem la.

english_verse: My dear friends, I am not writing to give you a new commandment. It is the same one you were first given, and it is the message you heard.
translation_verse: N zɔdima: di pa la n sɔbri la zaalipaaliseaa n‑tiri ya na, amaa n teaari ya la bunkurigu yɛla, seaa yan daa deaai piiligu ni la. Zaalikurigu wa kur nyɛ la lahabaseaa yan daa pun wum la.

english_verse: But it really is a new commandment, and you know its true meaning, just as Christ does. You can see the darkness fading away and the true light already shining.
translation_verse: Halli zaalipaalli n nyɛ ka gba, ka n tiri ya; dama ka nyɛ la yɛlimaŋni Yisa Masiiya zugu, ni yɛlimaŋni yarima saani gba. Ka nin kpalim m‑bɛ lala n‑tiri ya gba; dama zibsim la viiri ni, ka yɛlimaŋni neesim neaara.

english_verse: If we claim to be in the light and hate someone, we are still in the dark.
translation_verse: Ninvugsɔ yi ti yɛli, ni, u bɛ la neesim maa ni, ka yaai u mabiiya, u na kpalim m‑bɛ zibsim ni.

english_verse: But if we love others, we are in the light, and we don't cause problems for them.
translation_verse: Ŋɔn mun wuri u mabiiya kpalim m‑bɛ la neesim maa ni, ka seelli ka u ni kan nin toaai n‑kyɛ ka u taraana ti tuui n‑tum taalli.

english_verse: If we hate others, we are living and walking in the dark. We don't know where we are going, because we can't see in the dark.
translation_verse: Amaa ŋɔn mun yaai u mabiiya bɛ la zibsim ni n‑kyɛnna. U bu mi ŋɔn kyɛnni m‑paari seela, dama zibsim maa kyɛ ka u nini bu nyara.

english_verse: Children, I am writing you, because your sins have been forgiven in the name of Christ.
translation_verse: M biisi, man sɔbri n‑tiri ya wa, yan pun deaai ya tumbeeri kyɛ-m‑pɛŋŋi zugu - ya deaai di Yisa yuuri zugu.

english_verse: Parents, I am writing you, because you have known the one who was there from the beginning. Young people, I am writing you, because you have defeated the evil one.
translation_verse: M badima, n sɔbri n‑tiri ya gba, Yan mi Sɔ ŋɔn daa bɛ ni zugu - duniya piiligu saha ka u daa bɛ ni. Na'akyimbisi, n sɔbri n‑tiri ya gba, yan pun zabi Sintaani n‑nyaŋŋi u la zugu.

english_verse: Children, I am writing you, because you have known the Father. Parents, I am writing you, because you have known the one who was there from the beginning. Young people, I am writing you, because you are strong. God's message is firm in your hearts, and you have defeated the evil one.
translation_verse: M‑paasi yaasa#:- M bibisi, n laa n‑sɔbi n‑ti ya, yan mi Naawunni ti Ba la zugu. M badima, n laa n‑sɔbi n‑ti ya gba, Yan mi Sɔ Ŋɔn Daa Bɛ ni la zugu - duniya piiligu saha ka u daa bɛ ni. Na'akyimbisi, n laa n‑sɔbi n‑ti ya gba, yan mari yaa zugu; ka Naawunni yɛligu ŋɔn bɛ ya ni zugu, ka yan pun zabi Sintaani n‑nyaŋŋi u la.

english_verse: Don't love the world or anything that belongs to the world. If you love the world, you cannot love the Father.
translation_verse: Ya wumma! Yan di wuri duniya wa, bee, bunseesi an bɛ ka ni la. Sɔ ŋɔn boori duniya wa yɛla, ti Ba Naawunni wurilim ka u ni.

english_verse: Our foolish pride comes from this world, and so do our selfish desires and our desire to have everything we see. None of this comes from the Father.
translation_verse: Dama bunseelli kam kan bɛ duniya wa ni, hoo ningbinkɔrisi ni bunveela zaa ti nini ŋɔn nya ka boora, ni saalidima ŋɔn gyeemni bunseelli zaa - anŋɔ zaa bu yi la ti Ba Naawunni saani na, amaa duniya buna n nyɛ a, ka yi la duniya wa ni na.

english_verse: The world and the desires it causes are disappearing. But if we obey God, we will live forever. The Enemy of Christ
translation_verse: Ka duniya wa paari ka naari ni, kan ni ka kɔrisi yɛla zaa. Amaa ban tumni Naawunni ŋɔn boori ni ba tum seem la - lala niriba nin kpalim m‑bɛ ni halli saha kan ka naari.

english_verse: Children, this is the last hour. You heard that the enemy of Christ would appear at this time, and many of Christ's enemies have already appeared. So we know the last hour is here.
translation_verse: M biisi, saha maa nŋɔa. Ba daa pun yɛli ya, ni, Masiiya Dindaana maa nin ti kyɛ na; tɔ, ka u dindaandima pam pun kyɛ na. Dinŋɔ nin kyɛ ka ti baŋŋi, ni, saha maa nŋɔa.

english_verse: These people came from our own group, yet they were not really part of us. If they had been part of us, they would have stayed with us. But they left, which proves they did not belong to our group.
translation_verse: Ba daa yi ti saani m‑bakki, amaa ba daa pa la ti niriba ni yɛlimaŋni; ba yi siri daa nyɛ ti niriba, ba naa n‑kpalim ti saani. Ban yi m‑bakki seem la zugu ka ba wulisiri, ni, ba zaa pa la ti niriba.

english_verse: Christ, the Holy One, has blessed you, and now all of you understand.
translation_verse: Amaa yarim zaa pun deaai Naawunni kpaam soosigu, lala zugu ya zaa baŋŋiya.

english_verse: I did not need to write you about the truth, since you already know it. You also know that liars do not belong to the truth.
translation_verse: Din kyɛ ka n sɔbri yɛla wa n‑tiri ya maa, di pa la n teesi, ni, yan ka bamsim zugu. Ay! - n sɔbri n‑tiri ya yan pun mi la zugu, ka ziri ni yɛlimaŋni ku toaai n‑kpɛ laa yinni ni.

english_verse: And a liar is anyone who says Jesus isn't truly Christ. Anyone who says this is an enemy of Christ and rejects both the Father and the Son.
translation_verse: Ŋɔni n nyɛ ziri daana? - Pa ŋɔn kyiisiri, ni, Yisa pa la Masiiya maa? Di daama nyɛ la Masiiya Dindaana maa; u nyɛ la ninvugsɔ ŋɔn za'asiri ti Ba Naawunni ni u Bii Yisa zaa yɛla.

english_verse: If we reject the Son, we reject the Father. But if we say we accept the Son, we have the Father.
translation_verse: Ninvugsɔ ŋɔn za'asiri Naawunni Bii la, u Ba Naawunni gba ka u za'asira. Ŋɔn mun sakki n‑ti Bii maa, u sakkri n‑tiri u Ba maa gba.

english_verse: Keep thinking about the message you first heard, and you will always be one in your heart with the Son and with the Father.
translation_verse: Ya kyɛ ka yan daa daŋŋi n‑wum seem la kpalim m‑bɛ ya saani. Yan daa daŋŋi n‑wum seela la yi kpalim m‑bɛ ya saani, ya gba nin kpalim m‑bɛ Bii maa saani, ni u Ba maa gba saani.

english_verse: I am writing to warn you about those people who are misleading you.
translation_verse: Lala ka n sɔbri n‑tiri ya, ka teesiri la seeba ban boori ba burigi ya la yɛla.

english_verse: But Christ has blessed you with the Holy Spirit. Now the Spirit stays in you, and you don't need any teachers. The Spirit is truthful and teaches you everything. So stay one in your heart with Christ, just as the Spirit has taught you to do. Children of God
translation_verse: Yarima muna - ya daa pun deaai Naawunni kpaam soosigu. Lala piini maa nin ti kpalim m‑bɛ ya saani. Di zugu di pa la ya boori ninsaalisɔ ni u ti wulisi ya yam yɛla, dama Naawunni Siiya soosigu wulisiri ya yɛla kam zaa bamsim ŋɔn nyɛ seem; ka yɛtti ya yɛlimaŋni, ka bu ma'ari ziri. Dinzugu ya kpalimma m‑bɛ u saani, hoo ŋɔn daa wulisi ya seem maa.

english_verse: Children, stay one in your hearts with Christ. Then when he returns, we will have confidence and won't have to hide in shame.
translation_verse: Tɔ; ka pampaŋŋɔ, m biisi, ya kpalimma m‑bɛ u saani; ka u yi ti labi n‑yi paalu sahanseaa na, ti nin nya soori m‑paai u saani na, ka ti ku ti di vi.

english_verse: You know Christ always does right and everyone who does right is a child of God.
translation_verse: Ya mi halli, ni, Ŋɔna n nyɛ yɛlimaŋni daana. Lala zugu ya baŋŋma, ni, sɔkam zaa ŋɔn tumni yɛlimaŋni muna - Naawunni nyɛ la u Ba.

english_verse: Think how much the Father loves us. He loves us so much that he lets us be called his children, as we truly are. But since the people of this world did not know who Christ is, they don't know who we are.
translation_verse: Ya baŋŋma Naawunni ŋɔn zaŋŋi wurilim n‑ti ti la, ni, din galisi seem! U kyɛ ka ba boonni ti, ni, Naawunni biisi. Ka u biisi n siri nyɛ ti gba. Din kyɛ ka duniya wa na zi ti la nyɛ la: ka daa bu mi Ŋɔn gba.

english_verse: My dear friends, we are already God's children, though what we will be hasn't yet been seen. But we do know when Christ returns, we will be like him, because we will see him as he truly is.
translation_verse: N zɔsuma, pampaŋŋɔ ti nyɛ la Naawunni biisi, ka ti na bu baŋŋi tin nin nyɛ seem. Amaa tin mi bunseelli nŋɔa: ni, u yi ti yi paalu na, ti nin ti nya u hoo ŋɔn nyɛ seem ni yɛlimaŋni, ka dizugu ti nin ŋmanni hoo ŋɔn bɛ seem maa.

english_verse: This hope makes us keep ourselves holy, just as Christ is holy.
translation_verse: Nira kam ŋɔn mari lala tama maa maanni la u maŋŋa kasi hoo ŋɔn Naawunni ŋɔn nyɛ kasi seem la.

english_verse: Everyone who sins breaks God's law, because sin is the same as breaking God's law.
translation_verse: Tɔ: ŋɔnkam zaa tumni tumbeeri tuma, u galimni zaaligu maa, dama tumbeeri tumpu ni zaaligu galiŋŋu nyɛ la yummu.

english_verse: You know Christ came to take away our sins. He isn't sinful,
translation_verse: Amaa ya mi halli, ni, Kirisita daa yi na nti zaŋŋi ti tumbeeri taalli m‑basi. Ka u mammaŋŋa saani ka tumbeeri sɛseelli ka ni.

english_verse: and people who stay one in their hearts with him won't keep on sinning. If they do keep on sinning, they don't know Christ, and they have never seen him.
translation_verse: Sɔ ka ni n bɛ u ni ka kpalim n‑tumni taalli tuma; ŋɔn mun kpalim n‑tumni taalli tuma zaa na zi n‑nya u, bee, m‑mi u.

english_verse: Children, don't be fooled. Anyone who does right is good, just like Christ himself.
translation_verse: M biisi, yan di kyɛ ka sɔ yɔmsi ya ka ya burigi. Ŋɔn tumni din tu zaa nyɛ la yɛlimaŋni daana, hoo ŋɔn Naawunni ŋɔn nyɛ seem maa.

english_verse: Anyone who keeps on sinning belongs to the devil. He has sinned from the beginning, but the Son of God came to destroy all that he has done.
translation_verse: Ŋɔn mun kpalim n‑tumni taalli tuma nyɛ la Sintaani nira, dama ŋɔn Sintaani kur tumni la taalli zaŋŋi n‑yi piiligu ni sa na. Lala zugu ka Naawunni Bii maa daa yi na; u daa kyɛ na nti sa'am ŋɔn Sintaani tuma maa.

english_verse: God's children cannot keep on being sinful. His life-giving power lives in them and makes them his children, so they cannot keep on sinning.
translation_verse: Sɔkam ŋɔn nyɛ Naawunni biiya ku kpalim n‑tumni tumbeeri, dama Naawunni nyɔvuri bɛ u ni; u ku toaai n‑kpalim n‑tumni taalli tuma, dama Naawunni soori ni ka ba dɔ'ai u.

english_verse: You can tell God's children from the devil's children, because those who belong to the devil refuse to do right or to love each other. Love Each Other
translation_verse: Dinŋɔ n kyɛ ka ti baŋŋi ban nyɛ Naawunni biisi ni Sintaani biisi: ni, ŋɔn tumni din bu tuusi zaa pa Naawunni biiya, ka ŋɔn bu wuri u taraana gba pa Naawunni biiya.

english_verse: From the beginning you were told we must love each other.
translation_verse: Dama lahabaari kanŋɔ ka ba daa wulisi ya piiligu ni, ni, ti kyɛ ka ti wuri taaba.

english_verse: Don't be like Cain, who belonged to the devil and murdered his own brother. Why did he murder him? He did it because his brother was good, and he was evil.
translation_verse: Yan di dɔli Kyeen soori - Sintaani ŋɔn daa su sɔ sufu teesa la, ka u daa ku u sunzɔ maa. Wula zugu ka u daa ku u? - U toori tuma n daa nyɛ tumbeeri, ka u sunzɔ mun dina daa nyɛ bunsuma.

english_verse: My friends, don't be surprised if the people of this world hate you.
translation_verse: Ti gba, m mabiisi, ka duniya dima n yaai ti ni; dinŋɔna yan di kyɛ ka di niŋi ya alahazibu.

english_verse: Our love for each other proves we have gone from death to life. But if you don't love each other, you are still under the power of death.
translation_verse: Ti wuri ti mabiisi, ka lala kyɛ ka ti mi, ni, ti yisigi la kum ni n‑lɔkki n‑kpɛ nyɔvuripaalli puuni. Ninvugsɔ ŋɔn za'asiri wurilim la mun kur kpalim m‑bɛ kum ni.

english_verse: If you hate each other, you are murderers, and we know murderers do not have eternal life.
translation_verse: Ŋɔnkam yaai u mabiiya zaa nyɛ la ninvugkuura; ka ya mun mi halli, ni, nyɔvuri kan ka tariga ku kpalim m‑bɛ ninvugkuura saani.

english_verse: We know what love is because Jesus gave his life for us. This is why we must give our lives for each other.
translation_verse: Nŋɔ zugu ka ti baŋŋi wurilim ŋɔn nyɛ seela: ni, tirima zugu ka ŋɔn Yisa daa bu za'asi ka ba ku u. Tirim gba, di sumni ti di za'asi kum ti mabiisi zugu.

english_verse: If we have all we need and see one of our own people in need, we must have pity on that person, or else we cannot say we love God.
translation_verse: Ninvugsɔ yi mari bunseela duniya wa ni, ka u nya ka u mabisɔ bɛ la fara ni, amaa u ku sakki, ni, u zɔ faradaana wa namboo, ka mɔŋŋi, ni, u ku suŋŋi u - wula ka Naawunni wurilim bɛ di daama saani? Ay! - di ku bɛ ni.

english_verse: Children, you show love for others by truly helping them, and not merely by talking about it.
translation_verse: M biisi, yan di kyɛ ka ti taaba wurilim bɛ la noori ni yɛttɔ'a kɔkɔa. Ay! - ya kyɛ ka ti wuri taaba n‑tumni tunsuma n‑tiri taaba ni yɛlimaŋni.

english_verse: When we love others, we know we belong to the truth, and we feel at ease in the presence of God.
translation_verse: Tɔ; lala zugu nin kyɛ ka ti baŋŋi, ni, ti nyɛ la yɛlimaŋni maa niriba, ka ti teesa nya sufudoaa Naawunni saani.

english_verse: But even if we don't feel at ease, God is greater than our feelings, and he knows everything.
translation_verse: Dama sahaseaa ti sufu ni teesa ŋɔn yi ti galimni ti, ti baŋŋi, ni, Naawunni yiiko gaari ti teesa zaa, ka u mi bunseelli kam zaa.

english_verse: Dear friends, if we feel at ease in the presence of God, we will have the courage to come near him.
translation_verse: Amaa ti teesa yi bu galimni ti, n zɔdima, dinŋɔna ti teesa zaa nin bɛ la Naawunni saani, vi ka ni.

english_verse: He will give us whatever we ask, because we obey him and do what pleases him.
translation_verse: Di yi ti bɛ lala, ti yi ti susiri seelli zaa u saani, ti nin nya; dama ti dɔli la u zaaligu yɛla ka tumni u sufu yuubu ŋɔn nyɛ seem maa.

english_verse: God wants us to have faith in his Son Jesus Christ and to love each other. This is also what Jesus taught us to do.
translation_verse: U lala zaaligu maa nŋɔa: ni, ti niŋi Naawunni Bii maa yɛdda, Yisa Kirisita, ka laa n‑wuri taaba hoo ŋɔn Naawunni ŋɔn wulisi ti seem la.

english_verse: If we obey God's commandments, we will stay one in our hearts with him, and he will stay one with us. The Spirit he has given us is proof that we are one with him.
translation_verse: Ŋɔnkam dɔli u zaaligu yɛla zaa nyɛ la ŋɔn bɛ ŋɔn Naawunni saani, ka Naawunni mun gba bɛ u saani. Din kyɛ ka ti baŋŋi, ni, u kpalim m‑bɛ ti saani nyɛ la: ni, ŋɔn daa zaŋŋi u Siiya n‑ti ti maa zugu.

english_verse: Dear friends, don't believe everyone who claims to have the Spirit of God. Test them all to find out if they really do come from God. Many false prophets have already gone out into the world,
translation_verse: M mabiisi, yan di deaai sɔkam zaa ŋɔn yɛnni, ni, u mari Naawunni Sii maa, n‑niŋi u yɛligu yɛdda; amaa ya zamsim di daama n‑nya u yɛligu yiiko yi la Naawunni Sii maa saani na, bee? - Dama ziri anabidima pam pun yi duniya wa na.

english_verse: But when someone doesn't say this about Jesus, you know this person has a spirit that doesn't come from God and is the enemy of Christ. You knew this enemy was coming into the world and now is already here.
translation_verse: Sɔ mun yi bu sakki lala, di daama yɛligu yiiko bu yi la Naawunni Siiya saani na. U sii maa yiiko yi la Masiiya Dindaana la saani na. Ya daa pun wum, ni, lala Dindaana ya kyɛ na; u mun pun bɛ duniya wa puuni.

english_verse: Children, you belong to God, and you have defeated these enemies. God's Spirit is in you and is more powerful than the one who is in the world.
translation_verse: M biisi, yarima ŋɔna - Naawunni n su ya; ya mun nyaŋŋi ziri anabidima wa, dama ŋɔn bɛ ya saani maa mari yiiko n‑gaari ŋɔn bɛ duniya wa dima saani maa.

english_verse: These enemies belong to this world, and the world listens to them, because they speak its language.
translation_verse: Ban muna - duniya wa yiiko n su ba yɛla, ka ba tɔ'asiri la duniya wa yɛttɔ'a; di zugu duniya wa dima wumni n‑tiri ba.

english_verse: We belong to God, and everyone who knows God will listen to us. But the people who don't know God won't listen to us. This is how we can tell the Spirit that speaks the truth from the one that tells lies.
translation_verse: Tirima ŋɔna, Naawunni n su ti yɛla: ŋɔnkam mi Naawunni wumni n‑tiri ti. Ŋɔn mun pa Naawunni nira ku wum n‑ti ti. Dinŋɔ nin kyɛ ka ti baŋŋni yɛlimaŋni yiiko ni ziri dinni.

english_verse: My dear friends, we must love each other. Love comes from God, and when we love each other, it shows we have been given new life. We are now God's children, and we know him.
translation_verse: Tɔ, n zɔdima, ya kyɛ ka ti wuri taaba, dama wurilim yi la Naawunni saani na. Ŋɔnkam zaa yi mari wurilim, u nyɛ la Naawunni biiya, ka mi Naawunni.

english_verse: God is love, and anyone who doesn't love others has never known him.
translation_verse: Wurilim yi ka sɔ zaa ni, di daama zi Naawunni, dama Naawunni nyɛ la wurilim.

english_verse: God showed his love for us when he sent his only Son into the world to give us life.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔ ka Naawunni daa tum n‑wulisi ti u wurilim soori: u daa tum u Bii yinni duniya wa na, ni ti ti nya nyɔvuri u zugu.

english_verse: Real love isn't our love for God, but his love for us. God sent his Son to be the sacrifice by which our sins are forgiven.
translation_verse: Wurilim mun ŋɔn nyɛ seem nla#:- pa la tirima n wuri Naawunni, amaa Ŋɔna n wuri ti ka tum u Bii la na ni u ti leebi maaligu kan ti ti soori n‑kyɛ ka ti nya kyɛ-m‑pɛŋŋi ti tumbeeri zugu.

english_verse: Dear friends, since God loved us this much, we must love each other.
translation_verse: N zɔdima, Naawunni ŋɔn siri wuri ti lala, dinŋɔna ya kyɛ ka ti wuri taaba.

english_verse: No one has ever seen God. But if we love each other, God lives in us, and his love is truly in our hearts.
translation_verse: Sɔsɔ na zi n‑nya Naawunni; amaa ti yi ti wuri taaba, ŋɔn Naawunni nin la'am m‑bɛ ti ni, ka u wurilim maa zaa siri nin bɛ ti saani.

english_verse: God has given us his Spirit. This is how we know we are one with him, just as he is one with us.
translation_verse: Ti mi halli, ni, ti la'amni m‑bɛ la Naawunni ni, ka ŋɔn Naawunni mun la'am m‑bɛ ti ni, dama u pun zaŋŋi u Sii maa n‑ti ti.

english_verse: God sent his Son to be the Savior of the world. We saw his Son and are now telling others about him.
translation_verse: Ka ti gba nya ka yɛtti n‑wulisiri tin ŋɔn nya seem maa, ni, ti Ba maa tum la u Bii la na ni u ti leebi duniya wa Tiligra.

english_verse: God stays one with everyone who openly says Jesus is the Son of God. This is how we stay one with God
translation_verse: Ŋɔnkam zaa yɛnni, ni, Yisa nyɛ la Naawunni Biiya, di daama la'am m‑bɛ ni ni Naawunni, ka Naawunni nin la'am ni u m‑bɛ ni.

english_verse: and are sure God loves us. God is love. If we keep on loving others, we will stay one in our hearts with God, and he will stay one with us.
translation_verse: Ka ti mammansi mi wurilim seaa Naawunni ŋɔn mari n‑tiri ti maa, ka ti niŋni lala wurilim yɛdda. Naawunni nyɛ la wurilim, ka sɔ yi bɛ wurilim beesigu ni, di daama la'am la ni Naawunni m‑bɛ ni, ka Naawunni gba la'am ni u m‑bɛ ni.

english_verse: If we truly love others and live as Christ did in this world, we won't be worried about the day of judgment.
translation_verse: Wurilim paari ka tariga ti saani, ka lala nin kyɛ ka ti mari sufukpeemni ka ku ti di vi, sariya karibu daari maa; dama ti duniya wa ni nyɔvuri ni ti Dugma Yisa dinni nyɛ la yummu.

english_verse: A real love for others will chase those worries away. The thought of being punished is what makes us afraid. It shows we have not really learned to love.
translation_verse: Dabeem ka wurilim ni; wurilim seaa din nyɛ bummaŋni zaa, di katti dabeem zaa m‑basira. Tubdarigri zugu ka dabeem bɛ ni, ka ninvugsɔ ŋɔn zɔri dabeem maa na ka wurilim ni yɛlimaŋni.

english_verse: We love because God loved us first.
translation_verse: Tirim mari la wurilim maa, Naawunni ŋɔn daŋŋi n‑wuri ti la zugu.

english_verse: But if we say we love God and don't love each other, we are liars. We cannot see God. So how can we love God, if we don't love the people we can see?
translation_verse: Sɔ yi yɛli, ni, u wuri Naawunni, ka na yaai u mabiiya - ziri daana n nyɛ u. U nini pun nya u mabiiya ka u bu wuri u, dizugu u ya niŋi la wula n‑wuri Naawunni, sɔ u nini ŋɔn na zi n‑nya?

english_verse: The commandment that God has given us is: “Love God and love each other!”
translation_verse: Zaaligu seaa Yisa ŋɔn daa zaŋŋi n‑ti ti maa nyɛ la nŋɔa#:- ŋɔnkam zaa wuri Naawunni, di sumni ka u wuri u mabii gba.

english_verse: If we believe Jesus is truly Christ, we are God's children. Everyone who loves the Father will also love his children.
translation_verse: Tɔ: ŋɔnkam zaa niŋi yɛdda, ni, Yisa nyɛ la Masiiya maa, di daama nyɛ la Naawunni biiya. Ka ŋɔnkam wuri ninvugsɔ, see ka u wuri di daama bii maa gba.

english_verse: If we love and obey God, we know we will love his children.
translation_verse: Dinŋɔ n kyɛ ka ti baŋŋi, ni, ti wuri Naawunni biisi maa: tin wuri Naawunni ka tumni u zaaligu tuma zugu nla.

english_verse: We show our love for God by obeying his commandments, and they are not hard to follow.
translation_verse: Ti Naawunni wurilim nŋɔa: ti yi tumni u zaaligu tuma maa. Ka u zaaligu tuma bu tɔ ni,

english_verse: Every child of God can defeat the world, and our faith is what gives us this victory.
translation_verse: dama Naawunni bii zaa nyaŋŋni la duniya wa. Ka lala nyaŋŋni din nyaŋŋi duniya wa nyɛ la bɔa? - Ti yɛdda niŋbu nla.

english_verse: No one can defeat the world without having faith in Jesus as the Son of God. Who Jesus Is
translation_verse: Ka ŋɔni n nin nyaŋŋi duniya wa? - Pa la ŋɔn niŋi yɛdda, ni, Yisa nyɛ la Naawunni Biiya? - Ii, ŋɔna!

english_verse: Water and blood came out from the side of Jesus Christ. It wasn't just water, but water and blood. The Spirit tells about this, because the Spirit is truthful.
translation_verse: Ŋɔn Yisa Masiiya Kirisita n nyɛ ŋɔn daa dɔli koom soori, ni ziim soori m‑paasi, n‑kyɛ na. Pa koom kɔkɔ n‑daa la, amaa koom ni ziim zaa. Ka Naawunni Sii maa n nyɛ ŋɔn diri di sɛhara, dama ŋɔn Naawunni Sii maa nyɛ la yɛlimaŋni.

english_verse: In fact, there are three who tell about it.
translation_verse: Dizugu sɛhara dima ata m‑bɛ ni:

english_verse: We believe what people tell us. But we can trust what God says even more, and God is the one who has spoken about his Son.
translation_verse: Ti deaari ninsaala sɛhara n‑niŋni di yɛdda; amaa Naawunni sɛhara gaari lala zaa. Dama Naawunni sɛhara nla, ŋɔn di sɛharaseaa zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi u Bii maa yɛla.

english_verse: If we have faith in God's Son, we have believed what God has said. But if we don't believe what God has said about his Son, it is the same as calling God a liar.
translation_verse: Nira kam ŋɔn niŋi Naawunni Bii maa yɛdda mari la lala sɛhara maa u maŋtoori sufu ni. Ŋɔn kam mun ku sakki, ni, u niŋi Naawunni yɛla yɛdda, di daama n kur yɛtti, ni, Naawunni nyɛ la ziri daana, dama u bu niŋi Naawunni ŋɔn di sɛharaseaa yɛdda, sɛhara zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi u Bii maa yɛla maa.

english_verse: God has also said he gave us eternal life and this life comes to us from his Son.
translation_verse: Ka sɛhara maa nŋɔa: Naawunni ti ti la nyɔvuri kan ka naari, ka lala nyɔvuri wa bɛ la u Bii maa saani.

english_verse: And so, if we have God's Son, we have this life. But if we don't have the Son, we don't have this life. Knowing about Eternal Life
translation_verse: Nira kam ŋɔn mari Naawunni Bii maa mari la nyɔvuri; ka ŋɔn mun ka Naawunni Bii maa ka nyɔvuri.

english_verse: All of you have faith in the Son of God, and I have written to let you know you have eternal life.
translation_verse: Tɔ: n sɔbri anŋɔ n‑tiri yaseeba ban niŋi Naawunni Bii maa yuuri yɛdda la, ni ya ti baŋŋi, ni, ya mari nyɔvuri kan ka naari.

english_verse: And if we know God listens when we pray, we are sure our prayers have already been answered.
translation_verse: Ka ti yi mi, ni, u wumni ti susigu zaŋŋi n‑kyaŋŋi bunseelli kam zaa, ti laa m‑mi, ni, ti nin nya di u saani.

english_verse: Suppose you see one of our people commit a sin that isn't a deadly sin. You can pray, and this person will be given eternal life. But the sin must not be one that is deadly.
translation_verse: Sɔ yi ti nya ka u mabisɔ tum tumbɛseelli kan ku taasi u kum ni, ŋɔn susima Naawunni u mabii wa zugu, ka Naawunni nin kyɛ ka tumbeeri daana maa laa n‑nya nyɔvuri. Tumbɛseesi m bɛ ni n‑taasiri niriba kum ni - pa ana ka n yɛtti maa.

english_verse: Everything that is wrong is sin, but not all sins are deadly.
translation_verse: Tunseesi an bu tuusi zaa maa nyɛ la taalli tumbeeri, amaa taalli tumbɛseesi m bɛ ni an bu taasiri kum ni.

english_verse: We are sure God's children do not keep on sinning. God's own Son protects them, and the devil cannot harm them.
translation_verse: Tɔ: ti mi halli, ni, ninvugsɔ zaa ŋɔn nyɛ Naawunni biiya - u bu kpalim n‑tumni tumbeeri; dama Yisa, Naawunni ŋɔn dɔ'ai sɔ, nin ti gɔsi u yɛla; ka Sintaani ŋɔn su tumbeeri fukumsi la ku niŋi u seela.

english_verse: We are certain we come from God and the rest of the world is under the power of the devil.
translation_verse: Ti laa m‑mi, ni, Naawunni n su ti yɛla, ka duniya wa zaa mun bɛ la ŋɔn su tumbeeri fukumsi maa nuusi ni.

english_verse: We know that Jesus Christ the Son of God has come and has shown us the true God. And because of Jesus, we now belong to the true God who gives eternal life.
translation_verse: Ti mi, ni, Naawunni Bii maa daa kyɛ na ni u ti ti ti bamsim, ni ti baŋŋi Naawummaŋni maa. Ka ti bɛ la Naawummaŋni maa saani - di nyɛ la: ti bɛ la u Bii Yisa Kirisita saani. Ŋɔna n nyɛ Naawummaŋni, ka laa n‑nyɛ nyɔvuri kan ka naari maa.

english_verse: We love you because the truth is now in our hearts, and it will be there forever.
translation_verse: Ti wuri ya lala yɛlimaŋni maa zugu; yɛlimaŋni maa mun na kur kpalim m‑bɛ ti saani saha din ka tariga.

english_verse: I pray that God the Father and Jesus Christ his Son will be kind and merciful to us! May they give us peace and truth and love. Truth and Love
translation_verse: M puusiri ya zaa, ni, ti Ba Naawunni, ŋɔn ni Yisa Kirisita u Bii maa zaa, nin suŋŋi ti ka zɔ ti namboo, ka kyɛ ka ti nya sufudoaa. Anŋɔ zaa ka ti nin nya, ka kpalim yɛlimaŋni ni wurilim puuni.

english_verse: I was very glad to learn that some of your children are obeying the truth, as the Father told us to do.
translation_verse: Di daa niŋi ma nya'asim pam, man ŋɔn daa nya ka i biisi la seeba dɔli la yɛlimaŋni soori maa, kaman ti Ba Naawunni ŋɔn daa zaali ti seem la.

english_verse: Dear friend, I am not writing to tell you and your children to do something you have not done before. I am writing to tell you to love each other, which is the first thing you were told to do.
translation_verse: Tɔ, m ma, wumma! Pampaŋŋɔ n susiri i, ni, ti kyɛ ka ti wuri taaba. Di pa la n sɔbri la zaalipaalli n‑tiri i, amaa di nyɛ la zaaliseaa tin daa deaai piiligu ni la maa.

english_verse: Love means we do what God tells us. And from the beginning, he told you to love him.
translation_verse: Ka wurilim wa nyɛ la: ni, ti dɔli Naawunni zaaligu yɛla zaa. Ya daa pun wum lala n‑yi piiligu ni, halli ni zuna - ni, zaaligu mun nyɛ la: ni, ti dɔli wurilim soori.

english_verse: Many liars have gone out into the world. These deceitful liars are saying Jesus Christ did not have a truly human body. But they are liars and the enemies of Christ.
translation_verse: Dama pampaŋŋɔ ka ninvugseeba ban yɔmsiri niriba yiiri la duniya wa na, ba bɔbgu gba. Ba nyɛ la seeba ban ku sakki, ni, Yisa Masiiya daa leebi ninsaala n‑kyɛ duniya wa ni na. Sɔ ŋɔn yɛli lala zaa nyɛ la ŋɔn yɔmsira, halli n nyɛ sɔ ŋɔn nyɛ la Masiiya Dindaana maa.

english_verse: So be sure not to lose what we have worked for. If you do, you won't be given your full reward.
translation_verse: Dizugu ya mari ya mansi suŋŋa, ka di zaŋŋi yan pun tum tunseesi maa anfaani la m‑basi ka ka yi ya nuusi ni; ay! - see ka ya nya a sanyoaa ka bu pɔsigi seela.

english_verse: Don't keep changing what you were taught about Christ, or else God will no longer be with you. But if you hold firmly to what you were taught, both the Father and the Son will be with you.
translation_verse: Ninvugsɔ ŋɔn bu dɔli Yisa wulisigu yɛla, amaa ka yakkri a maa, di daama ku kpalim m‑bɛ Naawunni saani; amaa ŋɔnkam sakki n‑ti Yisa wulisigu ka kpalim m‑bɛ lala, di daama mari la ti Ba Naawunni u saani, ni Naawunni Bii maa m‑paasi.

english_verse: If people won't agree to this teaching, don't welcome them into your home or even greet them.
translation_verse: Dizugu sɔ yi ti kyɛ ya saani na ka bu mari wulisigu wa yɛla na, yan di sakki ka u kpɛ ya yiya ni, halli yan di puusi u gba.

english_verse: Greeting them is the same as taking part in their evil deeds. Final Greetings
translation_verse: Dama halli ninvugsɔ ŋɔn gyaari di daama gba, di ŋmanni hoo ŋɔn paasi u zugu ka ba la'am n‑tumni tumbeeri maa seem.

english_verse: I have much more to tell you, but I don't want to write it with pen and ink. I want to come and talk to you in person, because this will make us really happy.
translation_verse: Tɔ. N na mari yɛla pam ni n ya yɛli n‑ti ya, amaa ni lala zaa yɔri, n bu boori n sɔbi a m‑pa gbaŋŋu zugu n‑ti ya na. Dama m mari tama, ni, n nin kyɛ ya saani na n‑kaai ya, ka ti nini nya taaba ka ti di taaba azama, dinŋɔ nin kyɛ ka ti nya sufupeelli pam.

english_verse: From the church leader. To my dear friend Gaius. I love you because we follow the truth,
translation_verse: Mani ŋɔn sɔbri gbaŋŋu wa - man kpeema maa nla: n sɔbri n‑tiri nyini, Gayusi. N wuri i ni n sufu zaa, yɛlimaŋni maa zugu.

english_verse: dear friend, and I pray all goes well for you. I hope you are as strong in body, as I know you are in spirit.
translation_verse: N zɔsuŋŋu, m puusiri i ni, ka susiri Naawunni, ni, bunseelli kam zaa niŋi suŋŋa n‑ti i, ka i mari alaafɛa, hoo man mi suŋŋa, ni, i sii maa mari alaafɛ zaa seem la.

english_verse: It makes me very happy when the Lord's followers come by and speak openly of how you obey the truth.
translation_verse: Ti Kirisita mabitaaba ŋɔn daa paai na ka yɛli ma i yɛdda ŋɔn nyɛ seem, ni, i na dɔli la yɛlimaŋni sɔsuŋŋu ni nimbirimoaa, ka di daa niŋi ma nya'asim pam.

english_verse: Nothing brings me greater happiness than to hear that my children are obeying the truth. Working Together
translation_verse: Dama seelli ka ni m‑maari n sufu n‑gaari n yi wum, ni, m biisi maa bɛ la yɛlimaŋni beesigu.

english_verse: Dear friend, you have always been faithful in helping other followers of the Lord, even the ones you didn't know before.
translation_verse: N zɔsuŋŋu, i tumni yɛdda tuma n‑suŋŋni ti Kirisita mabitaaba la, halli ni ba daa pa ya timbiisi gba.

english_verse: They have told the church about your love. They say you were good enough to welcome them and to send them on their mission in a way God's servants deserve.
translation_verse: Ba daa pun tɔ'asi i wurilim yɛla n‑wulisi n‑ti ti kpa wa mabiisi maa. Kur kpaŋŋma i maŋŋa n‑suŋŋi ba ba kyɛnni maa ni, hoo Naawunni ŋɔn boori seem.

english_verse: When they left to tell others about the Lord, they decided not to accept help from anyone who wasn't a follower.
translation_verse: Dama Yisa yuuri zugu ka ba yi soori, ka dizugu ba ku sakki ni ba deaai sɛseelli ninvugseeba ban bu dɔli Yisa maa saani.

english_verse: We must support people like them, so we can take part in what they are doing to spread the truth.
translation_verse: Di sumni ni ti deaai niriba wa taabu ti yiya ni, ka lala nin kyɛ ka ti zaa la'amni taaba n‑tumni yɛlimaŋni maa tuma.

english_verse: I wrote to the church. But Diotrephes likes to be the number-one leader, and he won't pay any attention to us.
translation_verse: Tɔ: n daa pun sɔbi gbaŋŋu n‑ti ya bɛni sa niriba ban la'amni n‑gyeemni Naawunni la, amaa Diyɔtirifiisi ŋɔn boori u su ba fukumsi maa ku sakki n‑deaai n noori.
